quotes.text: It is true however to say that the memories of the physically-oriented ego take their place with memories that were once subconscious. I am speaking now of the psychological makeup of the survival personality. The memories remain in physical existence. There is no real distinction between psychological reality and physical reality. The physically-oriented ego manufactures this distinction of necessity.
quotes.translation: 然而，可以说，以肉体为导向的自我记忆，与曾经是潜意识的记忆并存。我现在谈论的是生存人格的心理构成。记忆保留在肉体存在中。心理实相与肉体实相之间并无真正区别。以肉体为导向的自我出于必要制造了这种区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: If you have questions, I shall answer them but all of this is meant to show you that reality is more than you thought reality to be... I am not here as the host of a party. I am not here for your amusement or pleasure. I am here for your education and training.
quotes.translation: 若你们有疑问，我自会作答，但这一切旨在向你们揭示：实相远非你们所认知的那样……我并非以派对主人的身份而来，亦非为取悦或娱乐你们。我来此是为了教导与训练你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There is no particular and definite line between the ego and the personality and the inner self. They must merely be discussed in such terms. There is, believe it or not, no particular and specific and definite boundary between what is self and not self. If we isolate such portions of reality for the sake of discussion, such isolation is artificial, and in no way affects the nature of reality itself.
quotes.translation: 自我、人格与内在自体之间并无明确的分界线。我们只是不得不以这样的术语来讨论它们。信不信由你，自体与非自体之间同样没有明确、具体且固定的界限。若为讨论之便而将实相的某些部分孤立出来，这种孤立是人为的，绝不会影响实相本身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The symbols can come together or fly apart, can be perceived separately or as a unity. As each event has its own symbol for you, so you have your characteristic way of combining these. These symbols can be translated and perceived in many terms; as a series of notes for example, as a combination of senses, as a series of images. At various stages of consciousness you will perceive the symbols in different terms. The multidimensional symbol in its entirety, then, has a reality in other states of consciousness, but also at other levels of reality entirely.
quotes.translation: 象征符号可以聚合或离散，可被分别感知或视为整体。正如每个事件为你呈现其专属象征，你也有自己组合这些象征的独特方式。这些象征可通过多种形式被翻译和感知——例如作为一连串音符、感官的融合、或一系列意象。在不同意识阶段，你会以不同方式感知这些象征。因此，多维象征的整体性既存在于其他意识状态中，也完全存在于其他实相层面。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many individuals imagine the soul to be an immortalized ego, forgetting that the ego as you know it is only a small portion of the self; so this section of the personality is simply projected onward, ad infinitum, so to speak. Because the dimensions of your reality are so little understood, your concepts are bound to be limited. In considering "immortality," mankind seems to hope for further egotistical development, and yet he objects to the idea that such development might involve change. He says through his religions that he has a soul indeed, without even asking what a soul is, and often he seems to regard it, again, as an object in his possession.
quotes.translation: 许多人将灵魂想象为不朽的自我，却忘了你们所知的自我只是自体的一小部分；于是人格的这一部分被简单投射至无限延伸。由于你们对自身实相的维度知之甚少，概念必然受限。在思考"不朽"时，人类似乎渴望自我进一步的发展，却又反对这种发展可能带来的改变。他们通过宗教宣称自己确实拥有灵魂，却从不追问灵魂为何物，且常将其视为自己拥有的物件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Your sense perception, physically speaking, is a result of behavior on the part of organs that seem to you to have no reality outside of their relationship with you. Those organs are themselves composed of atoms and molecules with their own consciousnesses. They have, then, their own states of sensation and cognition. They work for you, allowing you to perceive physical reality.
quotes.translation: 请稍候……从物理层面而言，你们的感官知觉是器官运作的结果——这些器官看似脱离与你们的关系便无实相。这些器官本身由拥有自身意识的原子与分子构成。它们拥有各自的感知与认知状态。它们为你工作，使你得以感知物质实相。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Therefore they are accepted without question too often. They are not recognized as beliefs about reality, but are instead considered characteristics of reality itself. (Pause.) Frequently such ideas appear indisputable, so a part of you that it does not occur to you to speculate about their validity. They become invisible assumptions, but they nevertheless color and form your personal experience.
quotes.translation: 因此它们常被不加质疑地接受。人们不将其视为关于实相的信念，反而当作实相本身的特征。（停顿）这类观念往往看似无可辩驳，以至于你根本不会去思考其有效性。它们成为隐形的假设，却始终塑造并形成你的个人经验。

quotes.text: My form may be changed, but so do you change the form of your own thoughts. When you dream of a particular location, that location does then exist in fact. It has a definite reality, although it may not have a physical reality. Because you experience it, and you are partially physical, it does have some basis of reality in physical terms, even though it may not exist full-blown in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 我的形态可能改变，但你也改变自己思想的形态。当你梦见某个特定地点时，那个地点确实真实存在。它拥有明确的实相，尽管可能没有物质实相。因为你体验了它，而你是部分物质性的，所以它在物质层面确实具有某种实相基础，即使它可能未在物质层面充分展现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A large variety of dreams are the memories of this nonphysical existence that constantly occurs, though in waking life you are seldom aware of them. This cycle that psychologists have recently discovered, having to do with the various dream levels, corresponds to the ebb and tide of consciousness as it appears within and disappears from physical reality. It creates physical reality, as you know.
quotes.translation: 大量梦境都是这种持续发生的非物质存在的记忆，尽管在清醒生活中你很少意识到它们。心理学家最近发现的与各种梦境层次相关的周期，对应着意识在物质实相中出现和消失的潮起潮落。如你所知，正是这周期创造了物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 通过在不同存在层面的体验，内在自我和外在自我越来越接近。潜意识最终消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你目前的发展阶段，内在自我是整体自我中最具自我意识的部分，拥有最强的感知和组织能力。只有它能直接且即时地体验内在与基本实相。只有它能应对这种直接实相体验的汹涌本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Shortly we will begin to discuss the formation of a better kind of mass reality -- a reality that can happen as more and more individuals begin to come in contact with the true nature of the self. Then we will have less frightened people, and fewer fanatics, and each person involved can to some extent begin to see the "ideal" come into practical actualization. The means never justify the ends.
quotes.translation: 不久我们将开始讨论如何形成更好的群体实相——一种随着越来越多的人开始接触自性的真实本质而可能发生的实相。届时我们将拥有更少恐惧的人和更少的狂热者，每个相关者都能在一定程度上开始看到"理想"转化为实际实现。手段永远不能证明目的正当。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Reality changes its form in order to become known to itself. It constructs varieties of consciousness with varying kinds of sense apparatus, or perceiving apparatus. Each consciousness then perceives reality in a different fashion. Yet all fashions you see are legitimate, as far as physical sense apparatus is concerned. But the mental or psychic energy behind all this is the one basic reality.
quotes.translation: 实相改变其形态以便认识自身。它构建了具有不同感官装置或感知装置的各类意识。每种意识随后以不同方式感知实相。然而就物质感官装置而言，你所见的各种方式都是合理的。但这一切背后的心智或灵性能量才是唯一的基本实相。

quotes.text: It was easier for me to make certain realignments and adjustments of a necessary nature. The other point that I wanted to make was that while your physical time, or clock time, has no overall basic reality, and is not a primary reality, that runs through various fields or systems, it is nevertheless an electromagnetic reality within your own system, for you have created it on mental terms.
quotes.translation: 我更容易进行某些必要性质的重新调整和修正。我想指出的另一点是：虽然你们的物理时间或时钟时间没有整体基本实相，也不是贯穿各个领域或系统的主要实相，但在你们自己的系统内它确实是电磁实相，因为你们是在心智层面创造了它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: The experience of any given unit, constantly changing, affects all other units ... Give us time ... It is difficult to explain because your concepts of selfhood are so limited ... These units contain within themselves, in your terms, all "latent" identities, but not in a predetermined fashion. Selves may be quite independent within the framework of their own reality, while still being a part of a larger reality in which their independence works not only for their own benefit, but for the sake of a greater structure.
quotes.translation: 任何特定单元的经验都在不断变化，并影响所有其他单元……请给我们时间……这很难解释，因为你们对自我本质的概念如此有限……这些单元在你们看来，自身包含所有"潜在"的身份，但并非以预定方式。自我在其自身实相框架内可能相当独立，同时仍是更大实相的一部分——在这个更大实相中，它们的独立不仅为自身利益服务，也为更宏大结构的目的而运作。

quotes.text: I am speaking of that framework now only as it applies to your world -- not in its relationship to other realities. Earlier in his own experience Ruburt described that framework (in Psychic Politics) as the heroic dimension. He saw quite correctly that there was a great give-and-take between the two frameworks -- your regular working one, Framework 1, and this other more comprehensive reality. He did not thoroughly understand, however, the creative ramifications involved, for it did not occur to him at the time that the prime work of your world was actually done by you in that other wider aspect of your existence.
quotes.translation: 我现在谈论的这个框架仅适用于你们的世界——不涉及它与其他实相的关系。鲁柏早先在自己的经验中（在《心灵政治》里）将这个框架描述为"英雄维度"。他相当正确地看到两个框架之间存在巨大的互动——你们常规运作的框架一，以及这个更全面的实相。然而，他并未完全理解其中涉及的创造性衍生，因为当时他未曾想到，你们世界的主要工作实际上是由你们在存在的那个更广阔面向中完成的。

quotes.text: Now it is nearly impossible to separate a discussion of the nature of the soul from a discussion of the nature of perception. Very briefly let us review a few points: You form physical matter and the physical world that you know. The physical senses actually can be said to create the physical world, in that they force you to perceive an available field of energy in physical terms, and impose a highly specialized pattern upon this field of reality. Using the physical senses, you can perceive reality in no other way.
quotes.translation: 现在几乎不可能将灵魂本质的讨论与感知本质的讨论分开。让我们简要回顾几点：你们形成物质实相和你们所知的物质世界。实际上可以说，物质感官创造了物质世界，因为它们迫使你们以物质术语感知可用的能量场，并将高度专门化的模式强加于这个实相场。使用物质感官，你们无法以其他方式感知实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: According to your intent, your desire, and your beliefs, your ideas intersect with the reality that you know, with physical space and physical time -- they become real, in historic terms. In other realities there are different historical terms. A war won here, with a treaty, is not won somewhere else, and there is a different treaty. Even wars seemingly won here are not nearly as clear-cut as would appear; you make history as you go along. You use, in your terms now only, the past as source material. You rewrite it as you go along. As records are lost, you do not even realize that you have rewritten the past.
quotes.translation: 根据你们的意图、欲望和信念，你们的思想与所知的实相、物质空间和物质时间相交——它们在历史意义上变得真实。在其他实相中有不同的历史术语。这里通过条约赢得的战争，在别处并未获胜，且存在不同的条约。即使看似在这里赢得的战争，也远不如表面那样明确；你们在行进中创造历史。你们（仅以你们现在的说法）将过去用作素材。你们在行进中重写它。随着记录丢失，你们甚至没有意识到自己已经重写了过去。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Coming together, the units actually form the systems of reality in which they have their experience. In your system, for example, they are within the phenomenal world. They will always come under the guise of any particular pattern of reality, then. In your terms they can move forward or backward in time, but they also possess another kind of interior mobility within time as you know it.
quotes.translation: 这些单元聚集在一起，实际上形成了它们在其中获得经验的实相系统。例如，在你们的系统中，它们存在于现象世界内。因此，它们总是以任何特定实相模式的面貌出现。以你们的说法，它们可以在时间中向前或向后移动，但它们在你们所知的时间内部还拥有另一种内在流动性。

quotes.text: You may ask how real are those other existences, but if so you must ask in whose terms. Existence has a physical version. In that framework you are born and die, and in a definite sequence. Death is a physical reality. It is real, however, only in physical terms. If you accept those terms as the only criterion of reality then surely it appears that death is an end to your consciousness.
quotes.translation: 你可能会问那些其他存在有多真实，但若如此，你必须问以谁的术语为准。存在具有物质版本。在那个框架中，你们出生和死亡，且遵循确定的顺序。死亡是物质实相。然而，它仅在物质术语中才是真实的。如果你接受这些术语作为实相的唯一标准，那么死亡确实显得是你意识的终结。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Anything that you can see and feel and touch exists within your own reality, yes, and within it, it is legitimate and valid. It is also highly distorted, for your physical senses are lovely liars that betray you constantly. They form reality for you, and yet the reality that they form is highly distorted; and what you see, dear friends, does not exist and you do not see what does exist.
quotes.translation: 任何你能看见、感受和触摸到的事物，都存在于你自己的实相中，是的，在其中它们是合理且有效的。但它们也被高度扭曲了，因为你的肉体感官是可爱的说谎者，不断地背叛你。它们为你构建了实相，然而它们所构建的实相是高度扭曲的；而你所看见的，亲爱的朋友们，并不存在，而你没有看见真正存在的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (Loudly:) Generally speaking (underlined), most of you live in your own world, with others of your kind. Those of you who do not believe in war have not experienced it. It may have surrounded you, but you did not experience it. Those of you who do not believe in greed have not suffered its "consequences." If you still see it, it is because it is a part of your reality. If you are honestly not greedy, yet you see greed, then perhaps you are serving as an example to others -- but you form your own reality.
quotes.translation: （大声地：）一般来说（划线强调），你们大多数人生活在自己的世界里，与同类为伴。那些不相信战争的人并没有经历过战争。战争可能包围着你，但你并未体验它。那些不相信贪婪的人并未承受其“后果”。如果你仍然看到它，那是因为它是你实相的一部分。如果你真诚地不贪婪，却仍看到贪婪，那么也许你是在为他人树立榜样——但你创造了自己的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now there is some relationship, at least in terms of our discussion, between the reality of the dolphins and the reality of the fetus. In your terms the fetus lives in primeval conditions, reminiscent of periods in the species' past. It relates in its own way to its environment. Now for some consciousnesses this is sufficient. In your terms, again, for each of you, it was sufficient.
quotes.translation: 现在，至少在我们讨论的范围内，海豚的实相与胎儿的实相之间存在某种关联。用你们的话说，胎儿生活在原始状态中，令人想起物种过去的时期。它以自己独特的方式与环境互动。对某些意识体而言，这已经足够。同样，用你们的话说，对你们每个人而言，这也曾足够。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. quotes.text: Again: Your reality is like a shining platform, a surface resting upon probabilities. You follow these so unconsciously and beautifully, you swim through them so easily, that it does not occur to you to question your origin, or the medium in which your experience has its existence. All of those sharing any given birthdate, however, sharing even place as well as time, do not have the same "destiny"; but more, they do not share the same conditions necessarily. They are each affected by their own probability system at birth, and those conditions drastically alter the nature of their development.
quotes.translation: 再次强调：你的实相就像一个闪亮的平台，一个栖息在可能性之上的表面。你如此无意识而优美地遵循着它们，如此轻松地穿梭其中，以至于你从未想过质疑自己的起源，或质疑你经验赖以存在的媒介。然而，所有共享任何给定出生日期的人，即使共享地点与时间，也未必拥有相同的“命运”；不仅如此，他们未必共享相同的条件。每个人在出生时都受到自身可能性系统的影响，而这些条件极大地改变了他们发展的本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: History, as you think of it, represents but one thin line of probabilities, in which you are presently immersed. It does not represent the entire lifetime of your species or the catalogue of physical activities, or begin to tell the story of physical creatures, their civilizations, wars, joys, technologies, or triumphs. Reality is far more diverse, far richer and unutterable than you can presently suppose or comprehend. Evolution, as you think of it and as it is categorized by your scientists, represents but one probable line of evolution, the one in which, again, you are presently immersed.
quotes.translation: 历史，如你所想，只代表一条细薄的可能性线索，你目前正沉浸其中。它并不代表你物种的整个生命周期，也不代表肉体活动的全部目录，更无法开始讲述肉体生物、他们的文明、战争、喜悦、科技或胜利的故事。实相比你目前所能假设或理解的远为多样、远为丰富且难以言喻。进化，如你所想及科学家所分类的那样，只代表一条可能的进化线索，同样，你目前正沉浸其中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It will manipulate those memories in its own way, and alter them, and add to the pool of energy from which it has emerged. It is quite familiar with me, now, through your experience. At this moment, in your terms, its view of reality is more pure than your own. It is aware of you both as psychic entities, and retains strong and unclouded perceptions of your past relationship. These connections must pass from its memory as it matures. The memories can be retained, but the primary focus of activity and the intensity must deal with this personality, and with this existence as you think of it.
quotes.translation: 它将以其自身方式处理那些记忆，改变它们，并增添到它从中涌现的能量池中。现在，通过你的经验，它对我已相当熟悉。在你们的时间概念中，它对实相的看法比你们自己的更为纯粹。它意识到你们俩都是灵性实体，并保留着对你们过去关系的强烈而清晰的感知。随着它的成熟，这些联系必须从它的记忆中淡出。记忆可以保留，但活动的主要焦点和强度必须处理这个人格，以及你们所认为的这个存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner senses alone are equipped and able to process and perceive other reality systems. Even the distortions can be kept at a minimum with training. Indiscriminate use of the psychedelic drugs can severely shake up learned patterns of response, that are necessary for effective manipulation within physical reality, break subtle connections and disturb electromagnetic functions.
quotes.translation: 唯有内在感官具备处理与感知其他实相系统的能力。即使经过训练，扭曲现象仍可降至最低。不加选择地使用迷幻药物会严重动摇那些在物质实相中有效运作所必需的学习反应模式，破坏精微连接并干扰电磁功能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In larger terms, the word reality and those characteristics that I will give you as attributed to it, will be seen as part and parcel of a unified psychic consciousness, from which all other consciousness emerges. These emerging consciousness form new moment points, create new value fulfillment experiences that constantly allow the overall reality to be created even as it creates.
quotes.translation: 从更宏大的角度来看，"实相"一词及其我将赋予它的特性，将被视为统一心灵意识不可分割的组成部分，所有其他意识皆由此而生。这些涌现的意识形成新的"瞬间点"，创造新的"价值完成"体验，使得整体实相得以在创造自身的同时不断被创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Even within the experience of men there are realities that are entirely different from the realities of physical objects. Psychological experience is one such indisputable reality. Ideas are another, and dreams are still another. Secondary effects of such realities may appear in material form, but the original reality of such experiences cannot be captured within physical matter.
quotes.translation: 即使在人类的经验中，也存在与物质客体实相完全不同的实相。心理经验便是这样一种无可争议的实相。思想是另一种，而梦境又是另一种。这类实相的次要效应可能以物质形式显现，但其原始实相却无法被物质所捕捉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Other kinds of consciousness coexist within the same "space" that your world inhabits. They do not perceive your physical objects, for their reality is composed of a different camouflage structure. You do not perceive them, and generally speaking they do not perceive you. This is a general statement, however, for various points of your realities can and do coincide, so to speak.
quotes.translation: 其他种类的意识与你们的世界共存于同一"空间"。它们感知不到你们的物质客体，因为它们的实相由不同的伪装结构构成。你们也感知不到它们，一般而言它们也感知不到你们。然而这只是一个概括性陈述，因为你们实相的各个交汇点确实能够且确实会重合。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are systems in which a moment,5 from your standpoint, is made to endure for the life of a universe. I do not mean that a moment is simply stretched, or that time is slowed down alone, but that all the experiences possible within a moment become realities within that framework. Such systems have little to do with you in any practical manner, nor is such information given to dwarf your idea of what your own consciousness is. It is important, however, that you realize the fact that there is more creativity and variety in an inner reality than you ever physically perceive.
quotes.translation: 存在某些系统，其中从你们的角度来看的一个"瞬间"，被延长至一个宇宙的寿命。我并非指瞬间被简单拉伸，或时间被单独减慢，而是指一个瞬间内所有可能的体验都在该框架内成为实相。这类系统与你们在实用层面关联甚微，提供此类信息也并非为了贬低你们对自身意识的认知。但重要的是，你们必须认识到内在实相中存在着远超物质感知的创造力与多样性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This in many instances will be distasteful to many, but all physical constructions are transformations of energy made manifest as idea, and then constructed into physical reality. Without the idea you have no physical reality, and without belief that our aims are possible, there will be no achievement. The achievement gained, however, will then provide its own physical proofs.
quotes.translation: 这在许多情况下会令许多人反感，但所有物质构造都是能量的转化——先显化为思想，再构建为物质实相。没有思想就没有物质实相，若不相信我们的目标可能实现，便不会有成就。然而，当成就达成时，它自会提供其物质证明。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Later you may not recall it, but you have a more direct connection with reality in the dream state, and the intensity of the dream experience is more completely perceived. I am speaking now in terms of basic reality. It is less camouflaged in the dream state. For this reason, in any projections you may be startled, for here you also enter a less strictly camouflaged situation.
quotes.translation: 日后你或许不记得，但在梦境状态中你与实相有更直接的联系，且梦体验的强度能被更完整地感知。我现在是从基本实相的角度来说。它在梦境状态中伪装较少。正因如此，在任何投射中你可能会感到惊愕，因为你在此也进入了一个伪装较不严格的情境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: As a physical being, your beliefs and concepts form your reality. The psyche from which your identity springs is free of the picture of reality that you have chosen. Period. You choose, in other words, to accept a given picture of the world, and you use that picture as a frame within which you form a life.
quotes.translation: 作为物质存在，你的信念与概念构成了你的实相。你身份所源出的心灵，不受你所选择的实相画面所束缚。句号。换言之，你选择接受某个特定的世界画面，并用那画面作为框架，在其中塑造人生。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. quotes.text: This characteristic of materializing thoughts and emotions into physical realities is an attribute of the soul. Now in your reality, these thoughts are made physical. In other realities, they may be "constructed" in an entirely different fashion. So your soul, that which you are, constructs your physical daily reality for you from the nature of your thoughts and expectations.
quotes.translation: 这种将思想与情感物质化为物质实相的特性，是灵魂的一种属性。在你们的实相中，这些思想被化为物质。在其他实相中，它们可能以完全不同的方式被"建构"。因此，你的灵魂——即你所是——根据你思想与期望的本质，为你构建了物质性的日常实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now the inner ego is the organizer of experience that Jung would call unconscious. The inner ego is another term for what we call the inner self. As the outer ego manipulates within the environment and physical reality, so the inner ego or self organizes and manipulates within an inner reality. The inner ego creates that physical reality with which the outer ego then deals.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是荣格会称之为无意识的体验组织者。内在自我是我们所谓内在自己的另一个术语。如同外在自我在环境与物质实相中运作，内在自我或内在自己则在内在实相中组织与运作。内在自我创造了那个外在自我随后与之打交道的物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The dramas themselves do express certain inner realities, and they serve as surface reminders to those who do not trust direct experience with the inner self. They will take the symbols as reality. When they discover that this is not so, they feel betrayed. Christ spoke in terms of the father and son because in your terms, at that time, this was the method used -- the story he told to explain the relationship between the inner self and the physically-alive individual. No new religion really startles anyone, for the drama has already been played subjectively.
quotes.translation: 这些戏剧本身确实表达了某些内在实相，它们作为表面提醒，给那些不信任与内在自己直接体验的人。他们会将象征视为实相。当他们发现并非如此时，便感到被背叛。基督以父与子的说法来讲述，因为在你们当时的说法中，这是所用的方法——他用以解释内在自己与物质活着的个体之间关系的故事。没有新宗教真正惊动任何人，因为那戏剧早已在主观层面被演出。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What your scientists have learned about the physical genes barely scratches the reality of diversity, even physically. The miraculous and pristine originality of every moment, even as you know it, can hardly be vocalized. The diversity of atomic structure is as yet hardly suspected. And all of this is but the physical materiaizationl of the inner reality within one system.
quotes.translation: 你们的科学家对物质基因的了解，几乎连实相的多样性——即使是物质层面的多样性——都未能触及。每一刻那奇迹般且原初的独创性，即使如你们所知，也难以言表。原子结构的多样性至今仍几乎未被察觉。而这一切，不过是一个系统内内在实相的物质化呈现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In this reality, [each of] you very nicely emphasize all the similarities which bind you together; you make a pattern of them, and you very nicely ignore all the dissimilarities ... If you were able to focus your attention on the dissimilarities, merely those that you can perceive but do not, then you would be amazed that mankind can form any idea of an organized reality.
quotes.translation: 在这个实相中，你们每个人都非常巧妙地强调所有将你们联结在一起的相似性；你们将它们编织成一种模式，并非常巧妙地忽略所有差异……如果你们能够将注意力集中在那些差异上，仅仅是那些你们能够感知却不去感知的差异，那么你们会惊讶于人类竟然能形成任何关于有组织实相的概念。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, the personality as it is manifested can never be understood if it is taken alone. There are sufficient hints and signs that do appear, to give evidence of these other portions of the self. Now there is one important point in particular in all this that should be emphasized, and I will repeat it: Certain portions of the self do not manifest themselves directly within physical reality. They do not operate directly within physical reality, and the word directly is significant.
quotes.translation: 然而，如果单独看待人格的显现，就永远无法理解它。有足够的暗示和迹象出现，以证明自我的这些其他部分的存在。现在，在所有这一切中，有一个特别重要的点需要强调，我将重复它：自我的某些部分并不直接在物质实相中显现。它们并不直接在物质实相中运作，而"直接"这个词意义重大。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I have my own existence, that is quite different from Ruburt's, and yet I also have a reality that is connected to his psyche.6 Each of you also have the same kind of connection with other "more knowledgeable" portions of yourself, or your greater identity, that are independently themselves and yet also alive in your psyches. They are portions of the "unknown" reality.
quotes.translation: 我有自己的存在，这与鲁柏的存在截然不同，然而我也有一个与他的心灵相连的实相。你们每个人也与自己的其他"更有知识"的部分，或你们更大的身份，有着同样的联系，这些部分独立存在，同时又活跃在你们的心灵中。它们是"未知"实相的一部分。
