source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: When you become too serious you overwork your intellect and tire your body, for then it seems that your entire life depends upon the reasoning of your intellect alone. Instead, of course, your intellectual abilities are supported and promoted by that inner mixture of spontaneity and order that so magically combine to form both your reality and the reality of the world.
quotes.translation: 当你变得过于严肃时，你会过度使用你的智力并让身体疲惫，因为那时似乎你的整个生命仅依赖于你智力的推理。当然，实际上，你的智力能力是由那种内在的自发性与秩序的混合所支持和促进的，这种混合如此神奇地结合，形成了你的实相和世界的实相。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Your question about transmigration (in Session 903 in Dreams) was an excellent one, and did indeed make the matter clear. It is a temptation at times to use more specific scientific terms, but these would be as confusing as the various definitions and classifications (with humor) that you read in the dictionary, so overall we try to hit a "happy medium." (With more humor.)

quotes.text: It is one thing to recognize that your particular camouflage patterns are part of reality and another to realize that there is a reality that is independent of your camouflage patterns. One of my purposes is to enable you not only to recognize but experience this independent reality, and again the use of psychological time in a correct manner will be an invaluable aid.
quotes.translation: 认识到你特定的伪装模式是实相的一部分是一回事，而意识到存在一个独立于你伪装模式的实相则是另一回事。我的目的之一不仅是让你们认识到，而且体验到这个独立的实相，再次强调，以正确方式使用心理时间将是无价的帮助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is the result of your own misinterpretations of the nature of reality. There is no one place therefore, no specific location. These environments exist unperceived by you amid the physical world that you know. Your perceptive mechanisms simply do not allow you to tune in to their ranges. You react to a highly specific but limited field. As I mentioned earlier, other realities coexist with your own at death, for example. You simply divest yourself of physical paraphernalia, tune into different fields, and react to other sets of assumptions.
quotes.translation: 这是你们自己对实相本质的误解的结果。因此，没有一个地方，没有特定的位置。这些环境在你所知的物质世界中未被你察觉地存在着。你的感知机制根本不让你调谐到它们的范围。你反应的是一个高度特定但有限的领域。正如我之前提到的，其他实相与你的实相共存，例如在死亡时。你只是脱去物质装备，调谐到不同的领域，并对其他假设集合作出反应。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The package of experience that you can focus upon and make sense of, is indeed composed of many small packages, but the whole package of reality is actually much larger than this. There is however a portion of the self that can and does experience events in an entirely different fashion, and this portion of the self goes off on a different tangent. For when our individual perceives event X, this other portion of the self branches off, so to speak, into all the other probable events that could have been just as easily experienced by the ego.
quotes.translation: 你能聚焦并理解的经验包，确实由许多小包组成，但实相的整体包其实比这大得多。然而，自我有一部分能够且确实以完全不同的方式体验事件，这部分自我会沿着不同的切线偏离。因为当我们的个体感知到事件X时，自我的这一部分会分叉，可以说，进入所有其他可能的事件，这些事件本可以同样轻易地被自我体验到。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You form the fabric of your experience through your own beliefs and expectations. These personal ideas about yourself and the nature of reality will affect your thoughts and emotions. You take your beliefs about reality as truth, and often do not question them. They seem self-explanatory. They appear in your mind as statements of fact, far too obvious for examination.
quotes.translation: 你通过自己的信念和期望形成你的经验结构。这些关于你自己和实相本质的个人观念会影响你的思想和情感。你把关于实相的信念当作真理，常常不去质疑它们。它们似乎不言自明。它们以事实陈述的形式出现在你的脑海中，显而易见，无需审视。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: These multiple existences, however, are simultaneous and open-ended. In your terms the conscious mind is growing toward a realization of the part it has to play in such multidimensional reality. It is enough that you understand your part in this existence. When you fully comprehend that you form what you think of as your current reality, all else will fall into place.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些多重存在是同时且开放的。用你们的说法，意识心正在逐渐认识到它在多维实相中必须扮演的角色。你只需理解你在此次存在中的角色。当你完全理解你形成了你所谓的当前实相时，其他一切都会各就各位。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is no separate field that combines all of that information, or applies the facts of one discipline to the facts of another discipline, so overall, science, with its brand of rational thought, can offer no even, suggestive, hypothetical, comprehensive ideas of what reality is. It seems that each individual is in effect isolated in certain vital regards -- given, say, a genetic heritage and a certain amount of unspecified energy with which to run the body's machinery (intently). Intent, purpose, or desire do not apply in that picture.
quotes.translation: 没有一个独立的领域能整合所有这些信息，或将一门学科的事实应用于另一门学科的事实，因此，总体而言，科学及其理性思维的品牌，无法提供任何关于实相是什么的、哪怕是暗示性的、假设性的、全面的概念。似乎每个个体在某些关键方面实际上都是孤立的——比如说，被赋予了一份遗传遗产和一定量的未指定能量来运行身体的机器（专注地）。意图、目的或欲望在那幅图景中并不适用。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. From my dream notebook: (See my painting at end of Session 4.)

quotes.text: But beyond this life, and before this life, and forming this life, there are identities and there are realities and these are not dead. Identity as experience is intimate. It is a psychic reality but it exists electromagnetically. Identity, the self that you are, is made up of the selves that you were and, my dear friends, the selves that you shall be. The selves that you were still exist. The selves that you shall be already exist. The lives that you have lived, in your terms, are still being lived. There is no past, present or future.
quotes.translation: 但在此生之外，在此生之前，并形成此生的，是身份和实相，而这些并非死寂的。作为经验的身份是亲密的。它是一种心灵实相，但以电磁方式存在。身份，即你所是的自己，由你曾是的自己和我亲爱的朋友们，以及你将是的自己所组成。你曾是的自己仍然存在。你将是的自己已经存在。你活过的生命，用你们的说法，仍在被活出。没有过去、现在或未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The body obviously must react in your official present; hence the brain neatly keeps its physical time sequences with spaced neural responses. The entire package of physical reality is dependent upon the senses' data being timed -- synchronized -- giving the body an opportunity for precise action. In dreams the senses are not so restrained. Events from past, present, and future can be safely experienced, as can events that would be termed probable from your usual viewpoint, since the body, again, is not required to act upon them.
quotes.translation: 身体显然必须在你们的官方现在中做出反应；因此大脑巧妙地通过间隔的神经反应来保持其物理时间序列。整个物理实相包依赖于感官数据的定时——同步——给身体一个精确行动的机会。在梦中，感官不受如此限制。来自过去、现在和未来的事件可以安全地体验，就像从你们通常视角看来会被视为可能的事件一样，因为同样地，身体不需要对它们采取行动。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: There are, then, no devils waiting to carry anyone off, unless you create them yourself, in which case the power resides in you and not in the mock devils. The Crucifixion and attendant drama made sense within your reality at the time. It arose into the world of physical actuality out of the inner reality from which your deepest intuitions and insights also spring.
quotes.translation: 因此，并没有魔鬼在等着把任何人带走，除非你自己创造了它们——在这种情况下，力量存在于你之内，而非那些虚假的魔鬼之中。耶稣受难及其伴随的戏剧性事件，在当时你们的实相中具有意义。它从内在实相中浮现到物质世界的实际性里，而你们最深的直觉与洞见也同样源自那内在实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In those frameworks you have made certain classifications that now appear quite obvious. Common sense upholds them, and it seems impossible to consider reality otherwise. Yet by their nature such categories structure your experience of reality itself to such an extent that any alternate ways of perceiving life seem not only untrustworthy, but completely impossible.
quotes.translation: 在那些架构中，你们做出了某些分类，如今这些分类显得显而易见。常识支持它们，以至于似乎不可能以其他方式看待实相。然而，就其本质而言，这类范畴将你们对实相本身的体验结构化到了如此程度，以至于任何其他感知生命的方式不仅显得不可信赖，而且完全不可能。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Episodes will therefore be related one to another by entirely different methods, and the methods will be intuitional and highly selective and psychological. You will find your own way through complicated mazes of reality according to your own intuitional nature. You will find what you expect to find. You will seek out what you want from the available reality data.
quotes.translation: 因此，事件将以完全不同的方法相互关联，这些方法将是直觉性的、高度选择性的，并且是心理性的。你将根据自己的直觉本性，在实相错综复杂的迷宫中找到自己的道路。你将找到你预期找到的东西。你将根据可得的实相数据，寻找你想要的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: He ignored what seemed to be a fact of reality, built his own constructive expectatations, and made them the reality. He expectats good things, and receives them. Now he also gives. At his own level he gives in his relationship with his students, and primarily his turn toward counseling is directed by a desire to help others. There is no one to whom he wishes ill.
quotes.translation: 他忽略了看似是实相的事实，建立了自己建设性的期望，并使之成为实相。他期待美好的事物，并接收它们。现在他也给予。在他自己的层次上，他在与学生的关系中给予，而他转向咨询的主要动机是帮助他人的愿望。他没有对任何人怀有恶意。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I am far more however than this portion of me that you contact, for it is only one portion of me that experienced that reality. (Pause.) It is highly important that the material not be distorted then, for most communications take place on far different levels than this, so closely connected with your own system that even the most undistorted material is highly distorted, because the communicators themselves are so closely involved with camouflages, and do not realize that they create the realities which they then describe.
quotes.translation: 然而，我远不止你所接触到的这一部分，因为那只是体验了那个实相的我的一部分。（停顿）因此，确保资料不被扭曲极为重要，因为大多数沟通发生在远不同于此的层次上，这些层次与你们自己的系统紧密相连，以至于即使是最未扭曲的资料也高度扭曲，因为沟通者本身与伪装如此紧密地纠缠，以至于他们并未意识到他们创造了他们随后所描述的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Imagine vividly what you will do tomorrow, and in detail plan a probable day that will rise naturally from your present experience, behavior, and purposes. Follow through as you did with the first part of the exercise. (Pause.) That day's reality is already anticipated by your cells. Your body has prepared for it, all of its functions precognitively projecting their own existences into it. Your "future" life exists in the same manner, and in your terms grows as much out of your present as tomorrow grows out of your today.
quotes.translation: 生动地想象你明天将做什么，并详细计划一个可能的日子，它将自然地从你当下的经验、行为和目的中升起。像你在练习的第一部分所做的那样，贯彻到底。（停顿）那一天的实相已被你的细胞预期。你的身体已为此做好准备，它所有的功能都以预知的方式将自身的存在投射到那一天中。你的"未来"生命以同样的方式存在，并且，用你们的话来说，它从你的当下生长出来，正如明天从你的今天生长出来一样。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Within the mind the dream has an electrical reality. Within the brain the dream has an electric and psychological reality; a much weaker electrical reality. That is, it still exists as an electrical reality, but it is not recognized as such by the brain or the psychological awareness of an individual. To the individual the dream has only a psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 在心灵中，梦具有电性实相。在大脑中，梦具有电性与心理实相；其电性实相弱得多。也就是说，它仍以电性实相存在，但大脑或个体的心理意识并不如此认知它。对个体而言，梦只具有心理实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I told you at one time that my form was somehow a man's form. I use the form rarely. The electric reality of it, coded in a particular range of intensities, is now in my possession, in what you may call capsule form, though this is not a good analogy. But an explanation will have to wait until you understand more clearly the nature of electrical reality itself.
quotes.translation: 我曾告诉过你，我的形态在某种程度上是人的形态。我很少使用这个形态。它的电性实相，以特定强度范围编码，现在以你所谓的胶囊形式为我所拥有——尽管这个比喻并不恰当。但解释必须等到你更清楚地理解电性实相本身的本质时才能进行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Again, all of these code systems5 are interrelated. In the same way, the private psyche contains within it hints and glimpses of other alternate realities. These operate as secondary codes, so to speak, beneath the existence that you officially recognize. Such secondary systems can tell you much about the potentials of human reality, those that are latent but can at any time be "raised" to primary importance. Such secondary systems also point toward the probable developments possible for individuals or species.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，所有这些编码系统都是相互关联的。同样地，私人心灵内部也包含着对其他交替实相的暗示与一瞥。这些可说是作为次要编码运作，存在于你正式认可的存在之下。这类次要系统能告诉你许多关于人类实相的潜能——那些潜伏着但随时可能被"提升"为首要重要性的潜能。这类次要系统也指向个体或物种可能发展的可能性。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 708
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: For, because you perceive reality in a limited fashion only, this in no way affects the basic nature of reality itself. The ego attempts to stand apart from action, to view action as the result of ego. However, again, the ego's attempt to stand apart from action in no way changes the basic nature of action itself, and the ego merely limits its own perception.
quotes.translation: 因为，你仅以有限方式感知实相，这丝毫不会影响实相本身的基本本质。自我试图与行动分离，将行动视为自我的结果。然而，再次强调，自我试图与行动分离的企图丝毫不会改变行动本身的基本本质，自我只是限制了自己的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Within your reality there are procedures with which you must deal. There are many occasions when a glimpse into your own future will be of benefit, and then you shall have them. (Pause.) Questions as to the nature of reality and of existence--these will serve you better, and I believe that you know this already. You are learning very quickly, for that matter.
quotes.translation: 在你的实相中，有些程序是你必须处理的。有许多时候，瞥见你自己的未来将是有益的，那时你便会拥有这些瞥见。（停顿）关于实相与存在的本质的问题——这些将对你更有帮助，我相信你已知晓这一点。就此而言，你学习得非常快。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: "Words aren't describing this at all. Each person who passes the car is more than three-dimensional, super-real in this time, but part of a 'model' of a greater self ... and each person's reality is obviously and clearly more than three-dimensional. I know I'm repeating myself here, but it's as if before I've seen only a part of people or things. The world is so much more solid right now4 that by contrast my earlier experience of it is like a shoddy version, made up of disconnected dots or blurred focus...."
quotes.translation: "言语根本无法描述这个。每个经过车子的人都是三维以上的，在此刻是超真实的，但却是更大自体的一个'模型'的一部分……每个人的实相都明显且清晰地超越三维。我知道我在重复自己，但仿佛之前我只看到人或事物的一部分。此刻世界如此坚实，相比之下，我早先对它的体验就像个粗制滥造的版本，由不连贯的点或模糊的焦点组成……"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 715
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: If the books are children symbolically, then in those same terms his representation of my reality is a far more living, three-dimensional aspect. He has at various times wondered about schizophrenia, for example. He does not realize that on this level, now, and regardless of my independence and other issues involved, that he creates the personalities free of time, organizes them under the leadership of the conscious mind, and assigns them tasks of great validity and importance, which are then carried out.
quotes.translation: 若书籍是象征性的孩子，那么用同样的说法，他对我实相的描述便是一个远更鲜活、立体的面向。例如，他曾在不同时期思考过精神分裂症的问题。他并未意识到，在此层面上——无论我的独立性及其他相关议题如何——他创造了不受时间束缚的人格，将其置于意识心智的领导下，并指派它们执行极具效力与重要性的任务，而这些任务随后得以完成。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is less differentiation, in your terms, in no time, but far more differentiation in terms of consciousness, and psychological experience. All probabilities have their reality in no time, and the creative accomplishments that take place within no time generate all the probable realities that will ever exist or have existed within the various time systems. In various dream states you do delve into no time, and it is of course here that you have your primary existence and the ground of your identity.
quotes.translation: 以你们的说法，在无时间中差异较少，但在意识与心理体验方面差异却大得多。所有可能性都在无时间中拥有其实相，而在无时间内发生的创造性成就，生成了所有曾在或将在不同时间系统中存在的可能性实相。在各种梦境状态中，你们确实深入了无时间，而这里正是你们拥有主要存在与身份根基之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These three dilemmas represent three areas of reality within which inner reality, or inner vitality, can experience itself. And here we have also the reason, or one of the reasons why, inner vitality can never achieve complete materialization. The very action involved in vitality's attempt to materialize itself adds to the inner dimension of inner vitality.
quotes.translation: 这三重困境代表了内在实相或内在活力得以体验自身的三个实相领域。此处我们也找到了内在活力永远无法完全物质化的原因之一。活力试图物质化自身所涉及的行动本身，反而增添了内在活力的内在维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you have a limited conception of the nature of reality, then your ego will do its best to keep you in the small enclosed area of your accepted reality. If, on the other hand, your intuitions and creative instincts are allowed freedom, then they communicate some knowledge of greater dimensions to this most physically oriented portion of your personality.
quotes.translation: 若你对实相的本质持有狭隘的概念，那么你的自我便会尽力将你困于所接受的实相之狭小封闭区域。反之，若你的直觉与创造本能被允许自由，它们便会将更广大维度的某些知识传达给你人格中最具物质导向的部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Unimaginable differences would be present if those posies could see the same environment of the year before, and all of the minute variations that you ignore would be gigantic; different enough indeed so that at their level the flowers might think that a different kind of reality was involved. So there are variations, and highly significant probabilities, operating even between those born generally in the same month of the same year -- not only in terms of exterior conditions, but of inward ones.
quotes.translation: 若那些花朵能看见前一年同样的环境，而你忽略的所有细微变化将显得巨大无比——差异之大足以让花朵在其层面认为涉及了不同种类的实相。因此，即便在同一年同一月出生的人之间，也存在着变化与高度显著的可能性——不仅关乎外在条件，也关乎内在状态。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: From the "chaotic" bed of your dreams springs your ordered daily organized action. In your reality, the behavior of your consciousness and of your molecules are highly connected. Your type of consciousness presupposes a molecular consciousness, and your kind of consciousness is inherent in molecular consciousness -- inherent within your system, but not basically predictable. Predictability is simply another word for significance. Unpredictability, looking at itself in a variety of different fashions, finds certain portions of itself significant, and forms certain orders, or ordered sequences, about itself. In one of our very early sessions, I told you that you perceive from a vast field only certain data that you find meaningful. That data could only arise from the bed of unpredictability. Only unpredictability can provide the greatest source of probable orders.
quotes.translation: 从你梦境那"混沌"的温床中，生出了你井然有序的日常行动。在你的实相中，你意识的运作与分子的运作高度关联。你的意识类型预设了分子意识的存在，而你的意识类型内在于分子意识之中——内在于你的系统，但基本上不可预测。可预测性不过是意义的另一个代名词。不可预测性以各种不同方式审视自身，发现自身的某些部分具有意义，并围绕自身形成某种秩序或有序序列。在我们早期的一次课中，我告诉过你，你从广袤的场域中只感知到那些你认为有意义的数据。那些数据只能从不可预测性的温床中涌现。唯有不可预测性才能提供可能性秩序的最大源泉。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: They certainly have a reality in energy, and they aid in the conversion of energy into physical terms. They are active rather than passive, then. You see about you physical forces and think nothing of them. For example: You feel the wind and its effects, but you cannot see it. The wind itself is invisible. So these other forces are also invisible. In basic terms they are no more good or evil than the wind is. I say this because you usually imagine that if something is good, there must be a countering force that is evil. Such is not the case. In greater terms these forces are good. They are protective. They nourish every living thing. They have been the impetus for what you think of as evolution. They are biological in that they are to some extent composed of mass cellular knowledge -- basically free of time, but directing physical activity in time, and thereby maintaining physical equilibrium.
quotes.translation: 它们确实具有能量实相，并协助将能量转化为物质形式。它们是主动而非被动的。你看到周围的物质力量却不以为意。例如：你能感受到风及其影响，却看不见它。风本身是不可见的。这些其他力量同样不可见。从根本上说，它们并不比风更善或更恶。我这样说是因为你通常认为若某物为善，必存在与之抗衡的恶力。事实并非如此。从更高层面看，这些力量是善的。它们具有保护性，滋养一切生灵。它们一直是你所谓进化的驱动力。它们具有生物性，在某种程度上由大量细胞知识构成——基本不受时间限制，却在时间中指引物质活动，从而维持物质平衡。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 691
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now all of this certainly sounds unscientific to many people, yet most of my readers have already picked up a different version of the nature of science, or they would not be reading this book to begin with. The private oracle: What does that mean? And what does it have to do with the unknown reality? More, what does it have to do with the practical world? The private oracle is the voice of the inner multidimensional self -- the part of each person not fully contained in his or her personhood, the part of the unknown self-structure out of which personhood, with its physical alliance, springs. Basically that portion of the psyche is outside of space and time, while enabling you to operate in it.4 It deals intimately with probabilities -- (louder:) the source of all predictable action.
quotes.translation: 这一切对许多人来说当然听起来不科学，但我的大多数读者已经接受了科学本质的不同版本，否则他们根本不会开始阅读这本书。私人神谕：这代表什么？它与未知实相有何关联？更重要的是，它与现实世界有何关联？私人神谕是内在多维自我的心声——每个人中未被完全包含在人格中的部分，是未知自体结构的一部分，人格及其物质联盟由此生发。基本上，心灵的那部分存在于时空之外，同时使你能够在其中运作。它密切处理或然性——（更大声地：）所有可预测行动的源头。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 704
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Your now (underlined), or present moment, is a psychological platform. It seems that the universe began with an initial burst of energy of some kind (the "big bang"). Evolutionists cannot account for its cause. Many religious people believe that a god exists in a larger dimension of reality, and that he created the universe while being himself outside of it. He set it into motion. Many individuals, following either persuasion, believe that regardless of its source, the [universe]1 must run out of energy. Established science is quite certain that no energy can now be created or destroyed, but only transformed (as stated in the first law of thermodynamics). Science sees energy and matter as being basically the same thing, appearing differently under varying circumstances.
quotes.translation: 你的"当下"（划线强调），或当下时刻，是一个心理平台。宇宙似乎始于某种能量的初始爆发（"大爆炸"）。进化论者无法解释其原因。许多宗教信徒相信，神存在于一个更大的实相维度中，他创造了宇宙而自身处于其外。他启动了宇宙。无论遵循哪种观点，许多人都认为无论其源头为何，宇宙终将耗尽能量。既定科学相当确定，能量现在既不能被创造也不能被消灭，只能被转化（如热力学第一定律所述）。科学视能量与物质为本质相同，在不同情况下呈现不同形态。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now as you will see, all creatures, regardless of their degree, can and do choose, within their spheres of reality, those sensations that they will experience--but to one extent or another (underlined) all sensations are felt. We will later discuss the part of the mind and its interpretation, for example, of painful stimuli, but I want to make the point that those attracted to physical life are first and foremost tasters of sensation. Outside of that, basically, there are all kinds of mental distinctions made [among] stimuli. The body is made to react. It is made to feel life and vitality by reacting to an environment that is not itself, by encountering what you might call natural stress. The body maintains its equilibrium by reacting against gravity, by coming in contact with other bodies, by changing its own sensations, by glorifying in the balance between balance and off-balance.
quotes.translation: 正如你将看到的，所有生物，无论其程度如何，都能且确实在其实相范围内选择它们将体验的感觉——但所有感觉都在某种程度上（划线强调）被感受到。我们稍后将讨论心智及其对痛苦刺激等信息的解读作用，但我想指出，那些被物质生命吸引者首先是感觉的品尝者。除此之外，基本上，刺激之间存在各种心智上的区分。身体被设计来反应。它通过与并非自身的环境互动、通过遭遇你所谓的自然压力，来感受生命与活力。身体通过对抗重力、接触其他身体、改变自身感觉、在平衡与失衡之间欢庆来维持其平衡。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will not learn it by trying to escape your own reality, or by attempting to dull your senses. This can only teach you what it means not to focus, and in whatever reality you visit the ability to focus clearly and well is a prerequisite. Once you learn how to really tune in, then you will understand what it means to change the direction of your focus.
quotes.translation: 你无法通过逃避自己的实相或试图钝化感官来学会这一点。这只能教会你什么是缺乏聚焦，而无论你造访何种实相，清晰良好聚焦的能力都是先决条件。一旦你学会真正调频，你就会明白改变聚焦方向意味着什么。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A belief in hell fires can cause you to hallucinate Hades' conditions. A belief in a stereotyped heaven can result in a hallucination of heavenly conditions. You always form your own reality according to your ideas and expectations. This is the nature of consciousness in whatever reality it finds itself. Such hallucinations, I assure you, are temporary.
quotes.translation: 对地狱之火的信念可能导致你幻视冥界景象。对刻板天堂的信念可能导致天堂景象的幻觉。你总是根据自己的观念与期望形成自己的实相。这是意识在任何实相中的本质。我向你保证，这类幻觉是暂时的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: No physical matter is without this electromagnetic reality, and no thought exists which does not exist within this reality. Again, I am not speaking symbolically, but quite practically. Emotions, having their own reality within this system, do not affect physical matter indirectly, but cause specific electromagnetic changes within the physical organism.
quotes.translation: 没有物质不具备这种电磁实相，也没有思想不存在于这个实相之中。再次强调，我并非象征性地说，而是非常实际地。情绪在这个系统内拥有自己的实相，它们并非间接影响物质，而是在物质有机体内引发特定的电磁变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The full practical implication here should be understood: No course is irrevocably set or beyond change. Within the limited framework of your usual operations, however, so-called predictions3 may be made. They will be workable to some degree. In deeper terms however no action is set beyond alteration. The unknown reality is the source for the known one. If you want to "discover" how things work, then your journey must eventually lead you into the dimensions that lie within the world you know.
quotes.translation: 这里应充分理解其实际含义：没有任何进程是绝对固定或不可改变的。然而，在你们通常运作的有限框架内，可以做出所谓的预测。这些预测在一定程度上是可行的。但更深层而言，没有任何行动是固定不变的。未知的实相是已知实相的源头。如果你想"发现"事物如何运作，那么你的旅程最终必须引领你进入存在于你所知世界之内的维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 704
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: There are indeed no physical places. There are the illusions. The psychological reality, the psychic reality, always forms it own environment. The divisions between various environments have nothing to do with space. There are fields of energy set up and channels that open between various such environments, and communications can be made through these.
quotes.translation: 确实没有物理地点。只有幻象。心理实相、心灵实相总是形成自己的环境。不同环境之间的划分与空间无关。有建立的能量场和连接各种此类环境的通道，通过这些通道可以进行沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: At a later date I will explain the true nature of this electrical reality, since your idea of electrical reality is extremely limited, and within your field it is perceived but dimly, as a mere shadow of itself.
quotes.translation: 日后我将解释这种电性实相的真实本质，因为你们对电性实相的概念极为有限，在你们的领域中它仅被模糊地感知，如同其自身的影子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your consciousness fluctuates in the same way. It is here and then it is not here, but the physical self focuses upon only those moments of physical reality. Because consciousness fluctuates however, other portions of your self have memory of those times when it is not focused in "physical reality," and this is also a portion of your entire existence.
quotes.translation: 你们的意识以同样的方式波动。它在此处，然后又不在此处，但物质自我只聚焦于物质实相的那些时刻。然而，由于意识波动，你自我的其他部分会记得那些它不聚焦于"物质实相"的时刻，这也是你整个存在的一部分。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are various periods of training that vary according to the individual. You must understand the nature of reality before you manipulate within it intelligently and well. In this environment and in physical reality, you are learning... You are supposed to be learning... that your thoughts have reality and that you create the reality that you know.
quotes.translation: 有各种训练阶段，因人而异。在你能明智而妥善地操控实相之前，你必须理解实相的本质。在这个环境和物质实相中，你正在学习……你应该学习……你的思想具有实相，并且你创造你所知的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You cannot probe into the one system without affecting the others. It is basically meaningless to consider the personality as separate from the simultaneous actions of which it is composed. The personality, as you know, has also a reality within the dream universe. It should be obvious that in a most basic and practical manner the personality however is not involved with physical time to any degree. Only a part of the personality, the ego, is so involved. It is obvious of course that the personality system will react to stimuli that seem, to the ego, to be far divorced in time. That is, the personality may react to a stimuli in the present that occurred originally twenty years ago, to the ego's understanding of time.
quotes.translation: 你无法在不影响其他系统的情况下探究其中一个系统。将人格视为独立于构成它的同时性行为，基本上毫无意义。如你所知，人格在梦境宇宙中也具有实相。显而易见，在最基本且实际的层面上，人格无论如何都不涉及物理时间。只有人格的一部分——自我——才如此涉入。当然，人格系统会对那些在自我看来时间上相距甚远的刺激做出反应。也就是说，人格可能会对当下发生的、原本发生在二十年前的刺激做出反应，而这是从自我对时间的理解来看的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In physical life there is a lag between the conception of an idea and its physical construction. In dream reality, this is not so. Therefore, the best way to become acquainted with after-death reality ahead of time, so to speak, is to explore and understand the nature of your own dreaming self. Not very many people want to take the time or energy.
quotes.translation: 在物质生活中，从想法的构思到其物质构建之间存在时间差。但在梦境实相中，情况并非如此。因此，可以这么说，提前熟悉死后实相的最佳方式，就是探索并理解你自身做梦自我的本质。没有多少人愿意花时间或精力去做这件事。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In such a system, even good becomes suspect, because an equal evil is seen to follow it. The god-versus-devil, angels-versus-demons -- the gulf between animals and angels -- all of these distortions are impediments. In your system of reality now you set up great contrasts and opposing factors. These operate as root assumptions within your reality.
quotes.translation: 在这样的系统中，甚至连善也变得可疑，因为人们看到同等的恶紧随其后。神与魔、天使与恶魔——动物与天使之间的鸿沟——所有这些扭曲都是障碍。在你们当前的实相系统中，你们设立了巨大的对比和对立因素。这些因素在你们的实相中作为根本假设运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are other root assumptions that you take as a basis of reality. And in other levels of reality, there are other root assumptions. These are the seeming laws by which you govern your experiences. Our note takers are doing very well, considering that the paper is not solid and neither are their pens. It is amazing what you can do with nothing!
quotes.translation: 还有其他根本假设，你们将其作为实相的基础。而在其他实相层面，则存在其他根本假设。这些是你们用来支配自身经验的看似法则。考虑到纸张并非固体，他们的笔也非固体，我们的笔记记录者做得非常好。你们能用虚无做到这些，真是令人惊叹！
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In one way or another all of Seth's books are elaborations of that basic message, stated nine months after his sessions with us began in December 1963. It should be obvious that the two volumes of "Unknown" Reality are further ramifications of that thesis, for here Seth shows us the usually invisible psychological dimensions that underlie the known world. He reveals the very structure upon which our free will rests: for if events were immutable or fated, no free will would be possible.
quotes.translation: 以这样或那样的方式，赛斯的所有书籍都是对那个基本信息的阐述，该信息是在1963年12月他与我们开始通灵九个月后提出的。显而易见，《未知的实相》两卷本正是该论点的进一步延伸，因为在这里赛斯向我们展示了通常不可见的、构成已知世界基础的心理维度。他揭示了我们的自由意志所依托的结构：因为如果事件是不可改变的或注定的，那么自由意志就不可能存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 7. In Session 692 for Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality see the material on Sue's double dreams in the opening notes and in Note 2. Personally, at least, I see strong connections between the idea of double dreams and the kind of conscious reincarnational memory -- or knowledge -- detailed by Sue in this appendix.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: All personal contact with the multidimensional God, all legitimate moments of mystic consciousness, will always have a unifying effect. They will not, therefore, isolate the individual involved, but instead will enlarge his perceptions until he will experience the reality and uniqueness of as many other aspects of reality of which he is capable.
quotes.translation: 所有与多维神格的个人接触，所有神秘意识的合法时刻，都会产生统一的效果。因此，它们不会孤立相关的个体，反而会扩展他的感知，直到他能够体验他所能够触及的尽可能多的实相面向的实相性与独特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He has managed to organize physical reality because he focuses so intensely within it. His knowledge of other realities is limited however to infrequent glimpses. He perceives bits and pieces of other realities. As long as his perception in this manner is so disorganized and so fragmentary he cannot hope to compose any conception of the total.
quotes.translation: 他之所以能组织物质实相，是因为他如此专注地沉浸其中。然而他对其他实相的认识仅限于偶尔的惊鸿一瞥。他感知到的其他实相是支离破碎的。只要他以这种方式获得的感知如此混乱零散，他就无法期望拼凑出任何整体概念。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your world is populated by individuals concentrating upon physical activities, dealing with events that are "finished products" -- at least in usual terms. Your inner egos populate Framework 2, and deal with the actual creation of those events that are then objectified. Since "the rules" of Framework 2 are different, that reality is not at all bound by your physical assumptions. It contains, therefore, the inner ego of each individual who has lived or will ever live upon the earth.
quotes.translation: 你们的世界由专注于物质活动、处理"成品"事件（至少以通常标准而言）的个体所组成。你们的内在自我则栖居于架构二中，处理那些随后被客观化的实际事件创造过程。由于架构二的"规则"不同，那个实相完全不受你们物质假设的束缚。因此，它包含了每个曾经或将要在地球上生存之人的内在自我。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 822, FEBRUARY 22, 1978
9:27 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I call this seemingly unconscious the "inner ego," for it directs inner activities. It correlates information that is perceived not through the physical senses, but through other inner channels. It is the inner perceiver of reality that exists beyond the three-dimensional. It carries within it the memory of each of your past existences. It looks into subjective dimensions that are literally infinite, and from these subjective dimensions all objective realities flow. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 我将这个看似无意识的自我称为"内在自我"，因为它主导着内在活动。它整合的信息并非通过物质感官感知，而是经由其他内在渠道获取。它是存在于三维世界之外实相的内在感知者。它承载着你们每一世存在的记忆。它审视着真正无限的主观维度，而所有客观实相皆从这些主观维度中流出。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The kind of reality thus created by that portion of your consciousness forms a given kind of experience. It is valid and real. When you want to travel, you do so within the dimensions of the reality thus created. If you drive or fly from one city to another, you do not consider the journey imaginary. You are exploring the dimensions given.
quotes.translation: 你们意识的那部分所创造的这类实相，会形成特定种类的经验。它是有效且真实的。当你们想要旅行时，你们就在如此创造的实相维度内进行。若你们开车或乘飞机从一个城市到另一个城市，你们不会认为这趟旅程是想象的。你们只是在探索既定的维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 713
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You pay little heed, however. You think that this is just your "imagination." The unknown reality is alive in your own psyche. There are hints of it in all of your experience. You would not be alive, in your terms, if first you did not imagine yourself as you are. Play is, in fact, one of the most practical methods of survival, both individually and for the species. Within its framework lie the secrets of creativity, and within the secrets of creativity lie the secrets of being.
quotes.translation: 然而你们很少留意。你们认为这只是"想象"。未知的实相在你们自己的心灵中生机勃勃。在你们所有经验中都有它的蛛丝马迹。以你们的说法，如果你们没有先想象自己现在的样子，你们根本不会活着。事实上，游戏无论对个体还是物种而言，都是最实用的生存方法之一。在其架构内蕴藏着创造力的奥秘，而创造力的奥秘中又蕴藏着存在的奥秘。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 732
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I am not suggesting that you substitute dream reality for your so-called waking reality. I am mainly suggesting that the two can reinforce each other to a larger degree than you recognize. Also it is difficult for you to accept the idea that experience within dreams is as vivid and valid a part of the personality as its waking experience.
quotes.translation: 我并非建议你们用梦境实相替代所谓的清醒实相。我主要想说明，两者相互强化的程度远超你们所认知。此外，你们很难接受这样的观念：梦境中的经验与清醒时的经验一样，都是人格中生动而有效的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Tension is infinite. Your time system is indeed the result of tension as it is distorted within your own system, yet the distortion itself, as you see, creates a new reality. And that reality then continues to operate, forming like realities of the sort that can exist within the given conditions already set up by the original distortion.
quotes.translation: 张力是无限的。你们的时间系统确实是张力在你们系统内扭曲的结果，然而正如你们所见，扭曲本身创造了新的实相。这个实相随后继续运作，形成能够在原始扭曲所设定的既定条件下存在的同类实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Apropos of the material I've been covering in these pages, I want to close this essay with quotations from two sessions that I've always thought are among the best Seth has given. These sessions still live, and in them he reinforces the idea that each of us does create our own reality. Both can be found in Chapter 1 of Personal Reality.
quotes.translation: 关于我在这些篇章中探讨的内容，我想引用两节赛斯资料来结束本文——我一直认为这是赛斯给出的最精彩的章节之一。这些章节至今仍充满生命力，在其中他强化了"每个人都在创造自己的实相"这一理念。两者均收录于《个人实相》第一章。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: It is not that physical reality is false. It is that the physical picture is simply one of an infinite number of ways of perceiving the various guises through which consciousness expresses itself. The physical senses force you to translate experience into physical perceptions. The inner senses open your range of perception, allow you to interpret experience in a far freer manner and to create new forms and new channels through which you, or any consciousness, can know itself.
quotes.translation: 并非物质实相是虚假的，而是物质画面只是感知意识表达自身之无数种伪装方式的其中一种。物质感官迫使你将经验转化为物质感知。内在感官则拓展你的感知范围，让你能以更自由的方式诠释经验，并创造新的形式与通道，使你或任何意识得以认识自身。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are chemical and electrical connections that cannot be ignored here. For a dream has a chemical reality and an electrical reality. It is built up, on one level, of chemical components that have an electrical basis, and it is through these connections that transformation within the nerve structure of the physical organism is made.
quotes.translation: 这里存在不可忽视的化学与电性连接。因为梦境具有化学实相与电性实相。在某个层面上，它由具有电性基础的化学组分构建而成，正是通过这些连接，物质有机体的神经结构才得以转化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: The organization of your feelings, beliefs, and intents directs the focus about which your physical reality is built. This follows with impeccable spontaneity and order. If you believe in the sinfulness of the world, for instance, then you will search out from normal sense data those facts that confirm your belief. But beyond that, at other levels you also organize your mental world in such a way that you attract to yourself events that -- again -- will confirm your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你感受、信念与意图的组织方式，主导着构建物质实相的核心焦点。这遵循着无可挑剔的自发性与秩序。例如，若你相信世界充满罪孽，便会从正常感官数据中筛选出证实此信念的事实。但不仅如此，在其他层面上，你还会组织你的心灵世界，以吸引那些——再次——能证实你信念的事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I did not experience it. Ruburt experienced it. I commented on Ruburt's experience ... In his experience, Ruburt is also free enough so that he can open up certain channels of his mind that then comment upon his activity. Some of those channels lead to my reality. But, I am not some spooky Big Brother experiencing his reality for him!
quotes.translation: 我并未经历它。是鲁柏经历了它。我评论了鲁柏的经历……在他的经历中，鲁柏也足够自由，能够开启某些心灵通道来评论他的活动。其中一些通道通向我的实相。但我并非某个替他经历实相的阴森"老大哥"！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)

quotes.text: Emotions may even cause a color reaction. Any reality, regardless of which system it originates within, will appear to some degree within all systems. Even within your own system, though perhaps on a subconscious level, all emotions have a reality in color. They have, as you know, a chemical reaction which is sniffed by other animals.
quotes.translation: 情绪甚至可能引发颜色反应。任何实相，无论它起源于哪个系统，都会在所有系统中以某种程度显现。即使在你们自己的系统内，也许在潜意识层面，所有情绪都有其颜色实相。如你们所知，它们会产生一种化学反应，其他动物能嗅到这种反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The next chapter will deal with your physical reality as it appears to me and others like me. This chapter will contain some rather fascinating points, for not only do you form the physical reality that you know, but you are also forming other quite valid environments in other realities by your present thoughts, desires and emotions.
quotes.translation: 下一章将讨论你们所知的物质实相，正如它对我及像我这样的存在所显现的那样。这一章将包含一些相当引人入胜的观点，因为你们不仅形成了你们所知的物质实相，还通过你们当前的思想、欲望和情绪，在其他实相中形成了其他同样有效的环境。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Here is a copy of that outline, which was given to us in Session 510, January 19, 1970. As you'll see here, Seth calls me Ruburt, and Rob, Joseph. These names represent our entire personalities as distinguished from our present physically oriented selves.

quotes.text: Ego failure may result. Development of the inner senses is a much more effective method of perceiving other realities, and followed correctly, the ego is not only stronger but more flexible, and consciousness even of physical reality is increased. Such development becomes an unfolding and a natural expansion of the whole personality.
quotes.translation: 自我可能会因此失败。发展内在感官是感知其他实相更有效的方法，如果正确遵循，自我不仅会更强大，而且更灵活，甚至对物质实相的意识也会增强。这种发展成为整个人格的一种展开和自然扩展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There are more than your thought forms in other words. Your thought forms however can be used as definite aids when you are in the proper mental condition, and they can impede your progress if you are not. In physical reality a man in a desperate frame of mind is more apt to emphasize horrible aspects in the news, for example, and to see desperation rather than joy in the faces of those he meets. He will ignore the contented playful child on one side of the street, and notice instead a dirty ragged boy even though he be further away. So your frame of mind when projecting will largely determine the sort of experiences you have, and the environments you visit.
quotes.translation: 换句话说，存在的不只是你们的思想形态。然而，当你们处于适当的心智状态时，你们的思想形态可以作为明确的辅助工具；如果你们不处于这种状态，它们则会阻碍你们的进步。在物质实相中，一个处于绝望心境的人更倾向于强调新闻中可怕的一面，例如，在他遇到的人脸上看到绝望而非喜悦。他会忽略街对面满足玩耍的孩子，反而注意到一个更远处的肮脏褴褛的男孩。因此，你们投射时的心境将在很大程度上决定你们所经历的经验类型以及你们所访问的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: From one end of reality you shout: "Where is God?" and from the other end the answer comes: "I am Me." Capitalize "Me." From the other end of reality, God goes shouting: "Who am I?" and finds himself in you. You are therefore a part of the source, and so is everything else manifest. Because God is, you are. Because you are, God is.
quotes.translation: 从实相的一端，你们呼喊："上帝在哪里？"而从另一端，回答传来："我是我。"将"我"大写。从实相的另一端，上帝呼喊："我是谁？"并在你们之中找到自己。因此，你们是源头的一部分，其他一切显现也是如此。因为上帝存在，你们存在。因为你们存在，上帝存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The Instreams did not consider going to York Beach. Neither was their visit a complete coincidence, although it might seem so. All experiences have an electrical reality. Your experiences at York Beach had such a reality, and having met you, not Dr. Instream but his wife unconsciously picked up this connection, and responded to it.
quotes.translation: 因斯特里姆夫妇并未考虑去约克海滩。他们的访问也并非完全巧合，尽管看起来可能如此。所有经验都有其电性实相。你们在约克海滩的经历具有这样的实相，而在遇见你们之后，不是因斯特里姆博士，而是他的妻子无意识地捕捉到了这个联系，并对此做出了回应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Perhaps it is better to say that physical reality is one form that reality takes. In your system, however, you are focused much more intensely upon one relatively small aspect of experience.
quotes.translation: 或许更恰当的说法是，物质实相是实相所采取的一种形式。然而在你们的系统中，你们更强烈地聚焦于经验中相对微小的一面。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We have been speaking of dream events and waking reality, the nature of creativity and the formation of events. We have also touched upon psychological entities of vast proportions, in your terms, that form psychological structures from which your own reality emerges. In that connection, the nature of my reality becomes pertinent.
quotes.translation: 我们一直在谈论梦境事件与清醒实相、创造力的本质以及事件的形成。我们也触及了以你们的话来说规模庞大的心理实体，它们构成了你们自身实相从中涌现的心理结构。就此而言，我自身实相的本质便具有了相关性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As some of your reading material of late suggests, the more you know of the nature of reality the better equipped you are to deal with the point of transition. Here your inner beliefs are your only contact with reality. Believing for example that death is a complete end can result in a quite unnecessary period of unconsciousness.
quotes.translation: 正如你们近期某些读物所暗示的，对实相本质了解得越多，就越能妥善应对过渡点。在此，你们内在的信念是与实相唯一的接触点。例如，相信死亡是彻底的终结，会导致一段完全不必要的无意识时期。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now. Moment points are indeed composed of action, action experiencing itself. What you see and experience physically represents but a small portion, a mere fraction of what reality is. There are universes within universes. Action is, and yet forms its own experience. Thoughts take electromagnetic patterns that have their own materializations as universal systems. Your physical body is a series of actions, though the word series is being used for simplicity's sake only.
quotes.translation: 现在。瞬间点确实由行动构成——行动体验着自身。你们在物质层面所见所感的，仅代表实相极小的一部分、一个片段。宇宙之中还有宇宙。行动存在，却又形成自身的经验。思想采取电磁模式，这些模式作为宇宙系统拥有自身的物质化。你们的物质身体是一系列行动，尽管"系列"一词仅为简便而用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Again, the nature of space and time is glimpsed more clearly as it appears to the sleeping self, for in the dream state reality is to a large measure uncamouflaged, and the personality appears in a freer state. It should also be borne in mind that all aspects of the personality are part of the whole self. As such there is an overall communication between the various aspects of the self, although the separate aspects of the self may not be aware of the communications.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，当空间与时间的本质向沉睡的自我显现时，能更清晰地瞥见其真貌，因为在梦境状态中，实相在很大程度上是不加伪装的，人格也以更自由的状态呈现。同时需谨记，人格的所有面向都是整体自性的一部分。正因如此，自性的各个面向之间存在整体性的沟通，尽管这些分离的面向可能并未意识到这种沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words the repressed Emotionalism will only carry you so far before you need to be refreshed in Ruburt's reality; and through approaching his reality you also gain, in a different manner than you usually know it, refreshment from the natural world.
quotes.translation: 换言之，被压抑的情感主义只能支撑你到一定程度，之后你便需要在鲁柏的实相中获得更新；而通过接近他的实相，你也能以不同于惯常认知的方式，从自然界获得滋养。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You are aware, alert, and participating in many more realities than you know as your soul expresses itself through you. That consciousness of your usual daylight hours, the ego consciousness, rises up like a flower from the ground of the "underneath," the unconscious bed of your own reality. Though you are not aware of it, this ego itself emerges, then falls back again into the unconscious, from which another ego then rises as a new bloom from the springtime earth.
quotes.translation: 你觉察、警醒并参与着远比你已知更多的实相，因为你的灵魂正透过你表达自身。你日常白昼时光的意识，即自我意识，如同花朵般从"底层"——你自身实相的无意识土壤——中升起。尽管你未曾察觉，这个自我本身浮现后又坠回无意识，而另一个自我则如春日大地绽放的新蕾般再度升起。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: All systems of reality are created, or constructed, by those who perceive the system. Those who do not construct a system cannot perceive it. Now. There is nothing at all unusual in precognitive experiences. They occur constantly beneath the level of your awareness. However there are certain conditions necessary before precognitions can arise to conscious levels, and there are definite conditions that must exist before what you call apparitions can be perceived.
quotes.translation: 所有实相系统都由感知该系统者创造或建构。不建构系统者便无法感知它。请注意。预知经验毫无异常之处。它们持续发生在你意识层面之下。然而，预知要上升到意识层面需要特定条件，而你们所谓的幻象要被感知也必须存在明确条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The reality of dreams themselves can only be investigated through direct contact. Their reality cannot be probed by scientific devices, for dreams in this respect are as nebulous as the spirit, or soul, or inner self. Dreams are directly experienced. They have no meaning outside of their relationship with the personality.
quotes.translation: 梦境本身的实相只能通过直接接触来探究。科学仪器无法探测其本质，因为在这方面，梦境如同灵体、灵魂或内在自我般缥缈。梦境是被直接体验的。它们与人格的关系之外毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your kind of psychological reality is therefore implied in my own, and mine in yours, even as your kind of reality is implied in that of Willy Two (our kitten) -- and his in yours.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们这类心理实相隐含于我的实相中，而我的也隐含于你们的实相中，正如你们的实相隐含于威利二世（我们的小猫）的实相中——而他的也隐含于你们的实相中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As words would tell little, or give small hint of the reality of sound or color to someone who did not experience these, so the words used can only give insight into the nature of reality. I hope through the addition of various subjective experiences in the sessions to give you the feel of concepts when this is possible.
quotes.translation: 正如文字对未曾体验声音或色彩实相者而言毫无意义或仅能提供微弱暗示，所用文字也只能让人瞥见实相的本质。我希望能通过课程中各种主观经验的添加，在可能时让你们感受到概念的真谛。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is your loss. Now, there is a way--when you are involved in physical activity, and even intense mental work--to change the inner focus so that you are aware of two realities at once and can manipulate quite easily in the physical reality as you must. Now, you ask your Bega, for I have told him the message, and I have told him to tell you. We shall see how good he is. And I want to know what he tells you for I want to see how he is delivering my suggestions.
quotes.translation: 这是你们的损失。现在，有一种方法——当你们从事体力活动甚至高强度脑力工作时——可以转换内在焦点，使你们同时觉察两个实相，并能在必须处理物理实相时轻松运作。现在，去问你们的贝加吧，因为我已经把讯息告诉他，并让他转告你们。我们且看他表现如何。我想知道他告诉你们什么，因为我要看他如何传达我的建议。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Our friend back here (Paul W.) could well appear, you see, as a UFO in another aspect of reality, and frighten the inhabitants. You forget that consciousness is the only true vehicle. No part of your consciousness is imprisoned within you. It materializes in one aspect or another. I use the word "materializes" because it makes sense to you, but it is distortive since it predisposes an appearance within matter. Yet all realities, as you know, are not physical.
quotes.translation: 我们这位朋友（保罗·W）在实相的另一个层面中很可能以飞碟的形象出现，吓坏那里的居民。你们忘了意识才是唯一的真实载具。你们意识的任何部分都不曾被囚禁在体内。它会在某个层面或另一个层面中物质化。我使用"物质化"这个词是因为这对你们有意义，但这其实是一种扭曲，因为它预设了物质中的显像。然而，如你们所知，并非所有实相都是物质的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is highly difficult for you to perceive any knowledge or reality unless it is interpreted in physical terms, even though such interpretation highly distorts the information itself. When you allow yourselves freedom in the dream state, when you allow yourself direct experience of reality, when you do not remember it.
quotes.translation: 你们极难感知任何知识或实相，除非它以物质术语被诠释——即便这种诠释会严重扭曲信息本身。当你们允许自己在梦境状态中自由，当你们允许自己直接体验实相，当你们不记得它时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Nor is the dream universe a shadow image of your own. It carries on according to the possibilities inherent within it, as you carry on according to the possibilities that exist within the physical field. The possibilities for action vary, however, within these two fields as they vary within all other fields. You may say that in sleeping you focus your energies to form a different reality than the reality of waking physical matter.
quotes.translation: 梦境宇宙也并非你们世界的投影。它根据自身内在的可能性运作，正如你们根据物质领域存在的可能性运作一样。然而，行动的可能性在这两个领域中各有不同，正如它们在所有其他领域中各有差异。你可以说，在睡眠中你集中能量形成不同于清醒物质实相的另一实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The continued existence of your physical body is determined by action, although consciously you are not aware of this most of the time. Action may not seem to be going any place. Action, by its nature, while part of every reality necessarily changes that reality and forms from it a new reality. This should be obvious.
quotes.translation: 你物质身体的持续存在由行动决定，尽管大多数时候你意识不到这点。行动看似没有去向。行动的本质是：作为每个实相的一部分，它必然改变该实相，并从中形成新的实相。这应当显而易见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now there are indeed connections between these two conditions. And there are definite realities that exist in both states, and these uniting realities will be what you are looking for. For only by finding these can you discover the nature of the human personality and the nature of reality within which it must operate.
quotes.translation: 现在，这两种状态之间确实存在关联。确实有明确的实相同时存在于两种状态中，这些联结性的实相正是你们要寻找的。因为只有找到它们，你们才能发现人类人格的本质，以及人格必须运作其中的实相本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In other systems this is not necessarily the case. The time system within them is entirely different than your own. In these the inner self is aware of itself as more than one ego. (Pause.) The inner self can play more than one role at once, consciously in other words. Simply as an analogy, it would be as if within physical reality you lived, say, the life of a rich man of great talent, the life of a poor man with entirely different talents, and the life of a mother and career woman. You would be aware of yourself in each of these three roles, and find qualities being developed in each of the separate lives.
quotes.translation: 在其他系统中情况未必如此。它们内部的时间系统与你们的截然不同。在这些系统中，内在自我意识到自己不止是一个自我。（停顿）内在自我可以同时扮演多个角色——换言之，有意识地。打个比方，这就像在物质实相中，你同时过着才华横溢的富人的生活、拥有完全不同天赋的穷人的生活，以及母亲兼职业女性的生活。你会意识到自己在这三个角色中的存在，并发现每个独立生命正在发展的特质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: But this is the only reality that can be granted to the present. I am speaking now in your terms only, and this point should be clearly understood, for I am simplifying conditions considerably. A change of attitude, a new association, any of innumerable other actions, will automatically set up new electromagnetic connections, and break others. Now part of this we shall explain later, for these changes obviously affect both the future and the past. But the past, again, is continually changed by you, and by every individual. For basically you see, it is not something done and finished with, as is supposed.
quotes.translation: 但这只是当下能被赋予的唯一实相。我现在仅以你们的术语来说，这点必须清楚理解，因为我正在大幅简化情况。态度的转变、新的联想，或任何其他数不清的行为，都会自动建立新的电磁连接，并打破旧的连接。这部分我们稍后会解释，因为这些变化显然同时影响未来和过去。但过去同样不断被你们和每个人改变。因为从根本上说，它并非如人们所想的那样是已完成之事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each event of your life is contained within each other event. In the same way, each lifetime is contained in each other lifetime. The feeling of reality is "truer" then in the dream state. You can become consciously aware of your dreams to some extent -- that is, consciously aware of your own dreaming. You can also allow your "dream self" greater expression in the waking state. This can be done through techniques that are largely connected with creativity.
quotes.translation: 你生命中的每个事件都包含在其他每个事件之中。同样地，每个转世都包含在其他每个转世之中。在梦境状态中，实相感反而"更真实"。你可以在某种程度上清醒地意识到自己的梦境——即清醒地意识到自己的做梦过程。你也可以让"梦我"在清醒状态中获得更大表达。这可以通过主要与创造力相关的技巧来实现。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You do not know it now. When that point is reached, you will be able, if you prefer, to experience any"Reality-illusion" at your will, but the self who experiences these"reality-illusions" will know itself as reality. There is no place for it to go, because it is the only reality and will create its own environment.
quotes.translation: 你现在还不知道这一点。当达到那个境界时，你若愿意，就能随意体验任何"实相-幻相"，但体验这些"实相-幻相"的自我将知晓自身即为实相。它无处可去，因为它就是唯一的实相，并将创造自己的环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Dream images are indeed, in density, between the tangible nature of physical objects and the intangible reality that is entirely independent of physical matter. The dream reality cannot be entirely disconnected from the material universe because of its connections with human personality. There is a dependence here.
quotes.translation: 梦境影像的密度确实介于有形物质实相与完全独立于物质的无形实相之间。由于与人类人格的关联，梦境实相无法完全脱离物质宇宙。这里存在一种依存关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am again, as I have said often, an energy personality essence, which means quite simply that I am a personality who does not now operate within the physical reality. I can at times impress your physical reality, but the focus of my existence no longer involves a three-dimensional psychological structure. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 我再次重申，正如我常说的，我是一个能量人格本质，这很简单地意味着我是一个不再运作于物质实相中的人格。我有时能影响你们的物质实相，但我存在的焦点已不再涉及三维心理结构。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Problems leading to world wars also cause worldwide natural disasters. These are merely another materialization of energy projected by those who have not learned how to handle it. Such reactions fire through the dream universe also, and are reflected through all phases of your activity. The whole self compares the performance of various portions of itself in physical reality and in dream reality, and draws its own conclusions.
quotes.translation: 导致世界大战的问题也会引发全球性自然灾害。这不过是那些尚未学会处理能量的人所投射能量的另一种物质化表现。这类反应也会贯穿梦境宇宙，并反映在你们活动的所有层面。整体自我会比较自身各部分在物质实相与梦境实相中的表现，并得出自己的结论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You can feel what you cannot necessarily describe verbally, for you are more than the physical brain that you have now. I am no poet, but as in one of Ruburt's poems, think of the brain as a web you form about the inner self. This webwork helps you manipulate in a world of space and time, and is as nebulous, precarious and delicate as any spider's web -- and in as precarious a balance. You form this and then perceive the world, but your viewpoint is very small and the garden you perceive very intimate. You have, however, far greater abilities of perception. I want you to understand the nature of your inner self, or soul, for it is a focal point of reality from which other realities spring. It is not imprisoned in tiny boxes of days or weeks or months, or even of centuries.
quotes.translation: 你能感受到那些未必能用言语描述的事物，因为你远不止是此刻拥有的物质大脑。我并非诗人，但正如鲁柏某首诗中所言：将大脑视为你围绕内在自我编织的网。这张网协助你在时空世界中运作，它如同蛛网般缥缈、脆弱而精妙——同样维系着岌岌可危的平衡。你编织此网后便以此感知世界，但你的视角极其狭窄，所见的庭园也极为私密。然而你拥有远为强大的感知能力。我希望你理解内在自我或灵魂的本质——它是实相的焦点，其他实相皆由此生发。它不被囚禁于日、周、月甚至世纪的狭小牢笼中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Some inventors, writers, scientists, artists, who are used to dealing with creative material directly, are quite aware of the fact that many of their productive ideas came from the dream condition. They see the results of dream activity in practical physical life. Many others, though untrained, can clearly trace certain decisions made in waking life to dreams. Few understand, however, that private reality is like a finished product, rising out of the immense productivity that occurs in the dreaming condition. Ruburt calls this The Wonderworks,2 and with good reason. In waking life there are fluctuations in your consciousness, periods when you are more or less alert, in your terms, when your attention wanders from issues at hand; or when, instead, you are certainly brilliantly focused in the moment. So there are gradations of consciousness in the waking state. Usually you pay little attention to them.
quotes.translation: 请稍候片刻……某些惯于直接处理创作素材的发明家、作家、科学家、艺术家，都清楚意识到许多创见源自梦境状态。他们在实际物质生活中见证梦境活动的成果。许多未经训练的人也能清晰追溯清醒时的某些决定源于梦境。然而鲜有人明白：私人实相如同成品，源自梦境状态中发生的浩瀚创造力。鲁柏称之为"奇迹工坊"，这称呼恰如其分。清醒意识存在波动起伏——按你们的说法，有时警觉度较高或较低，注意力会从手头事务游移；有时则全然聚焦于当下。因此清醒状态存在意识层级，只是你们通常很少留意。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 699
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Such events occur as a result of individual beliefs, desires, and intents. There is no such thing as a chance encounter. No death occurs by chance, nor any birth. In the creative atmosphere of Framework 2, intents are known. In a manner of speaking, no act is private. Your communication systems bring to your living room notices of events that occur throughout the world. Yet that larger inner system of communications is far more powerful in scope, and each mental act is imprinted in the multidimensional screen of Framework 2. That screen is available to all, and in other levels of consciousness, particularly in the sleep and dreaming stages, the events of that inner reality are as ever-present and easily accessible as physical events are when you are awake.
quotes.translation: 此类事件源于个体信念、欲望与意图。不存在偶然相遇，没有偶然死亡，亦无偶然诞生。在架构二的创造氛围中，意图皆被知晓。可以说，没有行为是私密的。你们的通讯系统将全球事件带入客厅，而内在通讯系统在范围上远为强大——每个心智活动都烙印在架构二的多维荧幕上。此荧幕向所有人敞开，在其他意识层面（尤其是睡眠与梦境阶段），内在实相的事件如同清醒时的物质事件般触手可及。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json
