SESSION 824, MARCH 1, 1978
9:40 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Now. Your stereophonic setting can be compared to what we have termed the inner ego. Now each of these selves experience time in their own manner, and as you should see by now this only means that they build their own realities according to the nature of their own perceptions. But the nature of their own perceptions is not chaotic. The portions of the self are so constructed, so to speak, that when the stereophonic channel is turned on the selves then know their unity. Their various realities merge in the overall perceptions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。你的立体声设定可以比作我们所说的内在自我。现在，这些自我中的每一个都以自己的方式体验时间，而正如你现在应该明白的，这仅仅意味着它们根据自己感知的性质构建自己的实相。但它们感知的性质并非混乱的。可以说，自我的各个部分被如此构建，以至于当立体声通道被打开时，这些自我便知晓它们的统一。它们各自不同的实相在全我的整体感知中融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You change because of any experience. You have, then, changed because of this one. You have become more than you were. I am speaking here to you both. I am not taking you over, so to speak. You are accepting as a part of your whole experience more and more of the reality of what I am. This in no way minimizes me. you see. I make much of my knowledge available to you, but it is still my knowledge, you see. T he sharing of it however enlarges my own experience. Now then, I will let you rest. You may take a break or end the session as you prefer.
quotes.translation: 你因任何经验而改变。那么，你因这个经验而改变了。你变得比过去更多了。我在这里是对你们两人说话。可以说，我并没有接管你们。你们正在将我所是的实相越来越多地接纳为你们整体经验的一部分。这绝不会削弱我，你看。我让你们获得我的许多知识，但这仍然是我的知识，你看。然而，分享它扩大了我自己的经验。那么现在，我让你们休息。你们可以按自己的喜好休息一下或结束这节课。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The hope and the possibilities here, as well as some of the dangers, lie in the fact that the ego does indeed change, and is not one specific reality but a series or group of actions, with direction, that have the potentiality for unlimited value fulfillment. The ego will never be less than it is now. It may very well be more. Possibilities for development here are very great, but most such possibilities lie still in the future, and only, so far, as possibilities. There is nothing that will force the ego to enlarge the scope of its awareness.
quotes.translation: 希望和可能性在此，以及一些危险，在于自我确实在改变，它不是一种特定的实相，而是一系列或一组具有方向性的行动，拥有无限价值完成的潜能。自我永远不会比现在更少。它很可能变得更多。这里的发展可能性非常大，但大多数这样的可能性仍然在未来，并且到目前为止，只是作为可能性存在。没有任何东西会迫使自我扩大其觉知的范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The inner ego is then this inner identity. It is closely allied with the entity, and connects a reality that is purely psychic, the reality of the entity, with a reality that is mainly physical, the reality of the physical self.
quotes.translation: 内在自我就是这种内在身份。它与存有紧密相连，并将一种纯粹心灵的实相——存有的实相——与一种主要是物质的实相——物质自我的实相——连接起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The health and psychic condition of an individual is not primarily determined by the ego, however. It is only when the ego is allowed too much power that the individual is deprived of much of the inner vitality of the whole self. For the ego is acquainted with only its role. It can find refreshment only within the limitations of the reality which it was formed to meet; and when it looks about with the best of intentions and sees disasters and terrors, it does not know that these others also play their roles, and that the roles are temporary.
quotes.translation: 然而，个体的健康与心灵状态并非主要由自我决定。只有当自我被赋予过多权力时，个体才会被剥夺全我内在的活力。因为自我只熟悉自己的角色，它只能在它被塑造来应对的现实限制内获得更新；当它怀着善意环顾四周，看到灾难与恐惧时，它不知道这些角色也各有其位，且都是暂时的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you desperately try to remain young, it is usually to hide your own beliefs about age, and to negate all of those emotions connected with it. (Pause.) Whenever you refuse to accept the reality of your creaturehood, you also reject aspects of your spirit. The body exists in the world of space and time. The experiences you may encounter in your sixties are as necessary as those in your twenties. Your changing image is supposed to tell you something. When you pretend alterations do not occur you block both biological and spiritual messages.
quotes.translation: 如果你拼命试图保持年轻，通常是为了隐藏自己对年龄的信念，并否定所有与之相关的情绪。（停顿）每当你拒绝接受自己作为生物体的现实，你也在排斥你灵性的某些面向。身体存在于时空世界中。你在六十岁时可能遇到的经历，与二十岁时同样必要。你不断变化的形象本应告诉你一些事。当你假装变化并未发生时，你既阻断了生物信息，也阻断了灵性信息。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At one time the personality's sister was a father to the present personality. Since many of the building plans involved the construction of various kinds of temples, the personality has always been interested in acquiring knowledge concerning the nature of reality. There has been little concern with commerce. There is a need on the present personality's part to understand its own nature, and to use its abilities constructively. The personality has not come to grips with itself truly, but has the inner persistence and intuitiveness to do so.
quotes.translation: 曾有一世，此人的人格姐妹是今世人格的父亲。由于许多建设计划涉及各种庙宇的建造，此人始终对获取关于实相本质的知识感兴趣，对商业则鲜有关注。今世人格需要理解自身的本质，并建设性地运用其能力。此人尚未真正面对自己，但内在拥有坚持与直觉去做到这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You remember this from our material on action and the personality. The ego therefore is pleased when information is proven correct. (Long pause.) If the nature of perception were clearly understood then the nature of reality as you know it would also be understood much more clearly. Only half the process of perception, so-called, is even considered, however. Only half of the circle is known. The entire circle consists of those projections outward that form events, as well as the mechanisms by which the events are then physically perceived.
quotes.translation: 你从我们关于行动与人格的资料中记得这一点。因此，当信息被证实正确时，自我会感到愉悦。（长停顿）如果感知的本质被清楚理解，那么你所知的实相本质也会被更清晰地理解。然而，所谓的感知过程只有一半被考虑，只有半个圆被知晓。整个圆既包括向外投射形成事件的过程，也包括随后物理感知这些事件的机制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: To that extent a study of the dream state gives you some important insights as to the nature of the psyche. In certain terms you are "prepackaged." You always recognize one package of psychological reality as "you." In basic terms you are always arriving by a kind of instantaneous mail into that package, however. You are unknowingly immersed in and a part of pure energy, being newly created in each moment, so that the energy of your atoms and molecules and of your physical universal system is being replenished at every conceivable moment.
quotes.translation: 就此而言，对梦境状态的研究能让你对心灵的本质获得重要洞见。从某种角度说，你是“预包装”的。你总是将一包心理实相认作“你”。然而，从根本意义上说，你总是通过某种即时邮件抵达那个包装。你不知不觉地沉浸并成为纯能量的一部分，在每一刻被重新创造，以至于你原子、分子乃至整个物质宇宙系统的能量，在每一个可想象的瞬间都在被补充。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Even the electric reality of a dream is decoded, so that its effects are experienced not only by the brain, but in the furthest reaches of the most minute cells in the human body. Dream experiences long forgotten are forever contained as electrically coded within the cells of the physical body. If an effect is felt in any one portion of human experience, then you can be sure that such an effect is felt in all other possible ways, whether or not such an effect is immediately obvious. This is also an extremely important point to remember.
quotes.translation: 甚至梦的电性实相也会被解码，其效应不仅被大脑体验，更延伸至人体最微小细胞的深处。早已被遗忘的梦境体验，永远以电性编码的形式存于肉体细胞中。如果人类经验的任何一部分感受到某种效应，那么你可以确信，这种效应会以所有其他可能的方式被感知，无论这种效应是否立即显现。这也是一个极其重要的要点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I speak to you of other theoretical realities. I challenge you now to be as creative in another reality as you are in this one. And if it seems to you, because of your beliefs, that you are limited here, then I joyfully challenge each of you to create a city, an environment, and perhaps a world, in which no such limitations occur. What kind of world would you create?
quotes.translation: 我向你们谈及其他的理论性实相。现在我挑战你们，要在另一种实相中像在此生中一样富有创造力。如果因为你们的信念，你们觉得在此受到限制，那么我欣然挑战你们每个人去创造一个城市、一个环境，或许一个世界，在其中没有这样的限制存在。你们会创造什么样的世界呢？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 711)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (From the ESP class session for September 24, 1974:) The excitement [of living] must come from each of you, and not from me. You come here to know yourselves, and that should always be your purpose. I can help you -- I can help you -- but I am not the person you search for. You are the person you search for. The dimensions of your reality are the important points....
quotes.translation: （摘自1974年9月24日的ESP课：）[生活的]兴奋必须来自你们每个人，而不是来自我。你们来这里是为了认识自己，这应该始终是你们的目的。我可以帮助你们——我可以帮助你们——但我不是你们所寻找的那个人。你们就是你们所寻找的那个人。你们实相的维度才是重点……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Now I'll refer the reader to Note 6 for Session 711, which is the session for which I'm assembling this chronology to begin with. In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: All That Is vibrates with desire. (Louder:) The denial of desire will bring you only listlessness. Those who deny desire are the most smitten by it. Each of your lives are miniature and yet gigantic episodes, mortal and immortal at once, providing experiences that you form meaningfully, opening up dimensions of reality available to no one else, for no one can view existence from your standpoint. No one can be you but you. There are communications at other levels, but your experience of existence is completely original, to be treasured.
quotes.translation: 一切万有因渴望而振动。（更大声地：）否认渴望只会带给你们无精打采。那些否认渴望的人最受其折磨。你们的每一生都是微型却巨大的插曲，同时是凡俗与不朽的，提供你们有意义地形成的经验，开启无人能及的实相维度，因为没有人能从你们的立场看待存在。除了你们自己，没有人能成为你们。在其他层面有沟通，但你们对存在的体验是完全原创的，值得珍惜。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At the bottom so to speak, will be found a layer of the subconscious dealing with racial heritage, concerning the dim first materialization of man; and beneath this a heritage dealing with a comprehension of reality as concerned in physical matter before the physical evolution of man, following backward to that first inner self within its mental enclosure, that was adept enough to translate and transform its psychic energy to form the first, most minute physical materialization, from which all other physical constructions then flowed.
quotes.translation: 可以说，在底层会发现一层处理种族传承的潜意识，涉及人类最初模糊的物质化；在此之下是一层处理在人类物质进化之前对实相理解的传承，追溯回那个在心灵围场内的最初内在自己，它足够熟练地将自己的心灵能量转化并变形，形成最初、最微小的物质化，所有其他物质构造随后由此流出。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You must understand that in any way your situation, and any that you know of physical reality, is highly artificial. It is the mass creation formed by your inner ideas. The time concept is but one example, and it is responsible for many of your most cherished misconceptions. You must form ideas into physical materiaizationl in order to recognize the force behind the ideas you are learning to use and understand. However such materializations are only necessary at certain levels. The time scheme appears valid only within that framework.
quotes.translation: 你们必须明白，你们的处境以及你们所知的任何物质实相，在任何方面都是高度人为的。它是你们内在观念形成的大众创造。时间概念只是一个例子，它导致了许多你们最珍视的错误观念。你们必须将观念形成物质化，才能认识到你们正在学习使用和理解的那些观念背后的力量。然而，这样的物质化只在某些层面是必要的。时间架构只在该框架内显得有效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As a continent does not exist alone, but also in relationship to other physical formations, so in your terms you form events so that they fit into a mass framework. You form your own reality. You do not form it isolated and alone, however. You are aware of other events, and take them into consideration, for example, regardless of appearances. You cannot force another person to experience an event he or she rejects. Nor can anyone act in like manner against you. So-called good or bad events each faithfully follow the inner mechanics.
quotes.translation: 正如一个大陆并非单独存在，而是与其他物质形成物相关联，所以用你们的说法，你们形成事件，使它们适合一个大众框架。你们形成自己的实相。然而，你们并非孤立地形成它。你们意识到其他事件，并考虑它们，例如，不论表象如何。你们不能强迫另一个人经历他或她拒绝的事件。也没有人能以类似方式违背你们行事。所谓的好或坏事件，都忠实地遵循内在的机制。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The settings in your physical environment, the sometimes lovely paraphernalia, the physical aspects of life as you know it, are all camouflages, and so I call your physical reality a camouflage. Yet these camouflages are composed of the vitality of the universe. The rocks and stones and mountains and earth are living camouflage, interlocking psychic webs formed by minute consciousnesses that you cannot perceive as such. The atoms and molecules within them have their own consciousness, as do the atoms and molecules with your body.
quotes.translation: 你们物质环境中的场景、有时可爱的装饰品、以及你们所认知的生命物质层面，全都是伪装，因此我称你们的物质实相为一种伪装。然而这些伪装是由宇宙的生命力所构成。岩石、石头、山脉与大地都是活生生的伪装，是由你们无法直接感知的细微意识所交织而成的心理网络。它们内部的原子与分子拥有自己的意识，正如你们身体内的原子与分子一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I will have to go into what we will call for now evolution at some time to explain the influence of the inner world upon the outer world, because the species to which you have the honor of belonging is now moving in the direction of breakthrough discoveries, as far as inner reality is concerned. There is much more to be said here, and you can count on me to say it.
quotes.translation: 我必须在某个时候探讨我们暂且称为"演化"的过程，以解释内在世界对外在世界的影响，因为你们有幸归属的这个物种，就内在实相而言，正朝着突破性发现的方向迈进。这里还有更多需要说明的，你们可以指望我来阐述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Actions have an electrical reality. Your outer senses do not perceive electrical realities of this nature. Nevertheless, you are a gestalt of electrical actions. Within the physical matter of your chromosomes there are electrically coded systems. These are not the chromosomes themselves. The chromosomes are the physical materialization of the inner electrical data.
quotes.translation: 行动具有电性实相。你们的外在感官无法感知这种性质的电气实相。然而，你们是电性行动的整体。在你们染色体的物质中，存在着电性编码系统。这些并非染色体本身，染色体是内在电性数据的物质化显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Remember that ideas are as natural as the weather. They follow patterns, then, and obey certain laws even as more strictly physical phenomena do. Unfortunately, no one examines the nature of mental reality from such a viewpoint. You will be born in the midst of certain mass beliefs, and these may vary according to the country of your nativity. As you come into your body with all of its physical surroundings, so at birth do you emerge into a rich natural psychological environment in which beliefs and ideas are every bit as real.
quotes.translation: 请记住，思想就像天气一样自然。它们遵循模式，服从特定法则，甚至比严格意义上的物理现象更有规律。遗憾的是，没有人从这个角度审视心灵实相的本质。你们将诞生于某些集体信念之中，这些信念可能因出生国家而异。正如你们带着所有物质环境进入身体，出生时你们也进入了一个丰富的自然心理环境，其中信念与思想同样真实不虚。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am again, not here praising the intuitions above the intellect. They are both intended for different purposes. They tune in on different realities, and all realities are actual. Nevertheless our last session, with its simplified explanation of development in terms that you can understand, should lead you to realize that because of the parallel development of the dream universe with the physical universe, the study of the dream universe will help you comprehend the basic inwardness behind the physical world that you inhabit.
quotes.translation: 我再次强调，并非在此推崇直觉而贬抑理智。它们各有不同用途，调频至不同的实相，而所有实相都是真实的。然而，我们上一节以你们能理解的简化方式解释发展过程，应该能让你们认识到：由于梦宇宙与物质宇宙平行发展，研究梦宇宙将有助于理解你们所居住的物质世界背后的内在本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Any action that affects the physical individual also has its reality within many other fields, and its effects and its nature are felt within them. A manuscript, or indeed any art form, contains action and sets up its own climate, either of psychological acceptance or rejection. This climate is more than the result of the materials or subject matter or nature of which the work is composed. It goes without saying that such a work actually contains a portion of focused psychic energy, which is action, and which has its effects.
quotes.translation: 任何影响物质个体的行动，在其他许多场域中也具有其实相，其效应与本质会在这些场域中被感知。一份手稿，或任何艺术形式，都包含行动并建立自身的气候——无论是心理上的接纳或排斥。这种气候远非作品的材料、主题或性质所能概括。不言而喻，这类作品实际上包含了一部分聚焦的心理能量，这种能量即是行动，并会产生其效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It did not occur to him that those experiences had anything to do with this book, or that in acting so spontaneously he was following any kind of inner order. He wanted these pages to follow neatly one by one. Each of his experiences, however, demonstrates the ways in which the psyche's direct experiences defy your prosaic concepts of time, reality, and the orderly sequence of events. They also served to point up the differences between knowledge and comprehension, and emphasize the importance of desire and of the emotions.
quotes.translation: 他从未想过那些经历与这本书有任何关联，也未曾意识到如此自发行动时他正遵循着某种内在秩序。他希望这些篇章能一页接一页地整齐排列。然而，他的每一次经历都彰显了心灵直接体验如何挑战你们对时间、现实和事件有序序列的平淡概念。这些经历还凸显了知识与理解之间的差异，并强调了渴望与情感的重要性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What gives life to chemicals now? That is the more proper question. All energy is (underlined) not only aware-ized but the source of all organizations of consciousness, and all physical forms. These represent frameworks of consciousness. (Long pause.) There was a day when the dreaming world, in your terms, suddenly awakened to full reality as far as physical materialization is concerned. The planet was visited by desire. There were ghost excursions there -- mental buildings, dream civilizations which then became actualized.
quotes.translation: 现在赋予化学物质生命的是什么？这才是更恰当的问题。所有能量不仅（着重号）被赋予了意识，更是所有意识组织及所有物质形态的源头。这些代表着意识的框架。（长停顿。）在你们的时间概念里，曾有那么一天，就物质显化而言，梦境世界突然觉醒为完整的现实。渴望降临了这颗行星。那里有过幽灵般的漫游——心灵建筑、梦境文明，随后它们被具体化。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 872, AUGUST 8, 1979
9:15 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: These secondary personalities, known to psychologists, have a much more important place within reality than is suspected. No psychic action is invalid. Every psychic action exists, has an effect and has durability in terms of value fulfillment. Every psychic action, and a psychic action is any psychic happening such as a dream, or thought, that may have no existence in terms of space and time, every psychic action then contains within it the potentialities of value fulfillment, transference, and even energy transformation.
quotes.translation: 心理学家所知的这些次级人格，在现实中的地位远比人们猜想的更为重要。没有哪种心灵行动是无效的。每一种心灵行动都存在、产生影响，并在价值完成方面具有持久性。每一种心灵行动——而心灵行动是指任何心灵事件，如梦境或思想，这些可能在时空层面不存在——每一种心灵行动都蕴含着价值完成、转移甚至能量转化的潜能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: All of an individual's experiences, even those of which he is not aware on a conscious basis, therefore are part of the electromagnetic reality that forms this particular individual's electromagnetic identity. It exists within the physical matter of the organism during existence within the physical system. While the experiences which form this framework and compose this individual's identity are obtained through his interaction with the physical system, his electromagnetic identity is not dependent upon the physical field.
quotes.translation: 因此，个体所有的经历，甚至那些他意识层面未察觉的经历，都是构成这个特定个体电磁身份的那部分电磁现实。在物理系统存在期间，它存在于有机体的物质之中。虽然构成这个框架并组成个体身份的经历是通过他与物理系统的互动获得的，但他的电磁身份并不依赖于物理场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Some of these may involve the thoughts of what you would call a reincarnational self, focused in another period of history as you know it. You may instead, "pick up" an event in which a probable self is involved, according to your inclination, your psychic suppleness, your curiosity, your desire for knowledge. In other words, you may become aware of a far greater reality than you now know, use abilities that you do not realize you possess, know beyond all doubt that your own consciousness and identity is independent of the world in which you now focus your primary attention. If all of that were not true, I would not be writing this book and you would not be reading it.
quotes.translation: 其中一些可能涉及你们所谓的转世自我的思想，聚焦于你们所知历史的另一个时期。根据你的倾向、心灵柔韧度、好奇心和对知识的渴望，你反而可能"捕捉"到一个涉及可能自我的事件。换言之，你可能会意识到比现在所知更广阔的现实，运用你尚未意识到自己拥有的能力，确凿无疑地知晓你自己的意识和身份独立于你目前主要关注的世界。如果这一切都不是真的，我就不会写这本书，你也不会读它。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One form may indeed serve, and then consciousness may project out of it into a new form that is familiar with other dimensions. In Ruburt's experience three different forms were used. He spoke, incidentally to his Father Trainor, and Lizzie Roohan together, while he was in the second form . He was then led by me into a further dimension of reality in which his third form was used. You must remember that all of these portions of the self exist at once, and that the whole inner self knows them as a part of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一种形态确实可以服务，然后意识可能从中投射进入一个熟悉其他维度的新形态。在鲁柏的经历中，使用了三种不同的形态。顺便说一句，当他处于第二种形态时，他与特雷纳神父和莉齐·鲁汉同时交谈。随后，我被引导进入一个更深的现实维度，在那里他使用了第三种形态。你必须记住，自我的所有这些部分同时存在，整个内在自我将它们视为自身身份的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no need to worry about your friend (Ruburt). We want you to realize that there is more than your human reality. We want you to realize that there is consciousness without form, that there is consciousness with will and vitality that comes to you from beyond even those places that your Seth knows. We want you to realize that though it is hard for us to communicate, we spoke with your race before your race learned language. We gave you mental images and upon these images you learned to form the world that you knew.
quotes.translation: 不必为你的朋友（鲁柏）担忧。我们希望你能明白，现实远不止你们人类所认知的范畴。我们希望你能认识到，存在无形无相的意识，存在具有意志与活力的意识，它们来自赛斯所知的领域之外。我们想让你明白，尽管沟通对我们而言十分困难，但在你们的种族学会语言之前，我们就曾与你们交流过。我们给予你们心灵意象，你们正是基于这些意象学会了构建所认知的世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, it is indeed a mirage, but it is a mirage with which you must deal. It is not so much, you see, as he thought, that nothing has meaning. Everything has so much meaning that basically no one thing can have more meaning than another, because all reality is implied within each sample of it.
quotes.translation: 这确实是一场幻象，但这是你必须面对的幻象。并非如他所想的那样——万物皆无意义。恰恰相反，万物蕴含的意义如此丰沛，以至于本质上没有任何事物能比另一事物更具意义，因为所有现实都隐含于其每个样本之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These minds all work together to keep you alive through the physical structure of the brain. When you use all of these minds, then and only then do you become fully aware of your surroundings: You perceive reality more clearly than you do now, more sharply, brilliantly, and concisely. At the same time, however, you comprehend it directly. You comprehend what it is apart from your physical perception of it. You accept as yourself those other states of consciousness native to your other minds. You achieve true personhood.
quotes.translation: 这些心智共同协作，通过大脑的物理结构维持你的生命。当你运用所有这些心智时，唯有此时你才能完全觉察周遭环境：你比现在更清晰地、更锐利地、更璀璨而精准地感知现实。然而与此同时，你直接领悟了它。你理解了它脱离物理感知后的本质。你将那些属于你其他心智的、与生俱来的意识状态接纳为自我的一部分。你实现了真正的人格完整。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Note that even though Seth finished dictating Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality almost three years ago (in June 1974), and I completed my own notes and appendixes for it six months ago, we're just now coming to the end of the long, complicated process involved in following the manuscript through the editorial and production stages necessary to get the book out into the marketplace. Checking the page proofs is the last stage we go through before publication, and Volume 1 is due to be marketed this summer -- probably in July.
quotes.translation: 请注意，尽管赛斯在三年前（1974年6月）就完成了《未知的实相》第一卷的口述，而我在六个月前也完成了自己的注释与附录，但我们此刻才刚走完漫长的编辑出版流程——从手稿审校到最终上市所需的生产环节。核对清样是出版前的最后阶段，第一卷预计今夏（很可能在七月）面市。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: NOTES: SESSION 801
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The inner ego is a portion of the self, for example -- is the portion of your self -- that is aware of your reincarnational activities. It is the part of you that exists outside of time, yet simultaneously lives in time. You form your own reality. The ego that you are aware of obviously could not form your body for you, however, or grow your bones. It knows how to assess the conditions of the world. It makes deductions. Your reasoning is highly important, yet alone it cannot pump your blood or tell your eyes how to see.
quotes.translation: 内在自我是自体的一部分——例如——它是你自体的一部分——它知晓你的转世活动。它是存在于时间之外，却又同时活在时间中的那个你。你构建了自己的现实。然而，你所觉察的自我显然无法为你塑造身体，或生长你的骨骼。它懂得评估世间境况，做出推论。你的推理能力至关重要，但仅凭它无法泵送血液，也无法指令眼睛如何观看。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 822, FEBRUARY 22, 1978
9:27 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Our environment therefore is composed of exquisite imbalances, where change is allowed full play. Your own time structure misleads you into your ideas of the relative permanency of physical matter, and you close your eyes to the constant alterations within it. Your physical senses confine you as best they can to the perception of a highly formalized reality. Only through the use of the intuitions and in sleep and dream states, as a rule, can you perceive the joyfully changing nature of your own, and any, consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，我们的环境由精妙的失衡构成，变化在其中得以充分展现。你们的时间结构误导你们产生物质相对恒久的错觉，你们对物质内部持续不断的变迁视而不见。你们的肉体感官尽其所能将你们禁锢于高度形式化的现实感知中。通常而言，唯有通过直觉的运用，以及在睡眠与梦境状态中，你们才能感知到自身及一切意识那欢快变化的本质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Man is a part of that trans-species consciousness also, as are the plants and animals. Also, part of man's reality contributes to that trans-species organization, but he has not chosen to focus his practical daily consciousness in that direction, or to identify his individuality with it. As a result he does not understand the greater natural mobility he himself possesses, nor can he practically perceive the natural psychological gestalts of which he is a part, that form all of your natural -- meaning physical -- world.
quotes.translation: 人类也是这种跨物种意识的一部分，植物和动物同样如此。人类实相的一部分也贡献给了这种跨物种组织，但他并未选择将日常实用意识聚焦于那个方向，也未将个体性与之认同。因此他既不了解自身所拥有的更大自然流动性，也无法实际感知构成你们所有自然（即物质）世界的那些心理完形——他本就是其中一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The root assumptions upon which physical reality is formed represent secure ground to the ego. We always operate with the ego's consent. It consents to step aside momentarily. It interprets the inner knowledge gained in its own way, true, but it is immeasurably enriched by so doing. Other layers of the self interpret the same inner experiences quite differently.
quotes.translation: 物质实相赖以形成的根本假设，对自我而言是安全的基础。我们始终在征得自我同意的前提下运作。它同意暂时退居一旁。诚然，它会以自己的方式诠释所获得的内在知识，但通过这样做，它自身得到了无可估量的丰富。自我的其他层面则会以截然不同的方式诠释同样的内在体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The dream experience is felt directly by the inner self. Dreams have an electric actuality, as I have told you. In this electrical actuality they then exist independently of the dreamer, although he still applies the dream to himself. In the same manner do thoughts and emotions have the electric reality of which I have spoken. Therefore, within the electric system, dreams, thoughts and emotions exist as actualities, and in what you may call a tangible form, though not in the form of matter as you are familiar with it.
quotes.translation: 内在自我直接感受梦境体验。如我曾告诉你们的，梦境具有电性实相。在这种电性实相中，它们独立于做梦者而存在，尽管做梦者仍将梦境应用于自身。思想与情感同样具有我说过的那种电性实相。因此，在电性系统内，梦境、思想和情感作为实相存在，且具有你们可称为"可触形式"的形态——尽管并非你们所熟悉的物质形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... True order and organization, even of biological structure, can be achieved only by granting a basic unpredictability. I am aware that this sounds startling. Basically, however, the motion of any wave or particle or entity is unpredictable -- freewheeling and undetermined. Your life structure is a result of that unpredictability. Your psychological structure is also. However, because you are presented with a fairly cohesive picture, in which certain laws seem to apply, you think that the laws come first and physical reality follows. Instead, the cohesive picture is the result of the unpredictable nature that is and must be basic to all energy.
quotes.translation: 请稍等……真正的秩序与组织，即便生物结构层面，也只能通过赋予基本不可预测性来实现。我知道这听起来令人震惊。但根本上，任何波动、粒子或实体的运动都是不可预测的——自由运转且未受决定。你们的生命结构正是这种不可预测性的结果。你们的心理结构亦然。然而，由于你们面对的是相当连贯的画面，其中某些法则似乎适用，你们便认为法则在先，物质实相随后。实则，这连贯画面正是不可预测本性的结果——这种本性是且必须是所有能量的基础。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This does not mean that it ignores its earlier functions. In true expansion of consciousness then, you become more and more aware, more conscious, underlined, of inner realities that were previously never realized on a conscious level. Since the ego is presently your main vehicle of consciousness, it will not be obliterated. It will indeed be resurrected. It simply changes not only its form, but its inner core, accepting as a part of itself realities which it previously ignored out of fear, ignorance and insecurity.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着它忽略早期功能。在真正的意识扩展中，你们会越来越觉察、越来越有意识地（强调）认识到那些先前从未在意识层面被认知的内在实相。既然自我目前是你们意识的主要载体，它不会被抹除。它确实会重生。它不仅改变自身形态，更改变内在核心，将先前因恐惧、无知与不安全感而忽视的实相接纳为自身的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am speaking of the portion of you who is taking part in this particular period piece, however; and that particular portion of your entire personality is so focused within this drama that you are not aware of the others in which you also play a role. You do not understand your own multidimensional reality; therefore it seems strange or unbelievable when I tell you that you live many existences at one time. It is difficult for you to imagine being in two places at once, much less in two or more times, or centuries.
quotes.translation: 不过，我指的是参与这场特定时代剧的那部分你；而你这整个人格的特定部分如此聚焦于这出戏剧，以至于你意识不到自己也在其中扮演角色的其他戏剧。你不了解自身多维度的实相；因此当我告诉你，你同时经历着许多存在时，这听起来奇怪或难以置信。你很难想象同时身处两地，更不用说同时存在于两个或更多时代、甚至多个世纪了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We have mentioned reincarnation hardly at all (but see the 631st session in Chapter Seven), yet here let me state that the theory is a conscious-mind interpretation in linear terms. On the one hand it is highly distorted. On the other hand it is a creative interpretation, as the conscious mind plays with reality as it understands it. But in the terms used there is no karma to be paid off as punishment unless you believe that there are crimes for which you must pay (as indicated in the 614th session in Chapter Two).
quotes.translation: 我们几乎从未提及转世（但见第七章第631节），然而在此我要说明，转世理论是意识心以线性方式进行的诠释。一方面它高度扭曲，另一方面它又是创造性的诠释——意识心以其理解方式与实相嬉戏。但就所用术语而言，不存在必须偿还的业债作为惩罚，除非你相信有些罪行必须付出代价（如第二章第614节所述）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many of the most powerful aspects of consciousness are at work precisely when it seems to you that you are relatively unconscious and asleep to physical reality. It would be impossible for you to handle the vast amount of material available, in the context of time as you presently experience it. To operate adequately in your highly specific field (pause), an almost infinite amount of information must be instantly assimilated, probabilities calculated, and certain balances maintained of which you are not even aware.
quotes.translation: 意识最强大的许多面向，恰恰在你看似对物质实相相对无意识或沉睡时运作。以你当前体验的时间框架，根本不可能处理可获得的浩瀚资料。要在高度特定的领域中恰当运作（停顿），必须瞬间吸收近乎无限的信息、计算概率、维持某些你甚至未曾察觉的平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In your probability you did allow the inner self some freedom. Therefore, the so-called egotistical consciousness was not given complete sway. It remained flexible enough so that even hidden in its god concepts4 there were symbols of greater reality. Your system deals with physical manipulability, again, and the translation of creativity into physical form. An exterior separation had to occur for a while, in which consciousness forgot, egotistically speaking, that it was a part of nature, and pretended to be apart.
quotes.translation: 在你的概率中，你确实允许内在自我拥有某种自由。因此，所谓的自我意识并未获得完全支配权。它保持足够弹性，以至于即便隐藏在其神祇概念4中，仍存有更伟大实相的象征。你的系统处理的是物质可操作性，以及将创造力转化为物质形态。必须暂时产生外在分离——从自我角度而言，意识忘记自己是自然的一部分，假装与之分离。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This is simply an analogy because you are steeped in that other reality constantly; but its illuminations and nature are transmitted to the self that you know through the formation of dreams, and in your terms, "it takes time to dream." This larger experience, from which your dreams are finally formed, involves you in a kind of journey. Period. Using another analogy, it is as if you joyfully leave the normal paraphernalia of usual life behind, and ride aboard your own greater psyche into vaster seas of experience.
quotes.translation: 这仅是个比喻，因为你始终浸润于那另一种实相中；但其光辉与本质通过梦境的形成传递给你所知的自我，用你的话说，"做梦需要时间"。最终形成你梦境的这种更大体验，将你卷入某种旅程。句号。再用一个比喻：仿佛你欣然抛下日常生活的寻常行头，乘着自己更伟大的心灵，航向更浩瀚的经验之海。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In certain terms, the ego is the eye through which the conscious mind perceives, or the focus through which it views physical reality. But the conscious mind automatically changes its focus throughout life. The ego, while appearing the same to itself, ever changes. It is only when the conscious mind becomes rigid in its direction, or allows the ego to take on some of its own functions, that difficulties arise. Then the ego allows the conscious mind to work in certain directions and blocks its awareness in others.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度说，自我是意识心用以感知的眼睛，或它聚焦物质实相的焦点。但意识心终其一生自动改变焦点。自我看似始终如一，实则不断变化。只有当意识心方向僵化，或允许自我接管部分自身功能时，困难才会产生。此时自我允许意识心朝某些方向运作，同时阻断它对其他方向的觉知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The gestalt patterns of which I have spoken is the basis here, and yet all members within such gestalts are themselves independent, possessing identity and separation even while they cooperate in a complicated pattern. It is arbitrary; that is, from your viewpoint you arbitrarily choose certain portions of reality and call them units, marking them off. But your divisions do not affect the nature of these gestalts, as my discussion speaks of separate universes without affecting the nature of any universe one whit.
quotes.translation: 我所说的完形模式在此是基础，然而这类完形中的所有成员本身都是独立的——即便在复杂模式中合作时，仍拥有身份与分离性。这是武断的：从你的视角，你任意选取实相的某些部分称之为单位，加以标记。但你的划分并不影响这些完形的本质，正如我的讨论提及分离的宇宙，却丝毫未影响任何宇宙的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You each have your own earth god. The term may not be the best, but it is meant to express that portion of you that is as yet unexpressed in your terms -- the idealized earth version of yourself, which you are becoming. The idealized earth version is not meant to mean a perfect self in flesh at all; instead, it represents a psychic reality in which your own abilities fulfill themselves in relationship with your earthly environment to the fullest extent possible, within the time and place you have already chosen.
quotes.translation: 你们每个人都有自己的土地神。这个术语或许不是最佳选择，但意在表达你们尚未在自身层面展现的那部分自我——你们正在成为的理想化尘世版本。理想化尘世版本绝非指肉身中的完美自我；相反，它代表一种心灵实相，在其中你们的能力得以在已选择的时间与地点内，与尘世环境建立最充分的互动关系。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 691
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Now if you wish, Quality-depth operates within the value climate of psychological reality, and gives truly amazing dimension to the spacious present, which is contained within the value climate of psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 若你愿意，品质深度在心理实相的价值气候中运作，为容纳于心理实相价值气候内的广阔当下赋予真正惊人的维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: He (Ruburt) was bound and determined to explore the nature of reality.1 ... He wanted to protect himself until he had enough knowledge to know what he was doing. He fears for the gullibility of people, and is rightly appalled at their superstitions -- as you are, Joseph (as Seth calls me). Indeed, as Ruburt became aware of the little that is known, he wondered at his own daring. There was no one he could turn to for instruction. I could have helped him further, but I was [part of what he was investigating] ...
quotes.translation: 他（鲁柏）决心探索实相的本质。他希望在获得足够认知前保护自己，以免盲目行事。他担忧人们的轻信，并对他们的迷信感到震惊——正如你约瑟（赛斯对我的称呼）一样。事实上，当鲁柏意识到已知之渺小时，不禁对自己的勇气感到惊奇。他无人可求教。我本可进一步协助他，但我正是他探索的一部分……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 692)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: So, often such dreams are like programmed dramas, in that you clothe such visitations in familiar props. The same sort of thing frequently occurs when you experience extraordinary flashes of inspiration, or perceive other unofficial data. Quickly you try to make sense of such material in usual terms. An out-of-body experience into another level of reality becomes a visit to heaven, for example; or the heretofore-unrecognized voice of your own greater identity becomes the voice of God, or a spaceman or prophet.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类梦境常如编排好的戏剧，你们用熟悉的道具装点这些访客。当你们经历非凡的灵感闪现或感知非官方资料时，类似情况也频繁发生。你们会迅速试图用惯常术语理解这些素材。例如，进入另一实相层级的出体经验会被诠释为造访天堂；而你们更大身份那未被辨识的声音，则被当作神、外星人或先知之语。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: Do the exercises in my book, The Nature of Personal Reality, to discover what conditions of a mental nature, or of psychological origin, are causing you distress. Instead of taking an aspirin for a headache, sit down, breathe quietly, and remind yourself that you are an integral part of the universe. Allow yourself to feel a sense of belonging with nature. Such an exercise can often relieve a headache in no time. But each such experience will allow you to build up a sense of trust in your own body's processes.
quotes.translation: 请练习我著作《个人实相的本质》中的方法，以发现何种心智状态或心理根源正在造成你的痛苦。头痛时别急着吃阿司匹林，静坐调息，提醒自己是宇宙不可分割的部分。让自己感受与自然的归属感。这类练习常能即刻缓解头痛。每次体验都将助你建立对身体运作机制的信任。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 870, AUGUST 1, 1979
9:21 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Any event that you perceive is only a portion of the true dimensionality of that event. The observer and the object perceived are a part of the same event, each changing the other. This interrelationship always exists in any system of reality and at any level of activity. In certain terms, for example, even an electron "knows" it is being observed through your instrument. The electrons within the instrument itself have a relationship with the electron that scientists may be trying to "isolate" for examination.
quotes.translation: 你感知的任何事件都只是该事件真实维度的一部分。观察者与被观察对象同属一个事件，彼此相互改变。这种互存关系存在于任何实相系统与活动层面。从某种角度而言，即便电子也"知道"自己正被你的仪器观测。仪器内部的电子与科学家试图"隔离"研究的电子之间，始终存在着关联。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We were speaking, among other things, of intensities, and this is connected with both dream symbols and other such data. Dreams, having an electrical reality as I explained, must be decoded to have meaning to various levels of the subconscious and the personality. In Ruburt's predictions he has only begun. There will be other significant data that will be observed, as he learns to use his ability. And much of this significant material that he will observe from his predictions will also apply to dream symbols.
quotes.translation: 我们之前谈到过强度，这既与梦境符号有关，也与其他类似资料相连。如我所解释的，梦境具有电性实相，必须被解码才能对潜意识与人格的不同层面产生意义。在鲁柏的预测中，他才刚刚起步。当他学会运用自己的能力时，将会观察到其他重要的资料。而他通过预测所观察到的这些重要素材，许多也将适用于梦境符号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You exist in more dimensions than you know, and your own reality (voice quite a bit louder and stronger) transcends your understanding, and transcends the limitations of your own intellectual knowledge... (pace faster, still fairly loud) these truths must be understood intuitively.... In quiet moments of your existence... (faster here) you will know your part in creation... uniqueness, and your own individuality (now slower), for through your own individuality what you call God expresses himself and is known.
quotes.translation: 你存在于比你已知的更多维度中，你自己的实相（声音明显更响亮有力）超越你的理解，也超越你自身智性知识的局限……（语速加快，仍相当响亮）这些真理必须凭直觉领悟……在你存在的宁静时刻……（此处加快）你将知晓自己在创造中的角色……独特性，以及你自己的个体性（现在放慢），因为通过你的个体性，你所称为的上帝得以表达自身并被认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: The rules within physical reality say that objects appear to be stationary and permanent. The rules of other realities are often far different, however. The nature of mental activities will follow different lines, and "continuity" in terms of time will not exist. Perceptual organization will exist by the use of different psychological groupings. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 现在：物质实相中的规则表明，物体看似静止而恒久。然而其他实相的规则往往大不相同。心智活动的本质将遵循不同路径，而时间意义上的"连续性"将不复存在。知觉组织将通过运用不同的心理群组而存在。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: My environment, as I mentioned earlier, is not one of a personality recently dead in your terms, but later I will describe what you can expect under those conditions. One large difference between your environment and mine is that you must physically materialize mental acts as physical matter. We understand the reality of mental acts and recognize their brilliant validity. We accept them for what they are, and therefore we are beyond the necessity to materialize them and interpret them in such a rigid manner.
quotes.translation: 如我之前所提，我的环境并非你们所谓近期去世之人格所处的环境，但稍后我会描述你在那些条件下可以期待什么。你的环境与我的环境之间一个重大差异是：你必须将心智行为以物质形式具体化为物质。我们理解心智行为的实相，并认可其辉煌的有效性。我们接受它们的本来面目，因此无需以如此僵化的方式将它们物质化并加以诠释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: -- working on the interior patterns that will form the next day's realities, and providing probable previews of future events. Waking and sleeping reality is therefore balanced in the world mind -- not the world brain.
quotes.translation: ——在内在模式上运作，这些模式将形成次日的实相，并提供未来事件的可能性预览。因此，醒时与睡时实相在世界心智——而非世界大脑——中得以平衡。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When I speak of the electrical universe, indeed this represents but one more facet of reality. But all of these universes are indeed one. You remember our discussion concerning density of intensities. Here is the secret, if you could but see it: Even though the electrical universe might seem to you far divorced from what you know, nevertheless you dwell within it. Your own emotions have an independent existence within it. And your own possibilities within it are unlimited. But even this is also a camouflage.
quotes.translation: 当我谈及电性宇宙时，这确实只代表实相的另一个面向。但所有这些宇宙实则为一。你还记得我们关于强度密度的讨论吗？这就是秘密所在，若你能看见的话：即便电性宇宙在你看来似乎与你所知的一切相去甚远，你仍栖身其中。你自己的情感在其中拥有独立的存在。而你在其中的可能性是无限的。但即便如此，这也是一种伪装。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Time, in your terms, is plastic. Most predictions are made in a highly distorted fashion; they can lead the public astray. Not only that, but when the predictors fall flat on their faces it does not help "The Cause." Reality does not exist in that fashion. You can tune in to certain probabilities and predict "that they will occur," but free will always operates. No god in a giant ivory tower says, "This will happen February 15 at 8:05." And if no god predicts, then I do not see the point of doing so myself.
quotes.translation: 以你们的时间观念来说，时间是可塑的。大多数预言都以高度扭曲的方式做出；它们可能误导公众。不仅如此，当预言者彻底失败时，对"那个事业"也毫无帮助。实相并非以那种方式存在。你可以调准到某些或然性并预测"它们将会发生"，但自由意志始终在运作。没有哪位坐在巨大象牙塔里的神会说："这件事将在2月15日8点05分发生。"如果连神都不做预言，我看不出自己有什么理由这么做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: My definition of magic is this: Magic is nature unimpeded, or magic is life unimpeded. It is true that your thoughts and emotions and beliefs form the reality that you experience -- but it is also true that this creative construction is, in a manner of speaking, magically formed. That is, the construction of your body and the construction of a world (pause) are produced with the greatest combination of order and spontaneity -- an order and spontaneity that seems hidden rather than apparent (all intently).
quotes.translation: 我对魔法的定义是这样的：魔法是未受阻碍的自然，或者说魔法是未受阻碍的生命。你的思想、情感和信念确实形成了你所体验的实相——但同样真实的是，这种创造性的建构，从某种意义上说，是以魔法的方式形成的。也就是说，你身体的建构和世界的建构（停顿）是以秩序与自发性最完美的结合而产生的——一种看似隐藏而非明显的秩序与自发性（全神贯注地）。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Your question about transmigration (in Session 903 in Dreams) was an excellent one, and did indeed make the matter clear. It is a temptation at times to use more specific scientific terms, but these would be as confusing as the various definitions and classifications (with humor) that you read in the dictionary, so overall we try to hit a "happy medium." (With more humor.)

quotes.text: Now: The senses that you use, in a very real manner, create the environment that you perceive. Your physical senses necessitate the perception of a three-dimensional reality. Consciousness is equipped with inner perceptors, however. These are inherent within all consciousness, regardless of its development. These perceptors operate quite independently from those that might be assumed when a given consciousness adopts a specialized form, such as a physical body, in order to operate in a particular system.
quotes.translation: 现在：你所使用的感官，以一种非常真实的方式，创造了你所感知的环境。你的肉体感官必然导致对三维实相的感知。然而，意识配备了内在的感知器。这些感知器内在于所有意识之中，无论其发展程度如何。当某个意识为了在特定系统中运作而采取专门的形式（如肉体）时，这些感知器完全独立于那些可能被假设的感知器而运作。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The mind is also equipped to see its own beliefs, reflect upon them and evaluate their results, so using this tool as it was meant to be used would automatically help man in recognizing both his beliefs and their effects. Part of this great permissiveness has to do with the fact that man is to realize that he creates his own reality. Free will is a necessity. The leeway given allows him to materialize his ideas, meet them in physical experience, and evaluate for himself their particular kind of validity.
quotes.translation: 心智也配备了看见自身信念、反思它们并评估其结果的能力，因此，按照这个工具本来的用途使用它，自然会帮助人认识到自己的信念及其影响。这种极大的容许性部分与以下事实有关：人要认识到他创造了自己的实相。自由意志是必要的。所给予的余地让他能够将自己的想法具体化，在物质体验中遇见它们，并自行评估它们那种特定的有效性。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This material is leading up to some future discussions, and the nature of action will be most important. Action is as valid whether the act is conscious and voluntary, or whether it occurs within a dream or within a thought. It is as much a reality either way. Again, it is not an outside force. It arises from within the inner vitality of which all camouflage is composed. To some degree it is a result of inner vitality's attempt to completely express itself in materializations, and its inability to do so.
quotes.translation: 这些材料正在为未来的某些讨论做准备，而行动的本质将是最重要的。无论行动是有意识且自愿的，还是发生在梦境或思想中，它都同样有效。无论哪种方式，它都同样是实相。再次强调，它不是一种外在力量。它源于所有伪装所由构成的内在活力。在某种程度上，它是内在活力试图在物质化中完全表达自己，却又无法做到的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now these same sort of emotional systems operate under all conditions, and they regulate the kinds of experience to which an individual is susceptible or open, and they close out from his awareness those experiences which he has already decided he will not accept. Again, the emotional attitudes have their own electromagnetic reality. This field or system will therefore attract certain experiences, close out others, allow others to come so close and no closer, as is the case with Marleno and our sessions.
quotes.translation: 现在，这些相同类型的情感系统在所有条件下运作，它们调节着个体容易或愿意接受的经验种类，并将他已经决定不接受的经验从他的意识中排除。再次强调，情感态度有其自身的电磁实相。因此，这个场域或系统会吸引某些经验，排除其他经验，让另一些经验靠近到一定程度便不再靠近，就像马勒诺和我们课程的情况一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When you travel into such realms you usually do so from the dream state, still carrying your private symbols with you. Even here, these are automatically translated into experience. This is not your own codified system, however. You may journey through such a reality, perceiving it opaquely, layering it over with your own perceived symbols, and taking those for the "real" environment. In these terms the real environment will be that which was generally perceived by the natural inhabitants of the system.
quotes.translation: 当你进入这类领域时，通常是从梦境状态出发，仍携带着你的私人符号。即使在此处，这些符号也会自动转化为经验。然而，这并非你个人的编码系统。你或许会穿越这样的实相，以模糊的方式感知它，用你自身感知的符号层层覆盖，并将这些符号误认为"真实"环境。就这些术语而言，真实环境将是该系统的自然居民普遍感知到的那个环境。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 710
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: (Slowly:) The dream state, however, does operate as a rich web of communication between probable selves and probable existences. All probabilities spring from inner reality, from the psyche's own inner activity and structure. (Long pause.) The consciousness that you know can indeed now emerge into even greater realization of itself, but not by obsessively defending its old position. Instead it must recognize its power as the director of probable action, and no longer inhibit its own greater capacities.
quotes.translation: （缓慢地：）然而，梦境状态确实充当了可能自我与可能存在之间丰富的沟通网络。所有可能性都源自内在实相，源自心灵自身的内在活动与结构。（长停顿。）你所知的意识确实能够进入对自身更伟大的觉知，但不是通过执着地捍卫其旧有立场。相反，它必须认识到自己作为可能行动导演的力量，不再抑制自身更伟大的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 687
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You must still deal with physical reality, for it is definitely the representation of inner data. I have said this constantly: Expectation is behind all Sense data, and forms it. I have told you--and incidentally my lovely skeptics I have told you in the past--that you create your own physical environment and universe. Your physical condition in every way is a reflection of your inner expectations, accomplishments, and failures, and I have told you that any illness is the result of an inner distortion.
quotes.translation: 你仍必须处理物质实相，因为它无疑是内在数据的呈现。我一直在说：期望是一切感官资料背后的东西，并塑造了它。我告诉过你们——顺便提一下，我可爱的怀疑者们，我过去告诉过你们——你们创造了自己的物质环境和宇宙。你们身体状况的方方面面都是内在期望、成就与失败的反映，我也告诉过你们，任何疾病都是内在扭曲的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You cannot separate your beliefs about reality from the reality that you experience. That is, your beliefs about reality form it. Your ideas about what is possible and what is not possible are reflected in all areas.
quotes.translation: 你无法将你对实相的信念与你所体验的实相分开。也就是说，你对实相的信念塑造了它。你对什么是可能的、什么是不可能的想法，反映在所有领域。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 684
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Ideas form reality, so the body is used to reacting to some "imaginary" situations in which, for example, the mind conjures up dire circumstances which do not physically exist; but these still force the organism into an over-activation, setting up a state of stress. In massive drug therapy the body feels in greatest threat, for it is forced to use all of its resources while its own signals tell it that the messages it is getting do not have a correlation -- and yet they are of the most urgent nature.
quotes.translation: 观念形成实相，因此身体习惯于对某些"想象"情境做出反应——例如，心灵构想出并不实际存在的可怕情境；但这些情境仍迫使有机体过度激活，造成压力状态。在大规模药物治疗中，身体感受到最大威胁，因为它被迫动用所有资源，而自身的信号告诉它，它接收到的信息缺乏对应性——然而这些信息又具有最紧迫的性质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Do not place the words of gurus, ministers, priests, scientists, psychologists, friends -- or my words -- higher than the feelings of your own being. You can learn much from others, but the deepest knowledge must come from within yourself. Your own consciousness is embarked upon a reality that basically can be experienced by no other, that is unique and untranslatable, with its own meaning, following its own paths of becoming.
quotes.translation: 不要将古鲁、牧师、祭司、科学家、心理学家、朋友的话语——或我的话——置于你自身存在的感受之上。你可以从他人那里学到很多，但最深的知识必须来自你自身。你自己的意识正投身于一个本质上无法被他人体验的实相，它是独特且不可翻译的，拥有自身意义，遵循自身成道的路径。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Such subjective events therefore manipulate physical matter through the personality who experiences them. The field of reality for any given personality must and does include all these areas of activity, for they give form and dimension to his existence. I have said earlier that the individual could not exist in a physical universe if he did not also exist in the dream universe. Again, there are chemical and electromagnetic connections that cannot be severed between all these states of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 因此，这类主观事件通过体验它们的人格来操控物质。任何人格的现实领域必然且确实包含所有这些活动领域，因为它们赋予其存在以形态和维度。我之前说过，如果个体不存在于梦境宇宙中，他就无法存在于物质宇宙中。同样，所有这些意识状态之间存在着无法切断的化学与电磁连接。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You must remember that the word, time, is itself distorted. It projects limitations upon other systems of reality that do not exist. We must use it for our explanations, but nontime comes far closest to the reality.
quotes.translation: 你必须记住，"时间"这个词本身已被扭曲。它将并不存在的限制投射到其他现实系统上。我们不得不使用它来进行解释，但"非时间"才最接近现实的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The abilities, strengths and variants that you may want to actualize are already latent, in your terms, and at your disposal. Suppose that you are unhealthy and desire health. If you understand the nature of probabilities, you will not need to pretend to ignore your present situation. You will recognize it instead as a probable reality that you have physically materialized. Taking that for granted, you will then begin the process necessary to bring a different probability into physical experience.
quotes.translation: 你希望实现的那些能力、力量与变体，用你们的说法，早已潜伏着，并可供你支配。假设你身体不健康并渴望健康。如果你理解或然性的本质，就无需假装忽视当前状况。你反而会将其视为你已物质化的一个或然现实。在确认这一点后，你便会开始将不同或然性带入物质体验的必要过程。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Many past beliefs were automatically shattered in the reality of the moment. Powers of initiation and action, long buried, were released in numberless individuals. Federal funds were directed instantly to this region. The spotlight was turned on to the section. (Pause.) Many lonely people were forced, or rather forced themselves, into a situation where it was imperative that they relate with others. Since this is not the main topic of this book, I cannot go deeply into the ways and means involved.
quotes.translation: 许多过去的信念在当下的现实中自动瓦解。长期被埋藏的主动性与行动力，在无数个体中被释放。联邦资金立即被调拨至该区域。聚光灯转向了那个地区。（停顿）许多孤独的人被迫——更确切地说，是迫使自己——进入必须与他人建立联系的处境。由于这并非本书的主题，我无法深入探讨所涉及的方式方法。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now I mean this literally. Reality is on the one hand the product of perception. On the other hand that which is, is always present as the basis for any perception. That which is perceives itself, you see. The unitary self is basically an illusions and yet individuality is no illusion.
quotes.translation: 现在，我这话是字面意思。现实一方面是感知的产物。另一方面，存在本身始终作为任何感知的基础而存在。存在感知自身，你明白吗。统一的自性从根本上说是幻象，然而个体性绝非幻象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In this reality, you very nicely emphasize all the similarities which bind you together; you make a pattern of them, and you very nicely ignore all the dissimilarities. Out of a vast field of perception, you choose to focus your attention upon certain specific areas and to ignore all others, and so there is perfect agreement among you as far as this small area is concerned. The vastness that you do not perceive does not bother you at all, and you do not ask questions about it. And yet it exists.
quotes.translation: 在这个现实中，你巧妙地强调所有将你们联结在一起的相似性；你将其编织成模式，并巧妙地忽略所有相异性。从广阔的感知场域中，你选择将注意力聚焦于某些特定区域而忽略其他一切，因此在这小范围内你们之间达成了完美共识。你们未曾感知到的浩瀚完全不会困扰你们，你们也从不对此发问。然而它确实存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Man's physical world, with all of its civilizations and cultural aspects, and even with its technologies and sciences, basically represents the species' innate drive to communicate, to move outward, to create, and to objectify sensed inner realities. The most private life imaginable is a very social affair. The most secluded recluse must still depend upon the biological sociability of not only his own body cells, but of the natural world with all of its creatures. The body, then, no matter how private, is also a public, social, biological statement. A spoken sentence has a certain structure in any language. It presupposes a mouth and a tongue, the kind of physical organization necessary; a mind; a certain kind of world in which sounds have meaning; and a very precise, quite practical knowledge of the nature of sounds, the combination of their patterns, the use of repetition, and a knowledge of the nervous system. Few of my readers possess such conscious knowledge, yet the majority speak quite well.
quotes.translation: 人类的物质世界，连同其所有文明与文化层面，甚至包括科技与科学，基本上代表了该物种与生俱来的驱动力——去沟通、向外拓展、创造，并将感知到的内在实相客观化。最私密的生活想象起来也是一件非常社会化的事。最与世隔绝的隐士仍必须依赖不仅是自身身体细胞的生物社会性，还有自然界及其所有造物的生物社会性。因此，无论身体多么私密，它也是一种公开的、社会的、生物性的陈述。任何语言中，一个说出的句子都有特定结构。它预设了嘴巴和舌头，以及必要的物理组织；一个心智；一个声音具有意义的特定世界；以及对声音本质、模式组合、重复运用、神经系统运作的精确且实用的知识。我的读者中很少有人具备这种有意识的知识，但大多数人说得相当好。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 804, MAY 9, 1977
9:44 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Now in many ways this applies to Ruburt also. The two of you seek refreshment together, then plunge into your inner realities. He is more Emotionally attuned than you, in that it is easier for him, when coming out of his private world, to rush toward you with spontaneity. You are both equally dependent however, basically, on this necessary Emotional refreshment. You both drink it in, and it sustains you for some period. It is used in your work, and in your joint work. It forms an inner framework of which you are sometimes aware. (Smile.) Without your feeling toward Ruburt and the resulting urge to Emotionally actualize yourself to another personality, your background could have prevented even artistic development. (Pause.) Rather than serve as a springboard for creativity.
quotes.translation: 现在，这在许多方面也适用于鲁柏。你们俩一起寻求滋养，然后投入各自的内在实相。他比你更情绪协调，因为当他走出私人世界时，更容易自发地冲向你。然而，你们俩基本上都同样依赖这种必要的情绪滋养。你们汲取它，它支撑你们一段时间。它被用于你们各自的工作以及共同的工作。它形成了一个内在框架，你们有时能意识到它。（微笑。）若没有你对鲁柏的感觉以及由此产生的、在情绪上向另一个个体实现自己的冲动，你的背景甚至可能阻碍艺术发展。（停顿。）而非成为创造力的跳板。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The great communication system within the body itself is dependent, then, upon the constant inner flux and flow of these units. On one level the body's very survival is largely determined by the units' propensities for selectivity and significance. Also, however, the body's physical reality is a seeming constant in a seemingly constant physical existence.
quotes.translation: 身体内部伟大的沟通系统，因此依赖于这些单位的持续内在流动与流转。在一个层面上，身体本身的生存很大程度上取决于这些单位对选择性和重要性的倾向。然而，身体的物质实相在一个看似恒常的物质存在中，也只是一个看似恒常的东西。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json
