quotes.text: Now. It is not likely that I will be heard by anyone for some time in the way that Philip heard me speak. Again, the condition simply happened to be favorable. I have told you that all action is psychic action, but the terms used make little difference. All action does have an electromagnetic reality, which is usually not perceived by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 现在。在相当一段时间内，不太可能有人像菲利普听到我说话那样听到我。再说一次，那条件只是恰好有利。我告诉过你，一切行动都是心灵行动，但所用术语并无大碍。一切行动确实具有电磁实相，这通常不被物质感官所感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dictation. Now: Dreams occur at so many levels of reality that it is quite impossible to describe their true scope. For one thing, that scope includes levels that are consciously unknown to you. (Long pause.) Dreams serve as backup systems also, for example, in the important communications between various peoples or nations--and, particularly when physical communication is cut off between such groups, dreams provide the continuation of information's flow from one part of the species to another.
quotes.translation: 口述。现在：梦发生在如此多的实相层面，以至于完全不可能描述其真实范围。首先，这个范围包括你意识上未知的层面。（长停顿。）梦也作为备份系统，例如，在不同民族或国家之间的重要沟通中——尤其是当这些群体之间的物质沟通被切断时，梦提供了信息流从物种一部分流向另一部分的延续。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There may be the appearance of a time lapse of one kind or another between mental actions and their appearance or projection into other systems, but this is a distortive effect. Such distortive effects, such distortions, are often correlated within a given system, and accepted as a foundation for the nature of reality. And all further data is then accepted according to the easiness with which it can be accepted within this framework, the distortions being mistaken for the actuality behind them.
quotes.translation: 在心灵行动与其显现或投射到其他系统之间，可能存在某种时间差的外观，但这是扭曲效应。这种扭曲效应，这类扭曲，往往在特定系统内被关联起来，并被接受为实相本质的基础。所有进一步的数据随后根据其在此框架内被接受的难易程度而被接受，而扭曲则被误认为是其背后的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There is a delicate connection here with the dream universe that is somewhat difficult to explain. The dream universe, however, pervades many other fields. It does not exist outside or apart from your own universe, but simultaneously with it. It appears, and is a reality, to all aspects or portions of the self, and often it is only within the dream universe that the personality can change focus easily or efficiently enough so that he can perceive the variety of roles that he himself has played.
quotes.translation: 这里与梦境宇宙存在着微妙的关联，这有点难以解释。然而，梦境宇宙渗透了许多其他领域。它并非存在于你的宇宙之外或与之分离，而是与之同时存在。它对自我的所有面向或部分显现，并且是一个实相，通常只有在梦境宇宙中，人格才能足够轻松或有效地转换焦点，从而感知到自己所扮演的各种角色。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The chemical doorway into inner reality is indeed a doorway. In one regard, this is a projection from a molecular standpoint. What is not understood is that worlds exist between one molecule and another, and worlds that you do not understand. You could get lost in the life and death of a molecule under such conditions, and I am speaking in literal terms.
quotes.translation: 通往内在实相的化学门户确实是一道门。从某个角度来看，这是从分子层面的投射。人们不理解的是，世界存在于一个分子与另一个分子之间，是你们不理解的世界。在这样的条件下，你可能会迷失在分子的生死之中，而我是按字面意思说的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I have also discussed reincarnation in terms of environment because many schools of thought over-emphasize the effects of reincarnational existences, so that often they explain present-life circumstances as a result of rigid and uncompromising patterns determined in a "past" life. You will feel relatively incompetent to handle present physical reality, to alter your environment, to affect and change your world, if you feel that you are at the mercy of conditions over which you have no control.
quotes.translation: 我也从环境的角度讨论过转世，因为许多思想学派过分强调转世存在的影响，以至于他们常常将今生的境况解释为“前世”所决定的僵化且不妥协的模式的结果。如果你觉得自己受制于无法控制的条件，你就会感到相对无力处理当前的物质实相、改变你的环境、影响和改变你的世界。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They have little to do with the nature of basic reality. Distance has nothing to do with space. Realities that you can only perceive in terms of light can, for example, exist as sound, as motion, as color, and can have dimensions with which you are completely unfamiliar. We will end up talking about your quasars, but first we need introductory material.
quotes.translation: 它们与基本实相的本质几乎无关。距离与空间无关。例如，你们只能以光的形式感知的实相，可以以声音、运动、色彩的形式存在，并且可以具有你们完全不熟悉的维度。我们最终会讨论你们的类星体，但首先我们需要介绍性材料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: He simply adds some of his energy to that present in the animal, mixing this vitality with the animal's own. This does not mean that all animals are fragments in this manner, however. Animals, as any pet owner knows, have their own personalities and characteristics, and individual ways of perceiving the reality available to them. Some gobble experience. Their consciousness can be immeasurably quickened by contact with friendly humans, and emotional involvement with life is strongly developed.
quotes.translation: 他只是将自己的一些能量添加到动物体内现有的能量中，将这种活力与动物自身的活力混合。然而，这并不意味着所有动物都是以这种方式形成的碎片。正如任何宠物主人所知，动物有自己的个性和特征，以及感知它们可触及的实相的独特方式。有些动物狼吞虎咽地体验。通过与友善的人类接触，它们的意识可以得到不可估量的加速，并且与生命的情感投入得到了强烈发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而，自我还有其他的自我意识部分，自我完全不熟悉它们，但潜意识对它们有直觉性的了解。自我的这些自我意识部分存在于不同的实相系统中。然而，在我们进入我们的“因斯特里姆博士”资料之前，让我提醒你，存在着一个整体自我，由这些不同的自我意识自我组成，而自我的一个部分确实意识到形成整体心理完形体的统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There religious interests, therefore, are repeated in the present personality, but efforts are made to tie these ideas into the world of so-called reality. The interest in extrasensory perception, the interest in science and religion, all represent efforts on his part to tie various of his older personalities together, and to learn from their mistakes.
quotes.translation: 因此，宗教兴趣在现有人格中重复出现，但努力将这些理念与所谓的现实世界联系起来。对超感官知觉的兴趣、对科学与宗教的兴趣，都代表他试图将自身各种较老的人格整合在一起，并从它们的错误中学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: These are not sharp images, but he already begins to build up ideas of shape and form. It goes without saying that the eyelids are also thus equipped. He can see through closed eyelids in other words. He is aware of light and shadow, of shape and form, though he must learn to distinguish those portions of the available field of reality that you accept as objects, from the available field that you do not accept as objects.
quotes.translation: 这些并非清晰的影像，但他已开始构建形状与形态的概念。不言而喻，眼睑同样具备这种能力。换句话说，他能透过闭合的眼睑看见东西。他感知光与影、形状与形态，尽管他必须学会区分你们所接受的现实场域中那些被视为物体的部分，与你们不接受的现实场域中的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: To identify man with his poorest works is to purposefully seek out the mars, the mistakes, of a fine artist, and then to condemn him. To do this is to condemn yourselves personally. If a scientist says consciousness is the result of chance, or Darwin's theories say that basically man is a triumphant son of murderers, many people object. If you say, however, that men are idiots, or that they are not worth the ground they walk upon, you are saying the same thing. For you must be concerned with this reality as you know it; in those terms, to condemn man is to condemn the species as you know it, and the practical terms of your world.
quotes.translation: 将人类等同于其最拙劣的作品，无异于刻意寻找一位优秀艺术家的瑕疵与错误，然后加以谴责。这样做就是在谴责你们自己。如果科学家说意识是偶然的产物，或达尔文的理论认为人类本质上是谋杀者的胜利之子，许多人会反对。然而，如果你说人类是白痴，或他们不配踏足脚下的土地，你表达的其实是同一回事。因为你们必须关注你们所知的这个现实；就这些术语而言，谴责人类就是谴责你们所知的物种，以及你们世界的实际状况。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Those realities however which appear only in certain stages of consciousness, are secondaries. This is perhaps one of the most important bits of information I have given you; for if you are bright enough, and I think that you are, then you have a yardstick by which to measure the nature of primary reality, from which all other manifestations are spun.
quotes.translation: 然而，那些仅出现在特定意识状态中的现实，是次要的。这或许是我给予你们的最重要信息之一；因为如果你们足够聪明——而我认为你们确实如此——那么你们就拥有了一把衡量主要现实本质的标尺，所有其他显现都由此衍生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: They are not one-dimensional images therefore, nor for that matter are they static. They are vital, full of their own energy reality, living composites. In dreams as a rule you only perceive them as images. They possess a psychic identity however that is biological to some extent as far as you are concerned. In other words, at this time various biological changes must occur in order for you to tune in upon them directly.
quotes.translation: 因此，它们并非一维影像，也绝非静止的。它们是充满活力的，饱含自身能量现实的生命复合体。在梦境中，你们通常只将它们感知为影像。然而，它们拥有某种心灵身份，就你们而言，这种身份在某种程度上具有生物性。换句话说，此时必须发生各种生物变化，你们才能直接调频接收它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The fact is that each of you create your own physical reality; and en masse, you create both the glories and the terrors that exist within your earthly experience. Until you realize that you are the creators, you will refuse to accept this responsibility. Nor can you blame a devil for the world's misfortunes. You have grown sophisticated enough to realize that the Devil is a projection of your own psyche, but you have not grown wise enough to learn how to use your creativity constructively.
quotes.translation: 事实是，你们每个人都创造了自己的物质现实；而集体而言，你们创造了存在于你们尘世经验中的一切荣光与恐怖。除非你们意识到自己就是创造者，否则你们会拒绝承担这份责任。你们也不能将世界的不幸归咎于魔鬼。你们已足够世故，认识到魔鬼是你们自身心灵的投射，但你们尚未足够明智，学会如何建设性地运用自己的创造力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is always because you do not trust the natural self that you resort to such drug therapy. The individuals who seek out treatment fear the nature of their own identity more than anything else. They are then only too willing to sacrifice it. (Pause, then smiling:) Your thoughts and beliefs form your reality. There is, as Joseph (Seth's name for me) said in our break, no magic therapy -- only an understanding of your own great creativity, and the knowledge that you yourself make your world.
quotes.translation: 你之所以诉诸药物疗法，始终是因为你不信任自然的本我。寻求治疗的人最恐惧的莫过于自身身份的本质。他们随后便太过情愿牺牲它。（停顿，微笑：）你的思想和信念形成你的现实。正如约瑟夫（赛斯对我的称呼）在休息时所说，没有神奇的疗法——只有对你自身伟大创造力的理解，以及你明白自己创造了自己世界的认知。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A strong coming into or focusing of inner reality into the objective form of the painting. You are allowing now the inner form to come out fully, and, to bring its own reality and environment with it. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 内在现实强烈地进入或聚焦于画作的客观形式。你现在正允许内在形式完全展现，并携带着它自身的现实和环境一同到来。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now dolphins deal with an entirely different dimension of reality. There is as yet no method of communication that can allow you to perceive their concepts of selfhood, or their [collective] vision of existence. They are sensitive, self-aware individuals. They are altruistic. They understand the nature of relativity,6 and they have different ways of passing on information to their young. They are not higher or lower than your own species. They simply represent a different kind of selfhood.
quotes.translation: 海豚处理的是完全不同的现实维度。目前尚无任何沟通方法能让你感知它们对自我身份的概念，或它们对存在的（集体）视野。它们是敏感、具有自我意识的个体。它们利他。它们理解相对性的本质，并以不同方式将信息传递给后代。它们并不比人类物种更高或更低。它们只是代表了一种不同的自我身份。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 730
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Action is basically electrical, but within your field only the most obvious forms of electrical action have been perceived. In this one respect your technology has let you down, but the electrical manifestations of which I speak could not even be searched for, or anticipated within your physical field, until the reality of man's psychic nature began to make itself known. And it is only now beginning to become apparent.
quotes.translation: 行动本质上是电性的，但在你的领域内，只有最明显的电性形式被感知到。在这方面，你的技术辜负了你，但我所说的电性显现在你的物理领域内甚至无法被寻找或预期，直到人类心灵本质的现实开始显现自身。而它现在才开始变得明显。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Reality means consciousness, and through the very physical apparatus developed by inwardness, which was aware from the beginning, further embellishments became possible for consciousness itself. The inwardness not only formed physical matter then, but formed new dimensions of inwardness itself, new dynamics from which consciousness could originate.
quotes.translation: 现实意味着意识，通过内在性所发展的物理机制——内在性从一开始就具有觉知——意识本身得以获得进一步的修饰。内在性不仅形成了物理物质，还形成了内在性自身的新维度，以及意识可以从中起源的新动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: To refute your reality in time, therefore, results in your being stuck in time and obsessed by it. Accepting your integrity in time allows the body to function until its natural end, in good condition, free from those distorted, invisible concepts about age. If you believe that youth is the ideal and struggle for it while simultaneously believing that old age must involve infirmities, then you cause an unnecessary dilemma, and hasten aging according to the negative aspects of your mind.
quotes.translation: 因此，否定你在时间中的现实，会导致你被困在时间中并被其困扰。接受你在时间中的完整性，能让身体以良好状态运作直至自然终结，摆脱那些关于年龄的扭曲、无形的概念。如果你相信青春是理想并为之奋斗，同时却相信老年必然伴随衰弱，那么你就会造成不必要的困境，并根据你心灵的负面方面加速衰老。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are obviously as many kinds of ghosts and apparitions as there are people. They are as alert or as unalert to their situation as you are to your own. They are not fully focused in physical reality, however, either in personality or in form, and this is their main distinction. Some apparitions are thought-forms sent by survival personalities out of lingering deep anxiety. They portray the same compulsive-type behavior that can be seen in many instances in your ordinary experience.
quotes.translation: 显然有多少种人就有多少种鬼魂和幻象。它们对自己处境的警觉程度，正如你们对自己处境的警觉程度一样。然而，无论在人格还是形态上，它们都未完全聚焦于物质实相，这是它们的主要区别。有些幻象是由幸存人格出于挥之不去的深层焦虑所投射的思想形态。它们展现出的强迫性行为模式，在你们日常经验中亦屡见不鲜。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some of these systems do touch upon legitimate portions of reality, but they all overlook the great individualistic and highly private nature of your dreams, and the fact that you create your own reality.
quotes.translation: 这些体系中有一些确实触及了实相的合法领域，但它们全都忽略了你们梦境中那伟大的个体性与高度私密性，以及你们创造自身实相这一事实。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For safety's sake a firm relationship between the ego and its environment should be considered a prerequisite for serious or extensive psychic investigation. The ego must have something to come back to. This is extremely important. I do not mean to discourage the personality in his laudable interest in unseen reality. I do want to caution him that first steps must be taken first if his inner goals in this direction are ever to be achieved, without unnecessary difficulties for the ego.
quotes.translation: 为安全起见，自我与其环境之间稳固的关系应被视为进行严肃或广泛灵性探究的先决条件。自我必须有一个可以回归的基点。这一点极为重要。我无意打击人格对不可见实相的可贵兴趣，但确实要提醒他：若想在不给自我带来不必要困难的前提下达成内在目标，必须先走好第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You create many of your own difficulties, if not all of them. This is true for all individuals. The inner psychological state is projected outward, gaining physical reality. This holds true regardless of the nature of that inner psychological state. The way that this is done has been discussed often and is on record in the material. I suggest you read it. The rules apply to everyone. You can use this for your own benefit and change your conditions, once you realize what the rules are.
quotes.translation: 你们制造了自身大部分的困难——若非全部的话。这对所有个体皆然。内在心理状态向外投射，获得物质实相。无论这种内在心理状态的性质如何，此理皆适用。其运作方式已在资料中多次讨论并有记录，建议你们去阅读。这些法则适用于每个人。一旦你认清这些法则，便能善用它们为自己谋利，改变自身处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: However, you will reincarnate whether or not you believe that you will. It is much easier if your theories fit reality, but if they do not, then you do not change reality one iota. Give us a moment here.
quotes.translation: 然而，无论你是否相信轮回，你都将经历轮回。若你的理论契合实相，事情会容易得多；但若不相符，你丝毫无法改变实相。请稍等片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: You will learn to take a certain portion of purpose with you through suggestion, so that you can attempt to enlarge the dream space of which you are first aware. You can extend it in other words. The investigation will always be concerned with the search for primaries and secondaries. On many occasions an apparent primary reality will later be seen to be secondary, as a result of experiments with the trance state.
quotes.translation: 你将学会通过暗示携带特定目的，从而尝试扩展你最初觉察到的梦境空间。换言之，你可以延伸它。这种探究始终关乎对首要实相与次要实相的追寻。许多时候，经由出神状态的实验，一个看似首要的实相后来会被视为次要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You must be more open and receptive than this in order to receive knowledge of undistorted basic realities. And the truly hilarious part of this is that such seemingly subjective data will enable you to cut through objective, or so-called objective, reality in a way that will give you so-called proofs, that you can achieve in no other fashion.
quotes.translation: 你必须比现在更加开放和接纳，才能获得未扭曲的基本实相的知识。而其中真正滑稽的部分是，这种看似主观的数据将让你能够以其他方式无法获得所谓证据的方式，穿透客观或所谓的客观实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: What you consider death has no more basic reality than has your idea of time and space. Death really represents a blind spot in your present ability to perceive energy transformation, and even value fulfillment. Death merely represents the termination of your own perception, that is, the termination of your understanding. Your ability here amounts to a complete dwindling of comprehension. Your senses are not equipped to perceive the transformation of energy from one form to another.
quotes.translation: 你所认为的死亡，其基本实相并不比你对时间和空间的观念更多。死亡实际上代表了你当前感知能量转化甚至价值完成能力中的一个盲点。死亡仅仅代表了你自身感知的终止，即你理解的终止。你的能力在此相当于理解的完全萎缩。你的感官并不具备感知能量从一种形式转化为另一种形式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: And finally, here's an answer to a number of inquiries from readers. The 647th session for Chapter 21 of Personal Reality was held on July 2, 1973, and in it I quoted a remark Seth made to me the following September: "You can have more material on Jerusalem or Christ now, or when you want it. You can have The Christ Book when you want it...."
quotes.translation: 最后，这是对读者众多询问的答复。个人实相第21章的第647节于1973年7月2日举行，其中我引用了赛斯在同年9月对我说的一句话："你现在或想要时可以拥有更多关于耶路撒冷或基督的资料。你想要时就可以拥有《基督之书》……"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: "It was the Jewish tradition that nourished the new religion in its early stages. Christ, as you know, was a common name, so when I say that there was a man named Christ involved in those events, I do not mean to say that he was the biblical Christ. His life was one of those that were finally used to compose the composite image of the biblical Christ." (In Chapter 20 of Seth Speaks, see Session 586 for July 24, 1971.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Some sense impressions fall beneath the threshold of consciousness, these impressions coming from the outside environment. Some impressions however have their origin within inner reality, and the personality is receiving information not available to the egotistical self. If such inner data is to become at all conscious, it must be translated into terms that the ego can recognize. In other words, into sense data.
quotes.translation: 有些感官印象落在意识门槛之下，这些印象来自外部环境。然而有些印象则源于内在实相，人格正在接收自我无法获得的信息。如果这种内在数据要变得有意识，就必须被翻译成自我能够识别的术语。换句话说，就是翻译成感官数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或存有始终处于流动、学习以及与主观经验而非时间或空间相关的发展状态中。这并不像听起来那么神秘。我的每位读者都在玩一个游戏，其中自我意识假装不知道整体自我确实知道的事情。既然自我绝对是整体自我的一部分，那么它必然在基本层面上知晓这种知识。然而，由于它强烈聚焦于物质实相，它假装不知道，直到它感觉能够以物质方式利用这些信息。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is even possible for the physical individual to train himself to change the nature of his own perception of such objects. It is not a question of the car having certain properties, being real to one perceptive view and therefore necessarily unreal to another. To a very large degree, the portion of any reality that you can perceive is determined largely not by the given, so-called real object itself, but from the perspective, and because of, the senses with which you perceive it.
quotes.translation: 甚至物质个体有可能训练自己改变对这些物体感知的性质。这不是汽车具有某些属性、对一种感知视角是真实的因而对另一种视角必然不真实的问题。在很大程度上，你能感知的任何实相部分，主要不是由给定的所谓真实物体本身决定，而是由你感知它的视角和感官决定。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The multiplicity of your own system is but one small example of the infinite realities that exist outside it. The gradations in physical matter forms alone escape your scientists. That matter exists in other forms is scarcely understood. There are gradations in matter as there are gradations in your color, realities that blend one into the other, and probable systems in which various representations, reflections, shadows and echoes, all probable creations of any given self, mature.
quotes.translation: 你们自身系统的多重性，不过是其外存在的无限实相中的一个小小例子。仅物质形态中的渐变层次就超出了你们科学家的理解。物质以其他形式存在这一点几乎不为人知。物质中存在渐变层次，正如你们的颜色中存在渐变层次，实相彼此交融，还有各种可能系统，其中任何特定自我的所有可能创造——各种表征、反射、阴影与回响——都在其中成熟。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The self then, unknown to the ego, perceives itself in a vast variety of experiences, and in, indeed, a vast number of realities. Each of these so-called realities, for one blends into the other, could be termed, or viewed as, a separate field. Each is therefore composed of the characteristic perception patterns that happen to lie within it, and these so-called minor fields could then be termed other selves, or minor selves, from the standpoint of the self that we are considering.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我（自我意识所不知）在极其多样的经验中感知自身，实际上是在大量的实相中感知自身。这些所谓的实相，每一个都彼此交融，可被称为或视为一个独立的场域。因此，每个场域都由恰好位于其中的特征性感知模式构成，而从我们正在考虑的自我角度来看，这些所谓的次要场域可被称为其他自我或次要自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In this chapter we will be concerned with the effect that dream experiences and objective experiences have upon each other. Certainly there is a connection... in terms of events... between waking and dreaming reality as we know it. If rauixuxx our dreams effect our objective actions in any way at all, on an individual then we as a race are 'also effected, en masse, in the physical universe, by our collective dreams, dreams could then be seen as a causal element in physical events.
quotes.translation: 在本章中，我们将关注梦境体验与客观体验如何相互影响。当然，就事件而言，我们所知的清醒实相与梦境实相之间存在着联系。如果我们的梦境以任何方式影响我们的客观行动，那么作为个体，我们作为种族，在物质宇宙中也同样受到集体梦境的影响。因此，梦境可被视为物质事件中的一个因果要素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In the diagram for example, each star would represent a moment point in another system. It appears as matter within your system, from your viewpoint, and exists as matter within your system. But it exists as something entirely different, you see, within another system. You perceive but the lowest point of its reality, so I will tell you now that the various stars and planets and heavenly bodies that you observe in your universe do indeed exist as such, but only within your system.
quotes.translation: 例如，在图表中，每颗星代表另一个系统中的一个瞬间点。从你们的视角看，它作为物质存在于你们的系统中，并且确实作为物质存在于你们的系统中。但它在另一个系统中，你看，却以完全不同的形式存在。你们只感知到其实相的最低点，所以我现在要告诉你们，你们在宇宙中观察到的各种恒星、行星和天体确实如此存在，但仅限于你们的系统内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

source_raw.title: （Once before, in the first and 18th envelope experiments, an object was used that was similar but not identical by any means. In the first experiment in the 179th session, Seth came through with one accurate impression. In the 18th experiment, held during the 212th session, a few more impressions were obtained; but overall the results were interfered with by other factors in a way that doesn't seem to happen these days. See Session 179 in Volume 4, and Session 212 in Volume 5.

quotes.text: Since I have also said that basically the universe has no more to do with space in your terms than does the dream world, you may deduce a similarity between the medium in which both the basic universe and the dream world may be found. You must understand here that your idea of space is something quite different from the reality of our fifth dimensional space. I want to make this plain again before we continue.
quotes.translation: 既然我也说过，从根本上讲，宇宙与你们所谓的空间的关系，并不比梦境世界与空间的关系更密切，那么你们可以推断出基本宇宙和梦境世界可能存在的媒介之间的相似性。你们必须明白，你们对空间的概念与我们第五维度空间的实相截然不同。在继续之前，我想再次明确这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: So, from other streams of actuality you choose those events that you want physically materialized; and you do this according to your beliefs about the nature of reality. A photograph is taken, and you have before you then a picture of an event that in your terms has already happened. In dreams you take many subjective "photographs," and decide which ones among them you want to materialize in time. To a certain extent, therefore, the dreams are blueprints for your later snapshots.
quotes.translation: 因此，从其他实相之流中，你们选择那些想要在物质层面具体化的事件；而你们根据自己对实相本质的信念来做出选择。拍下一张照片，你们面前就有了一个事件的照片，按你们的说法，这个事件已经发生。在梦境中，你们拍摄许多主观的“照片”，并决定其中哪些要在时间中具体化。因此，在某种程度上，梦境是你们后来快照的蓝图。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 699
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: New paragraph: Nevertheless, the blueprints lie within. Give us a moment ... We will have more to say very shortly about our dream-art scientist (see the last session); yet there are also other important ways that could be used to study the nature of reality. One in particular does not involve the dream state per se. It does include the manipulation of consciousness, however. To some extent it includes identification with, rather than separation from, that which is being studied.
quotes.translation: 然而，蓝图就在内在。请稍等片刻……我们很快会进一步讨论那位梦艺术科学家（见上一节）；但还有其他重要方法可用于研究实相的本质。其中一种方法本身并不涉及梦境状态，却包含对意识的操控。在某种程度上，它要求研究者与被研究对象认同，而非与之分离。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 701
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The action and counteraction is the time trigger. To you this will be almost unbelievable, but on some other planes motion is simultaneous and time unknown. To me time can be manipulated, used at leisure and examined. To me your time is a vehicle, one of the several vehicles by which I can enter your awareness. It is therefore still a reality of some kind to me. Otherwise I could not utilize it in any manner whatsoever. As an example of my good intentions I will end this session.
quotes.translation: 作用与反作用即是时间触发器。对你们而言这几乎难以置信，但在某些层面，运动是同时发生的，时间并不存在。对我而言，时间可以被操控、随意运用并加以审视。你们的时空对我而言是一种载具——是我进入你们意识的几种载具之一。因此它对我而言仍是某种实相，否则我根本无法以任何方式利用它。为表善意，我将在此结束本节。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is, as a rule, lack of knowledge on the part of the ego as to the nature of reality, and its part in it, and the resulting fear, that often prevents a personality from accepting spontaneous expression of emotions in general. The capacity to feel is important. When one fears to experience seemingly unpleasant emotions, the personality also tends to set up an emotional pattern of rejection that seriously cuts down, also, not only on the expression but the very perception of joy.
quotes.translation: 通常而言，自我对实相本质及其自身在其中角色的无知，以及由此产生的恐惧，往往阻碍人格接纳情绪的自发表达。感受能力至关重要。当一个人畏惧体验看似不愉快的情绪时，人格也会建立排斥的情感模式，这不仅严重削减了喜悦的表达，更削弱了对喜悦本身的感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Latently, your consciousness is capable of performing these feats, but the work cannot be done with the part of your consciousness that is strongly attached to the space-time relationship. What you think of as your conscious mind is given the task of assessing the "facts" of daily living. It then forms beliefs about reality, and these are used in the dream state as one of the main yardsticks, so to speak, that activate the emergence of certain probable events rather than others.
quotes.translation: 你的意识潜藏着完成这些功绩的能力，但这项工作无法由你意识中强烈依附时空关系的部分完成。你所谓的显意识心智被赋予评估日常"事实"的任务，继而形成关于实相的信念——这些信念在梦境状态中成为主要标尺之一，可以说，它们激活了某些可能事件而非其他事件的显现。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For a psychic communication to take place the communication must fall within the particular range of electromagnetic reality that can be picked up by the receiver, and by that particular level of the receiver's self that is able to translate it into meaningful terms. If, that is, you want any kind of proof. Otherwise the communication is simply received and acted upon automatically without leaving a trace. It merely becomes part of a new action, giving no evidence of its source.
quotes.translation: 若要发生心灵沟通，该沟通必须落在接收者能捕捉的特定电磁实相范围内，且需符合接收者自我中能将之转化为有意义信息的特定层次。换言之，若你想要任何形式的证据，就必须满足这些条件。否则，沟通只会被自动接收并执行，不留痕迹，仅成为新行动的一部分，无从证明其来源。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Whatever the initial course of action agreed to in just this probable reality by everyone involved, from whatever point in the "past," in Framework 1 the participants have subjected it to an almost infinite variety of choices and modifications through the years: but always--always--within nature's great structure, and accompanied by the utter freedom of each person concerned to accept, reject, abort, or change the whole affair from their individual perspective at any moment....
quotes.translation: 无论最初各方在这特定可能实相中约定的行动路径为何——无论从"过去"的哪个时间点出发——在第一框架中，参与者们历经岁月已将其置于近乎无限的抉择与修正之中：但始终——始终——在自然的伟大结构内，伴随着每位相关者从自身视角随时接受、拒绝、中止或改变整件事的绝对自由。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I don't really think we can conceive of anything to be truly "alien," though, so I use the word here only to lead into the next of Seth's larger concepts that I want to mention: that of probable realities, or probabilities, as Jane and I usually say. Not only does Seth stress the constant psychic motion of reincarnational and counterpart selves upon this earth we know--but he also tells us that each of those selves can move into other or parallel realities. I quote him from Session 681 in Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality:
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: New paragraph: Because beliefs form reality -- the structure of experience -- any change in beliefs altering that structure initiates change to some extent, of course. The status quo which served a certain purpose is gone, new elements are introduced, another creative process begins. Because your private beliefs are shared with others, because there is interaction, then any determined change of direction on your part is felt by others, and they will react in their own fashion.
quotes.translation: 因为信念形成实相——经验的结构——任何信念的改变都会在一定程度上改变这种结构，从而引发变化。维持某种目的现状消失了，新的元素被引入，另一个创造过程开始了。由于你的私人信念与他人共享，由于存在互动，那么你任何坚定的方向改变都会被他人感知，他们将以自己的方式做出反应。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now. If you could see the body as it exists within the electric field, you would certainly not recognize it, for its shape would bear no resemblance to the physical shape as you know it. The electric counterpart to the physical body exists, then, as an identity formed by various electrical systems operating more or less as one. It is an electric reality in which most certainly even thoughts exist as actualities, ever-moving spheres of more or less independent electric systems.
quotes.translation: 现在。如果你能看到身体在电场中的存在，你肯定认不出它，因为它的形状与你所知的物质形态毫无相似之处。因此，物质身体的电性对应物作为一个由各种或多或少协同运作的电气系统形成的身份而存在。这是一个电性实相，其中甚至思想也作为实际存在而存在，它们是或多或少独立的电气系统不断运动的球体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you are considering dream reality, it is easier for you to understand that you construct the reality therein. You find it more difficult to understand the same thing about physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你考虑梦境实相时，更容易理解你在其中构建了实相。你发现更难理解关于物质实相的同样事情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: At this point many variations in behavior emerge, each the result of individual background, knowledge, and habit. The surroundings in which the dead find themselves will often vary. Vivid hallucinations may form experience quite as real as any in mortal life. Now, I have told you that thoughts and emotions form physical reality, and they form after-death experience. This does not mean that the experiences are not valid, any more than it means that physical life is not valid.
quotes.translation: 此时行为出现许多变化，每种都是个人背景、知识和习惯的结果。死者所处的环境常常会有所不同。生动的幻觉可能形成与凡间生活同样真实的经验。现在，我告诉过你思想和情感形成物质实相，它们也形成死后经验。这并不意味着这些经验无效，正如它并不意味着物质生活无效一样。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The conscious physically oriented portions of the self become acquainted with the inner information. To some extent the reality of thought is consciously perceived as the innovator behind physical matter. Such an individual then can understand the nature of hallucinations at the point of death, and with full conscious awareness enter into the next plane of existence. The information made conscious is then passed on to others where it can be physically recognized and applied.
quotes.translation: 自我中面向意识的物质部分开始熟悉内在信息。在某种程度上，思想的实相被有意识地感知为物质背后的创新者。这样的人随后能在死亡时刻理解幻觉的本质，并以完全清醒的意识进入下一个存在层面。被意识化的信息随后传递给他人，在物质层面得以被识别和应用。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: However, none of this is apart from normal living. Whether or not they want to mention it here in "Unknown" Reality, both Ruburt and Joseph have learned to correlate data so that some of the implications involved in a simple move from one house to another become apparent. They are not mathematicians. They will not statistically analyze the results. Yet I tell you that the moves that you make in daily life have indeed infinite effects -- and I am not using the word loosely.
quotes.translation: 然而，这一切都与正常生活密不可分。无论他们是否想在《未知的实相》中提及此事，鲁柏和约瑟都已学会关联数据，使得从一处搬到另一处的简单举动所涉及的一些含义变得明显。他们不是数学家。他们不会统计分析结果。然而我告诉你们，你们在日常生活中所做的举动确实具有无限的影响——我并非随意使用这个词。

If he is able to perceive the other areas of consciousness, he may find himself in still more difficulty -- not realizing that both systems of reality are valid.

quotes.text: In other words, the environment, conditions, and methods of perception will not be alien. You are not suddenly thrust into an unknown; that unknown is a part of you now. It was a part of you before this physical birth, and will be after physical death. These conditions, however, have been blotted out of your consciousness in the main, throughout physical history. Mankind has had various conceptions of his own reality but he has purposely, it seems, turned away from it in the last century. There are many reasons for this, and we will try to cover some of them.
quotes.translation: 换言之，环境、条件与感知方式不会陌生。你并非突然被抛入未知之境；那未知此刻就是你的一部分。它在这次肉身出生前便已存在，在肉身死亡后仍将延续。然而这些条件在整个人类历史中，大体上已被逐出你的意识。人类对其自身实相有过各种概念，但上个世纪似乎刻意回避了它。原因众多，我们将尝试探讨其中一些。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The plants awakened before the animals--and there are reasons for these varying degrees of "wakefulness" that have nothing to do basically with the differentiations of specieshood as defined by science from the outside, but have to do with the inner affiliations of consciousness, and with species or families of consciousness. Those affiliations fell into being as all of the consciousnesses that were embarked upon physical reality divided up (long pause) the almost unimaginable creative achievements that would be responsible for the physically effective world.
quotes.translation: 植物比动物更早觉醒——这些不同程度的"觉醒"有其原因，基本上与科学从外部定义的物种分化无关，而是关乎意识的内在关联，以及意识物种或意识家族。当所有投身物质实相的意识体（长停顿）划分出将负责创造物质有效世界的、几乎难以想象的创造性成就时，这些关联便应运而生。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your terms they did not have [an overall] purpose, yet their purpose was simply to be. Their main points of consciousness were elsewhere, in another kind of reality, while their physical manifestations were separate. Their primary focuses of consciousness were scarcely aware of the bodies they had created. Yet even those bodies learned, in quotes now, "through experience," and began to "awaken," to become aware of themselves, to discover time, or to create it. Period.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话说，它们没有[整体]目的，然而它们的目的就是存在。它们意识的主要焦点在别处，在另一种实相中，而它们的物质显化是分离的。它们意识的主要焦点几乎不知道它们所创造的身体。但即便是那些身体，现在引号，"通过经验"学习，并开始"觉醒"，开始意识到自身，发现时间，或创造时间。句号。

quotes.text: We must use analogies. It can be thought of as the most exterior projection of the inner ego. When you find yourself, so to speak, watching what you think of as the ego, then you are in contact with this portion of the self. It is aware of both conscious and subconscious motivations and realities, and it is also aware of projections into other fields of actuality. I have hinted before of these matters, for when I say that you will use this other portion of the self to examine waking consciousness and probe beneath it, I already presuppose a you that uses this self. In other words, you are already magnifying the limitations of the self and extending them.
quotes.translation: 我们必须使用类比。这可被视为内在自我的最外层投射。当你发现自己，可以说，在观察你所认为的自我时，你便与自我的这一部分取得了联系。它既觉察有意识与无意识的动机和实相，也觉察到进入其他实相领域的投射。我之前暗示过这些事，因为当我说你将使用自我的这一其他部分来检视清醒意识并深入其下时，我已经预设了一个使用这个自我的"你"。换言之，你已在放大自我的限制并扩展它们。

quotes.text: You can perceive the moment's reality as it exists for your intestine, or your hand; and experience, with practice, the present inner peace and commotion that exist simultaneously within your physical body. This brings a great appreciation and wonder, a sense of unity with the living corporeal material of which you are physically composed. With practice you can become as intuitively aware of your internal physical environment, as [of] your external physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你能感知到此刻为你肠道或手部存在的实相；并通过练习，体验到你肉身内同时存在的内在平静与骚动。这会带来极大的赞叹与惊奇，一种与你身体所构成的鲜活物质材料合一的感受。通过练习，你能像直觉感知外在物质环境一样，直觉感知内在物质环境。

quotes.text: The feelings and sensations give rise to the questions, to the thoughts, to the intellect. The child in a fashion feels -- feels -- its own thoughts rise from a relative psychological invisibility into immediate, vital formation. There is a process there that you have forgotten. The child identifies with its own psychic reality first of all -- then discovers its feelings, and claims those, and discovers its thoughts and intellect, and claims those (all quite intently).
quotes.translation: 情感与感受引发问题、思想与智性。孩童在某种程度上感受——感受——自己的思想从相对的心理隐形状态跃入即时、鲜活的成形过程。那里存在一个你们已遗忘的过程。孩童首先认同自己的心灵实相——继而发现自己的感受，并认领它们；再发现自己的思想与智性，并认领它们（全都相当专注）。

quotes.text: Now, I am not going to tell you anything, and that always infuriates you and makes you happy at the same time. Instead, I give you methods that you can use to make your own reality by following your will (with humorous emphasis) as far as you want to; and because of this evening's session and the energy involved, you have the opportunity for some splendid dream activity. You will have it whether or not you remember it, but I hope you can remember it. Do not hassle it.
quotes.translation: 现在，我不会告诉你们任何事——这总是既令你们恼怒又令你们欣喜。相反，我给予你们方法，让你们能通过追随自己的意志（带着幽默的强调）尽可能远地创造自己的实相；因今晚的课及所涉能量，你们有机会进行一些绝妙的梦活动。无论你们是否记得，它都会发生，但我希望你们能记住。不要强求。

quotes.text: Psychological time adds duration. You will find something else here. From the framework of psychological time you will see that clock time is as dreamlike and fleeting as you once thought inner time was. And you will discover that inner time is as much a reality as you once thought outer time was. You will discover your whole selves in other worlds, peeping inward and outward at the same time, and finding that all time is one time, and that all divisions are illusion.
quotes.translation: 心理时间增加了持续性。在此你们会发现别的东西。从心理时间的架构中，你们会看到钟表时间如同你们曾以为内在时间那般如梦似幻、转瞬即逝。而你们会发现内在时间如同你们曾以为外在时间那般真实。你们会在其他世界中发现自己完整的自我，同时向内向外窥探，发现所有时间皆为一体，所有分割皆是幻相。

This does not mean that I do not have my own reality, for I do, but in my relationship with you and Ruburt, and with your world, I do take certain characteristics that come from each of your realities.
quotes.translation: （微笑地：）我的人格，以其如此丰沛的呈现方式，在某种程度上是你们两人的共同创造。这并非意味着我没有自己的实相——我确实有——但在与你们和鲁柏、以及你们世界的关系中，我确实会从你们各自的实相中汲取某些特质。

quotes.translation: 它们代表着一个无法言喻的独特当下，在每个意识中鲜活存在，其重要性远超你们的认知。没有任何真正的规则能引导你们与当下的实相相遇——唯有对自身存在本质的信任。而那信任就在你们之内，无论你们是否认出它，因为它正赋予你们当下的经验；无论你们的心智如何质疑，它都安稳地乘载于灵魂的伟大创造力中。

quotes.translation: 动物们以你们无法理解的方式知道，它们个体的存在对实相的本质具有直接影响。它们因此是投入其中的。一个人可以拥有财富与健康，享受满意的人际关系甚至充实的工作，却活在我所说的那种戏剧性之外——因为除非你感到生命本身具有意义，否则每个生命必然显得毫无意义，所有的爱与美终将归于腐朽。

quotes.text: And yet such definitions are far more near the truth than those that have to do with measurements. There are no measurements of any kind. Reality, of itself, forms an apple. Your perception of the apple enables you to see it piecemeal. The apple is time. It is an event. It is the so-many-odd days or months that have gone into its production in your terms, or years that have gone into production of the tree. It is as much an event of time as it is an event of space.
quotes.translation: 然而，这样的定义远比那些与测量相关的定义更接近真相。根本不存在任何形式的测量。现实本身形成了一个苹果。你对苹果的感知使你得以零碎地看到它。苹果就是时间。它是一个事件。用你的话说，它是投入其生产过程的那么多天或月，或是投入树木生长过程的那么多年。它既是空间的事件，也是时间的事件。

quotes.text: Seth told us ahead of time, of course, that "Unknown" Reality would follow an intuitive and inner organization rather than a linear one, and that this writing method would itself arouse the creative, revelatory characteristics of the psyche. Material on any given subject may start, go on for a while, then either stop almost in mid-sentence or "evolve" into another topic. Yet underneath, the books ride securely upon rhythms that reflect the psyche's deep resources.
quotes.translation: 当然，赛斯提前告诉我们，《未知的实相》将遵循直觉和内在的组织方式，而非线性的方式，这种写作方法本身会激发心灵创造性和启示性的特质。关于任何特定主题的材料可能会开始，持续一段时间，然后要么在句子中间突然停止，要么“演化”到另一个主题。然而，在表面之下，这些书稳稳地驾驭着反映心灵深层资源的节奏。

quotes.text: If you will again recall our material on the fifth dimension, you will see how this must be the case. In all such cases the mental action occurs simultaneously in all systems in which it will have a reality; in which it can be used as a reference point in other words.
quotes.translation: 如果你再次回想我们关于第五维度的材料，你就会明白这必然如此。当一种心智行为发生在梦境和物质宇宙中时，看到其扭曲效应会简单得多。在所有这类情况下，心智行为同时发生在所有它将具有实相的系统里；换句话说，在这些系统中它可以被用作一个参考点。
