quotes.text: It is easy enough to look at those belief structures and shrug your shoulders, wondering at man's distorted views of reality. The entire scientific view of illness, however, is quite as distorted (with amused emphasis). It is as laboriously conceived and interwound with "nonsense." It is about as factual as the "fact" that God sends illness as punishment, or that illness is the unwanted gift of mischievous demons.
quotes.translation: 人们很容易看着这些信念结构耸耸肩，对人对实相的扭曲观点感到困惑。然而，整个科学的疾病观同样扭曲（带着戏谑的强调）。它被煞费苦心地构想出来，并与"胡说八道"交织在一起。它就像"上帝以疾病作为惩罚"或"疾病是恶作剧恶魔的不请之礼"这类"事实"一样不真实。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am speaking generally here, for remember that your individual beliefs, thoughts, and emotions cause your reality, so no person dies ahead of his or her time. The individual chooses the time of death. It is true, however, that many cancers and conditions such as AIDS result because the immunity system has been so tampered with that the body has not been allowed to follow through with its own balancing procedures.
quotes.translation: 我在此泛泛而谈，因为请记住，你个人的信念、思想和情感造就了你的实相，所以没有人会提前于其时间死亡。个体选择死亡的时间。然而，许多癌症和艾滋病等状况确实源于免疫系统被严重干扰，以至于身体无法完成其自身的平衡程序。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: The first "object" was an almost unendurable mass, though it had no weight, and it exploded, instantaneously beginning processes that formed the universe--but no time was involved. The process that you might imagine took up eons occurred in the twinkling of an eye, and the initial objective materialization of the massive thought of All That Is burst into reality. In your terms this was a physical explosion--but in the terms of the consciousnesses involved in that breakthrough, this was experienced as a triumphant "first" inspirational frenzy, a breakthrough into another kind of being (most intently).
quotes.translation: 第一个"物体"是一团几乎无法承受的质块，虽无重量，却爆炸了，瞬间启动了形成宇宙的过程——但其中并无时间参与。你可能想象需要亿万年完成的过程，在眨眼间发生，而"一切万有"那庞大思想的初始客观物质化，迸发进入实相。用你们的说法，这是一场物理爆炸——但就参与那突破的意识而言，这被体验为一场胜利的"首次"灵感狂喜，一次进入另一种存在的突破（极其专注地）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Man forgot the teaching and healing elements, and concentrated instead upon the unpleasant experience itself. To some extent this was quite natural, for the new species developed in order to change the nature of its consciousness, to follow a reality in which instinct was no longer "blindly" followed, and to individualize in strong personal focus corporeal experience that had previously taken a different pattern.
quotes.translation: 人类遗忘了教导与疗愈的元素，反而专注于不愉快的经验本身。在某种程度上这相当自然，因为新物种的发展是为了改变其意识的性质，追随一种不再"盲目"遵循本能的实相，并在强烈的个人聚焦中个性化那些先前以不同模式呈现的肉身经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: At the same time, you make this information available to all these other portions of your identity, who dwell in entirely different realities, and you receive from them comparable information. You do not lose contact with your ordinary waking self. You simply do not focus upon it. You turn your attention away. In the daytime you simply reverse the process. If you were looking at your daily normal self from the other viewpoint, you see, using an analogy here, you might find that physically waking self as strange as you now find the sleeping self. The analogy will not hold however, simply because this sleeping self of yours is far more knowledgeable than the waking self of which you are so proud.
quotes.translation: 同时，你将这信息提供给所有其他身份部分——它们栖身于完全不同的实相中——并从它们那里接收类似的信息。你并未失去与平常清醒自我的联系，只是不再聚焦于它。你转移了注意力。白天你只是逆转这个过程。如果你从另一个视角看待日常的清醒自我，打个比方，你可能会发现那个肉身清醒的自我，就像你现在发现睡眠自我一样陌生。然而这个比喻并不完全成立，仅仅因为你的这个睡眠自我远比你所引以为傲的清醒自我更具知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Art is as much a science, in the truest sense of the word, as biology is. Science as you think of it separates itself from the subject at hand. Art identifies with the subject. In your terms, then, other civilizations considered art as a fine science, and used it in such a way that it painted a very clear-cut picture of the nature of reality -- a picture in which human emotion and motivation played a grand role.
quotes.translation: 艺术在真正的意义上与生物学一样是一门科学。你所认为的科学将自己与手头的主题分离开来，而艺术则与主题认同。用你们的说法，其他文明将艺术视为一门精妙的科学，并以这样的方式运用它，描绘出一幅关于实相本质的清晰图景——在这幅图景中，人类情感与动机扮演着重要角色。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 700
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Someday we shall explain this in mathematical terms. However for now we shall try plain English. Every thought is composed of its own energy, and it has an effect within energy. We are not speaking here now of your tired old cause and effect theory however. Every action changes every other action. Any probability is a reality whether or not it occurs within your own system, and I shall add to that early mention.
quotes.translation: 总有一天我们会用数学术语来解释这一点。不过现在，我们先用简单的英语来说明。每个念头都由其自身的能量组成，并在能量中产生效应。然而，我们这里说的并非你们那陈旧的因果理论。每个行动都会改变其他每个行动。任何可能性都是一个实相，无论它是否发生在你们自己的系统内，而且我会在早期提到的内容中补充这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience, or any mystical experience, is sometimes apt to put you in touch with what may seem to you to be a future self. This self of course, again, always existed. The inner self has the ability to delve beneath all your camouflage data to perceive these other reality systems. For the fullest development however these perceptions must be made conscious. Even the ego must become aware of them.
quotes.translation: 迷幻体验或任何神秘体验，有时容易让你接触到可能看似未来自我的东西。当然，这个自我始终存在。内在自我有能力深入你们所有伪装数据之下，去感知这些其他实相系统。然而，为了最充分的发展，这些感知必须被有意识地觉察。甚至自我也必须意识到它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These are unfoldings, as the inner self materializes what is already latent into physical actuality. Now there may be areas in which the inner self is simply not interested. There may be areas in which it is simply less proficient. The inner self is a developing entity, not a finished product. The whole idea of physical reality, individually speaking, is the emergence of experience within your particular system.
quotes.translation: 这些是展开的过程，如同内在自我将已然潜伏的东西物质化为物理实相。现在，可能存在一些内在自我根本不感兴趣的领域。也可能存在一些它不太擅长的领域。内在自我是一个正在发展的实体，而非成品。从个体角度来说，物理实相的整体理念，就是在你们特定系统内经验的涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation (on The Nature of the Psyche: Its Human Expression): As the earth is composed of many environments, so is the psyche. As there are different continents, islands, mountains, seas, and peninsulas, so the psyche takes various shapes. If you live in one country, you often consider natives in other areas of the world as foreigners, while of course they see you in the same light. In those terms, the psyche contains many other levels of reality. From your point of view these might appear alien, and yet they are as much a part of your psyche as your motherland is a portion of the earth.
quotes.translation: 现在：口授（关于《心灵的本质：其人类表达》）：如同地球由许多环境组成，心灵也是如此。如同存在不同的大陆、岛屿、山脉、海洋和半岛，心灵也呈现出各种形态。如果你生活在一个国家，你常将世界其他地区的居民视为外国人，当然他们看你也一样。用这些术语来说，心灵包含了许多其他层面的实相。从你们的观点来看，这些可能显得陌生，但它们是你心灵的一部分，正如你的祖国是地球的一部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses allow you to follow some of these actions into other realities. The moment point on the one hand is of course a minute division of action. On the other hand it is an entrance into unknown possibilities and new dimensions. As you probe into any given moment point, you automatically become a part of it and change it accordingly as it makes its impressions upon you. These interchanging's occur on many levels: psychologically, chemically, electromagnetically, psychically. There are subtle variations, as you know, in your known self from one instant to another as you affect your physical environment and form it, and as it in turn forms you. And this is just on the physical level.
quotes.translation: 内在感官让你能够跟随这些行动中的一些进入其他实相。一方面，瞬间点当然是行动的一个微小划分。另一方面，它是进入未知可能性和新维度的入口。当你探索任何给定的瞬间点时，你自动成为它的一部分，并相应地改变它，因为它在你身上留下印象。这些交换发生在多个层面：心理层面、化学层面、电磁层面、心灵层面。如你所知，在你已知的自我中，从一刻到另一刻存在微妙的变异，因为你影响并塑造你的物理环境，而环境反过来塑造你。而这还仅仅是在物理层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: Much information does not even reach the brain (the mind is aware of such data, however). In man, the psychic-physical structure has at every moment a complete up-to-date picture of pertinent information about all events that will in any way affect the organism. All actions are taken with this information available. In the dream state such data becomes transformed, again, into pseudophysical pictures -- reflections of events that might occur, previews of probable sequences. These are flashed before a consciousness that momentarily focuses upon the inner rather than the outer arena of reality.
quotes.translation: 许多信息甚至不会到达大脑（然而心智是知道这些数据的）。在人类身上，灵性-物理结构每时每刻都拥有关于所有将以任何方式影响有机体的事件的最新完整信息。所有行动都是在掌握这些信息的情况下进行的。在梦境状态中，这些数据再次转化为伪物理画面——可能发生的事件的反映，可能序列的预览。这些画面闪现在暂时聚焦于内在而非外在实相舞台的意识之前。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The reality of such an identity then exists within the action. The energy of the action, the workings of action within and upon itself, forms identity. There are other causes here that we will consider later. Yet although identity is formed from action, action and identity cannot be separated. You will remember our previous definition of action, for this will make this evening's discussion easier to understand.
quotes.translation: 这种身份认同的实相随后存在于行动之中。行动的能量、行动在其自身内部及作用于自身的运作，形成了身份认同。这里还有其他原因，我们稍后会讨论。然而，尽管身份认同由行动形成，行动与身份认同却不可分割。你们会记得我们之前对行动的定义，因为这将使今晚的讨论更容易理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The basic source of your difficulty was not new. It did not even, except superficially, represent a dangerous lapse or relapse on your part, into those truly dangerous and quite disastrous negative battles of thoughts, which eventually in any individual can and often do lead the integrated self into annihilation. The illness did represent, however, a needed warning, materialized into physical reality as illness. A warning that after all there had been a recent tendency on your part, though slight, to slide into negative thinking. The illness was meant to bring you up short, to make you think.
quotes.translation: 你困境的根本源头并非新鲜事。它甚至——除了表面现象——并不代表你危险地失足或重蹈覆辙，陷入那些真正危险且极具破坏性的负面思想战役中——这些战役最终在任何个体身上都可能且常常导致整合的自我走向湮灭。然而，这场疾病确实代表了一个必要的警告，以疾病的形式物质化为物理实相。一个警告：毕竟你最近有——尽管轻微——滑向负面思维的倾向。这场疾病旨在让你猛然醒悟，促使你思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Your cellular structure is innately able to follow such sequences. Believing such clues to be meaningless, the conscious mind does not perceive them, or calls them coincidences. Such clues in your intimate daily life, however, looked at in a different way, can tell you much about the potentials of the species, and give you glimpses of other systems of reality in which human consciousness can respond. I am here using an incident from the experience of Ruburt and Joseph, but the reader can make his or her own correlations, and discover like events from which the same conclusions can be drawn.
quotes.translation: 你的细胞结构天生能够跟随这样的序列。由于相信这些线索毫无意义，意识心无法感知它们，或称之为巧合。然而，在你日常亲密生活中的这些线索，若以不同方式看待，可以告诉你许多关于物种潜能的讯息，并让你瞥见人类意识能够回应的其他实相系统。我在此引用鲁柏和约瑟经历中的一件事，但读者可以自行建立关联，并发现类似事件，从中得出相同的结论。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 693
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The ego is a jealous god, and it wants its interests served. It does not want to admit the reality of any dimensions except those within which it feels comfortable and can understand. It was meant to be an aid but it has been allowed to become a tyrant. Even so, it is much more resilient and eager to learn than is generally supposed. It is not natively as rigid as it seems. Its curiosity can be of great value.
quotes.translation: 自我是一个嫉妒的神祇，它要求自己的利益得到满足。它不愿承认任何它感到不自在或无法理解的维度的实相。它本应是一个帮手，却被允许变成了暴君。即便如此，它比通常认为的要更具韧性且更渴望学习。它天生并不像表面看起来那样僵化。它的好奇心可以具有巨大价值。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It could still do this and retain its own nature, merely by allowing into its awareness the reality of other actions as a part of its self-image. There is for example no basic reason why the subconscious and the ego cannot communicate to a much larger extent than is now usual. Such communication would result in the acceptance of additional energy and action by the ego, and an expansion of the ego's self-image.
quotes.translation: 它仍然可以做到这一点并保留自己的本性，只需允许其他行动的实相作为其自我形象的一部分进入它的觉知。例如，没有根本理由说明潜意识与自我为何不能比现在通常的程度进行更大范围的沟通。这种沟通将导致自我接纳额外的能量与行动，并扩展自我的自我形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The Fox experiments are quite valid, with some changes that you will make, I imagine. At one level of the dreaming state it is possible for you to recognize and align yourself with that portion of yourself that is aware of itself within fourth-dimensional reality. You have both occasionally learned to take our waking consciousness into the dream state, and here Fox is correct, for you must start at this point.
quotes.translation: 福克斯实验相当有效，但我想你们会做些调整。在梦境状态的某个层次，你有可能认出并调整自己，与第四维实相中那个觉察自身的部分对齐。你们两人都曾偶尔学会将清醒意识带入梦境状态，福克斯这点说得对，因为你们必须从这个起点开始。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Consciousness cannot be separated from mobility. It is true that you focus within the physical system mainly, yet the inner self is highly mobile and embarks simultaneously upon a variety of projections. The closest example in your experience of this mobility is the dream situation. These dreams make little impression upon the waking consciousness unless you train it and take it with you as far as it can go. It is then able to translate the dream reality at least in part. In the psychedelic experience the ego can be trained to act in the same manner. Later it can serve as an interpreter.
quotes.translation: 意识无法与流动性分离。诚然你主要聚焦于物质系统内，但内在自我高度流动，同时展开多种投射。在你们经验中最接近这种流动性的例子是梦境情境。这些梦对清醒意识影响甚微，除非你训练它并尽可能带它同行。它才能至少部分翻译梦境实相。在迷幻体验中，自我可被训练以同样方式运作。之后它能充当翻译者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I make these analogies because they are pertinent, yet I am aware that they can make you feel small or fear for your identity. You are more than a message, say, passing through the vast reaches of a superself. You are not lost in the universe. In a book we must use words, but such analogies can, if you let them, conjure up within your imagination some feeling of your intimate relationship with all other reality. To some extent, the feeling of grace is your emotional recognition of the necessity, purpose and freedom, the innate appreciation, of your rightness and your place in existence.
quotes.translation: 我作这些类比是因为它们贴切，但我知道它们可能让你感到渺小或担忧身份。你不仅仅是穿越超我广阔领域的讯息。你并未迷失在宇宙中。书中我们必须使用文字，但若你允许，这些类比能在你想象中唤起你与所有其他实相亲密关系的感受。某种程度上，恩宠感是你对必要性、目的与自由的情感认知，是对你存在中正确性与位置的天生欣赏。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Before we discuss man's and woman's private roles in the nature of mass events -- no matter what they are -- we must first look into the medium in which events appear concrete and real. The great sweep of the events of nature can be understood only by looking into a portion of their reality that is not apparent to you. We want to examine, therefore, the inner power of natural occurrences.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……在我们讨论男女在大众事件本质中的私人角色之前——无论它们是什么——我们必须先审视事件显得具体真实的媒介。自然事件的宏大脉络只能通过审视其一部分你们看不见的实相来理解。因此我们要检视自然事件的内在力量。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The freedom will also show in our sessions, and rather obviously, within a very brief time. It is already apparent. To become aware of other individuals who are not within your system will be good for him. It will also help him to understand and appreciate my own unique reality, and this now-growing belief should result in a greater familiarity. He should be able to perceive me to some degree before too long.
quotes.translation: 自由也会在我们的课中显现，而且相当明显，在很短的时间内。它已显而易见。意识到你们系统之外的其他个体对他有好处。这也会帮助他理解并欣赏我独特的实相，而这正在增长的信念应导致更大的熟悉度。他应该能在不久后某种程度上感知到我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I said that the inner ego reasons, but its reasoning is not restricted to the cause-and-effect limitations that you apply to the reasoning process. The action of the inner ego within the wider sphere of Framework 2 explains many events and seeming coincidences that otherwise seem to make no sense within your world. Many realities within Framework 2 cannot suitably be explained as facts to you in Framework 1, simply because they involve psychological thicknesses that cannot be translated into facts as you think of them. These often appear in the symbolic language of the arts instead, and many of your dreams are translations in which the events of Framework 2 appear in symbolic form.
quotes.translation: 我说过内在自我会推理，但其推理不受你们应用于推理过程的因果限制。内在自我在架构二更广阔领域中的行动，解释了你们世界中看似无意义的许多事件与表面巧合。架构二中的许多实相无法适当地作为事实向架构一中的你们解释，仅仅因为它们涉及无法转化为你们所认为事实的心理厚度。这些往往反而以艺术的象征语言出现，你们许多梦就是翻译，其中架构二的事件以象征形式呈现。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 823, FEBRUARY 27, 1978

source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: I mentioned that the electrical universe is composed of electricity that is far different from your idea of it. Electricity as you perceive it within your field, is merely an echo emanation, or a sort of shadow image of these infinite varieties of pulsations, which give reality and actuality to many phenomena with which you are familiar, but which do not appear as tangible objects within the physical system.
quotes.translation: 我曾提过，电性宇宙由远不同于你们认知的电力构成。你们在自身场域内感知到的电力，不过是这些无限多样脉动的回响辐射或阴影影像——正是这些脉动赋予你们熟悉的诸多现象以实相与真实性，尽管它们在物质系统中并不显现为有形物体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is not to minimize the importance of the intellect that I once again repeat: Inner reality will only be known directly through the inner self, and the inner senses. The intellect must deal and interpret the realities of camouflage existence, this being its purpose.
quotes.translation: 我再次重申并非要贬低智性的重要性：内在实相唯有通过内在自我与内在感官才能直接认知。智性必须处理并诠释伪装存在的实相，这正是其存在目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have used Andrea because so many typical Western beliefs coincide in her reality -- the idea that aging is disastrous; that women are relatively powerless without a man beside them; that life is, practically speaking, highly difficult while it should be ideally simple. All of these ideas obtain their charge from a basic belief in the powerlessness of the conscious self to form and regulate its experience.
quotes.translation: 我选用安德莉亚为例，是因为众多典型的西方信念在她实相中汇聚——衰老是灾难性的观念；女性若无男性相伴便相对无力的观念；生活理应简单却实则艰难的观念。所有这些信念皆源于一个基本信念：意识自我无力塑造与调控自身经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Such knowledge, however, would automatically affect those past lives. Ideas of cause and effect can hold you back here, because it seems to you that the leaves of next year come as an effect caused by this year's leaves.10 To the plant and its innate creative pattern, however, all of its manifestations are one -- an expression of itself, each portion different. The knowledge of its "future" leaves, as potential pattern, exists now. The same applies to the psyche. In that greater realm of reality there is creative interplay, and interrelationships between all aspects of selfhood.
quotes.translation: 然而，这类知识会自动影响那些前世。因果观念在此会阻碍你们，因为你们认为来年的树叶是今年树叶产生的果。但对植物及其与生俱来的创造模式而言，其所有显化皆为一体——是自身的表达，每个部分各不相同。它"未来"树叶作为潜在模式的知识，此刻已然存在。心灵亦复如是。在那更伟大的实相领域，自我所有面向之间存在着创造性的互动与相互关联。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He has been working with me for some time, in your terms, yet I do not "control" his subjective reality in any way. I have certainly been a teacher to him.9 Yet his progress is always his own challenge and responsibility, and basically what he does with my teaching is up to him. (Humorously:) In parentheses: (Right now I give him an A.)
quotes.translation: 按你们的时间观念，他与我共事已有时日，但我从未以任何方式"控制"他的主观实相。我确实曾是他的导师。然而他的进步始终是他自身的挑战与责任，本质上，他如何运用我的教导全在于他自己。（幽默地）括号补充：（此刻我给他打A等。）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The experiment that would transform your world would operate upon the basic idea that you create your own reality according to the nature of your beliefs, and that all existence was blessed, and that evil did not exist in it. If these ideas were followed individually and collectively, then the evidence of your physical senses would find no contradiction. They would perceive the world and existence as good.
quotes.translation: 能转化你们世界的实验，应基于这个基本理念：你们根据自身信念的性质创造自己的实相，一切存在皆受祝福，邪恶并不存在于其中。若这些理念被个体与集体遵循，你们物质感官的证据将找不到矛盾。它们将感知到世界与存在皆为良善。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Nevertheless the dream world, the mind, and the basic inner universe do exist ... in what we will call the value climate of psychological reality. This is the medium. This takes the place of what you call space. It is a quality which makes all existences and consciousness possible. It is one of the most powerful principles behind or within the vitality that itself composes from itself all other phenomena.3
quotes.translation: 然而，梦境世界、心智以及内在宇宙确实存在……存在于我们称之为心理实相的价值气候中。这是媒介。它取代了你们所谓的空间。这是一种使所有存在与意识成为可能的品质。它是生命力背后或内部最强大的原则之一，而生命力本身从自身构成了所有其他现象。

quotes.text: The Christ drama did splash over into historical reality. Man's fears of not achieving brotherhood, of not achieving a secure state of consciousness, or a workable morality, result in his dreams of destruction, however they are expressed. And indeed, the present physical event as it exists now at the energy plant near Harrisburg can easily be likened to -- and is -- a warning dream to change man's actions.
quotes.translation: 基督戏剧确实曾溅入历史实相。人类对未能实现博爱、未能达到安全意识状态或可行道德的恐惧，导致了他们的毁灭之梦，无论这些梦以何种方式表达。确实，目前发生在哈里斯堡附近能源厂的物理事件，很容易被比作——并且确实是——一个警告性的梦，旨在改变人类的行为。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ideas originate always from individuals on any plane, and under any circumstance. The ideas once originated, however, are given energy reality by the individual and therefore attain a vitality of their own. The ideas are picked up by the subconscious through a telepathic communication. They do not however have to be picked up directly from one mind, that is, there does not have to be direct communication.
quotes.translation: 观念始终源于任何层面、任何环境下的个体。然而，观念一旦产生，便由个体赋予能量实相，从而获得自身的活力。这些观念通过心灵感应交流被潜意识接收。但它们不必直接从某个心智接收，也就是说，不必存在直接交流。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Regard the inner senses in connection with the nature of action and electromagnetic reality, for the perceptions of the inner senses are themselves action, and as such they change both the perceiver and the thing perceived. You can see then that even this astral image is always in motion and never static, and its condition alters the physical self even as the physical self acts upon the astral image.
quotes.translation: 现在。请关注内在感官与行动本质及电磁实相的关系，因为内在感官的感知本身就是行动，因此它们既改变感知者也改变被感知之物。那么你可以看到，即使是这个星体形象也始终在运动中，从未静止，它的状态改变着物质自我，正如物质自我作用于星体形象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: You can readily see, therefore, how important your subjective feelings really are. This knowledge -- that your universe is idea construction -- can immediately give you clues that enable you to change your environment and circumstances beneficially. When you do not understand the nature of the soul, and do not realize that your thoughts and feelings form physical reality, then you feel powerless to change it. In later chapters of this book, I hope to give you some practical information that will enable you to alter practically the very nature and structure of daily life.
quotes.translation: 因此，你很容易看出你的主观感受有多么重要。这个知识——即你的宇宙是观念建构——能立即给你线索，使你能够有益地改变你的环境和境遇。当你不了解灵魂的本质，并且没有意识到你的思想和情感形成物质实相时，你就会感到无力改变它。在本书后面的章节中，我希望给你一些实用信息，使你能够实际改变日常生活的本质和结构。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: You use atoms and molecules in a strange way. You transpose your ideas upon them. You perceive them in a certain fashion. I am not blaming you. I have done it too, in my time, and there is good reason for it. But the fact is that physical matter is not solid except when you believe that it is, and that organization is transposed from within upon the without. It is not transposed from the without upon you. You form the reality that you know, and even though the table holds up your arms and you may lean upon it and write, I still tell you that the table is not solid.
quotes.translation: 现在：你们以一种奇怪的方式使用原子和分子。你们将自己的观念转译到它们之上。你们以某种方式感知它们。我不是在责备你们。我在我的时代也这样做过，而且有充分的理由。但事实是，物质并非坚固，除非你相信它是坚固的，并且组织是从内在转译到外在的。它不是从外在转译到你身上的。你形成你所知的实相，即使桌子支撑着你的手臂，你可以靠在上面写字，我仍然告诉你，桌子并不坚固。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "This is almost always an exhilarating experience, like riding some perfect gigantic ninth wave of energy, knowing exactly how and when to 'jump in', and feeling absolutely safe and supported even when embarked upon such a strange psychological flight. But the energy and power of this wave carries me above and below usual reality, sweeping me into contrasts that are microscopic and macroscopic by turns."
quotes.translation: 这几乎总是一种令人振奋的体验，就像驾驭一道完美的第九重能量巨浪，精准知道何时及如何"跃入其中"，即便踏上如此奇异的心理飞行，也感到绝对安全与支撑。但这道浪的能量与力量将我托举于寻常现实之上又沉入其下，交替将我卷入微观与宏观的对比之中。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your York Beach experience had you not been able through your peculiar creative abilities to form those images outside of yourselves, and so endow them with a physical reality, you might very well have instead turned yourself into schizophrenic personalities. Even your psychologists know that the schizoid is at least temporarily two personalities, a primary or dominant personality and an inferior one.
quotes.translation: 在约克海滩的经历中，若你未能凭借独特的创造能力在自身之外形成那些意象，并赋予它们物质实相，你很可能早已将自己转化为精神分裂人格。即便是你们的心理学家也知道，分裂型人格至少暂时拥有双重人格——一个主导人格与一个次级人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This we have called the value climate of psychological reality. It is what you may consider your counterpart of physical space. After a short break, we will discuss then your misconceptions concerning space, for you will see that your idea of space is the result of your own physical perceptions. Where you can perceive nothing, you presume to call empty space, but where you perceive nothing there is much.
quotes.translation: 我们称此为心理实相的价值氛围。这相当于你们所认知的物理空间对应物。稍作休息后，我们将讨论你们对空间的误解，因为你们会明白，你们对空间的概念源于自身的物理感知。在你们感知不到任何事物之处，便假定其为空无空间，但你们感知不到之处，实则蕴含丰盈。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The relatively insignificant example of probable events and their interaction just given (in the last session) provides a few important clues to the nature of probabilities in general. An organization is definitely present, but it is not the kind of order you are used to recognizing. This small private experience is repeated endlessly with different variations in all areas of daily living -- that is, probable events constantly interact, and (intently) through their interaction you end up with one recognized series of episodes that you accept, called physical reality.
quotes.translation: 刚才（上次课）给出的可能性事件及其互动的相对微小例子，为概率的整体本质提供了几个重要线索。其中确实存在某种组织，但并非你们惯于认知的那种秩序。这种微小的私人体验在日常生活的各个领域以不同变体不断重复——也就是说，可能性事件持续互动，并通过其互动（专注地）最终形成你们所接受的那一系列被认可的片段，即所谓的物质实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Hopefully, certain concepts will be delivered in this way that could not be delivered otherwise. These minglings of reality and experience, these messages from one system to another, occur in various ways continually, emerging in your world in one guise or another -- as inspiration of many kinds. You are being helped, in other words.
quotes.translation: 但愿某些概念能以此种方式传递，否则便无法传达。这些实相与经验的交融，这些从一系统到另一系统的讯息，持续以各种方式发生，以这样或那样的伪装显现在你们的世界中——作为多种形式的灵感。换言之，你们正受到协助。

quotes.text: The idealizations themselves are made of "conscious" stuff. These are not inert data,1 then. The nature of probabilities determines the framework in which these fulfillments can take place, and "frames" living developments. The structure of probabilities provides on the one hand a system of barriers, in which practical growth is not chosen or significant; and on the other hand it insures a safe, creative, rich environment -- a reality -- in which the idealization can choose from an almost infinite variety of possible actions those best suited to its own fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 理想化本身由"意识"材料构成。因此它们并非惰性数据。概率的本质决定了这些圆满实现得以发生的框架，并"框定"了活生生的演化。概率结构一方面提供了屏障系统，在此系统中实际成长不被选择或无关紧要；另一方面则确保了安全、创造性与丰饶的环境——一个实相——在此理想化可以从近乎无限的可能性行动中选择最适合自身圆满实现的那些。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 697
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: In a natural state, many children would die stillborn for the same reasons, or would be naturally aborted. There is a give-and-take between all elements of nature, so that such individuals often choose mothers, for example, who perhaps wanted the experience of pregnancy but not of birth -- where they choose the experience of the fetus but not necessarily [that] of the child. Often in such cases these are "fragment personalities," wanting to taste physical reality, but not being ready to deal with it. Each case is individual, however, so these are general statements.
quotes.translation: 在自然状态下，许多儿童会因相同原因胎死腹中，或自然流产。自然界的各元素之间存在一种给予与索取的关系，因此这类个体常会选择那些或许只想要怀孕体验而非分娩体验的母亲——她们选择体验胎儿阶段，却未必选择体验孩童阶段。这类情况中，这些往往是"片段人格"，渴望品尝物质实相，却尚未准备好应对它。不过每个案例都是独特的，因此这些只是概括性陈述。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: This discussion is not meant to be an esoteric presentation with little practical meaning in your daily lives. The fact is that while you hold limited concepts of your own reality, then you cannot practically take advantage of many abilities that are your own; and while you have a limited concept of the soul, then to some extent you cut yourself off from the source of your own being and creativity.
quotes.translation: 现在：这场讨论并非意在成为对你们日常生活缺乏实际意义的深奥论述。事实是，当你们对自身实相持有局限概念时，便无法切实运用许多本属于你们的能力；而当你们对灵魂持有局限概念时，便在某种程度上切断了与自身存在及创造力源头的联系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: To this end, through Ruburt, I am producing the continuing body of the Seth material, and books, each in a different way geared to these goals. In my present book, The Nature of Personal Reality: A Seth Book, I am including techniques that will allow you and thousands of others to use these ideas in normal daily living, to enrich the life that you know and to help you understand and solve your problems.
quotes.translation: 为此，我通过鲁柏持续产出赛斯资料系列著作及书籍，每本书都以不同方式服务于这些目标。在我当前的著作《个人实相的本质：赛斯书》中，我收录了能让你们及成千上万人在日常正常生活中运用这些理念的技巧，以丰富你们所知的生活，并帮助你们理解与解决自身问题。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Young people are urged to tackle life aggressively, but in the usage of the term this means competitively. It also implies, and of course, promotes, the direction of individual consciousness in an exterior fashion only. Not only is consciousness to be focused to the external reality, but within those limits it is still further harnessed toward certain specific goals. Other inclinations are frowned upon.
quotes.translation: 年轻人被敦促要积极地应对人生，但该术语的用法意味着竞争性。它同样暗示并必然助长个体意识仅朝向外在方向的发展。意识不仅被聚焦于外在实相，更在此局限内被进一步束缚于特定目标。其他倾向则遭到排斥。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Joseph recently had an experience that disturbed him, simply because it was difficult to interpret even in the light of his understanding about the nature of the self. You cannot explore the nature of reality, hoping to discover its unknown aspects, if you insist that those aspects correspond with the known ones. So Joseph allowed himself some freedom -- and then was almost scandalized with the results.
quotes.translation: 约瑟最近经历了一件困扰他的事，原因很简单：即使以他对自我本质的理解，这件事也难以解读。若你们坚持未知面向必须与已知面向相符，便无法探索实相的本质以发现其未知面向。因此约瑟允许自己拥有一些自由——结果却几乎被结果惊骇。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: conversely, if you do not accept the idea of reincarnation, this does not mean that reincarnation is not a fact. It does mean that this insufficient energy will keep this reality at such a low ebb that it will not sufficiently materialize as an event within your system. For the egotistical self it will be a non-fact and the physical senses will of course find no Sense data to confirm reincarnation.
quotes.translation: 现在：反之，若你们不接受转世概念，这并不意味着转世不是事实。这确实意味着这种不足的能量将使此实相维持在如此低潮的状态，以至于它无法在你们的系统内充分显化为事件。对于自我本位而言，它将是非事实，而物质感官自然找不到任何感官资料来证实转世。

quotes.text: My field of reality is not the same as it is for those who have recently left your system. It is not necessary for Ruburt to adopt the deep trance state for our sessions, since I am able to speak through him without shutting out most aspects of his consciousness.
quotes.translation: 我的实相领域与那些刚离开你们系统的人不同。鲁柏不必为了我们的课程进入深度出神状态，因为我能在不屏蔽他大部分意识的情况下通过他说话。

quotes.text: When you paint the land, do so thinking in terms having to do with its past as well as present and future. Its inner development that has resulted in its present form, the energy behind the form. Remember in your painting the relationship of one object to another, not in terms of space necessarily, the interrelationship of the vitality that forms the objects; the vibrating always changing reality within, say, the skin of the apple or the orange, the quite living consciousness within the molecules that make up what seems to be the solid surface of the fruits' skin.
quotes.translation: 当你描绘大地时，请思考其过去、现在与未来的关联。思考那造就其当前形态的内在发展，以及形态背后的能量。在画作中记住物体之间的关系——不一定是空间上的关系，而是构成物体的生命力之间的相互关联；那存在于苹果或橘子表皮之下、不断振动的永恒变化的实相，以及构成看似坚实果皮表面的分子中那充满生机的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is the dilemma of the ego, particularly in its early states. It looks outward for answers because this is its nature: to manipulate within physical reality. It also senses, however, a deep and abiding connection that it does not understand, with other portions of the self that are not under its domain. It is also aware that this inner self possesses knowledge upon which its own existence is based.
quotes.translation: 这是自我面临的困境，尤其在其早期阶段。它向外寻找答案，因为这是它的本性：在物质实相中运作。然而它也感受到一种深刻而持久的联系——它无法理解的、与自身其他不受其管辖的部分之间的联系。它同样意识到这个内在自我拥有其自身存在所依赖的知识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Before, the environment was effortlessly created and perceived by man and all other living things, knowing the nature of their inner unity. In order to begin this new venture, it was necessary to pretend that this inner unity did not exist. Otherwise the new kind of consciousness would always run back to its home for security and comfort. So it seemed that all bridges must be cut, while of course it was only a game because the inner reality always remained. The new kind of consciousness simply had to look away from it to maintain initially an independent focus.
quotes.translation: 从前，人类与所有生灵无需费力就能创造并感知环境，因为他们知晓内在统一的本性。为了开启这个新冒险，必须假装这种内在统一并不存在。否则这种新意识总会逃回它的家园寻求安全与慰藉。因此所有桥梁似乎都必须切断，当然这不过是一场游戏，因为内在实相始终存在。这种新意识只需暂时转移视线，以维持最初的独立焦点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your ego, in common ordinary terms, has changed as a result of our sessions, in that it is now concerned with other realities also. In common senseterms, the ego handles manipulations within physical reality, and focuses brilliantly within a rather narrow range.
quotes.translation: 用普通话说，你的自我因我们的课程而改变，如今它也开始关注其他实相。按常识而言，自我处理物质实相中的操作，并在相当狭窄的范围内聚焦得异常清晰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, remember: in one way your reality is a probable system. In some other realities mankind has taken different roads.
quotes.translation: 现在请记住：从某种角度来说，你的实相是一个可能性系统。在其他某些实相中，人类选择了不同的道路。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In such dreams you tune in to other frequencies that are, indeed, closer to your biological integrity, but there is no reason why you cannot do so in the waking state. When such seeming miracles occur, it is because you have transcended your usual official beliefs about your body and its health, and disease, and so allowed nature to take its course. Often in the dream state you become truly awake, and grab ahold of your spirithood and creaturehood with both hands, so to speak, understanding that each has a far greater reality then you have been led to suppose.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，你调频到其他频率，这些频率确实更贴近你的生物完整性，但你没有理由不能在清醒状态下做到这一点。当这类看似奇迹的事件发生时，是因为你超越了关于身体、健康与疾病的惯常官方信念，从而让自然顺其道而行。在梦境状态中，你常常真正清醒过来，可以说双手紧握你的灵性与生物性，理解到两者都拥有比你被引导相信的更为宏大的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: What sin did the poor person or the sick person commit? That question, often asked unconsciously -- if not consciously -- brings you back to beliefs in punishment that have nothing to do with the concept of natural guilt, but with those distortions placed upon it. There is also a connection with misinterpretation of the Bible. Christ as you think of him was simply saying that you form your own reality. He tried to rise above the idea-systems of those times, yet even he had to use them, and so the connotations of sin and punishment distorted the message given.
quotes.translation: 贫穷者或患病者犯了什么罪？这个问题——即便不是有意识地，也常被无意识地提出——让你回到与惩罚相关的信念，这些信念与自然罪疚的概念毫无关联，而是与强加其上的扭曲有关。这也与对圣经的误解有关。你所认知的基督只是在说：你创造自己的实相。他试图超越那个时代的观念体系，但即便如此，他仍不得不使用它们，因此罪与惩罚的意涵扭曲了他所传达的信息。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When it is understood that space and time are both camouflages, and that your cause and effect theory is a result of a continuity theory that no longer makes sense, then your scientists will recognize the impossibility of trying to decipher basic reality with camouflage instruments, and vehicles, that of themselves produce distortive theories, and only serve to probe further into a camouflage pattern.
quotes.translation: 当人们理解到空间与时间都是伪装，而你的因果理论源于一种不再成立的连续性理论时，你的科学家们就会认识到：试图用伪装仪器与载具来破解基本实相是不可能的——这些仪器与载具本身就会产生扭曲理论，且只能进一步探查伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Each individual is not at the same level of achievement even at the end of the reincarnational cycle. Some possess certain qualities that do not find a counterpart within human experience. Physical existence itself has a different effect upon various individuals. Some find it an excellent medium of expression and development. They are suited to it. They have the knack for expressing themselves in physical ways and objectifying inner feelings faithfully. Others find this difficult, and yet these same individuals may do much better in other levels of reality.
quotes.translation: 即便在轮回周期的终点，每个个体也并非处于相同的成就水平。有些人拥有某些在人类经验中找不到对应物的特质。物质存在本身对不同个体产生不同影响。有些人发现它是表达与发展的绝佳媒介，他们适合于此，拥有以物质方式表达自我、忠实外化内在感受的诀窍。另一些人则觉得这很困难，而正是这些个体，在实相的其他层面可能表现得更好。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not limited. Identities can mix and merge while retaining their inviolate nature and memories. This is all for now, but again, later, you will see where it relates, and how you can disperse your own characteristics into another and they can disperse theirs into you, with your consent and theirs, to form new aspects of reality and to cast new light on combined purposes and challenges.
quotes.translation: 意识不受限制。身份可以在保持其不可侵犯的本质与记忆的同时相互混合与融合。目前就说到这里，但稍后你会看到这如何关联，以及你如何能将自己的特性分散到他人之中，而他们也能在你我同意下将他们的特性分散到你之中，从而形成实相的新面向，并为共同的目标与挑战投下新光。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 726
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Now I hope that you will understand me intuitively, for what I have said confounds the intellect to some considerable degree. But I speak through Ruburt, and Ruburt is himself and I am myself, yet without your support of Ruburt I could not speak. This in no way minimizes my reality, or Ruburt's. So your father's use of his own energies does not minimize what he is, nor his overall sense of direction.
quotes.translation: 现在，我希望你能凭直觉理解我，因为我说的话在相当程度上让理智感到困惑。但我通过鲁柏说话，鲁柏是他自己，而我是我自己，然而没有你们对鲁柏的支持，我无法说话。这丝毫不减损我的实相，也不减损鲁柏的实相。因此，你父亲运用自身能量的方式，并不减损他之所是，也不减损他整体的方向感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now: All creation is constant, and physical reality is formed and maintained in mental realms, sparked by psychic(pause)experiences. These inner events are the results of action's own characteristics. Action continually working upon itself creates more action.
quotes.translation: 现在：一切创造都是持续的，物质实相在心灵领域中被形成并维持，由心理（停顿）体验所激发。这些内在事件是行动自身特性的结果。行动持续作用于自身，产生更多行动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Her whole reality is far greater, and she is endeavoring to put these memories in place, in perspective, as you would put furniture into a new house. Time as you think of it has little meaning for her. You could compare the different time concepts in this way:
quotes.translation: 她的整个实相远为宏大，她正努力将这些记忆安置到位、纳入视角，就像你们将家具搬进新房子。你们所认为的时间对她而言几乎没有意义。你们可以这样比较不同的时间概念：
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is not to say that you cannot understand the nature of the universe to some extent, but the answers lie in the natures of your own minds, in the processes of individual creativity, in studies that ask questions like: "Where did this thought come from? Where does it go? What effect does it have upon myself or others? How do I know how to dream, when I have never been taught to do so? How do I speak without understanding the mechanisms? Why do I feel that I have an eternal reality, when it is obvious that I was physically born and will physically die?"
quotes.translation: 这并不是说你们无法在一定程度上理解宇宙的本质，但答案在于你们自己心智的本性、个体创造力的过程，以及提出诸如以下问题的研究："这个念头从何而来？它去向何处？它对我或他人有何影响？我如何知道如何做梦，尽管从未被教导过？我如何在不理解机制的情况下说话？为什么我明明有物理出生和物理死亡，却感觉自己拥有永恒实相？"
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All religions are distortive. For that matter much of your science is distortive. Both arrive at approximations, at best, of reality. Religion has been the cause of much prejudice and cruelty, but the bomb over Hiroshima was not caused by the Catholic Saint Theresa showering down any roses. The distortions in science and religion have been truly disastrous. I will go into this upon another occasion.
quotes.translation: 所有宗教都是扭曲的。就此而言，你们的许多科学也是扭曲的。两者最多只能接近实相的近似值。宗教曾导致许多偏见与残酷，但广岛原子弹并非由天主教圣特蕾莎洒下玫瑰所造成。科学与宗教中的扭曲确实带来了灾难性后果。我将在其他场合深入探讨这一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Your actions take place with such seeming smoothness that you do not realize the order involved. A volcanic eruption in one corner of the world will ultimately affect the entire earth in varying degrees. An emotional eruption will do the same thing on another level, altering the local area primarily but also sending out its ripples into the mass psychological environment. The psyche's picture of reality, then, would be equally incomprehensible to the conscious mind because of the intense focus upon singularity that your usual consciousness requires.
quotes.translation: 你们的行动看似如此顺畅，以至于你们意识不到其中所涉及的有序性。世界某个角落的火山爆发最终会以不同程度影响整个地球。情感爆发在另一层面也会产生同样效应，主要改变局部区域，但也将其涟漪扩散至集体心理环境。因此，心灵对实相的描绘对意识心智而言同样难以理解，因为你们通常意识所需的强烈聚焦于单一性。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many of your technological advances -- all of them, for that matter -- are rather interpretations of the inner mechanisms of nature: sonar, radar, and so forth, as you attempt to physically or objectively reproduce the inner realities of nature. I have mentioned civilizations often before. But it is sometimes almost impossible to verbally describe civilizations of scent, civilizations built upon temperature variations, alphabets of color, pressure gradations -- all of these highly intimate and organized, but quite outside of verbal representation. You would have to have additional material, nonverbal, to approach an understanding of such matters.
quotes.translation: 你们许多技术进步——就此而言，所有技术进步——都是对自然内在机制的诠释：声纳、雷达等等，正如你们试图在物理或客观层面复制自然的内在实相。我此前常提及文明。但有时几乎无法用语言描述气味文明、基于温度变化的文明、色彩字母表、压力梯度——所有这些都高度亲密且有序，却完全超出语言表征的范围。你们需要额外的非语言材料，才能接近理解此类事物。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Such action serves as a safeguard so that you do not overemphasize the gaps that may exist in yourself or in society, between the reality and the ideal condition. Many people want to change the world for the better, but that ideal seems so awe-inspiring that they think they can make no headway unless they perform some great acts of daring or heroism, or envision themselves in some political or religious place of power, or promote an uprising or rebellion. The ideal seems so remote and unreachable that, again, sometimes any means, however reprehensible, eventually can seem justified (see Session 850, for example). To change the world for the better, you must begin by changing your own life. There is no other way.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This actual gathering up of prime vitality for the purpose of physical construction is not however truly automatic, and it is not truly performed unconsciously. The strong self-conscious self of which I have spoken, the self-conscious self of which your own personality is not aware, this self that faces into the inner world of reality, quite consciously draws upon the vitality and stuff of what is.
quotes.translation: 这种为了物质建构而聚集原始生命力的行为，实际上并非真正自动发生，也并非真正在无意识中进行。我曾提及的那个强大的自我意识自我——你们自身人格并未觉察到的那个自我意识自我——这个面向内在实相世界的自我，完全有意识地汲取着存在本身的活力与素材。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The distinctions formed by the outer senses therefore actually limit perception as a whole, while intensifying it into a small but vivid, seemingly enclosed radius of reality. When conceptual thought develops far enough, then it is imagined that all energy originates from what seems to be a closed system; and this misconception then colors all deductions made concerning the nature of energy itself.
quotes.translation: 因此，外在感官所形成的区分，实际上限制了整体感知，同时将感知强化为一个小而生动、看似封闭的实相范围。当概念性思维发展到足够程度时，人们便会想象所有能量都源自一个封闭系统；这种误解随后会染上所有关于能量本身性质的推论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is only according to where you happen to come in this time, so to speak. Each dream, first of all, begins with psychic energy which the individual transforms not into physical matter but into a reality every bit as functional and as real. He forms the idea into a dream object or event with amazing discrimination, so that the dream object itself gains existence, and exists in numerous dimensions.
quotes.translation: 可以说，这完全取决于你恰好在时间中的哪个位置。首先，每个梦境都始于个体转化为心灵能量的心理能量——不是转化为物质，而是转化为一个同样功能完备、同样真实的实相。个体以惊人的辨识力将意念塑造成梦境中的物体或事件，使得梦境物体本身获得存在，并在多重维度中存续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you are proficient you will not be swept willy-nilly into other stages of consciousness as you sleep, but will be able to understand and direct these activities. Consciousness is an attribute of the soul, a tool that can be turned in many directions. You are not your consciousness. It is something that belongs to you and to the soul. You are learning to use it. To the extent that you understand and utilize the various aspects of consciousness, you will learn to understand your own reality, and the conscious self will truly become conscious.
quotes.translation: 当你精通此道时，就不会在睡眠中被随意卷入其他意识阶段，而是能够理解并引导这些活动。意识是灵魂的属性，是可以转向多个方向的工具。你不是你的意识。它属于你，也属于灵魂。你正在学习使用它。当你理解并运用意识的各种面向时，你将学会理解自己的实相，而意识自我也将真正变得有意识。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Peter [for his own reasons] may decide that his body is out to get him and punish him, rather than, say, the FBI. He may symbolically pick out an organ or a function, and he will misinterpret many body events in the same way that another may misinterpret mass events. Any public service announcements, so-called, publicizing symptoms connected with his sensitive area, will immediately alarm him. He will consciously and unconsciously focus upon that part of the body, anticipating its malfunction. Our friend can indeed alter the reality of his body.
quotes.translation: 彼得（出于自身原因）可能认定他的身体要与他作对并惩罚他，而非联邦调查局。他可能象征性地挑出一个器官或功能，并以他人误解大众事件的方式，误解许多身体事件。任何所谓的公共服务公告，只要宣传与他敏感区域相关的症状，都会立即引起他的警觉。他会有意识且无意识地聚焦于身体那个部位，预期其功能失常。我们的朋友确实能够改变他身体的实相。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: hen he originally gave us the 812th session some 16 months ago, Seth told us it would "be part of a chapter later in the book...." [See my opening notes for Session 814.] The 812th session was held following an encounter Jane and I had with an unexpected visitor, although these excerpts aren't personal at all. They fit in well with material in Mass Events, however -- indeed, as soon as Seth confirmed Jane's headings for Part 3 and Chapter 6, we knew that we'd found the place to present this material. We made our decision without consulting Seth, by the way.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: People who wrote books against the Catholic Church were excommunicated. Ruburt transferred those fears to society at large. There was a conflict between creative work and the church even when only poetry was involved. He should indeed give himself suggestions that the necessary insights will come to him, and that the proper connections be made whether consciously or unconsciously. But the idea is that it is safe to express himself, and that the true purpose of his life is indeed to express those characteristics that compose his personal reality.
quotes.translation: 撰写反对天主教书籍的人会被逐出教会。鲁柏将这些恐惧转移到了整个社会。即便只涉及诗歌创作，创造性工作与教会之间也存在冲突。他确实应该给自己暗示：必要的洞见将会到来，无论有意识还是无意识，正确的联结都会建立。但关键在于：表达自己是安全的，他生命的真正目的正是表达那些构成他个人实相的特质。
quotes.book: The Way Toward Health
quotes.source_file: 10-10-10-10The Way Toward Health - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (I talked about the first session for Jane's symptoms -- the private portion of Session 208, for November 15, 1965 -- yet she said that for her the whole thing really started the day before we went to a party in June 1966 regarding How to Develop Your ESP Power. Our friends wanted to celebrate the publication of her first "psychic" book, her first mention of Seth, but she read poetry at the party and wouldn't talk about the ESP book -- too embarrassed. A strange, protective way to behave.

quotes.text: All of your physical experience must, of course, be pivoted in the corporeal reality of the body. The energy that moves your image comes from the soul. Through your own thoughts you direct the body's expression, and it can be of health or of illness. Out of a knowledge of the contents of your own conscious mind you can definitely heal most maladies of the body, within conditions to be given later.
quotes.translation: 当然，你所有的物质经验都必须以身体的物质实相为轴心。驱动你形象的能量来自灵魂。通过你自己的思想，你指挥身体的表达，这可以是健康或疾病。凭借对自身意识心内容的了解，你绝对可以治愈身体的大多数疾病，条件将在后面给出。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As a personality learns to use its abilities it becomes more aware of complexity, and able to operate as an identity within it. Since I have known your time it is meaningful for me, though it no longer hampers me. I merely understand its reality for you. Other psychological structures have not been initially aware of this peculiar relationship between your physical framework and your time concept.
quotes.translation: 当一个人格学会运用其能力时，它会更加意识到复杂性，并能够作为一个身份在其中运作。既然我已知晓你们的时间，这对我有意义，尽管它不再束缚我。我只是理解它对你们的实相。其他心理结构最初并未意识到你们物质框架与时间概念之间的这种特殊关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: At first, in your terms, all of probable reality existed as nebulous dreams within consciousness of All That Is. Later the unspecified nature of these "dreams," in quotes, grew more particular and vivid. The dreams became recognizable one from the other, until they drew the conscious notice of All That Is. And with curiosity and yearning, All That Is paid more and more attention to his own dreams.
quotes.translation: 起初，用你们的话说，所有可能的实相都作为模糊的梦存在于一切万有的意识中。后来，这些“梦”（引号内）的未明确性质变得更加具体和生动。这些梦变得彼此可辨，直到它们引起一切万有的意识注意。带着好奇与渴望，一切万有越来越关注自己的梦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If however you imagine that the environment or physical condition is the reality, then you can feel trapped by it, and spend your efforts fighting a paper dragon. The environment is always altered from the inside. There is instant feedback between the interior and exterior conditions, but the mobility, the necessity and the method of changing the physical environment will always come from within.
quotes.translation: 然而，如果你想象环境或身体状况就是实相，那么你会感到被它困住，并耗费精力与纸老虎搏斗。环境总是从内部改变。内在与外在条件之间存在即时反馈，但改变物质环境的动力、必要性和方法始终来自内在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The physical structure alone is simply not divided from other structures in the manner which you perceive it to be through use of the outer senses. The outer senses are usually considered mainly as perceptive organs, enabling you to experience reality as it is. My dear friends, I have been waiting to tell you for some time that in a very true sense, the outer senses can be regarded as inhibitors.
quotes.translation: 物质结构本身并非像你通过外在感官所感知的那样与其他结构分离。外在感官通常主要被视为感知器官，使你能够体验实相的本然。我亲爱的朋友们，我一直等待时机告诉你们：在非常真实的意义上，外在感官可被视为抑制器。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Beneath these root assumptions however portions of the self perceive physical reality in an entirely different fashion, free of the tyranny of objects and material form. Here you experience concepts directly, without the need for symbolisms. Here you experience the spacious present directly. Here you have knowledge of your past personalities, and know that they exist simultaneously with your own.
quotes.translation: 然而，在这些根本假设之下，自我的部分以完全不同的方式感知物质实相，摆脱了物体与物质形态的暴政。在这里，你直接体验概念，无需象征符号。在这里，你直接体验广袤的当下。在这里，你了解自己过去的人格，并知道它们与你的当前人格同时存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (11:06.) They may still be perceiving reality in terms of their old beliefs. Almost all communications come from this level, particularly when there is a bond of relationship in an immediately previous life. Even at this level, however, such messages serve a purpose. The communicators can inform living relatives that existence continues and they can do it in terms that the living can understand.
quotes.translation: （11点06分）他们可能仍在根据旧有信念感知实相。几乎所有通讯都来自这个层面，尤其是当存在上一世直接关系纽带时。但即便在这个层面，这类信息也有其目的。通讯者可以告知在世亲属：存续仍在继续，且能采用生者能理解的方式传达。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your consciousness expands and develops according to its own abilities. Previous lives are handled in conscious terms when you are in existence between physical lives. When you are completed in those terms you may operate within a two reality field psychological pattern, in which you are consciously aware of existing in two systems at once, and able to manipulate with full awareness within each.
quotes.translation: 你的意识会依据自身能力扩展和发展。当处于肉身生命之间的存有状态时，前世的经历会以意识可及的方式被处理。当你完成该层面的转化后，便可在双重实相场域的心理模式中运作——同时清醒意识到自己存在于两个系统之中，并能完全觉知地在每个系统内进行操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Do not forget however that you are a portion of the inner self. It is not using you. You are the portion of it that experiences physical reality. Now physical illnesses that are not critical but observable, that do not involve the loss of say of a limb or of an organ, generally (underlined) represent problems that are in the process of being solved, problems that are in quotes "out in the open."
quotes.translation: 但请勿忘记：你是内在自性的一部分。它并非在利用你。你正是那个体验物质实相的自性片段。现在，那些非致命但可观察的生理疾病——例如不涉及肢体或器官缺失的病症——通常（强调）代表着正在被解决的问题，即引号中所谓"公开化"的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: A psychological experience may take up no space as a rock takes up space, but when a psychological experience happens it may fill you up. Yet you do not deny the existence of a psychological experience, though you cannot rip it apart from yourself and examine it with the physical senses. Still it has its effect, and its validity is well known to every man. So also are there other realities that cannot be examined through the use of the physical senses, realities so close to the self that they cannot be separated from it and objectified.
quotes.translation: 心理体验不似岩石般占据空间，但当心理体验发生时，它可能充盈你的整个存在。然而你无法否认心理体验的存在，尽管无法将其从自身剥离并用物质感官检视。它依然产生着影响，其真实性为每个人所熟知。同样存在其他无法通过物质感官检验的实相——这些实相与自我如此贴近，以至于无法与之分离并客观化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: We do not need to name the two portions separately. I had thought of specifically having the first part deal with inner and outer immediate environments, and then to lead to the larger reality of the soul and its perception in the second part. This is what I did, but the material is so interwoven that I felt the given separation enough, and did not want to reinforce the idea of a division.
quotes.translation: 现在：我们无需分别命名这两个部分。我原计划让第一部分专门探讨内在与外在的即时环境，再在第二部分引向灵魂的更宏大实相及其感知方式。这正是我所做的，但材料交织如此紧密，以至于我认为既已做出区分便已足够，不愿再强化分裂的概念。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This will last very briefly. Heaven and hell, indeed, are mere representations. They represented originally intuitive insights. But no heaven or hell exist in those terms. There is no place within the universe or within any universe or system for them. You create reality according to your beliefs and expectations. Therefore, it behooves you to examine your beliefs and expectations very clearly.
quotes.translation: 这将会非常短暂。天堂与地狱确实只是表征。它们最初代表直觉洞见。但不存在字面意义上的天堂或地狱。宇宙之内、任何宇宙或系统之中都没有它们的位置。你根据信念与期待创造实相。因此，你应当极为清晰地检视自己的信念与期待。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The stronger those natural inclinations are, the more the child is directed to ignore them in your society, since certain characteristics, again, are considered exclusively male or female. The child is also coerced into ignoring or denying those portions of the personality that correspond with the sex it is being taught it cannot identify with. This squeezing of personality into a sexual mold begins early, then. Continuing guilt is generated because the child knows unerringly that its own reality transcends such simple orientation.
quotes.translation: 那些自然倾向越强烈，孩子就越被你的社会引导去忽视它们，因为某些特质再次被视为专属于男性或女性。孩子也被迫忽视或否认那些与其被教导不能认同的性别相对应的人格部分。这种将人格塞进性别模子的行为，从很早便开始了。持续的罪恶感由此产生，因为孩子准确无误地知道，自己的实相远超越这种简单的取向。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Once again, the elderly were singled out. It seems obvious that they are more susceptible to diseases. That susceptibility is a medical fact of life. It is a fact, however, without a basic foundation in the truth of man's biological reality. It is a fact brought about through suggestion. The doctors see the bodily results, which are quite definite, and then those results are taken as evidence.
quotes.translation: 再次，老年人被单独挑出来。他们似乎明显更容易患病。这种易感性是生命中的医学事实。然而，这个事实在人类生物实相的真相当中没有基本依据。它是通过暗示产生的。医生看到相当明确的身体结果，然后这些结果被当作证据。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Finally: Just before tonight's session Jane said she thought Seth might do some work on Mass Events. She had a question about herself, and I asked for a few lines from Seth on whether she just might have been born left-handed. I want to use the material in connection with a passage I'm putting together for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality. [See the excerpts from Session 211, in Appendix 18 of that work.] However, Seth didn't answer my question.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: This book is Seth's way of demonstrating that human personality is multidimensional, that we exist in many realities at once, that the soul or inner self is not something apart from us, but the very medium in which we exist. He emphasizes that "truth" is not found by going from teacher to teacher, church to church, or discipline to discipline, but by looking within the self. The intimate knowledge of consciousness, the "secrets of the universe," are not esoteric truths to be hidden from the people, then. Such information is as natural to man as air, and as available to those who honestly seek it by looking to the source within.
quotes.translation: 这本书是赛斯展示人类人格是多维度的方式，我们同时存在于许多实相中，灵魂或内在自己并非与我们分离的东西，而是我们存在的媒介本身。他强调，"真理"不是通过从一个老师到另一个老师、从一个教堂到另一个教堂、或从一个法门到另一个法门找到的，而是通过向内看自己找到的。那么，对意识的亲密知识、"宇宙的奥秘"并非要隐藏于人们的秘传真理。这样的信息对人类来说就像空气一样自然，并且对那些通过向内寻找源头而诚实寻求的人同样可得。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: You could see a phosphorescentlike glow, the aura of electromagnetic "structures" that compose the molecules themselves. You could, if you wished, condense your consciousness until it was small enough to travel through a single molecule, and from the molecule's own world look out and survey the universe of the room and the gigantic galaxy of interrelated, ever-moving starlike shapes. Now all of these possibilities represent a legitimate reality. Yours is no more legitimate than any other, but it is the only one that you perceive.
quotes.translation: 你可以看到一种磷光般的光辉，那是构成分子本身的电磁"结构"的光晕。如果你愿意，你可以凝聚你的意识，直到它小到足以穿过一个分子，并从分子自己的世界向外看，审视房间的宇宙和相互关联、不断运动的星状形状的巨大星系。现在所有这些可能性都代表一种合法的实相。你的实相并不比任何其他实相更合法，但它是你唯一感知到的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is from the bank of knowledge then that I can relate to others, and they realize intuitively that on such occasions I am not speaking down to them. Impediments do not get in my way, for I do not throw up impediments of that kind. I do not throw up distortions of my own making, and therefore misinterpret the reactions of others. When I speak to them I am thinking of them, and to some extent I can indeed enter into their psychological reality. Therefore I can phrase what I want to say in a way that is highly meaningful to them.
quotes.translation: 正是从知识库中，我才能与他人建立联系，他们直觉地意识到，在这种场合我并非居高临下地对他们说话。障碍不会妨碍我，因为我不制造那种障碍。我不制造自己造成的扭曲，因此不会误解他人的反应。当我与他们交谈时，我正想着他们，并且在某种程度上我确实能进入他们的心理实相。因此，我能以对他们高度有意义的方式措辞我想说的话。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In itself an object should be then felt as its unique identity, and as a part of the whole universe. A stone or a flower is a very small thing. When you attach your attention say to a flower, it is not only a matter of imagining yourself as the flower, or trying to sensewhat a flower is. It is also to imagine the power of the energy that causes that flower to grow; and yet in a landscape you will have perhaps many flowers. They must each suggest the reality of the overall pulsating vitality that makes their appearance possible.
quotes.translation: 物体本身应被感受为其独特的身份，以及整个宇宙的一部分。一块石头或一朵花是非常小的东西。当你把注意力集中在一朵花上时，这不仅仅是想象自己成为那朵花，或试图感知一朵花是什么的问题。这也是想象使那朵花生长的能量之力；然而在风景中，你也许会有许多花朵。它们必须各自暗示那使它们出现成为可能的整体脉动活力的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The mass race consciousness, in its terms, possesses an identity. You are a portion of that identity while still being unique, individual and independent. You are confined only to the extent that you have chosen physical reality, and so placed yourself within its context of experience. While physical, you follow physical laws, or assumptions. These form the framework for corporeal expression.
quotes.translation: 大众种族意识就其本身而言拥有一个身份。你是该身份的一部分，同时保持独特、个体且独立。你仅在自己选择物质实相并置身于其经验脉络的范围内受到限制。处于物质状态时，你遵循物质法则或假设，这些构成了肉体表达的框架。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In a way you are simply overexuberant, like children playing a new game. You will discover that at best you are using children's blocks. Some of you have already come to that conclusion. As this book continues, I will indeed outline some beginning proposals as to ways in which you can use your consciousness to understand the nature of reality, and to make some of those inner blueprints clear.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度看，你只是过于亢奋，如同玩新游戏的孩子。你会发现充其量只是在玩积木。有些人已得出这个结论。随着本书的推进，我确实会概述一些初步建议，说明如何运用意识理解实相的本质，并让那些内在蓝图变得清晰。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 701
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Do not be impatient. As you continue with this exercise over a period of time you will be able to go further away, orienting yourself as you grow more familiar with the feeling of your mind. Gradually you will discover that this inner sense data will become clearer and clearer as you move toward another "station." It will represent reality as perceived from a different state of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 请勿急躁。持续进行这个练习一段时间后，你将能走得更远，随着对心灵感觉愈发熟悉而调整方向。你会逐渐发现，当你移向另一个"站点"时，这些内在感官资料会变得越来越清晰。它将代表从不同意识状态所感知的实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Computer like, the data is instantly made available exactly when and where it is needed. The ego is indeed equipped to handle physical reality. Its purpose is the manipulation of the personality within the physical universe. Its most effective method of procedure however is to form the problem concisely, and then to feed it to the subconscious before the personality enters the dreaming state.
quotes.translation: 如同计算机般，资料会在需要的时间与地点立即被提供。自我确实被设计来处理物质实相，其目的是在物质宇宙中操控人格。然而，它最有效的运作方式是简洁地形成问题，然后在人格进入梦境状态前将其输入潜意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The word subjective, to you, implies immediately that which is not objective. However the events and actions of the probable system are indeed objective and concrete within their own field of reality. Your own physical system, you should remember, is only real and concrete within its own field. It is for this reason mainly that the physical system is so little perceived by you when you sleep.
quotes.translation: 对你而言，"主观"一词立即暗示非客观。然而，可能系统的活动与事件在其自身的实相领域内确实是客观且具体的。你应记住，你自己的物质系统仅在其自身领域内才是真实具体的。主要基于这个原因，你在睡眠时几乎感知不到物质系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Some such data will never be utilized. Some such data will be utilized time and time again. Now you see the energy does not reside within any given physical object, but in the idea form that is within it. Physical objects do not exist as such in a basic manner. You can only perceive large areas of reality data however by transforming it into terms that can be picked up by the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 有些这类资料永远不会被利用，有些则会反复被利用。现在你明白，能量并不驻留在任何特定物质对象中，而是存在于其内在的意念形式里。物质对象在基本层面上并不如此存在。你只能通过将实相资料转化为能被物质感官接收的术语，来感知大范围的实相资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is vital that you understand this inward and outward thrust of "time," however, and realize that from this flows the consecutive appearance of the moment. The thrusting gives dimensions to time that so far you have not even begun to realize. Again, you live on the surface of the moments, with no understanding of the unrecognized and unofficial realities that lie beneath.
