All of this, once more, is tied in with your accepted neurological recognition of certain messages over others, your mental prejudice that effectively blinds you to other quite valid biological communications that are indeed present all of the "time".
quotes.translation: 至关重要的是，你必须理解"时间"这种向内和向外的推力，并认识到由此产生了片刻的连续显现。这种推力赋予了时间维度，而你们至今尚未开始理解这些维度。再次强调，你们活在片刻的表面，对底下那些未被承认、非官方的实相一无所知。这一切，再次与你们对某些信息而非其他信息的神经认知选择有关，也与你们的精神偏见有关——这种偏见有效蒙蔽了你们，使你们无法察觉那些确实始终存在于"时间"中的其他有效生物沟通。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 688
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The chemical and electrical construction of the human individual opens other pathways, and requires other activities in other fields than those with which the conscious ego is familiar. The mechanics are not important, but as dreaming is partially caused by chemical poisons that make dreaming a necessity for physical survival, so there are other mechanisms of this kind that are actually doorways, built within and natural to the physical mechanism, that at the same time necessitate experience upon other fields of reality.
quotes.translation: 人类个体的化学与电子构造开启了其他路径，并在其他领域要求其他活动，这些领域并非意识自我所熟悉。机制本身并不重要，但正如做梦部分由化学毒素引起，使做梦成为肉体生存的必需，同样存在其他这类机制，它们实际上是门户，内建于肉体机制且为其自然属性，同时必然要求在其他实相领域中获得体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: All depth, all dimension and all distance is therein contained within the electrical universe. There is here, as I have said, no such thing as size in your terms, or shape in your terms: but there is, again, distance, which is not absolute but varying, and which can be said to exist both backward and forward indefinitely within the infinite intensities. And all reality within any given field basically occurs within such intensities.
quotes.translation: 所有深度、所有维度、所有距离都包含在电子宇宙之内。如我所说，这里没有你们所谓的尺寸或形状，但确实存在距离——它不是绝对的，而是变化的，可以说在无限强度中无限地向前和向后存在。任何给定领域内的所有实相，基本上都发生于这样的强度之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (12:21.) In other terms, the self that you have projected into the future is sending you back encouragement from a probable reality that you still can create. That focused self operates from its present, however, and some day in your own future you may find yourself thinking nostalgically of a moment back in your own past, when you were indecisive and irresolute, but took the proper course.
quotes.translation: (12:21。) 换个说法，你投射到未来的那个自我，正从一个你仍可创造的或然实相中向你发回鼓励。然而，那个聚焦的自我是从它的当下运作的，在你自己的未来某天，你可能会发现自己怀念地想起过去某个时刻——那时你犹豫不决、优柔寡断，但最终选择了正确的道路。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The fact remains that the inner senses are equipped to let you perceive inner reality. You can use them; and for Philip's information the evidence of the inner senses is immediate, and vivid, and direct--much more vivid, Philip, than for example your camouflage experience of the color red. Everyone sees red differently. There is no absolute objective red but only gradations of the idea red.
quotes.translation: 事实仍然是，内在感官被设计来让你感知内在实相。你可以使用它们；为了菲利普的参考，内在感官的证据是即时、生动且直接的——菲利普，比你对红色的伪装体验要生动得多。每个人看到的红色都不同。没有绝对客观的红色，只有红色理念的渐变。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: It is as if I was operating on one of many channels, and I am still in the process of teaching you to operate the other dials. When you grow in proficiency, and I certainly hope you will, then much greater dimension will be given to these sessions, with your help. You are getting now something that corresponds to one thin wispy signal, or one tinny distant sound, or one clouded foggy image. In the future as I said the dimension will grow. Your own inner senses will add greater reality than you can imagine at this point.
quotes.translation: 这就像我在众多频道中的一个上运作，而我仍在教导你操作其他旋钮的过程中。当你熟练度提升时——我当然希望你会——那么这些课将因你的帮助而获得更大的维度。你现在得到的东西，相当于一个微弱细小的信号，或一个遥远微弱的声响，或一个模糊朦胧的影像。未来，如我所说，维度将会增长。你自身的内在感官将增添比此刻你能想象的更大的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: and yet by their nature they are limitations. They are limitations because their reality is necessarily limited by the elements you have chosen. You paint one house within a landscape for example. This is a creation. But two houses will never appear.
quotes.translation: 然而就其本质而言，它们是限制。之所以是限制，是因为它们的实相必然受限于你所选择的元素。例如，你在风景中画一栋房子，这是一种创造。但两栋房子永远不会同时出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In two probable realities, your mother, for example, did not have children. You do not exist in these. In some she married but not the man you know as your father. A psychological connection exists between the first son in that reality, and yourself.
quotes.translation: 在两个可能的实相中，例如你的母亲没有孩子。在这些实相中你并不存在。在另一些实相中她结了婚，但嫁的不是你认识的那个父亲。那个实相中的长子与你之间存在心理上的联系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Psychically you are somewhat related, in the same way for instance that the violets that grow this year in one spot are related to all violets that have grown -- or will ever grow -- from (or on) the same spot. Each moment, each year, has other dimensions, therefore, that you do not comprehend as yet. To you, other people born now in 1940 would be born in a probable reality. Yet you share the same bed, so to speak. When you look at an object you see its exterior, and when you experience time you perceive its exterior.
quotes.translation: 在心灵层面你们有些关联，就像今年在同一地点生长的紫罗兰，与所有曾经或将要在此地生长的紫罗兰都有关联。每个瞬间、每个年份都拥有你尚未理解的其它维度。对你而言，1940年此刻出生的其他人会诞生于一个可能的实相中。但可以说你们共享同一张床。当你观察物体时看到的是它的外表，当你体验时间时感知到的也是它的外表。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 728
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The following basic subjects are necessary for an understanding of what we are trying to say, particularly for any practical application: the construction of physical matter; the psychological and electrical gestalt that results in the formation of a self; the nature of the dream universe; the electrical system, as it is related to both the physical universe and the inner psychic gestalt; the nature of action; mental enclosures; mental genes; and again, all of these subjects in relationship to their reality as action.
quotes.translation: 以下基础主题对于理解我们试图传达的内容至关重要，尤其对于任何实际应用：物质形态的构建；形成自我所需的心理与电力完形；梦境宇宙的本质；电力系统及其与物质宇宙和内在心灵完形的关系；行动的本质；心灵围场；心灵基因；再次强调，所有这些主题都与它们作为行动的实相相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am not going to hold a very long session this evening. Rather than give you fairly frequent short vacations, I may at times close a session early. We still come out ahead in terms of time. We are heading here indeed, slowly but surely, toward a thorough discussion of the inner senses, which could not be given until you had a good background in the nature of action itself. For you should be able to see now that the inner senses allow a more faithful perception of basic reality than the outer senses could ever give.
quotes.translation: 今晚我不打算进行很长的课程。与其频繁地给你短暂休息，我有时可能会提前结束课程。在时间上我们仍然占优。我们正缓慢而坚定地走向对内感官的彻底探讨，这必须在你对行动本质有良好基础后才能进行。因为你现在应该能看出，内感官能比外感官更忠实地感知基本实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of these procedures are unnecessary to consciousness itself, however. They are necessary to develop communication between nonphysical consciousness and the physical form which it has adopted. Consciousness, in forming an image, or creating it, then responds to it creatively, setting up frameworks for further creative actions. Consciousness experiences reality directly, but having formed physical matter into a personal image, it must then creatively translate data to that physical brain. It must keep it informed.
quotes.translation: 然而所有这些程序对意识本身而言都是不必要的。它们对于发展非物质意识与其所采用物质形态之间的沟通是必要的。意识在形成或创造意象后，会创造性地回应它，为后续创造性行动建立框架。意识直接体验实相，但既然已将物质形态塑造成个人意象，就必须创造性地将数据转译给那个物质大脑。它必须让大脑保持知情。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: So include it in The Nature of Personal Reality, for it is the birth of the book in your personal reality.
quotes.translation: 因此，将它纳入《个人实相的本质》吧，因为它是这本书在你个人实相中的诞生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Basically, however, no system is closed. Energy flows freely from one to another, or rather permeates each. It is only the camouflage structure that gives the impression of closed systems, and the law of inertia does not apply. It appears to be a reality only within your own framework and because of your limited focus.
quotes.translation: 然而，基本上没有系统是封闭的。能量自由地从一种系统流向另一种系统，或者更确切地说，渗透于每一种系统。只是伪装结构造成了封闭系统的印象，惯性定律并不适用。它似乎只在你的框架内因你有限的焦点而显得真实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. We will endeavor to continue speaking of some matters discussed in our previous session. A moment point basically consists not of any particular given time division, but is within your system a convenient term that expresses or represents the range of reality that can be conveniently embraced without undue strain.
quotes.translation: 现在。我们将继续讨论上一节课中谈到的某些议题。一个瞬间点基本上并非由任何特定的时间划分构成，而是在你的系统中，它是一个方便的术语，用来表达或代表无需过度紧张就能轻松容纳的实相范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The people of a nation can at any given moment decide to activate or experience a particular event almost entirely in the physical realm, or to separate its elements in such a way that half of it is experienced physically and the other half in dream reality. Transformations of energy occur of course constantly, so that, say, a probable physical storm can instead appear as an economic one.
quotes.translation: 一个国家的人民可以在任何特定时刻决定几乎完全在物质领域激活或体验某个特定事件，或者将其元素分离，使得一半在物质中体验，另一半在梦境实相中体验。能量的转化当然持续发生，因此，比如说，一场可能的物质风暴反而可能显现为经济风暴。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane held Session 900 for Chapter 5 of Dreams, in Volume 1, some 20 months ago. In Note 1 for that session I described a most vivid dream experience--one in which, Seth told me in the session itself, I had viewed the many-faceted light of my own being and of the universe. Participating in that event had been our friend, Floyd Waterman. Floyd is an extremely generous and caring individual who has helped us many times over the years; he's the contractor who converted half of our double garage for the hill house into Jane's writing room.2 Jane and I have each shared a number of psychic experiences with him.

quotes.text: Thoughts have shape in terms of intensity mass, though you cannot see their shape; your outer senses do not perceive it. You see within yourself the various shapes of dreams to a certain extent. You do not see the dream itself, for even here, after giving a dream reality, electrical existence, you must break it down into simpler terms so that you can perceive what you have indeed created.
quotes.translation: 思想在强度质量方面具有形状，尽管你看不到它们的形状；你的外在感官无法感知它。你在自身之内在一定程度上看到梦的各种形状。你并未看到梦本身，因为即使在这里，在赋予梦实相和电性存在之后，你也必须将其分解为更简单的术语，以便你能感知你确实创造的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This will serve as a further connective to our discussion of the dream universe, and its interaction with the world of physical matter. It goes without saying that your definition of reality is extremely limited, and excludes more than it includes.
quotes.translation: 这将作为我们讨论梦宇宙及其与物质世界互动的进一步连接。不言而喻，你对实相的定义极其有限，排除的比包含的要多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In prehistoric times mankind evolved the ego and self-consciousness to help him deal with the camouflage patterns that he had created. This is no contradiction, and will be explained later. He did the job so well that even when he had things under control he was not satisfied. He developed at a lopsided level. He used himself as a tool to dissect himself. The inside senses led him to a reality he could not manipulate as easily as he could a camouflage world, and he feared what he thought of as a loss of mastery.
quotes.translation: 在史前时代，人类进化出自我与自我意识，以协助处理自己创造的伪装模式。这并非矛盾，后续将予以解释。人类做得如此成功，以至于即便掌控了局面仍不满足。他们以失衡的方式发展，将自己当作解剖自身的工具。内在感官引领他们触及一个无法像操控伪装世界那样轻易掌控的实相，而他们恐惧这种所谓"失去掌控"的状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In the dream itself, he goes into his room and discovers that his ability is as much a part of him as his breath, and that he cannot turn it off and on at will, or turn it off as one would a radio. He stands in the room, and there is an electric storm in the dream, and the room is touched by vibrating currents. He is afraid. Nevertheless he realizes that he is part of the storm, and the storm is part of himself, and it is not destructive but creative; and most of all, a simple elemental part of reality as it is.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，他走进房间，发现这种能力如同呼吸般与自身融为一体，无法像开关收音机那样随意启闭。他立于房中，梦境里电闪雷鸣，震颤的电流触及房间。他心生恐惧，却意识到自己即是风暴的一部分，风暴亦是自身的一部分——这并非毁灭性的力量，而是创造性的存在；最重要的是，这是实相中纯粹而根本的组成部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Ideas of love, then, become highly distorted, and its expression also. You do not fight wars for the sake of the brotherhood of man, for example. People who are acquainted with undistorted versions of love in their relationships would find such a concept impossible. Men brought up to be ashamed of the "feminine" sides of their nature cannot be expected to love women. They will see in women instead the despised, feared, and yet charged aspects of their own reality, and behave accordingly in their relationships.
quotes.translation: 爱的理念因此遭到严重扭曲，其表达方式亦然。例如，你不会为人类手足情谊而发动战争。那些在关系中体验过未经扭曲之爱的人，会认为这种概念绝无可能。被教育要羞于自身"女性"特质的男性，不可能真正爱女性。他们会在女性身上看到自身实相中被鄙视、恐惧却又充满魅力的面向，并在关系中据此行事。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I have mentioned earlier the peculiar problems of your scientists as with tools and instruments they attempt to reduce reality to their terms. Any instruments made on your plane are like your outer senses, constructed to perceive camouflage patterns. The instruments of the scientists, and the outer senses themselves, are camouflage patterns and cannot, and never will, dissect themselves.
quotes.translation: 我先前提及科学家们面临的特殊困境：他们试图用工具仪器将实相简化为自身术语。你们物质层面制造的任何仪器都如同外在感官，专为感知伪装模式而设计。科学家的仪器与外在感官本身皆是伪装模式，无法也永远无法解剖自身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This electrical reality will be a basis for many future discussions, and you will see the basis behind my contention that dream locations indeed exist in actuality. It is important also to realize that psychic gestalts are built up electrically, and that many positive attractions exist between and within various electrical fields, so that there is constant motion and travel between them.
quotes.translation: 这种电性实相将成为未来诸多讨论的基础，你们将理解我主张"梦境地点确实存在于实相中"背后的依据。同样重要的是要认识到，心灵完形以电性方式构建，不同电场之间及内部存在大量正向吸引，使它们之间持续发生运动与穿梭。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: lbe pure and brilliant quality of the surroundings have much in common with the appearance physical reality has for children. The physical senses seem to operate with such efficiency that you think you are awake, but their brilliancy is super perfect. As soon as you realize what type of dream this is, then with practice you can project within it consciously, and explore your environment.
quotes.translation: 环境纯净璀璨的特质，与物质实相在孩童眼中的样貌极为相似。物质感官运作得如此高效，以至于你以为自己清醒着，但其明澈度超乎完美。一旦你辨识出这是何种梦境，便能通过练习在其中进行有意识的投射，探索周遭环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is not like a liquid that flows through a bowl. It becomes a part of that which contains it, and therefore a part of the consciousness, in your case, of the cells and all of your structures. Words on a printed page for example are not dead, nor are they merely inert symbols. They share the consciousness of the material upon which they are printed and the various individual letters themselves, by their position and reality, make each unique piece of paper upon which they are written original from all others.
quotes.translation: 它不像流过碗的液体，而是成为容纳它的容器的一部分，因此也成为意识的一部分——就你们而言，即细胞和所有身体结构的一部分。例如，印刷页面上的文字并非死物，也绝非惰性符号。它们共享承载它们的物质的意识，而各个字母本身通过其位置与实相，使每一张承载文字的纸张都成为独一无二的原创。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The "Unknown" Reality, Volumes One and Two. Seth reveals the multidimensional nature of the human soul, the dazzling labyrinths of unseen probabilities involved in any decision, and how probable realities combine to create the waking life we know.
quotes.translation: 《“未知”实相》卷一与卷二。赛斯揭示了人类灵魂的多维本质、任何决定中涉及的无形概率的炫目迷宫，以及概率实相如何组合成我们所知的清醒生活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You do not survive through cooperation, according to that theory, and nature is not given a kind or creative intent, but a murderous one. And if you see yourselves as the end result of such a species, then how can you expect goodness or merit or creativity from yourselves, or from others? How can you believe that you live in a safe universe when each species exists because it survives through claw, if it must hunt and kill out of murderous intent, as implied in the theories of evolution and of reality itself?
quotes.translation: 根据那套理论，你们并非通过合作生存，自然不被赋予仁慈或创造性的意图，而是充满杀意。如果你们将自己视为此类物种的最终产物，又如何能期待自身或他人拥有良善、价值或创造力？当每个物种的存在都依赖于利爪生存——若它必须出于杀意狩猎杀戮，正如进化论及实相本身理论所暗示的那样——你们又如何能相信活在一个安全的宇宙中？
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: This of course highly falsifies such data. The inner senses are not bound by those root assumptions however. This is why many psychic or subjective experiences seem to contradict physical laws. Inner experience often seems chaotic or meaningless because you attempt to interpret it according to the root assumptions of physical reality. You must learn the laws that apply to other systems.
quotes.translation: 这当然严重歪曲了此类数据。然而内在感官不受那些根本假设的束缚。这就是为何许多通灵或主观经验似乎与物理法则相矛盾。内在经验常显得混乱或无意义，因为你们试图用物质实相的根本假设去诠释它。你们必须学习适用于其他系统的法则。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Many actual physical intervening steps are cut out. The ego becomes more similar to the inner ego than to its old self, comparatively speaking. This altered ego is aware of large portions of inner reality that were previously denied. Structurally it remains intact, and yet it has changed chemically, and electromagnetically. It is able to open up so that inner experience can be received.
quotes.translation: 许多实际物理介入步骤被省略。相对而言，自我变得比其旧有形态更接近内在自我。这种被改变的自我意识到先前被否认的大量内在实相。它在结构上保持完整，却在化学与电磁层面发生了改变。它能够敞开，以便接收内在经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... Other focuses of consciousness besides your own have different concepts of time, and are actually more biologically correct, in that they have greater knowledge of both cellular and spiritual realities. There is nothing "wrong" with your present habitual kind of consciousness, any more than there is anything wrong with speaking only one language. There is within you, however, the impetus to explore, to expand, to create, and that will automatically lead you to explore inner lands of consciousness; as, in your terms, it has led you to explore the other countries of the physical world.
quotes.translation: 请稍等……除了你们自己的意识之外，其他意识焦点拥有不同的时间概念，实际上更符合生物学真相，因为它们对细胞实相与灵性实相都有更深刻的认识。你们当前习惯性的意识形态并无“错误”，正如只会说一种语言并无不妥。然而你们内在存在着探索、扩展与创造的动力，这动力将自动引领你们探索意识的内在领域——用你们的话说，正如它曾引领你们探索物质世界的其他国家。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I have given you both sermon enough for this evening but I cannot emphasize too strongly the importance of what I have said. If you direct your inner self with confidence to steer you through your physical existence, it will do so. If you concentrate upon difficulties you will not allow it to do so. This method of giving yourself room will also help you to achieve a greater freedom in psychic matters. For any negative focus （and underline negative） within egotistical reality will automatically block you.
quotes.translation: 今晚我已给你们足够多的训诫，但我再怎么强调我所说内容的重要性都不为过。如果你满怀信心地引导内在自我，让它指引你穿越物质存在，它便会如此行事。若你专注于困难，便不会允许它这样做。这种为自己留出空间的方法，也将帮助你在心灵事务中获得更大的自由。因为在自我本位的实相中，任何负面焦点（请着重强调"负面"二字）都会自动阻碍你。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Any deep exploration of the self will lead you into areas that will confound conventional beliefs about sexuality. You will discover an identity, a psychological and psychic identity, that is in your terms male and female, one in which those abilities of each sex are magnified, released, and expressed. They may not be so released in normal life, but you will meet the greater dimensions of your own reality, and at least in the dream state catch a glimpse of the self that transcends a one-sex orientation.
quotes.translation: 任何对自我的深度探索，都会将你引入足以颠覆传统性别观念的领域。你将发现一个身份——一个心理与灵性的身份——它在你看来兼具男性和女性特质，其中两性的能力都被放大、释放并表达出来。这些能力在正常生活中或许无法如此释放，但你会遇见自身实相的更大维度，至少在梦境状态中能一窥那个超越单一性别取向的自我。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All of the issues form together to make a trellis of behavior. Thorns or roses may grow therein. That is, the individual will grow outward toward the world, encountering and forming a practical experience, traveling outward from his center in almost vinelike fashion, forming from the fabric of physical reality a conglomeration of pleasant or aesthetic, and unpleasant or prickly events.
quotes.translation: 所有议题共同构成行为的格架。其中可能生长荆棘或玫瑰。也就是说，个体将如藤蔓般从中心向外延伸，朝向世界生长，遭遇并塑造实际经验，从物质实相的结构中编织出愉悦或美学性、以及不悦或刺痛性事件的集合体。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 801, APRIL 18, 1977
9:31 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: What I have said applies to what you just said. In one context what you call physical reality is a dream, but in a larger context it is a dream that you have created. When you realize that you form it you come into the memory of your whole self.
quotes.translation: 我所说的正适用于你刚才所言。在某个层面上，你所谓的物质实相是一场梦，但在更广阔的层面上，这是你创造的梦。当你意识到自己塑造了它，你便进入了全我的记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Here we have a combination of forces psychic showing themselves in chemical and electrical manifestations. The seasons as you know represent the physical construction of the inner psychic climate. As particular portions of matter are transformed, as the inner self, through the inner senses creates a simple material object that is picked up by the outer senses clearly as, say, a table, so are these other constructions that closely mirror inner reality that are perceived by the outer senses as effects.
quotes.translation: 在此我们看到心灵力量的组合，以化学与电学现象显现自身。如你所知，季节代表着内在心灵气候的物质建构。正如特定物质部分被转化，内在自我通过内在感官创造出被外在感官清晰捕捉的简单物质对象（例如一张桌子），这些紧密映照内在实相的其他建构，也被外在感官感知为各种效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This interrelationship is not in terms of cause and effect, as this law is a distortive misinterpretation of actuality. The interrelationship between all units or systems has nothing to do with continuity in your terms. The systems or units are basically simultaneous actions. As participants within one system of action, you are to a large extent limited by the very participation that gives you reality within the action system.
quotes.translation: 这种相互关系并非因果律所能解释，因为因果律是对实相的扭曲误解。所有单元或系统之间的相互关系，与你所理解的连续性毫无关联。这些系统或单元本质上是同时发生的行动。作为某个行动系统的参与者，你在很大程度上受限于这种参与本身——正是这种参与赋予你在该行动系统中的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You will not find yourself by running from teacher to teacher, from book to book. You will not meet yourself through following any particular specialized method of meditation. Only by looking quietly within the self that you know can your own reality be experienced, with those connections that exist between the present or immediate self and the inner identity that is multidimensional.
quotes.translation: 你不会通过从一个老师跑到另一个老师、从一本书跑到另一本书来找到自己。你不会通过遵循任何特定的冥想方法来遇见自己。只有通过安静地审视你所知的自我，才能体验到你自己的实相，以及存在于当下或直接自我与内在多维身份之间的那些联系。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It will, hopefully, avoid the Pollyanna attributes of many self-help books, and tease the reader into an enthusiastic desire to understand the characteristics of reality if only to solve his or her own problems. The methods given will be highly practical, workable, and within the abilities of any person genuinely concerned with those problems inherent in the nature of human existence.
quotes.translation: 希望它能避免许多自助书籍的盲目乐观特质，并激发读者热切渴望理解实相的特性，哪怕只是为了解决自己的问题。所提供的方法将非常实用、可行，并且任何真正关心人类存在本质中固有问题的个人都能掌握。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Playfully done, these exercises will set into action other creative events. These will involve the utilization of some of the inner senses, for which you have no objective sense-correlations. You will understand situations better in daily life, because you will have activated inner abilities that allow you to subjectively perceive the reality of other people in a way that children do.
quotes.translation: 以游戏的方式进行，这些练习将启动其他创造性事件。这些将涉及运用一些内在感官，对此你没有客观的感官对应物。你会更好地理解日常生活中的情境，因为你将激活内在能力，使你能够像孩子一样主观地感知他人的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. As you know, the inner senses belong to that part of human personality that is not physically materialized. At various times I have spoken concerning the reality of what you refer to as the astral body. You must remember that over a year ago we discussed tissue capsules. The astral body is of this nature. It is composed of electromagnetic components. It is simply the unseen self.
quotes.translation: 现在。如你所知，内在感官属于人类人格中未在物质上具体化的部分。我曾多次谈到你们所谓的星光体的实相。你必须记得，一年多前我们讨论过组织囊。星光体就具有这种性质。它由电磁成分组成。它只是看不见的自我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are some things that I do not believe you clearly understand. To me, a thought is an action. It is as valid a reality. There is no basic difference between telepathy and clairvoyance, as you term them. The Emotional feelings connected with an item are as real to me as the item itself. It is these Emotional charges that are interpreted, and finally translated into physical terms.
quotes.translation: 有些事情我认为你并未清楚理解。对我来说，一个思想就是一个行动。它同样是一种有效的实相。你们所称的心灵感应和千里眼之间没有基本区别。与某物相关的情感感受对我来说与那物本身一样真实。正是这些情感电荷被解读，并最终转化为物质术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: This process, you see, continues so smoothly that you are not aware of it. The pulses mentioned earlier are so short in duration that your consciousness skips over them merrily, yet your physical perception cannot seem to bridge the gap when the longer rhythm of pulsation occurs. And so this is the time that you perceive as death. What you want to know, therefore, is what happens when your consciousness is directed away from physical reality, and when momentarily it seems to have no image to wear.
quotes.translation: 你看，这个过程如此顺畅地持续，以至于你并未察觉。之前提到的脉冲持续时间如此之短，以至于你的意识愉快地跳过它们，然而当较长的脉动节奏发生时，你的物质感知似乎无法弥合这个间隙。因此，这就是你感知为死亡的时刻。所以，你想知道的是，当你的意识从物质实相转向别处，且暂时似乎没有形象可穿戴时，会发生什么。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (11:00.) Trees as they stand are a sound that, again, you do not perceive. In your dreams and particularly beyond those dreams that you recall, are areas of consciousness in which these sounds are automatically perceived and translated into visual images. They operate as a sort of shorthand. Given certain sounds, you could recreate your universe as you know it unconsciously, and any one multidimensional symbol can contain all the reality that you know. End of dictation. (Pause.) Now a few remarks.
quotes.translation: （11:00。）树木本身是一种声音，而你们并未感知到。在你们的梦境中，尤其是超越你们所忆起的那些梦境之外，存在着意识领域，在这些领域中，这些声音会被自动感知并转化为视觉影像。它们运作的方式类似于一种速记。若给予特定的声音，你们便能无意识地重建你们所知的宇宙，而任何一个多维符号都能包含你们所认知的全部实相。口授结束。（停顿。）现在说几句闲话。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The organism is the center of this happening, then, the core. The ego attempts to stand apart and observe, but in order to do so it narrows the available field of perception. Once it has formed its characteristics, it has already become too specialized to do more than observe certain limited fields of activity. It is of course itself observed by the inner ego, which has managed to maintain its position securely within subjective reality, where it has a wider though somewhat less intense viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 因此，有机体是这发生事件的核心，即中心。自我试图抽身旁观，但为了做到这一点，它缩小了可用的感知场域。一旦它形成了自身的特性，它便已变得过于专门化，只能观察某些有限的行动领域。当然，它本身也被内在自我所观察，内在自我成功地将其位置稳固地维持在主观实相之内，在那里它拥有更广阔、尽管不那么强烈的视角。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. In this existence, when you see a picture in your mind, and when there is strong emotion and vivid desire behind it, it will be constructed. There will be a time lapse within this system, but in other systems there may be no time lapse... and your thought may be instantly transposed into reality. Therefore, now you must learn the nature of your thoughts and how to handle energy.
quotes.translation: 现在。在此存在中，当你们脑海中浮现一幅画面，且背后有强烈的情感和生动的渴望时，它将被构建出来。在这个系统内会存在时间延迟，但在其他系统中可能没有时间延迟……而你们的念头可能瞬间被转化为实相。因此，现在你们必须学习你们思想的本质，以及如何处理能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: What I want you to know is this: I come here, I hope, as an endearing personality with characteristics that you can understand. Now these characteristics have been mine, and they are mine, and I am who I say I am. And yet, the Seth that you know, and that you find so endearing and understandable is but a small portion of my reality... the portion that can relate with you most easily.
quotes.translation: 我希望你们知道的是：我来到这里，我希望，是作为一个具有你们能理解的可爱特质的人格。这些特质过去是我的，现在也是我的，我就是我所说的那个人。然而，你们所认识的、觉得如此可爱且易于理解的赛斯，只是我实相的一小部分……是那个最能和你们建立联系的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Channels, psychological and psychic, always exist, sending communications back and forth through the various levels of the self, and the ego accepts necessary information and data from inner portions of the personality without question. Its position in fact depends in a large manner upon this unquestioning acceptance of inner data. The ego, in other words, the "exterior" self that you think of as your self -- that portion of you maintains its safety and its seeming command precisely because inner layers of your own personality constantly uphold it, keep the physical body operating, and maintain communications with the multitudinous stimuli that come both from outside conditions and inside conditions. The soul or entity is not diminished but expanded through reincarnations, through existence and experience in probable realities -- something that I will explain later.
quotes.translation: 心理与心灵的通道始终存在，在自我的各个层面之间来回传递信息，而自我不加质疑地从人格的内在部分接受必要的信息与资料。事实上，它的地位在很大程度上依赖于对这种内在资料的不加质疑的接受。换句话说，自我，即你们认为是“你们自己”的那个“外在”自我——你们的那一部分之所以能维持其安全感和表面的掌控力，恰恰是因为你们人格的内在层面不断支撑着它，维持着肉体的运作，并与来自外在条件和内在条件的众多刺激保持沟通。灵魂或存有并不会因转世、因在可能实相中的存在与体验而减少，反而会扩展——这一点我稍后会解释。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that some biological confusion might not result in the meantime. It does mean that even in those terms, and consciously unknowing, mankind is experimenting with a probable species and working out quite spiritual issues. Your probable futures and your probable pasts, in larger terms, exist at once. I will begin by explaining your history to you, at least to some extent, in the historical terms you recognize. To that degree, I hope to make your unknown reality consciously known.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着在此期间不会出现某些生物性的混乱。它确实意味着，即使在这些条件下，且在有意识中并不知晓的情况下，人类正在实验一个可能的物种，并处理相当灵性层面的议题。从更宏大的角度来看，你们可能的未来和可能的过去是同时存在的。我将从以你们所认可的历史术语向你们解释你们的历史开始，至少在一定程度上如此。到那个程度，我希望让你们未知的实相被有意识地知晓。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: In your terms, until now your consciousness has specialized in neurological patterning. As mentioned (in Session 682), this was extremely important while it learned the art of specialized focus. Now, however, it must begin to recognize that it can indeed expand, and bring into its awareness other quite legitimate realities. The nature of probabilities must be understood, for the time has come in the world as you experience it where the greatest wisdom and discrimination are needed. Your consciousness and neurological prejudice blind you to the full dimension of physical activity. The true implications of physical action are not as yet apparent to you.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The first journey from one home station to another, unfamiliar one may bring you in contact with various kinds of bleed-throughs, distortions, or static. These can be expected. They are simply the result of not yet learning how to tune your own consciousness clearly in to other kinds of focus. Before you can pick up the "next" station, for example, you may see ghost images in your mind, or pick up distorted versions from your own home station. You have momentarily dispensed with the usual, habitual organizational process by which you unite regular physical sense perceptions, so while you are "between stations," you may well encounter mixed signals from each. When you alter your conscious focus in such a fashion, you are also moving away from the part of your psyche that you consider its center. You are journeying through your own psyche, in other words, for different realities are different states of the psyche -- materialized, projected outward and experienced. That applies to your home station or physical world as well.
quotes.translation: 从一处本乡站台前往另一处陌生站台的首次旅程，可能会让你接触到各种渗透、扭曲或静电干扰。这些现象实属正常，不过是因为你尚未学会如何将自己的意识清晰调频至其他焦点。在你能接收到"下一站"信号前，你可能会在脑海中看到幻影，或接收到来自本乡站台的扭曲版本。你暂时搁置了惯常的组织化流程——正是这套流程让你整合常规物理感官知觉——因此当你处于"站台间隙"时，很可能同时接收到来自两方的混杂信号。当你以这种方式改变意识焦点时，也在远离你视为自我核心的那部分心灵。换言之，你正在穿越自己的心灵，因为不同的实相正是心灵的不同状态——被物质化、投射向外并被体验。这同样适用于你的本乡站台或物质世界。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, your universe and all others spring from a dimension that is the creative source for all realities--a basic dream universe, so to speak, a divine psychological bed where subjective being is sparked, illuminated, stimulated, pierced, by its own infinite desire for creativity. The source of its power is so great that its imaginings become worlds, but it is endowed with a creativity of such splendor that it seeks the finest fulfillment, for even the smallest of its thoughts and all of its potentials are directed with a good intent that is literally beyond all imagining.
quotes.translation: 可以说，你的宇宙与其他所有宇宙都源自一个维度，那是所有实相的创造源头——一个基本的梦境宇宙，一个神圣的心理温床，在那里主观存在被自身对创造性的无限渴望所点燃、照亮、刺激、穿透。其力量之源如此浩瀚，以至于它的想象化为了世界，但它被赋予的创造力如此辉煌，以至于它追求最精微的圆满——因为它最微小的念头与所有潜能，都指向一种超越一切想象的善意。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The value climate of psychological reality can be likened to an ocean in which all consciousness has its being. There are multitudinous levels that can be plunged into, with various life forms, diverse and alien, but nevertheless interconnected and dependent one upon the other. I like the ocean analogy because you get the idea of continuous flow and motion without apparent division.
quotes.translation: 心理实相的价值气候可比作一片海洋，所有意识都在其中存在。其中有无数层次可供潜入，栖息着多样而陌生的生命形态，彼此相互关联、相互依存。我偏爱海洋的比喻，因为你能从中感受到连续流动与运动，而无需明显的分割。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 690)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You must begin any study from your own viewpoint, from your own ledge, but your personal living experience is always the main source of information. Within you as you know yourself are all of the hints you need, if you are but willing to follow them; and these will not destroy the fabric of physical reality, but instead show you more clearly the structure of its miraculous patterns.
quotes.translation: 任何研究都必须从你自己的视角、从你自己的立足点开始，但你个人的生活经验始终是主要的信息来源。在你所认知的自我之内，已蕴含着你所需的一切线索——只要你愿意追随它们；这些线索不会摧毁物质实相的结构，反而会向你更清晰地揭示其奇迹般模式的构造。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 728
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The traveling consciousness as you know it often experiences the feeling of motion and movement through space. This is because there is still translation through the physical senses. You are moving more effectively within camouflage reality, but you are still dealing with it. The focus of your attention has changed somewhat, but you are still strongly relating to the physical field.
quotes.translation: 你所知的旅行意识常会体验到穿越空间的运动感。这是因为仍存在通过物质感官的转译。你是在伪装实相中更有效地移动，但仍在与之打交道。你的注意力焦点已有所改变，但你仍与物质场域保持着强烈关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Therefore, within this context you trust treat your living things gently. They are actualities within your system. Philosophical tenets at your level must be carefully filled in by constructive Emotions. There is strong value fulfillment to be gained where you are. It is good to know where you are, and the nature of your reality. You must still operate within its framework, however.
quotes.translation: 因此，在此脉络下，你应温柔对待你的生命体。它们是你系统中的实相。在你所处的层次上，哲学信条必须由建设性情感精心填充。在你所在之处，存在着强烈的价值完成。知晓你身在何处、了解你实相的本质是好的。然而，你仍需在其框架内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The genes and chromosomes do not just happen to have within them the precisely definite coded information that will be needed. The data is impressed upon them from within. The identity exists before the form. You could say that the identity, existing in another dimension entirely, plants the seed into the medium of physical reality from which its own material existence will spring.
quotes.translation: 基因与染色体并非偶然蕴含所需的精确编码信息。这些数据是从内在被铭刻于其上的。本体先于形态存在。你可以说，完全存在于另一维度的本体，将种子植入物质实相的媒介中，其自身的物质存在将从这里萌发。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The more involved you become with complicated physical organisms, the more energy you project outward and the more entranced you become with "exterior" manifestations. In itself this was -- and is -- a natural learning method. Your inner life is being translated into corporeal reality. As you perceive it and relate to it, you begin to question first its origin and then its meaning.
quotes.translation: 你越是投入复杂的物质有机体，向外投射的能量就越多，就越沉迷于"外在"显化。这本身过去是——现在也是——一种自然的学习方法。你的内在生命正被转译为物质实相。当你感知它并与之关联时，你首先会质疑它的起源，继而追问它的意义。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I speak to you from the known and unknown desire that gives you your own birth, and that speaks to you from the tiniest, least-acknowledged thought that flies like a pigeon within your skull ... And in this moment of your reality, and in the desire of your being, do you even create All That Is. Bow down before no man, no woman, and no belief -- but know you are indeed the creators.
quotes.translation: 我从那赋予你自身诞生的已知与未知渴望中对你说话，它从最微小、最不被承认的思想中对你说话，那思想如鸽子般在你颅骨内飞翔……在你实相的此刻，在你存在的渴望中，你甚至创造了万有。不要在任何人、任何女人、任何信仰面前俯首——但要知道你确实是创造者。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 711)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Your own greater reality hovers about you in each instant. If you knew in precise terminology how you grew physically from a fetus to an adult, if you could consciously follow that process, you would not necessarily be better off, but possibly hindered in your growth; for you would begin to question: "Am I doing this right?" The perfection of the process would make you ill at ease.
quotes.translation: 你自身更大的实相每时每刻都萦绕在你周围。如果你能以精确的术语知晓自己如何从胎儿成长为成人，如果你能有意识地追随那个过程，你未必会过得更好，反而可能阻碍你的成长；因为你会开始质疑："我这样做对吗？"过程的完美反而会让你不安。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Again, master events are those that most significantly affect your system of reality, even though the original action was not physical but took place in the inner dimension. Most events appear both in time and out of it, their action distributed between an inner and outer field of expression. Usually you are aware only of events' exterior cores. The inner processes escape you.
quotes.translation: 现在：再次强调，主导事件是那些最显著影响你实相系统的事件，即使原初行动并非物质性的，而是发生在内在维度。大多数事件既在时间之内又超越时间，其行动分布于内在与外在的表达场域之间。通常你只意识到事件的外在核心。内在过程则逃过你的感知。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It may however be a valid projection. The room and the people exist, but they do not exist in the manner which you endorse as reality. They exist in another dimension, but as a rule you cannot perceive it. In this case, you see, since the book has already been written you could say that the scene was a past event, at least of the imagination, at the time the author conceived of it.
quotes.translation: 然而，这可能是有效的投射。房间与人们确实存在，但它们并非以你所认可为实相的方式存在。它们存在于另一维度，但通常你无法感知。在这种情况下，你看，既然书已经写成，你可以说这个场景是过去的事件——至少在作者构思它时，是想象的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Action is therefore a part of all structure. Here again is an apparent dilemma, an exquisite imbalance whose result is consciousness and existence. For consciousness and existence do not exist because of delicate balances, so much as they are made possible by lacks of balances, so richly creative there would be no reality as it is understood to be, if balance were ever maintained.
quotes.translation: 因此行动是所有结构的一部分。这里又出现了一个明显的两难困境，一种精妙的不平衡，其结果是意识与存在。因为意识与存在并非源于精妙的平衡，而更多是由不平衡所促成——这种不平衡如此富于创造力，以至于如果平衡得以维持，就不会有我们所理解的现实存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Before you can be allowed into systems of reality that are more extensive and open, you must first learn to handle energy, and see, through physical materiaizationls, the concrete result of thought and emotion. As a child forms mud pies from dirt, so you form your civilization out of thoughts and emotions, and then see what you have created, and you must deal with it on its terms.
quotes.translation: 在你被允许进入更广阔、更开放的实相系统之前，你必须先学会处理能量，并通过物质显化看到思想与情感的具体结果。正如孩子用泥土捏制泥饼，你用思想与情感塑造出你的文明，然后目睹你所创造之物，并必须按其自身规则与之相处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: In our book, I will be doing my best to explain the origin of your universe, and in such a way that most of the pertinent questions are answered, but man's present concept of reality is so limited that I must often resort to analogies.
quotes.translation: 现在：在我们的书中，我将尽力解释你宇宙的起源，并以一种能解答大多数相关疑问的方式进行，但人类目前对实相的概念如此局限，以至于我常常不得不借助类比。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Egos concept of itself as a rock of unchanging identity is highly ludicrous, since its perceptions constantly change it from what it was. It is not a thing proceeding, by any means. This is not to deny the human aspects of the ego, for the ego is also somewhat like a light carried in front of the inner self, a light that gives meaning to the physical universe and to its objects. It enables the inner self to manipulate within physical reality. It translates outer data to the inner personality.
quotes.translation: 自我将自己视为永恒不变的身份基石，这种观念极为荒谬，因为它的感知不断将其从原本的状态改变。它绝非一个按部就班前进的事物。这并非否认自我的人类面向，因为自我也像内我前方的一盏灯，为物质宇宙及其物体赋予意义。它使内我能在物质实相中运作，并将外在数据转化为内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Dream images, not astral projections, operate within certain electrical limits, limits that form the boundaries of the dream universe. Dream images are nevertheless almost fibrous projections, almost a thinned-out composition, more plastic basically than physical matter, but composed of a number of the same properties. For again there must be this connection between the nature of dreams and the matter of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 梦境影像（而非星体投射）在特定的电性界限内运作，这些界限构成了梦宇宙的边界。然而梦境影像几乎是纤维状的投射，一种近乎稀薄的构成，本质上比物质更具可塑性，却由许多相同的属性组成。因为梦境本质与物质实相之间必须存在这种关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is the myth of the exteriorized consciousness -- a consciousness that you are told is open-ended only so far as objective reality is concerned. It seems to be closed "at the other end," which in those terms would represent your birth.
quotes.translation: 这就是外化意识的神话——一种被告知只在客观实相范围内开放的意识。它似乎在"另一端"封闭，用那些术语来说，这另一端代表你的出生。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 823, FEBRUARY 27, 1978
9:43 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Without such recognition however an encounter could be unpleasant. You have little control, and I am speaking here now all evening, of projections and their circumstances--you will have little control over the constructions of others. If, for example, during projection travel you encounter a disturbing image, you must first will it to disappear. If it is a subconscious fabrication it will vanish, but if you do not will it to vanish it will remain, and then you must deal with it as a reality.
quotes.translation: 然而，若无此认知，遭遇可能令人不悦。你几乎无法掌控——我今晚整晚都在谈论投射及其相关情境——你几乎无法掌控他人构建的实相。例如，若在投射旅行中遇到令人不安的影像，你必须先以意志令其消失。若它是潜意识的虚构产物便会消散，但若你不以意志令其消失，它就会存续，届时你必须将其视为实相来应对。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Full and uninhibited use of even the outer senses would lead you to inner reality. Usually only a strong and disciplined self, a well-structured identity, can perceive in this manner, and then only occasionally. Full operation of inner and outer senses, you see, in your present stage of development as a race, would be blinding, as you can see in your reading of drug experiences.
quotes.translation: 即使充分且无拘束地运用外在感官，也会引领你触及内在实相。通常只有强大而自律的自我、结构稳固的身份认同，才能以这种方式感知，且仅能偶尔为之。你看，在人类当前的发展阶段，内外感官的全面运作会令人目眩——正如你在解读药物体验时所见的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: ...and is an apex point. The personality without realizing it also operates as a transmitter, sending messages to other portions of reality. The abilities must be used, the creative urges therefore fully utilized in all areas--the psychic, the spiritual (pause), the more earthy writing and painting, for this energy sweeps through the personality and cannot be dammed up. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: ……且是一个顶点。人格在无意识中也作为发射器运作，向实相的其他部分传递讯息。这些能力必须被运用，创造冲动因而需在所有领域充分施展——灵性领域、心灵领域（停顿）、更接地气的写作与绘画——因为这股能量席卷人格，无法被阻截。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now there are personalities developed enough to do this. And each act of leaping, so to speak, forms a new thread. Now following through with our analogy, imagine yourself A. We will start you off in physical reality at thread A, though you have already traversed many other threads to get where you are. We are merely beginning with thread A since this is your present situation.
quotes.translation: 现在存在足够发展成熟的人格能做到这点。可以说，每一次跳跃行为都编织出新丝线。继续沿用我们的比喻，想象你是A。我们暂且将你置于物质实相中的丝线A——尽管你已穿越许多其他丝线才抵达此处。我们仅以丝线A为起点，因这是你当下的处境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Put more simply from another viewpoint, each of you as you know yourselves has certain abilities and characteristics of your own. You experience reality through the cast of those abilities and characteristics, but you also stamp the universe with that particular imprint of individuality that is your own, and you attract those events that are suited to your nature and no other.
quotes.translation: 从另一视角更简明地说：你们每个人所认知的自我，都拥有自身独特的能力与特质。你通过这组能力与特质的滤镜体验实相，同时也以自己独有的个性印记铭刻宇宙，并吸引那些契合你本质——而非其他本质——的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Time therefore is formed out of and from nontime. (Long pause.) Nontime is psychological experience, psychological reality, and time is always at its service. (Long pause.) Entities then form the time in which they seem to dwell. (Long pause.) Experience itself is always plastic, and again, form is not dependent upon mass. Mass belongs to your camouflage system. Form does not.
quotes.translation: 时间因此由非时间形成并源自非时间。（长停顿。）非时间是心理体验、心理实相，而时间始终为其服务。（长停顿。）存有们于是构建出他们看似栖居其中的时间。（长停顿。）体验本身始终具有可塑性，再次强调，形态不依赖于质量。质量属于你们的伪装系统，形态则不然。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In other words, the Emotional charges allow me to hunt for the item that you want me to identify. I do not begin with the item and reach outward. I identify first of all with the Emotional realities, for these are the only basic realities to me. Then I form these into my interpretations of the item itself.
quotes.translation: 换言之，情感电荷让我能够搜寻你想要我辨识的物品。我并非从物品出发向外延伸。我首先与情感实相认同，因为这些对我而言才是唯一的基本实相。然后我将这些情感实相转化为我对物品本身的诠释。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: These personality intensities are themselves formed within ranges that would appear minute, but contain within them, truly, eons of experience. In our further discussions concerning the nature of electrical reality, we will also come closer to an understanding of those pyramid gestalts of which I have spoken. See the 81st session for some material on psychic pyramid gestalts.
quotes.translation: 这些人格强度本身形成于看似微小的范围内，但其中确实蕴含着数不清的体验纪元。在我们后续关于电性实相本质的讨论中，我们也将更接近理解我曾提及的那些金字塔形完形。关于心灵金字塔形完形的资料，请参阅第81节。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The inner self therefore uses the physical system to express its own inclinations and ideas of reality. It is the inner self that unfolds those patterns of behavior spoken about in the article you read on infant growth. (In a recent issue of Time magazine.) Such unfoldings always occur from within, responding to signals not from the exterior but from the interior environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在自体运用物质系统来表达其自身的倾向与对实相的看法。正是内在自体展开了你们在关于婴儿成长的文章中读到的那些行为模式（见于近期《时代》杂志）。这种展开总是从内在发生，回应着并非来自外在环境，而是来自内在环境的信号。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The basic reality is indeed within the illusions. Look beneath them and within them and you will feel it. But they are themselves composed of it, and you cannot really separate the two. Words are inadequate to explain what I mean here.
quotes.translation: 基本实相确实存在于幻相之中。在幻相之下与之内观察，你便能感受到它。但幻相本身由实相构成，你无法真正将两者分离。言语不足以解释我在此处的意思。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You see perhaps havoc within the physical field, and this is indeed to be faced and dealt with, and set straight, as aid is given to the victims of a hurricane. But you are familiar only with the results of action as they appear within the physical field, as long as you insist upon viewing your physical universe with the eyes of the ego-self; for the ego-self attempts to cut itself off from that action of which it is a part, and in so attempting it loses contact with this larger reality.
quotes.translation: 你或许在物质场域中看到混乱，这确实需要面对、处理并纠正，如同向飓风灾民提供援助。但只要你坚持用自我之眼审视物质宇宙，你就只能熟悉行动在物质场域中呈现的结果；因为自我试图切断自身与它所从属的行动的联系，在如此尝试中，它便失去了与这更大实相的接触。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now these previews are played out not only for the mind but for the body as well. In sleep, again, each cell calculates the effect of various probable events upon its own reality. Computations are made so that the body's entire response can be ascertained ahead of time, and the advantages and disadvantages weighed. The body participates in dreaming at the most minute levels.
quotes.translation: 这些预演不仅为心智所展现，也为身体所展现。在睡眠中，每个细胞同样计算各种可能事件对其自身实相的影响。计算得以进行，以便身体能够提前确定整体反应，并权衡利弊。身体在最微细的层面上参与梦境。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As the outer senses of sight, sound and smell appear to reach outward, bringing data to the physical body from an outside observable camouflage pattern, so the inside senses seem to extend far inward, bringing important inner reality data to the physical body. There is also a transforming process here much like the moment that we have spoken of in the creation of a painting.
quotes.translation: 正如外在感官中的视觉、听觉和嗅觉似乎向外延伸，将数据从外部可观察的伪装模式传递给物质身体，内在感官则似乎向内深深延伸，将重要的内在实相数据传递给物质身体。这里也存在一个转化过程，很像我们之前谈到的绘画创作中的那个时刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The experimentation with daily predictions will show you quite clearly, with practice, the nature of such distortions, as you see the difference between the predicted event and the event that occurs. Also for economy and for the reason given above, symbols may stand for more than one physical reality, and so may they in some of the earlier predictions given in this material.
quotes.translation: 通过日常预测的实践，你会相当清楚地看到这类扭曲的本质，当你观察到预测事件与实际发生事件之间的差异时。同样，出于经济性和上述原因，符号可能代表不止一种物质实相，因此在本资料中较早给出的一些预测中也是如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This particular kind of dream is concerned with working out certain problems concerning your physical reality, and they are usually not precognitive. They might appear precognitive if you perceived them, because many of the events contained therein will later occur in fact. They are not precognitive however, for in a large measure they bring about, or cause, physical events.
quotes.translation: 这种特定类型的梦境涉及解决有关你物质实相的某些问题，它们通常不是预知性的。如果你感知到它们，它们可能显得具有预知性，因为其中包含的许多事件后来确实会发生。然而它们并非预知性的，因为在很大程度上，它们促成或引发了物质事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The resulting thoughts and images in turn are expressed and affect others, and not only symbolically. As you should know, mental acts have an electromagnetic reality which directly affects the inner self, which directly forms the constantly changing nature of the inner self. For the inner self is, after all, composed of mental actions, and the entity itself is ever-changing.
quotes.translation: 由此产生的思想和意象反过来被表达并影响他人，而且不仅仅是象征性的。你应该知道，心智活动具有电磁实相，它直接影响到内在自我，直接塑造了内在自我不断变化的本质。因为内在自我毕竟是由心智活动构成的，而存有本身也在不断变化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: To some other types of consciousness, your physical reality is clearly understood in its symbolic form. Objects, as symbols, help construct the very framework of your existence. They, the objects, can then be manipulated quite freely.
quotes.translation: 对于其他某些类型的意识而言，你的物质实相在其象征形式中被清晰地理解。物体作为象征，帮助构建了你存在的整个框架。然后，这些物体可以被相当自由地操控。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A study or investigation of inner reality was not the purpose of the intellect. The intellect, again, was also and is a means by which the inner self relates itself to the camouflage physical universe which it has itself constructed.
quotes.translation: 对内在实相的研究或探索并非智力的目的。智力再次是，并且一直是，内在自我将其自身与其自身构建的伪装物质宇宙联系起来的一种手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Instead, the soul stands at the center of itself, exploring, extending its capacities in all directions at once, involved in issues of creativity, each one highly legitimate. The probable system of reality opens up the nature of the soul to you. It should change current religion's ideas considerably. For this reason, the nature of good and evil is a highly important point.
quotes.translation: 相反，灵魂处于自身的中心，同时向所有方向探索、扩展其能力，参与各种极具合理性的创造力议题。实相的可能系统向你揭示了灵魂的本质。它应能大幅改变当前宗教的观念。因此，善恶的本质是一个极为重要的要点。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Each "part" of the soul contains the whole -- a concept I am sure will startle you. As you become more aware of your own subjective reality you will therefore, become familiar with greater portions of your own soul. When you think of the soul as a closed system you perceive it as such, and close off from yourself the knowledge of its greater creativity and characteristics.
quotes.translation: 灵魂的每个"部分"都包含整体——我相信这个概念会让你震惊。当你越来越意识到自己的主观实相时，你便会熟悉自身灵魂的更大部分。当你将灵魂视为封闭系统时，你便会如此感知它，并切断自己对它更大创造力与特性的认知。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now if you would each, for ten minutes a day, open yourselves to your own reality there would be no question of self-justification, for you would realize the miraculous nature of your own identity. I have said this before in class: You are as dead now, and as alive, as you will ever be. In life you can be as dead as you think any corpse is -- even, by contrast, far deader.
quotes.translation: 现在，如果你们每个人每天花十分钟向自己的实相敞开，就不会有自我辩护的问题，因为你们会认识到自身身份的神奇本质。我以前在课堂上说过：你现在有多死，就有多活，正如你永远会如此。在生命中，你可以像你认为任何尸体那样死——甚至，相比之下，更死得多。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They will not be able to perceive these hidden portions of any given atom with the methods they are now using. I have told you in the past that the same atoms are utilized, that is the same given atoms are utilized both in your system and in other systems. In like manner then these giant nuclei, or quasars, are only a part of reality, the part projected within your system.
quotes.translation: 他们无法用目前使用的方法感知任何给定原子的这些隐藏部分。我过去告诉过你，相同的原子被利用，也就是说，相同的给定原子既在你的系统中也在其他系统中被利用。同样地，这些巨大的核或类星体只是实相的一部分，是投射在你系统内的那部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your closest point to the withinness of which I speak is your own consciousness, though you use it as a tool to examine the exterior universe. But it is basically free of that reality, not confined to the life-and-death saga, and at other levels deals with the blueprints for its own physical existence.
quotes.translation: 你离我所言的内在性最近的点是你自己的意识，尽管你用它作为工具来检视外在宇宙。但它基本上不受那个实相的束缚，不局限于生死传奇，并在其他层面处理其自身物质存在的蓝图。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 703
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The evening hours are best, and it was for this reason that I chose them. By this hour there is apt to be a stability of electromagnetic properties, though of course this is not always the case. Since all things have an electrical and chemical reality, the food that you eat is also important, and it is for this reason that I made certain suggestions concerning your diet.
quotes.translation: 夜晚的时间最好，我选择它们正是出于这个原因。到了这个时辰，电磁特性往往趋于稳定，尽管当然并非总是如此。由于一切事物都有电性和化学实相，你吃的食物也很重要，正是出于这个原因，我对你的饮食提出了一些建议。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A psychological existence presupposes experience, experience in terms of value fulfillment (pause) and the Emotional manipulation and direct knowledge of subjective states. This involves a capacity and ability to throw yourself wholeheartedly into a reality enveloping situation, and yet to be aware of the self who is then so lost or enveloped. (Pause; emphatic delivery.)
quotes.translation: 心理上的存在预设了经验，即价值实现方面的经验（停顿），以及情绪操控和对主观状态的直接认知。这需要一种能力与本领：全身心投入一个包裹着你的现实情境，同时又能觉察到那个如此迷失或被包裹的自我。（停顿；强调语气。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: In either case when conditions are right, you should feel a sense of recognition, a sense of grasping a portion of the center of your own reality. This is not a nebulous experience, but vivid, powerful, and direct. You will know it at once. When you have achieved this oneness with your own center, then you automatically free additional energy and vitality into your life.
quotes.translation: 无论哪种情况，当条件成熟时，你应当感受到一种认知感，一种把握住自身现实核心一部分的感觉。这不是一种模糊的经验，而是生动、有力且直接的。你会立刻认出它。当你与自己的核心达成这种合一，你便会自动将额外的能量与活力释放到你的生命中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Its sense of identity spontaneously goes beyond the change of its own form. It has no ego to cut the "I" identification short. Creatures without the compartment of the ego can easily follow their own identities beyond any changes of form. The inner self is aware of this integrity of identity, but the ego focused so securely in physical reality cannot afford this luxury.
quotes.translation: 它的身份感自发地超越自身形态的变化。它没有自我来切断“我”的认同。没有自我这个隔间的生物，能轻易追随自己的身份超越任何形态变化。内在自我知晓这种身份的完整性，但如此稳固地聚焦于物质现实的自我，却无法享有这种奢侈。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First I thought of Seth's assertion in the 92nd session for September 28, 1964, that "trees have their dreams"; [in Volume 1, see the quotations in Note 1 for Session 698]. Then I remembered that he'd come through with extensive material on tree consciousness in a much earlier session. With Jane's help the next day I found that information in the 18th session, which had been held on January 22, 1964. Most of that session is unpublished, although someday we'd like to print it in full. It contains many intriguing ideas -- as, for example: "A tree knows a human being also ... [yet it] does not even build up an image of a man, which is why this is so difficult to explain ... And the same tree will recognize the same man who passes it by each day."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In some ways you see, your dream world is actually much closer to the direct experience of reality than is your waking world, where the operation of the inner senses is shielded so from your own awareness. This is not to say that the dream world is more important to you in your present situation, merely that it contains more truth about the source of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 从某些方面看，你的梦境世界实际上比你的醒时世界更接近现实的直接经验，因为在醒时世界里，内在感官的运作被屏蔽于你的觉知之外。这并非说梦境世界在你当前处境中更重要，只是它包含了更多关于你自身存在源头的真相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: You can direct the healing of your body, telling yourself that this will be accomplished by you at one of the other levels of sleep consciousness, and you may ask for the aid of a Speaker to give you any necessary psychological guidance that is needed to maintain health. If you have particular conscious goals and if you are reasonably certain that they are beneficial ones, then you can suggest dreams in which they occur, for the dreams themselves will hasten their physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你可以引导身体的疗愈，告诉自己这将在睡眠意识的其他层次由你完成，并可以请求一位“演讲者”的帮助，以获取维持健康所需的任何心理指导。如果你有特定的意识目标，并且相当确信它们是有益的，那么你可以建议梦境中出现这些目标，因为梦境本身会加速它们在物质现实中的实现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When the inverted time system is understood clearly, then the inadequacy of the cause and effect theory will be clear. If your psychologists and scientists would begin a study of their own dreams, they would learn much through personal experience. They would tackle realities that cannot be measured with physical instruments. Since psychologists deal with psychological activity, it is all the more amazing that they have not concentrated upon psychological activity, observing it first hand as it exists in their own various stages of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 当倒转的时间系统被清楚理解时，因果理论的不足便会显而易见。如果你的心理学家和科学家开始研究自己的梦境，他们将通过个人经验学到很多。他们将处理那些无法用物理仪器测量的现实。既然心理学家处理的是心理活动，那么他们竟没有专注于心理活动，没有在第一手观察中审视它存在于自身不同意识状态中的样貌，这便更加令人惊讶了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: When I use the term time-wise, I refer it to the formation of a structure from which one kind of consciousness then views itself, sees itself as unique, and then tries to form other kinds of conscious structures. A fly is conscious of itself, fulfilled within that reality, and feels no need to form an "extension" of that awareness from which to view its own existence.
quotes.translation: 当我使用“时间性”一词时，我指的是某种结构的形成，通过这种结构，一种意识得以审视自身，视自己为独特的存在，并试图构建其他类型的意识结构。苍蝇意识到自身的存在，在其现实之内感到圆满，并不觉得需要形成那种意识的“延伸”来审视自己的存在。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: I said (in sessions 711 and 716, for instance) that your normal focus of consciousness can be compared to your home station. So far, exercises have been described that will gently lead you away from concentration upon this home base, even while its structure is strengthened at the same time. You can also call this home station or local program your world view, since from it you perceive your reality. To some extent it represents your personal focus, through which you interpret most of your experience. As I mentioned (in Session 715, for instance), when you begin to move away from that particular organization, strange things may start to happen. You may be filled with wonder, excitement, or perplexity. You may be delighted or appalled, according to whether or not your new perceptions agree or disagree with your established world view.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is because of this instantaneous creation and projection of inner reality into form that you experience time within the physical system--to train you literally, to give you time to learn to handle your own creations. Projection experiments should only be adopted therefore when you are in a peaceful state of mind, as Ruburt should know after his creature experience.
quotes.translation: 正是由于内在现实被瞬间创造并投射为形态，你才在物质系统内体验时间——这实际上是为了训练你，给你时间去学习处理自己的创造。因此，投射实验只应在心境平和时进行，正如鲁柏在经历他的造物体验后所应知晓的那样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Also, in a manner of speaking, you are yourselves the ancient dreamers who dreamed your world into being. You must understand that I am not saying that you are passive, fleeting dreamers, lost in some divine mind, but that you are the unique creative manifestations of a divine intelligence whose creativity is responsible for all realities, which are themselves endowed with creative abilities of their own, with the potential and desire for fulfillment--inheritors indeed of the divine processes themselves. Spontaneity knows its own order.
quotes.translation: 此外，从某种意义上说，你们自己就是那些古老的做梦者，将你们的世界梦入存在。你们必须明白，我并非说你们是被动、转瞬即逝的做梦者，迷失于某个神圣心智中，而是说你们是神圣智慧的独特创造性显现，这种智慧创造了一切现实，而这些现实本身又被赋予了自身的创造能力，拥有实现的潜能与渴望——你们确实是神圣过程本身的继承者。自发性知晓自身的秩序。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It has its own possibilities of development and achievement. This should not be forgotten, and all potential egos have, also, their own possibilities. The inner self or identity must express itself through its ego in order to manipulate within physical reality.
