The inner self is composed of all the potential egos that compose it, but it is more than the sum of these.
quotes.translation: 它拥有自身发展与成就的可能性。这一点不应被遗忘，所有潜在的自我也拥有其自身的可能性。内在自我或本体必须通过其自我来表达自己，以便在物质现实中运作。内在自我由构成它的所有潜在自我组成，但它大于这些自我的总和。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Space and time are both root assumptions, which simply means that man accepts both, and assumes that his reality is rooted in a series of moments and a dimension of space. So your inner experience is translated in those terms.
quotes.translation: 空间与时间都是根本假设，这仅仅意味着人类接受两者，并假定自己的现实植根于一系列时刻与一个空间维度。因此，你的内在体验便以这些术语被转译。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can, however, using your inner senses, perceive reality as it exists apart from the play and your role in it. In order to do this you must, of course, momentarily at least turn your attention away from the constant activity that is taking place -- turn off the physical senses, as it were -- and switch your attention to those events that have escaped you earlier.
quotes.translation: 然而，你可以运用内在感官，感知现实在戏剧及其角色之外的存在方式。要做到这一点，你当然必须至少暂时将注意力从正在进行的持续活动中移开——仿佛关闭物质感官——并将注意力转向那些先前被你忽略的事件。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As the mind developed, the species could hand down to its offspring the wisdom and law of the elders. This is still being done in modern society, of course, when each child inherits the beliefs of its parents about the nature of reality. Apart from all other considerations, this is also a characteristic of creaturehood. Only the means are different with the animals.
quotes.translation: 随着心智的发展，物种能够将长者的智慧与法则传递给后代。当然，在现代社会中，每个孩子仍然继承着父母对实相本质的信念。撇开其他考量不谈，这也是生物性的特征。动物只是使用不同的方式而已。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Some ancient religions put the existence of gods there, and saw the spirits of each living thing as existing primarily in that invisible medium of reality. Therefore, Framework 2 has always been represented in one way or another as a source of your world. Christianity saw it as heaven, inhabited by God the Father, His angels, the saints, and [the] deceased faithful.
quotes.translation: 某些古老宗教将诸神的存在置于其中，视每个生灵的灵性主要存在于那不可见的实相媒介中。因此，框架二始终以某种形式被呈现为你们世界的源头。基督教将其视为天堂，由天父、祂的天使、圣徒及已故信徒所居。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 822, FEBRUARY 22, 1978
9:27 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You are being allowed freedom within limits. (Long pause.) The human race is a stage through which various forms of consciousness travel. The ideals keep the race pointed in beneficial directions. Thoughts and emotions form the basis. You learn by seeing these turn into physical reality. You may be killed by what you have created. If so the lesson is doubly learned.
quotes.translation: 你们被允许在限制内享有自由。（长停顿）人类种族是各种意识形态穿行其间的舞台。理想使种族始终朝向有益的方向发展。思想与情感构成基础。你们通过观察它们转化为物质实相而学习。你们可能被自己所创造之物毁灭。若如此，教训便加倍深刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As you read this book, the words are meant to release your own intuitional abilities. When you are reading it, your own dreams will give you added information and will be in your mind upon awakening if you are alert for them. There is no such simple end to the life that you know, [such] as the story of heaven. There is the freedom to understand your own reality, to develop your abilities further, and to feel more deeply the nature of your own existence as a part of All That Is.
quotes.translation: 当你阅读本书时，这些文字旨在释放你自身的直觉能力。阅读时，你的梦境将提供额外信息，若你保持警觉，醒来时这些信息便会浮现于脑海。你所知的生命并非如天堂故事那般简单终结。你拥有理解自身实相、进一步发展能力、更深刻感受作为一切万有组成部分的自身存在本质的自由。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It may be thought that such perception patterns or identities may be limited, but this is hardly the case. For without them, whole portions of reality would never be perceived. There is much here that will take us a long while to explain, for the line can theoretically be drawn anywhere in the formation of identities and consciousness. And herein lies your freedom.
quotes.translation: 或许有人认为此类感知模式或身份认同存在局限，但事实绝非如此。若无它们，实相的完整面向将永不被感知。此处有许多内容需要长时间解释，因为理论上，身份与意识的形成界限可划在任何位置。而你的自由正蕴含于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: "God knows itself through the flesh. God may know itself through a million or a thousand million other worlds, as so may I -- but because this world is, and because I am alive in it, it is more than appearance, more than a shackle to be thrown aside. It is a privilege to be here, to look out with this unique focus, with these individual eyes; not to be blinded by cosmic vision, but to see this corner of reality which I form through the miraculous connections of soul and flesh.
quotes.translation: "神通过肉身认识自身。神可能通过百万或亿万其他世界认识自身，正如我亦能如此——但正因这个世界存在，正因我活在其中，它便超越表象，超越可被抛弃的桎梏。能在此处，能以这独特的焦点、以这双独特的眼睛向外观看，实为一种特权；不被宇宙视野所蒙蔽，而是看见这由灵魂与肉身神奇连接所构成的实相角落。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 710)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There is no cause and effect in the terms in which you understand the words. Nor is there a succession of moments that follow one after the other; and without a succession of moments following one after the other you can see that the idea of cause and effect becomes meaningless. An action of the present in your terms cannot be based or caused by an action in the past, and neither action can be the cause of a future action in a basic reality where neither past nor future exist.
quotes.translation: 在你们所理解的因果字眼中，并不存在因果关系。也没有一个接一个连续不断的瞬间；而没有连续不断的瞬间，因果概念就变得毫无意义。在你们术语中的现在行为，不能基于或由过去行为引起，而在一个既无过去也无未来的基本实相中，过去和未来行为也不能成为未来行为的原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Such a change of focus demands a concentration in one area to the exclusion, as a rule, of other areas. In the waking state you are usually not aware of your dreaming existence. In your dreaming existence your physical environment is replaced by your dream environment. You react to both environments whenever you are concentrated within them. Our study of the dream state will take us into many other discussions, for you will learn much about the nature of uncamouflaged reality.
quotes.translation: 这种焦点的改变通常要求将注意力集中在一个领域而排除其他领域。在清醒状态时，你们通常意识不到自己的梦境存在。在梦境存在中，你们的物质环境被梦境环境所取代。每当你们专注于其中时，都会对这两种环境做出反应。我们对梦境状态的研究将带我们进入许多其他讨论，因为你们会学到很多关于非伪装实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: They exist now, however, as certainly as do, say, the dinosaurs. You only choose to focus your attention upon a highly specific field of space-time coordinates, accepting these as present reality, and closing yourselves off from all others. Specifically, complicated physical forms are not the result of previous simpler ones. They all exist in larger terms at once.
quotes.translation: 然而，它们现在确实存在，就像恐龙一样确定无疑。你们只是选择将注意力集中在一个高度特定的时空坐标领域，接受这些作为当下实相，并将自己与所有其他领域隔绝开来。具体来说，复杂的物质形态并非先前简单形态的结果。它们都在更大的意义上同时存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One more point. The ulcer for example has reality upon many levels, and must be dealt with in a like manner, for it is not enough to handle it even from the viewpoint of the present ego; for indeed causes are involved of which the present ego must necessarily be mainly ignorant. The inner self however has at its command all these reasoning's, and all these causes.
quotes.translation: 还有一点。例如，溃疡在多个层面具有实相，必须以类似方式处理，因为即使从当前自我的角度来看也不足以应对；确实涉及当前自我必然主要无知的原因。然而，内在自我掌握所有这些推理和所有原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Several other methods of communication occur. They do not spring from nowhere. You use them beneath conscious level to some degree now. They grow into prominence. Images are widely used, but these images would be fourth dimensional to your way of thinking. They are far from flat. They have a reality, and these are, what you have read, referred to as thought forms.
quotes.translation: 还有几种其他沟通方式。它们并非凭空而来。你们现在在意识层面之下一定程度上使用它们。它们逐渐变得突出。图像被广泛使用，但这些图像在你们的思维方式中将是四维的。它们远非平面。它们具有实相，这些就是你们所读到的所谓思想形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your own science has led you to its logical conclusion. It is not enough, and some suspect that its methods and attitudes have a built-in disadvantage. Physicists are going beyond themselves, so to speak, where even their own instruments cannot follow and where all rules do not apply. Even the prophet Einstein did not lead them far enough. You cannot stand apart from a reality and do any more than present diagrams of it. You will not understand its living heart or its nature.
quotes.translation: 你们自己的科学已将你们引向其逻辑结论。这还不够，有些人怀疑其方法和态度存在内在缺陷。可以说，物理学家正在超越自身，甚至到了他们自己的仪器无法跟随、所有规则都不适用的地步。即使是先知爱因斯坦也没有将他们引向足够远的地方。你们无法脱离实相而只能呈现其图解。你们将无法理解其活生生的核心或本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 702
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You however do have free will, for while the entity's psychic structure can be compared to the body, it is a part of and inhabits far greater dimensions. All of this may seem to have little to do with your personal reality. Yet your daily experience is as connected with your self or entity (abruptly louder, briefly), as it is with the cells of your physical form.
quotes.translation: 然而你确实拥有自由意志，因为虽然存有的心灵结构可比拟为身体，但它却是更宏大维度的一部分并栖身其中。这一切似乎与你的个人实相关系甚微，然而你的日常体验与你的自我或存有的关联，恰如与物质形体的细胞那般紧密相连（突然提高音量，短暂停顿）。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Therefore, in the dream state communication is possible between all portions of the self. The personality appears in its truest state if it seems, in dreams, that you are free of space and time. It is indeed because the basic self is free of space and time. If you appear to hear voices out of the past, if you seem to see into the future, it is because the dream state is a more or less faithful approximation of a basic reality in which your time and space simply do not exist.
quotes.translation: 因此在梦境状态中，自我的所有部分皆可沟通。若在梦中你似乎摆脱了时空束缚，人格便显现其最真实的状态。这确实是因为基本自我本就超脱时空。若你仿佛听见来自过去的声音，若你似乎预见未来，皆因梦境状态或多或少忠实地趋近于某种基本实相——在那种实相中，你的时空根本不存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As it grows, in your terms, it looks outward for confirmation of this inner knowledge. The inner self upholds the ego with its support. It forms its truths into physically oriented data with which the ego can deal. It then projects these outward into the area of physical reality. Seeing these truths thus materialized, the ego then finds it easier to accept them.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，当内在自我成长时，它会向外寻求对这种内在知识的确认。内在自我以其支撑维系着自我，将其真理转化为自我能够处理的物质导向数据，继而将这些数据投射至物质实相领域。当自我目睹这些真理如此具现化后，便更容易接纳它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: What do I mean by such attention? Attention to the moment as it is presented. Attention to the table of rich reality as it appears before you. Attention to the kind of person you are, and to the loving appreciation of your own uniqueness. To attend to your life in such a fashion brings you into a clearer communication with the inner action of your own existence.
quotes.translation: 我所说的这种关注意指什么？关注当下呈现的每个瞬间。关注那丰盛实相之桌在你面前展现的模样。关注你自身的本质，以及对你独特性的珍视与欣赏。以这般方式关注你的生命，将使你与自身存在的内在运作建立更清晰的沟通。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane had noted on the 15th that she wanted to finish Seth's book soon. She made no more entries in her journal over the next ten days. She did more painting. Rather than intensify, her voice tremors lessened on some occasions and disappeared on others. The slowdown in her speech was more persistent, although it didn't become more pronounced in any manner. Following our own suggestions, we did fairly well at not dwelling upon those vocal challenges; we sent out no signals to Seth, asking him to discuss them. And Jane did have the energy to firmly begin dictating Session 939 for Chapter 12 of Dreams at 9:48 P.M. on Monday evening, January 25:)

quotes.text: Most realities have absolutely nothing to do with space as you imagine it. Most realities have their growth and existence in something closely akin to what we have called psychological time, and this is completely independent of space as you conceive it to be. Psychological time is a sort of climate or environment conducive to the existence of all consciousness.
quotes.translation: 大多数实相与你所想象的时空毫无关联。大多数实相的生长与存续，存在于某种与我们称为"心理时间"极为相似的状态中，而这完全独立于你所认知的时空。心理时间是一种气候或环境，适宜所有意识的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This arbitrary limitation set upon the individual self is put upon it by its reliance upon the outer senses, as a method of perceiving reality. The outer senses are excellent tools of perception for limited circumstances. However, man has relied upon them so long, and with such cringing dependence, that now they threaten to hamper his own growth and development.
quotes.translation: 这种强加于个体自我的武断限制，源于其对外在感官的依赖——这是感知实相的一种方式。外在感官在有限情境中确是绝佳的感知工具。然而人类对其依赖已久，且带着如此卑微的依附，以至于如今这些感官反而可能阻碍其自身的成长与发展。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Dreams do express a personality's basic reality. Negative dreams tend to reinforce the negative aspects of the personality, helping to form vicious circles of unfortunate complications. Upon suggestion dream actions can be turned toward fulfilling constructive expectations, which can themselves effect a definite change for the better in the personality involved.
quotes.translation: 梦确实表达了一个人格的基本实相。负面梦境往往会强化人格的负面面向，助长不幸纠葛的恶性循环。通过暗示，梦的行为可以转向实现建设性的期望，而这些期望本身就能对相关人格产生明确的改善效果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now,"There is no place to go" if you know what is truly meant by that statement. It is also true that there are as many places to go as you wish to find. You always create the places and the destinations at which you arrive. There are no places, and there are infinities of places. The inner self forms all systems and all places. On the one hand you can indeed call them illusion. On the other hand, these illusions are quite real. They are the clothing over the basic reality.
quotes.translation: 现在，"无处可去"这句话若你真正理解其含义，确是如此。同样真实的是，有多少你想去的地方，就有多少去处。你始终在创造你所抵达的地点与目的地。既没有地方，又有无穷无尽的地方。内在自体形成所有系统与所有地方。一方面你确实可称它们为幻相，另一方面，这些幻相又相当真实。它们是覆盖在基本实相之上的外衣。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You ignore certain temperature variations and stirrings of air as imagination, that are instead indicative of such thought-forms. You thrust into the background telepathic communications that often accompany such forms, and you turn aside from all clues that other realities exist quite validly with your own, and that in the midst of one existence you are surrounded by intangible but valid evidence. The very words "life" and "death" serve to limit your understanding, to set up barriers where none intrinsically exist.
quotes.translation: 你将某些温度变化与空气扰动视为想象而忽略，实则这些正是此类思想形态的征兆。你将常伴随这些形态的心灵感应沟通推入背景，并避开所有线索——这些线索表明其他实相与你的实相同样真实存在，且在一段存在之中，你被无形却有效的证据所环绕。"生"与"死"这些词语本身便限制了你的理解，在原本不存在的界限处设置了障碍。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In their own way, even atoms and molecules retain a knowledge of the forms through which they have passed, and so the individuals that compose any given civilization contain deep within themselves the inner knowledge of experiments and trials, successes and failures, in which the races have also been involved at other levels of reality. You may take your break.
quotes.translation: 以它们自己的方式，就连原子与分子也保留着它们曾经历过的形态的知识，因此组成任何特定文明的个体，其内心深处都蕴含着种族在其他实相层面所参与实验与试炼、成功与失败的内在知识。你可以休息了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are now rooted in your creaturehood, graced to perceive through your body a unique living experience. So when I mention techniques that will allow you to perceive other fields of reality beside your own, I want you to realize that these should be used to enhance your enjoyment of that creaturehood, and to enrich your sensual as well as spiritual expression.
quotes.translation: 你现在扎根于你的生物性中，蒙受恩宠得以通过身体感知独特的生活体验。因此，当我提及能让你感知自身实相之外其他实相领域的技术时，我希望你明白这些技术应被用来增强你对生物性的享受，并丰富你的感官与灵性表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The exterior dimensions are replicas of interior personal ones. The accomplishments, wars, difficulties and institutions are all "after the event" -- that is, they are outward actions of an inward existence. Under certain conditions water turns into ice. In the same way, interior events can appear in physical reality in a quite different form than the original.
quotes.translation: 外在维度是内在个人维度的复制品。成就、战争、困难与制度都是"事后"的——也就是说，它们是内在存在的外在行动。在特定条件下，水会变成冰。同样地，内在事件能以与原始形态截然不同的形式出现在物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The consciousness therefore would never be destroyed in reality. The most minute blossom within it would experience only an almost instantaneous change of form, and all of this would transpire in the breath of an instant. The individual petals would merely change, as the personalities of men change in what seems like a series of before and after reincarnations.
quotes.translation: 因此，意识在实相中永远不会被毁灭。其中最微小的花朵，只会经历几乎瞬间的形态变化，而这一切都将在刹那的呼吸间发生。花瓣个体只是改变，如同人类的人格在一系列看似前后相继的转世中改变一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You are beginning to perceive the holes in the camouflage, for I have pointed them out to you. They are doorways into inner realities, and other realities, as are these sessions. Those who have survived physical death in your terms, must use words in their communications, for you do not understand wordless communications. They themselves are far freer, however.
quotes.translation: 你们开始察觉伪装中的破洞，因为我已为你们指出。它们是通往内在实相及其他实相的门户，正如这些课一样。在你们说法中，那些经历过肉体死亡的人，必须在沟通中使用文字，因为你们不理解无言的沟通。然而，他们自身却自由得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you form a guilt in your mind, then it is a reality for you, and you must work it out. But many of you form guilts for which there is no adequate cause, and you saddle yourselves with these guilts without reason. In your dimension of activity there appear to be a wild assortment of evils. Let me tell you that he who hates an evil merely creates another one.
quotes.translation: 若你在心中形成一种罪疚感，那么它对你而言就是实相，你必须去化解它。但你们许多人形成的罪疚感并无充分理由，却毫无道理地将这些罪疚背负在自己身上。在你们的活动维度中，似乎存在着形形色色的邪恶。让我告诉你们，憎恨邪恶的人只会创造出另一种邪恶。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You could retain the identity of yourself as you know yourself, and yet flow into a greater field or wave of reality that allowed you to perceive your own other motions or shapes or versions. You could become aware of a larger structure in which you also have your own validity, and therefore add to your own knowledge and to the dimensions of your experience.10
quotes.translation: 你可以保留你认知中的自我身份，同时流入一个更大的实相场域或波动，让你能感知自己其他的运动、形态或版本。你能意识到一个更大的结构，在其中你同样具有自己的有效性，从而增添自己的知识，扩展经验的维度。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 722
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: To this extent we indulge in relaxation and sleep, for we can spend a century as a tree or as an uncomplicated life form in another reality. We delight our consciousness with the enjoyment of simple existence. We may create, you see, the forest in which we grow. Usually however we are highly active, our full energies focused in our work and in new challenges.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，我们沉溺于放松与睡眠，因为我们能花一个世纪的时间，作为一棵树或另一种实相中简单的生命形态存在。我们以享受单纯存在的乐趣来愉悦自己的意识。你看，我们可能创造自己生长的森林。然而，我们通常高度活跃，全部能量聚焦于工作与新的挑战。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Nor is its reality in space annihilated as long as it exists within your mind. Let us take a very simple example. A child has been told not to play with a doll. The order is disobeyed. The child, wittingly or unwittingly, breaks the doll, and it is finally thrown away. The doll exists in time quite vitally as long as the child or the adult-to-be remembers it.
quotes.translation: 只要它存在于你心中，它在空间中的实相便不会被消灭。让我们举一个非常简单的例子。一个孩子被告知不要玩一个娃娃。命令被违抗了。孩子有意或无意地弄坏了娃娃，最终它被丢弃了。只要孩子或未来的成人还记得它，这个娃娃就在时间中鲜活地存在着。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: "In a manner of speaking, Ruburt's physical condition represents the bruises, the wounds inflicted upon any individual in his or her long journey (long pause) toward a greater comprehension of life's experience. In religious terms, you begin to glimpse a promised land--a 'land' of psyche and reality that represents unimpeded nature (again, all very intently).
quotes.translation: 可以说，鲁柏的身体状况代表着个体在漫长旅程（长停顿）中，为更深入理解生命经验所承受的瘀伤与创伤。用宗教术语来说，你开始瞥见应许之地——那代表无碍本性的心灵与实相之"地"（再次，极其专注地）。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 5. It was inevitable that Jane's images would remind me of the note I'd written well over two months ago, on re-creating the past, or updating it, through nostalgia. In Chapter 11 of Dreams, see Note 8 for Session 936. Her images led me to search out the collection of battered black-and-white snapshots of her that somehow, some way, she'd managed to save from her early childhood. Along with scraps of her youthful poetry, the pictures are the only physical remnants she possesses of her first years, and studying them anew I realized just how valuable they really are. I talked of having them copied and enlarged by a professional photographer; I speculated about eventually having some of them reproduced in a book. That idea may have to wait, however: For some years Jane hasn't cared to be photographed--or have pictures of herself shown, no matter when they had been taken.

quotes.text: Distortion, in this respect, has a different meaning than the sort of distortion arising from a misreading of information. Yet in some respects it is similar. An original action can never repeat itself in an identical fashion. Its attempts to do so, never successful, result in a kind of distortion, and this distortion then becomes the basis for a new reality.
quotes.translation: 在此，扭曲的含义不同于因误读信息而产生的扭曲。然而在某些方面，两者又有相似之处。原始行动永远无法以完全相同的方式重复自身。它试图这样做却从未成功，结果产生了一种扭曲，而这种扭曲随后成为新实相的基础。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are dreams of different import, some triggered genetically, that serve as sparks for particular kinds of behavior--dreams, in other words, that literally span the centuries in that regard, coiled latently in the very chromosomes; and no level of consciousness is without some kind of participation in dream states. In that regard even electrons, for example, dream. Dreaming touches upon both microscopic and macroscopic events, or realities, and is not simply a human characteristic, appropriately appearing within your own range or within your own species. It is instead one area of subjective experience that is everywhere prevailing within the universe.
quotes.translation: 存在不同意义的梦境，有些由基因触发，成为特定行为的火花——换言之，有些梦境确实跨越世纪，潜伏在染色体中；没有任何意识层次不参与梦境状态。就此而言，甚至电子也会做梦。梦境触及微观与宏观事件或实相，并非仅是人类特征，恰当地出现在你的范畴或物种之内。它反而是宇宙中普遍存在的主观经验领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your terms, the rate at which you discover the facets and realities of the spacious present becomes your camouflage time. On your plane there must be physical manipulation. This gives you also the illusion of past and future, and to you it appears that the present is a fleeting, almost ashen illusion in itself, beyond any true remembrance and beyond the reach of any but nostalgic recall. This is also caused by your camouflage system in which physical materializations appear and grow, mature and disappear.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，你发现广袤当下各个面向与实相的速度，便成为你的伪装时间。在你的层面必须进行物质操控。这也给了你过去与未来的幻相，对你而言，当下本身成为转瞬即逝、近乎灰烬般的幻相，超越任何真实记忆，唯有怀旧回忆可及。这也是由你的伪装系统所致，其中物质显化出现、成长、成熟并消失。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is not to say that other realities do not exist. I have been conscious before your earth was formed. To write this book -- and in most of my communications with Ruburt -- I adopt from my own bank of past personalities those characteristics that seem appropriate. There are many of us, personalities like myself, unfocused in physical matter or time. Our existence seems strange to you only because you do not realize the true potentials of personality, and you are hypnotized by your own limited concepts.
quotes.translation: 这并非说其他实相不存在。在地球形成之前，我已存在意识。为撰写此书——以及在与鲁柏的大多数沟通中——我从自己过去人格的库藏中，选取那些看似合适的特性。有许多像我们这样的人格，未聚焦于物质或时间。我们的存在对你而言显得奇异，只因你尚未认识人格的真正潜能，且被自身有限的概念所催眠。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Inner vitality attempts therefore to materialize itself completely, and yet because of its very nature, with each materialization it increases itself, making the attempt impossible. This is the basic dilemma, from which all types of reality spring. This of course leads us to the necessity for further discussion concerning the nature of inner vitality itself.
quotes.translation: 因此，内在活力试图完全物质化自身，然而因其本性，每次物质化都使其自身增长，使这尝试成为不可能。这是基本的困境，所有类型的实相皆由此而生。这自然引导我们有必要进一步讨论内在活力自身的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If you are frightened of your emotions and believe them wrong, then when you try "psychic" experiments you may believe that you are possessed. Your feelings, the repressed ones, will seem demonic. You will be afraid to assign them to yourself, and so will think that they belong to a disembodied spirit. It is very important then that you understand the true innocence of all feelings, for each of them, if left alone and followed, will lead you back to the reality of love.
quotes.translation: 如果你害怕自己的情绪，认为它们是错误的，那么当你尝试“通灵”实验时，可能会认为自己被附身了。你的感受，那些被压抑的感受，会显得像恶魔一般。你会害怕将它们归因于自己，于是认为它们属于某个无形的灵体。因此，理解所有感受的纯真本质至关重要，因为每一种感受，如果任其自然并跟随它，都会引领你回到爱的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are gradations and fluctuations within its activity. It is far more flexible than you give it credit for. (Pause.) The ego can use the conscious mind almost entirely as a way of perceiving external or internal realities that coincide with its own beliefs. It is not that certain answers do not lie openly accessible, therefore, but that often you have set yourself on a course of action in which you believe, and you do not want to open yourself to any material that may contradict your current beliefs.
quotes.translation: 在其活动中有层次和波动。它比你认为的要灵活得多。（停顿）自我几乎可以完全将意识心用作一种感知与其自身信念相符的外在或内在实相的方式。因此，并非某些答案无法公开获取，而是你常常已经设定了一条自己深信不疑的行动路线，并且不愿向任何可能与你当前信念相矛盾的信息敞开自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The objects in the physical universe are but symbols to express other realities existing within private realms. The inner will always be projected outward within your system. If, for example, a letter comes to you bearing good news, and you react to the letter with high spirits, then you should understand that the high spirits existed first, and created the materialization of the letter within the physical systems, through the multilayered and complicated reactions that bind together the physical system.
quotes.translation: 物质宇宙中的物体只是表达存在于私人领域内其他实相的象征。内在永远会在你的系统中向外投射。例如，如果一封信带来好消息，而你以高昂的情绪回应这封信，那么你应该明白，高昂的情绪首先存在，并通过连接物质系统的多层复杂反应，创造了这封信在物质系统中的物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You make your own reality, Man's "evil" exists because of his misunderstanding of his own ideals, because of the gap that seems to exist between the ideal and its actualization. Evil actions, in other words, are the result of ignorance and misunderstanding. Evil is not a force in itself.
quotes.translation: 你创造你自己的实相。人类的“邪恶”之所以存在，是因为他误解了自己的理想，因为理想与其实现之间似乎存在鸿沟。换句话说，邪恶行为是无知和误解的结果。邪恶本身并非一种力量。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Here the basic experience is hastily dressed up as much as possible in physical clothes. This is not because you want to understand the experience, but because you refuse to accept it as basically nonphysical. All dreams are not of this nature. Some dreams themselves do take place in psychic or mental areas connected with your daily activities, in which case no dressing-up process is necessary. But in the very deep reaches of sleep experience -- those, incidentally, not yet touched upon by scientists in so-called dream laboratories -- you are in communication with other portions of your own identity, and with the other realities in which they exist.
quotes.translation: 在这里，基本体验被匆忙地尽可能穿上物质的外衣。这不是因为你想要理解这个体验，而是因为你拒绝接受它本质上是非物质的。并非所有梦境都具有这种性质。有些梦境本身确实发生在与你日常活动相关的通灵或心智领域，在这种情况下，不需要任何装扮过程。但在睡眠体验的极深处——顺便说一句，这些尚未被所谓的梦境实验室中的科学家触及——你正在与你自身身份的其他部分，以及它们所存在的其他实相进行沟通。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He is told the nature of those who participate with him. He realizes they are thought-forms, for example, and his own; but again, thought-forms do possess a certain reality and consciousness. They are not cardboard actors for him to simply push around at will. He must, therefore, take them into consideration, and he has a certain responsibility toward them.
quotes.translation: 他被告知那些与他共同参与者的本质。例如，他意识到它们是思想形态，并且是他自己的思想形态；但同样，思想形态确实拥有某种实相和意识。它们不是他可以随意摆布的纸板演员。因此，他必须考虑它们，并对它们负有一定的责任。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The separate incarnated personalities however are still separate identities. This is no contradiction at all. The personality structures of which I am speaking are far more advanced than this example. They are aware of many existences within many systems. They organize the basic ground reality into many patterns, and then operate and manipulate within them.
quotes.translation: 然而，各自转世的人格仍是独立的身份。这毫无矛盾之处。我所谈论的人格结构远比这个例子更为先进。它们意识到许多系统内的多重存在，将基本实相组织成多种模式，并在其中运作与操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: "In childhood we have little past time to remember. We seem to come from darkness, taking our parents' memories on faith for proof that there was time before our birth. As we grow toward old age, we have past time to play with--we know where we came from in usual terms--and the darkness that once seemed to stretch behind our source or origin seems to be our destination. Certainly an examination of the mind and reality from the standpoint of old age will be invaluable."
quotes.translation: "童年时期，我们几乎没有过往时间可供回忆。我们仿佛从黑暗中诞生，凭借对父母记忆的信任，来证明出生之前存在时间。随着我们走向老年，我们有了可供把玩的过往时间——以惯常说法，我们知晓自己从何而来——而曾经似乎延伸至我们源头或起源背后的黑暗，似乎成了我们的归宿。从老年的视角审视心智与实相，无疑将极具价值。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 6. In Chapter 8 of Dreams, see the opening notes for Session 915.

quotes.text: In other words, that entire framework is meant to give you a standardized, mass-produced version of reality. None of its concepts can (knocking the table) rationally be applied to creative endeavors. The orientation that gives you the creative achievement lies in the opposite direction.
quotes.translation: 换言之，整个框架旨在为你提供一种标准化、批量生产的实相版本。其任何概念都无法（敲击桌子）理性地应用于创造性努力。赋予你创造性成就的取向，恰恰位于相反的方向。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This is the experiment that has not been tried, and these are the truths that you must learn after physical death. Some, after death, understanding these truths, choose to return to physical existence and explain them. Through the centuries this has been the way. In the system of probabilities that originates within physical reality, this is also the case.
quotes.translation: 这是一项尚未尝试的实验，而这些是你必须在肉体死亡后学习的真理。有些人在死后领悟了这些真理，选择重返物质存在并加以阐释。数个世纪以来，这便是传承之道。在源于物质实相的概率系统中，情况亦是如此。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: They still exist within the same space, using your terms, that they did earlier in your time. But they have changed systems, and you can no longer perceive them. Their reality cannot be picked up by the instruments that you now have, but this does not mean they do not exist within your system. Nor does it mean that they may not reappear within your system.
quotes.translation: 用你们的术语来说，它们仍存在于与你们时间中早期相同的空间里。但它们已转换了系统，你们再也无法感知它们。你们现有的仪器无法捕捉它们的实相，但这并不意味着它们不存在于你们的系统内，也不意味着它们不会在你们的系统中重新显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now this distortion may possibly be a hangover from a previous existence, but it is a distortion. Projections in fact should give you an excellent idea of the reality of reincarnations. In an excellent projection you forget the self on the bed. You are in an entirely new environment, but you are still beset by certain personality tendencies that are yours.
quotes.translation: 这种扭曲可能是前世的残留，但它确实是扭曲。事实上，投射应能让你极好地理解转世的实相。在出色的投射中，你会忘记床上的自我。你身处一个全新的环境，但仍受制于某些属于你的人格倾向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The laws of the universe, of the inner universe, for example, are not laws in some book. (Smile.) Such laws that might be proclaimed in so many words. They are attempts to explain in words the nature of the inner reality that forms All That Is. I must disentangle concepts, unravel them, in order to explain them, and much is necessarily lost in the process.
quotes.translation: 宇宙的法则，内在宇宙的法则，并非书本中的条文。（微笑）那些可能以明确言辞宣告的法则，不过是试图用语言解释形成一切万有的内在实相本质。我必须理清概念，拆解它们才能加以解释，而在此过程中必然流失大量信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now that is what I have been doing as far as your reality is concerned -- that is, in my relationship with you. It is a multidimensional version of what Ruburt does in simple terms when he writes a book of his own.3
quotes.translation: 就你们的实相而言——也就是在我与你们的关系中——这正是我一直在做的事。这相当于鲁柏在撰写自己著作时，以简单方式呈现的多维度版本。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 744
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There is no single-line development, in other words. The fragment elements directed outward by you as a species also add of course to your physical reality, for without the fine balance maintained, and without this cooperation, your particular kind of environment would not be possible.
quotes.translation: 换言之，并不存在单线式的发展。你们作为物种向外投射的碎片元素，自然也在增添你们的物质实相，因为若没有精妙平衡的维持，没有这种协作，你们特定的环境形态便不可能存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: Your self-reality in any given moment is like that seed, following probable generations that appear in other dimensions as well as this one. In each now-moment, you draw from the vast bank of unpredictable actions certain ones that are "significant" to you; and your private idea of significance will result in what then seems to be predictable action.
quotes.translation: 现在：你们任一时刻的自我实相都如同那颗种子，追随着既出现在此维度也出现在其他维度的可能世代。在每个当下时刻，你们从浩瀚的不可预测行动库中，汲取某些对你们而言"具有意义"的行动；而你们对意义的私人认知，将导致随后看似可预测的行动。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The state into which Ruburt fell as a rule allows no such focus in either reality, but a suspension. It is necessary only as a transition. I will again suggest that for the present psychological time experiments be carried on once a day. There is no reason to give further time to it, in the evening, at this time. This is aimed at Ruburt. We want contrast.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏通常陷入的状态，在两种实相中都不允许这种聚焦，而是处于悬置状态。这种状态仅作为过渡所需。我再次建议，目前每天进行一次心理时间实验。现阶段晚间无需再投入更多时间。这是针对鲁柏的提示。我们需要对比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The entire nature of events, then, exists in a different way than you have supposed, only small portions slicing into the reality that you recognize--yet all underneath connected to a vast psychological activity. You might compare events to psychological consonants that underlay or underlie the more unusual features of physical psychological environment.
quotes.translation: 因此，事件的整体本质以不同于你们设想的方式存在，只有微小片段切入你们所认知的实相——然而所有片段之下都连接着浩瀚的心理活动。你们可将事件比作心理辅音，它们支撑或潜藏于物质心理环境中那些更不寻常的特征之下。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane doesn't agree with my doubts. As always, she's been letting me put this book together the way I think best--and inevitably that way has followed how we've been trying to understand our joint long-term situation. She innocently accepts my labors as they come out. And that trust always reflects, I'm sure, Seth's own larger view of reality, as I just quoted him from Session 915. Our challenges echo throughout all of our probable realities simultaneously, and through all of them together the largest picture of Jane and myself is presented. In this probable reality we work with what we can pick up from that great whole. We keep trying to learn to ask better questions.

quotes.text: She sees herself supported in a religious senseby conventional figures from the Bible. These personalities will explain the nature of reality to her in vocabulary that will make senseto her. She has solved the problems that she set, and brought forth in her husband compassion and understanding--qualities that greatly help in his own development. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 她看到自己在宗教层面得到圣经中传统人物的支持。这些人物会用她能理解的词汇向她解释实相的本质。她已解决了自己设定的问题，并在丈夫身上唤起了慈悲与理解——这些特质极大地促进了他自身的发展。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is almost impossible to speak of when the personality enters the physical body without discussing the ways in which it leaves it, for all this is highly dependent upon personal characteristics and attitudes toward physical reality. Decisions as to future lives may be made not only in between-life conditions but also in dream states in any given life.
quotes.translation: 若不讨论人格离开肉体的方式，几乎无法谈论它何时进入肉体，因为这一切都高度依赖于个人特质及其对物质实相的态度。关于未来人生的决定不仅可在转世间隙的状态中做出，也可在任何一世中的梦境状态里做出。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses to some extent will allow you to perceive the reality of inner existence, and Ruburt incidentally in this new development is involved with the use of these inner senses in a more effective manner than before. There are some changes in the way connections are made. This gives Ruburt a feeling of strangeness as he makes inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 内在感官在某种程度上会让你感知到内在存在的实相，而鲁柏在这次新发展中，正以比以往更有效的方式运用这些内在感官。连接方式发生了一些变化。这使鲁柏在进行内在调整时产生了一种陌生感。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: All of this is premature, for the equation itself bears little basic reality to truth. It has a highly artificial relation to it, and it hides another equation, secret since the time of Egypt, having do with the basic nature of zero, and the opening and wedging powers of the unleashed integer, over zero to the 9th degree gradations downward, do you see?
quotes.translation: 这一切都为时过早，因为该方程式本身与真理几乎毫无基本关联。它与真理的关系高度人为化，并隐藏着另一个自埃及时代起便秘而不宣的方程式——涉及零的基本本质，以及被释放的整数在零之上向下九级梯度中开启与楔入的力量，你明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Tell yourself several times a day that you can deal with whatever problems you have. Do not keep thinking of the job situation so that you are hammering yourself over the head with it constantly. Whenever you find yourself projecting failure in any sense into the future, even into tomorrow, stop yourself, remind yourself that your thoughts form reality.
quotes.translation: 每天对自己说几次：你能处理任何遇到的问题。不要持续思考工作状况，以至于不断用此敲打自己的脑袋。每当你发现自己将任何形式的失败投射到未来——甚至投射到明天——就立刻停止，提醒自己：你的思想形成实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You may become more and more efficient in that manner. This is why it is vital that you examine your beliefs for yourself and understand what they mean to you personally. If, using that example, you suddenly begin to realize your position and begin to express your love to your children directly, you may find them quite surprised, delighted but confused. It may take them a while to understand your reactions, but as the old reality had a cohesiveness so will the new.
quotes.translation: 你可能会以这种方式变得越来越高效。这就是为何你必须亲自检视自己的信念，并理解它们对你个人的意义。若用那个例子来说，当你突然开始认清自己的处境，并开始直接向孩子表达爱意时，你可能会发现他们既惊讶又欣喜，但也会感到困惑。他们可能需要一段时间才能理解你的反应，但正如旧实相曾有其凝聚力，新实相也将如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The creative body consciousness creates the eye. The creative inner psyche creates the ego. The body forms the eye in the splendid wisdom of its great unconscious knowing. The psyche brings forth the ego that perceives psychologically as the eye perceives physically. Both the eye and the ego are formations focused toward perception of exterior reality.
quotes.translation: 创造性的身体意识创造了眼睛。创造性的内在心灵创造了自我。身体以其伟大无意识认知的卓越智慧形成了眼睛。心灵则催生出自我，它在心理层面上的感知方式，正如眼睛在物理层面上的感知。眼睛和自我都是聚焦于感知外在实相而形成的结构。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A relationship with one woman beside the mother here connected. An incident with candy bars as a child, of approximately 6, or in grade six. An inner formlessness. It was easy for him, deceptively easy, to overlook physical reality, to say that it was a mirage, simply because he had never completely enmeshed himself within it. He never met it squarely.
quotes.translation: 与母亲之外的一位女性的关系在此处产生了关联。童年时期大约六岁或六年级时与糖果棒相关的事件。一种内在的无形状态。对他来说，轻易地——具有欺骗性地轻易——忽视物质实相，说它只是幻象，仅仅因为他从未完全沉浸其中。他从未正面面对过它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: These probabilities are realities, regardless of which decision you make. Say, for example, that you have three choices and it is imperative that you select one. Using this state, you take the first choice. The alternative present is the moment in which you make that choice. Having made it the present is changed, and quite clearly you perceive exactly the way it is changed and what actions and events will flow from the change into the future that belongs to that particular alternate present.
quotes.translation: 这些可能性都是实相，无论你做出何种决定。举例来说，假设你有三个选择，而你必须选出一个。利用这种状态，你选择了第一个。替代当下就是你做出那个选择的时刻。一旦做出选择，当下便已改变，而你清晰地感知到它如何改变，以及哪些行动和事件将从这一改变流向属于那个特定替代当下的未来。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is not a simple question that may be summed up in a statement, such as "attitudes regulate behavior." What is not understood is that emotional attitudes, conscious and subconscious, have an electromagnetic reality that operates very efficiently, either as an open system which attracts new stimuli, or as a closed electric force that is supercharged.
quotes.translation: 这不是一个可以用"态度调节行为"这样的陈述简单概括的问题。人们尚未理解的是，情绪态度——无论有意识还是无意识——具有一种电磁实相，它运作得极为高效，要么作为吸引新刺激的开放系统，要么作为充满电荷的封闭电力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I am not sugarcoating the process for you, for this would not be to your advantage. Nor will I understate the advantages that can be yours if you do so continue, for there are many. There will be direct experience of inner reality that is encountered most infrequently, and expansion of consciousness and a resulting fulfillment of your own personality.
quotes.translation: 我不会为你粉饰这个过程，因为这对你并无益处。我也不会低估你若能如此继续所能获得的诸多优势，因为确实有很多。你将获得极少遇到的内在实相的直接体验，以及意识的扩展，并由此带来你自身人格的圆满实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: A certain portion of my reality is therefore available to you during our appointed times, and the bridgework of which we have spoken is always available; and using it Ruburt can call upon me on other occasions.
quotes.translation: 因此，在我们约定的时间里，我实相的特定部分可供你获取，而我们曾谈及的桥梁工作始终可用；利用它，鲁柏可以在其他场合召唤我。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The grouping of inner senses with which we are now concerned deal with the disentanglement of one set of camouflage patterns and the taking up of another set. The groupings of inner senses most dependent upon the use of psychological time are those which involve a nearly complete disentanglement from camouflage pattern, without taking on other patterns, and these are perhaps the most important because they come closer to the direct experience of unveiled reality.
quotes.translation: 我们现在关注的内感官组合，涉及从一套伪装模式中解脱并进入另一套模式。最依赖心理时间运用的内感官组合，是那些几乎完全脱离伪装模式而不进入其他模式的组合，这些或许最为重要，因为它们更接近对未加掩饰实相的直接体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now. Time is the pattern of perception. It is highly personal, and has no meaning without personal experience. To you, then, time is the result of your perceiving mechanisms. You know the senses force you to perceive experience in certain pattern. Because I have also followed this particular reality, it is meaningful, for me, and I can understand it.
quotes.translation: 时间是一种感知模式。它极具个人性，没有个人体验便毫无意义。对你而言，时间是你感知机制的结果。你知道感官迫使你以特定模式感知体验。由于我也曾遵循过这种特定实相，它对我而言具有意义，我也能理解它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When the aggressiveness is released, then there will be no need for a victim. We do not want, in other words, to direct an individual to dream about a situation in which he is attacking a particular individual. There are many reasons for this, both telepathic realities which you do not as yet understand, and guilt patterns which would be unavoidable. This again is vital, and we shall discuss such matters to some degree.
quotes.translation: 当攻击性被释放时，便不再需要受害者。换言之，我们不想引导个体梦见自己攻击某个特定对象。这有许多原因，既涉及你们尚未理解的心灵感应实相，也涉及不可避免的罪恶模式。这一点至关重要，我们将在某种程度上讨论这类问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is of course because of your highly distorted ideas of time that you persist in projecting antiquated concepts of past, present and future outward into explorations of your universe. While the quasars appear to be filled with more energy than man can conceive of, still the quasars that are now perceived are but shadows of the reality behind them.
quotes.translation: 当然，正是由于你们对时间的扭曲观念，才导致你们将过去、现在与未来的陈旧概念投射到对宇宙的探索中。虽然类星体似乎充满人类无法想象的巨大能量，但此刻被感知的类星体不过是其背后实相的影子。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: At your stage it is of course easier if the actual separation of consciousness from the physical body occurs without your awareness. However the experience itself is excellent training. I have told you that these projections may carry you to different systems. In the beginning you are safer perhaps in those projections that involve your own reality.
quotes.translation: 在你们现阶段，若意识与肉体的分离在无意识状态下发生，自然更为容易。然而这种体验本身是极佳的训练。我曾告诉你们，这些投射可能将你们带往不同系统。初期，涉及你们自身实相的投射或许更为安全。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Reading this material and understanding the nature of this attack should end it. His book is helping others in Saratoga. He should be drawing gratitude and health from this thought reality. The yoga exercises will in themselves straighten out the kinks here, with his understanding, as he begins to automatically attract forces of health and vitality.
quotes.translation: 阅读这份资料并理解这次攻击的本质，应能终结它。他的书正在帮助萨拉托加的其他读者。他应当从这种思想实相中汲取感恩与健康。随着他开始自动吸引健康与活力的力量，瑜伽练习本身将在他理解的基础上理顺这些纠结。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In the first stage, Ruburt projected through physical reality and saw personalities who had very recently died in physical terms. Now, it is very difficult to tell you simply what happens at physical death, for the conditions vary considerably, according to the individual; his abilities and beliefs will largely determine what happens in those terms.
quotes.translation: 在第一阶段，鲁柏投射穿越物质实相，看见了在物质层面刚去世不久的人格。现在，很难简单地告诉你物质死亡时究竟发生了什么，因为情况因人而异，差异极大；他的能力与信念将在很大程度上决定那些层面发生的事。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The units obviously are within the reality of all cells. Now. (Pause.) The initiation point is the basic part of the unit, as the nucleus is the important part of the cell. The initiating point is the originating, unique, individual and specific emotional energy, or EE (Pause), that forms any given unit. It becomes the entryway into physical matter.
quotes.translation: 这些单位显然存在于所有细胞的实相之内。现在。（停顿。）起始点是单位的基本部分，就像细胞核是细胞的重要部分。起始点是形成任何给定单位的、原初的、独特的、个体且特定的情感能量，或EE（停顿）。它成为进入物质世界的入口。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We were discussing the nature of perception some while back, and its relation to clairvoyant activities. We were discussing the fact that no knowledge exists apart from consciousness. I told you that any perception alters the perceiver. Not only mentally and emotionally but also alters the electromagnetic reality of the internal physical structure.
quotes.translation: 我们之前讨论过感知的本质，及其与千里眼活动的关系。我们讨论过这样一个事实：没有脱离意识而存在的知识。我告诉过你，任何感知都会改变感知者。不仅是在心智和情感上，也会改变内在物理结构的电磁实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: If you believed you were unworthy because you were scrawny and bullied, then in some way you undoubtedly used that belief for your own purposes. Admit it. Discover what the purposes were. Perhaps you compensated -- became athletic later, or used the impetus to go ahead in your own way. If your mother hated you, you may have used that to assert independence, to give you an excuse or a pathway; but in all cases you form your own reality, and so you agreed to it.
quotes.translation: 如果你因为自己瘦弱且被欺凌而相信自己毫无价值，那么你无疑在某种程度上为了自己的目的而利用了那个信念。承认它。发现那些目的是什么。也许你后来通过运动进行了补偿，或者利用那股动力以自己的方式前进。如果你的母亲恨你，你可能利用这一点来主张独立，给你一个借口或一条出路；但在所有情况下，你都形成了自己的实相，因此你同意了它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: So do your dream images exist in the same manner, and you are as unaware of their existence as you are of your own subconscious existence. You do not know how you move across the floor. You are not conscious of each breath you take. You know that your muscles move, without your volition. You know you breathe, and in the same manner that you undertake physiological, biological and mental leaps and functions, so do you also create the reality of the dream world.
quotes.translation: 那么，你的梦境影像是否以同样的方式存在，而你对其存在的不自知，正如你对自己潜意识存在的不自知一样。你不知道自己是如何在地板上移动的。你意识不到自己的每一次呼吸。你知道你的肌肉在无需你意志的情况下运动。你知道你在呼吸，正如你进行生理、生物和心智的跳跃与功能一样，你也同样创造了梦境世界的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: As leaves drop from the tree, so finally do dream images depart from close connection with the personality. Yet a psychic connection is always maintained to some degree. Dream images are often images which cannot be created for various reasons within physical reality at any particular time. Dream images may appear later however as physical images.
quotes.translation: 正如树叶从树上落下，最终梦境影像也会脱离与人格的紧密联系。然而，某种程度的灵性联系始终得以维持。梦境影像往往是那些在特定时间因各种原因无法在物质实相中创造的影像。然而，梦境影像后来可能作为物质影像出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is also automatically transformed according to your beliefs, so that it makes sense to you at least to some degree. In energy terms, think of your selves as particles, and of your experiences as the waves that flow through the particles and gives each of them its sensations. When you are physical you are a particle. The form of the particle defines your experience as the waves permeate it, but your greater reality cannot be expressed in such limited terms.
quotes.translation: 它也会自动根据你的信念转化，因此至少在一定程度上对你而言是合理的。从能量角度来说，将你们自己视为粒子，将你们的经验视为流经粒子并赋予每个粒子感知的波浪。当你们处于物质状态时，你们就是一个粒子。粒子的形态决定了波浪渗透时你的经验，但你的更大实相无法用如此有限的术语来表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A form is basically nonphysical. What you see of form is only that part that can be effectively active or materialized within your system of reality. So the entity in its own way possesses what you can think of as future neuronal structures. Underline that whole last sentence.
quotes.translation: 形态本质上是非物质的。你所看到的形态只是能在你的实相系统内有效活动或物质化的那一部分。因此，存有以其自身方式拥有你可以视为未来神经元结构的东西。将整个最后一句画线强调。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The semitrance state does not allow a clear awareness in either world. It is passed through very quickly as a rule, both on the way into a trance and on the way out of one. It is of course a part of both realities. This goes without saying. It is true that there is much this evening that could be added to our previous discussions, but Ruburt, particularly after last nights session, should rest. And I would also suggest that he forget his psychological time experiments until next Monday.
quotes.translation: 半出神状态不允许在两个世界中都保持清晰的觉知。通常，无论是进入出神状态还是离开出神状态，它都会非常快速地通过。它当然属于两种实相的一部分。这是不言而喻的。今晚确实有很多内容可以补充到我们之前的讨论中，但鲁柏，特别是在昨晚的课程之后，应该休息。我也建议他暂停心理时间实验，直到下周一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Even those of you who intellectually agree that you form your own reality find it difficult to accept emotionally in certain areas. You are, of course, literally hypnotized into believing that your feelings arise in response to events. Your feelings, however, cause the events you perceive. Secondarily, you do of course then react to those events.
quotes.translation: 即使你们中那些在理智上同意自己创造实相的人，在某些领域也难以在情感上接受。当然，你们实际上被催眠了，相信你们的感受是对事件的反应。然而，你们的感受引起了你们所感知的事件。其次，你们当然会对那些事件做出反应。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Conditioning therefore must also be enlivened, and intuition will help you here. Your physical nature is, as I have told you, an approximation and materialization of inner reality on a physical level. Therefore, such simple activities as walking in the rain, lying upon grass, walking in windy weather, all represent gateways to psychic experience.
quotes.translation: 因此，条件作用也必须被激活，而直觉会在这方面帮助你。正如我告诉过你的，你的物质本性是内在实相在物质层面上的近似和物质化。因此，像雨中漫步、躺在草地上、在风中行走这样简单的活动，都代表着通往心灵体验的门户。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The personality is more integrated, yet through its acceptance of inner data, the ego, to use the term lightly, has expanded. It has not shrunk. It is now composed of more various elements from the whole personality. Retaining its own consciousness of reality it can now afford to step out of itself momentarily in order to gain further experience.
quotes.translation: 人格更加整合，然而通过接受内在资料，自我——姑且用这个术语——已经扩展了。它没有萎缩。现在它由整个人格中更多不同的元素组成。在保留自身对实相的意识的同时，它现在可以暂时跳出自身，以获取进一步的经验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You shut off stimuli to concentrate on other stimuli. This is a simplified example of how in the dream state you shut out stimuli usually accepted by the ego, and become conscious of other realities that you usually ignore in the waking state. You create the dream world continuously. You are familiar with it and intimate with it, and you know it well. In this discussion there should be some remarks made concerning the existence of the inner ego, of which I believe you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你关闭某些刺激以专注于其他刺激。这是一个简化的例子，说明在梦境状态中，你如何关闭通常被自我接受的刺激，并意识到你在清醒状态中通常忽略的其他实相。你持续创造梦境世界。你熟悉它、亲近它，并且深知它。在此讨论中，应当提及内在自我的存在——我相信你对此并不熟悉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: If all of your beliefs, not just your "fortunate" ones, were not materialized, you would never thoroughly understand on a physical level that your ideas create reality. If only your "positive" beliefs were materialized then you would never clearly comprehend the power of your thought, for you would not completely experience its physical results.
quotes.translation: 如果你所有的信念——不仅仅是那些"幸运"的信念——没有被物质化，你永远无法在物质层面彻底理解你的想法创造实相。如果只有"正面"信念被物质化，那么你永远无法清晰领悟思想的力量，因为你无法完整体验其物质结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (Very emphatically:) It is absurd to believe that you can learn something about consciousness by destroying it. It is absurd to believe that you can learn one iota about the inner reality of life when your search leads you to destroy it. Destruction, you see, in your terms (underlined twice), presupposes a misunderstanding of life to begin with.
quotes.translation: （非常强调地：）相信通过摧毁意识就能了解意识，这是荒谬的。相信通过毁灭生命的内在实相就能探知其分毫，这是荒谬的。你看，用你们的说法（双下划线强调），毁灭本身就预设了对生命的根本误解。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 701
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: I am in somewhat the same position when I try to explain to you the nature of this inner self, for while you can become aware of it in dreams, you cannot truly appreciate its maturity or abilities; yet they are yours in the same way that the man's abilities belonged to the child. In the dream state you learn, among other things, how to construct your own physical reality day by day, just as after death you learn how to construct your next physical lifetime.
quotes.translation: 当我试图向你们解释这个内在自我的本质时，我处于类似的境地——因为虽然你们能在梦中意识到它，却无法真正欣赏它的成熟度或能力；然而它们属于你们，正如那个男人的能力属于那个孩子。在梦境状态中，你们学习如何日复一日构建自己的物质实相，就像死后你们学习如何构建下一个物质生命。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Psychologically and physically, however, you send out dream bulletins all the while in a constant inner communication. On this level individual dreams help form mass reality, yet also to some extent arise from it in the same way that local weather conditions contribute to world weather conditions, while they are formed by them at the same time.
quotes.translation: 然而，在心理和生理层面，你们持续通过内在沟通发送"梦境公报"。在这个层面上，个体梦境帮助形成群体实相，同时也在某种程度上源于群体实相——正如局部天气状况既影响全球天气状况，又同时被全球天气状况所塑造。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One is that because objects just originate in man's imagination anyway, there's always a strong connection between objects and man's dreams. They act as symbols of inner reality, so it's only natural that whether he's aware of it or not, man perceives objects in such a fashion that they also stand for symbols that first originate in his dreams.
quotes.translation: 其一，由于物体本就源于人类的想象力，物体与人类的梦境之间始终存在强烈关联。它们作为内在实相的象征，因此无论人类是否意识到，他感知物体的方式自然会使这些物体同时代表最初源于其梦境的象征。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 844, APRIL 1, 1979
4:01 P.M. SUNDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The brain organizes activity and translates events, but it does not initiate them. Events have an electromagnetic reality that is then projected onto the brain for physical activation. Your instruments only pick up certain levels of the brain's activity. They do not perceive the mind's activity at all, except as it is imprinted onto the brain.
quotes.translation: 大脑组织活动并转化事件，但它并不启动事件。事件具有电磁实相，然后投射到大脑上以进行物理激活。你们的仪器只能捕捉到大脑活动的某些层面。它们完全感知不到心灵的活动，除非心灵活动被印刻在大脑上。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Later, Jane suggested that I ask Seth to comment upon the ideas in a session. There would also be a number of other reasons for double dreams, of course. I briefly wrote about them in Volume I of "Unknown" Reality; see the notes for Session 692.)

quotes.text: The ideas that you have involving the nature of reality will strongly color your experiences, for you will interpret them in the light of your beliefs, even as now you interpret daily life according to your ideas of what is possible or not possible. Your consciousness may withdraw from your body slowly or quickly, according to many variables.
quotes.translation: 你们对实相本质所持的观念将强烈地影响你们的经验，因为你们会根据信念来诠释经验，就像现在你们根据自己对可能或不可能的看法来诠释日常生活一样。根据许多变数，你们的意识可能缓慢或快速地脱离身体。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In itself, such an exercise creatively alters probabilities, for you no longer live with the problem as an unchanging concrete reality. This is a psychological and psychic impetus, altering the messages that you habitually send to your body and to its cellular construction. You are then creatively manipulating in several layers of experience.
quotes.translation: 就其本身而言，这样的练习会创造性地改变或然率，因为你们不再将问题视为一成不变的固定实相。这是一种心理和心灵上的推动力，改变了你们习惯性地发送给身体及其细胞结构的讯息。然后你们在多个经验层面上进行创造性的操纵。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The psychological feeling of intensity has its own electromagnetic reality. An action is an experienced intensity, and need not involve motion in physical terms. As I have said, every action is a part of every other action, and affects every other action, and is also so affected itself. This is not however your cause and effect theory at all.
quotes.translation: 心理上的强烈感受有其自身的电磁实相。行动是一种被体验到的强度，不一定涉及物理上的运动。如我所说，每个行动都是其他每个行动的一部分，影响其他每个行动，同时也被其他行动所影响。但这根本不是你们的因果理论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Verbalization is not a basic method of communication for in quotes "higher" forms of consciousness, nor is it for lower forms of consciousness. It is only at your particular intermediate state that verbalization as such is so important. It is a main basis for your species. Because of its importance at your particular stage it is an excellent method for our purposes. In many other systems of reality it is never adopted, for it is in many ways restrictive.
quotes.translation: 语言表达并非所谓"较高"意识形式的基本沟通方式，也不是较低意识形式的沟通方式。只有在你们特定的中间阶段，语言表达才如此重要。它是你们物种的主要基础。由于它在你们特定阶段的重要性，它成为我们目的的一个极佳方法。在许多其他实相系统中，它从未被采用，因为它在许多方面具有限制性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You have a greater identity outside of your context, yet a part of it is inside your context, as you. Your youness is your significance, a focus of awareness, conscious of itself, that seeks out and views experience with its own unique propensities. The existence of probable realities and probable selves in no way denies the validity of your own experience or individuality. That rides secure, choosing from unpredictable fields of actuality those that suit its own particular nature.
quotes.translation: 在你们的脉络之外，你们有一个更大的身份，然而它的一部分在你们的脉络之内，作为你们自己。你们的"你性"就是你们的重要性，一个觉知的焦点，自我觉察，以其独特的倾向寻求并审视经验。或然实相和或然自我的存在绝不否定你们自身经验或个体性的有效性。那个"你性"安然存在，从不可预测的实相场域中选择那些适合其自身本性的部分。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 682
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Too many complicated issues are connected here, so that I must at best simplify. It is as if man said: "Now what about this idea? What can we do with it? What will happen if we toss it out into reality, physically? How far can we go with any of the great social, scientific, religious ideas that are so peculiarly the offshoots of man's mind?"
quotes.translation: 这里牵扯到太多复杂的问题，所以我必须尽量简化。仿佛人类在问："这个想法究竟如何？我们能拿它做什么？如果我们把它抛入物理现实，会发生什么？那些作为人类心智独特产物的伟大社会、科学、宗教理念，我们能将其推进多远？"
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you, a dream tourist, wander about the inner landscape with your mental camera, however, it may take a while before you are able to tell the difference between dream events and their shadows or hallucinations. So you may take pictures of the shadows instead of the trees, and end up with a fine composition indeed -- but one that would give you somewhat of a distorted version of inner reality. So you must learn how to aim and focus your dream camera.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你作为梦境旅人，带着心灵相机漫游内在景观时，可能需要一段时间才能区分梦境事件与其阴影或幻象。所以你可能会拍到树的阴影而非树本身，最终得到一幅精美的构图——但呈现的却是内在现实的扭曲版本。因此你必须学会如何瞄准并聚焦你的梦境相机。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: In the dream world, however, each feeling or idea can be immediately expressed and experienced. The physical world has buildings in it that you manufacture -- that is, they do not spring up naturally from the ground itself. In the same way, your thoughts are "manufactured products" in the dream world. They are a part of the environment and appear within its reality, though they change shape and form constantly, as physically manufactured objects do not.
quotes.translation: 但在梦境世界中，每个感受或想法都能立即被表达和体验。物理世界中有你建造的建筑物——它们不会自然地从地面生长出来。同样地，你的思想在梦境世界中是"制造出来的产品"。它们是环境的一部分，出现在其现实之中，尽管它们不断改变形状和形态，而物理制造的物体则不会如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I am going to suggest that our friend take a walk when we are finished here, a brisk one. The situation is in no way alarming. He has been used to the trance, and of course with what you call the normal waking state, and has not happened to become acquainted with this transition phase. He passes through it so quickly as a rule. As a transitional step, it is most necessary. Otherwise however it does not allow efficient behavior in any particular reality.
quotes.translation: 我建议我们的朋友在我们结束后去散个步，快走的那种。情况完全不必惊慌。他习惯了出神状态，也习惯了所谓的正常清醒状态，只是碰巧还不熟悉这个过渡阶段。通常他太快穿越这个阶段了。作为过渡步骤，它极为必要。否则它无法在任何特定现实中促成有效的行为。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Our psychological structures are different, practically speaking, in that we consciously utilize a multidimensional psychological reality that you inherently possess, but are unfamiliar with at an egotistical level. It is natural, then, that our environment would have multidimensional qualities that the physical senses would never perceive.
quotes.translation: 实际上，我们的心理结构不同，因为我们有意识地运用一种多维度的心理现实——这种现实你本就拥有，但在自我层面尚不熟悉。因此，我们的环境自然具有物理感官永远无法感知的多维度特质。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consciousness is not basically built upon those precepts of good and evil that so presently concern you. By inference, neither is a soul. This does not mean that in your system, and in some others, these problems do not exist and that good is not preferable to the evil. It simply means that the soul knows that good and evil are but different manifestations of a far greater reality.
quotes.translation: 意识并非基本建立在那些你们目前关心的善恶戒律之上。由此推论，灵魂也不是。这并不意味着在你们的系统及其他某些系统中，这些问题不存在，也不意味着善不比恶更可取。它仅仅意味着灵魂知道善与恶不过是某个更伟大现实的不同显现。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If this strikes you as too intellectual a method, then you can also work backward from your emotions to your beliefs. In any case, regardless of which method you choose, one will lead you to the other. Both approaches require honesty with yourself, and a firm encounter with the mental, psychic and emotional aspects of your current reality.
quotes.translation: 如果你觉得这方法太理性，你也可以从情绪回溯到信念。无论如何，无论你选择哪种方法，两者都会相互引导。这两种方法都需要你对自己诚实，并坚定面对当前实相的心智、心灵与情感层面。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The table, and I'm afraid this is somewhat review, Joseph, the table as you know is not solid. Your scientists know this. Your outer senses lie when they experience the table as solid.
