You know this. The inner senses are not so deceived, and never have been. The inner senses experience directly the reality of which your matter is composed.
quotes.translation: 桌子——恐怕这有点老生常谈，约瑟——如你所知，桌子并非固体。你们的科学家知道这一点。当你们的外在感官将桌子体验为固体时，它们在说谎。你知道这一点。内在感官则不会被如此欺骗，也从未被欺骗过。内在感官直接体验构成你们物质的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I always like to have much energy on your part as reserve. It is true that in almost all cases our winter sessions will be most intensive, for various reasons. The matter of this reality, of which you know so little, will be the basis for future discussions, and indeed your inner senses will aid you in the perception of some of its facets.
quotes.translation: 我总希望你们这边保留充沛的能量作为储备。确实，出于各种原因，我们冬季的课几乎总是最密集的。这个你们知之甚少的实相本质，将成为未来讨论的基础，而你们的内在感官将协助你们感知其某些面向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is easier then to senseand feel the alive energy within and beneath the physical forms that you see. It is easier to feel yourself as the artist, also a part of the landscape that you paint; to sensethe merging of your own energy into the scene before you, and to realize that you are a part of it also. For you paint reality from within.
quotes.translation: 如此一来，更容易感知到你们所见物质形态内部与底层的鲜活能量。更容易将自己视为艺术家，同时也是所绘风景的一部分；感知自身能量融入眼前景象，并意识到你也是其中一部分。因为你从内在描绘实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This does not mean that an alienation results in those realities -- simply a relationship in which the body and consciousness relate to other events. Only your beliefs, training, and neurological indoctrination prevent you from recognizing the true nature of your consciousness while you sleep. You close out those data. In that period, however, at an inner order of events, you are highly active and do much of the interior mental work that will later appear as physical experience.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着那些实相会导致疏离——只是身体与意识以不同方式关联其他事件。唯有你的信念、训练和神经系统的灌输，阻止你在睡眠时认出意识的真实本质。你屏蔽了那些数据。然而在那段时间里，在事件的内在秩序中，你高度活跃，完成大量内在心智工作，这些工作日后将显现为物质经验。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (10:55: Jane's delivery had become somewhat faster and very absorbed as it progressed. Just as they had before our three-month layoff from book work [after Session 707], her trances for "Unknown" Reality were proving to be more "difficult" to initiate than those for the previous Seth books.9 She often had to wait for just the right moment to get back into dictation following a break, too; so tonight, after we'd shared an apple, she sat rather impatiently anticipating Seth's return. Resume, finally, at 11:25.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Understand, however, that the term "dream cloud" would serve as well. [Yet] it is an evocative reference to the way that All That Is packaged itself in the formation of its numberless realities. Such life clouds "still" exist--and you had better put the word "still" in quotations. Each seed of life, of living, contains within itself its own protective coating, its own placenta of necessary nourishment and environmental circumstances, its own system and branches of probabilities.
quotes.translation: 但请理解，“梦云”这个术语同样适用。它是对“一切万有”在形成无数实相时自我包装方式的一种唤起性指涉。这类生命云“仍然”存在——你最好把“仍然”这个词加上引号。每个生命种子、每个活生生的种子，都内含其保护层、滋养与环境的必要胎盘、以及它自己的概率系统与分支。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Jane had noted on the 15th that she wanted to finish Seth's book soon. She made no more entries in her journal over the next ten days. She did more painting. Rather than intensify, her voice tremors lessened on some occasions and disappeared on others. The slowdown in her speech was more persistent, although it didn't become more pronounced in any manner. Following our own suggestions, we did fairly well at not dwelling upon those vocal challenges; we sent out no signals to Seth, asking him to discuss them. And Jane did have the energy to firmly begin dictating Session 939 for Chapter 12 of Dreams at 9:48 P.M. on Monday evening, January 25:)

quotes.text: As you know, you create or construct all physical matter. What you see are your own constructions. This does not mean however that there is not something within or behind what you perceive. All thoughts are composed of energy, and from our discussions you realize that there are electrical intensities within whose range all reality exists.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，你创造或建构了所有物质实相。你所见的都是你自己的建构。但这并不意味着你所感知的事物之内或背后没有某种存在。所有思想都由能量构成，根据我们的讨论，你应了解在某个范围内存在各种电力强度，而所有实相皆存于此范围内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is easy for you to see that seeds bring forth the fruit of the earth, each [of] their own kind. No seed is identical to any other, yet generally speaking there are species that serve to unite them. You do not mistake an orange for a grape. In the same way ideas or thoughts form general patterns, bringing forth in your world certain kinds of events. In this respect your thoughts and feelings "seed" physical reality, bringing forth materializations.
quotes.translation: 你很容易理解种子会结出地上的果实，每种果实各从其类。没有两颗种子完全相同，但大致而言，物种将它们联结在一起。你不会把橙子误认为葡萄。同样地，观念或思想形成一般模式，在你们的世界中引发特定类型的事件。就此而言，你们的思想与情感"播种"了物质实相，促成了具体化。

quotes.text: Ruburt is connected with me in that manner. He is also connected with any ant in the backyard in the same way. Yet I retain my identity, the ant retains its identity, and Ruburt retains his.12 But one could not exist without the other two -- for in greater terms the reality of any one of the three presupposes the existence of the others.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏以那种方式与我相连。他也以同样的方式与后院的任何蚂蚁相连。然而我保有自己的身份，蚂蚁保有其身份，鲁柏也保有其身份。但三者中任何一者都无法脱离其他两者而存在——因为在更广的层面上，三者中任一者的实相都预设了其他两者的存在。

quotes.text: You understand that the radio stars are merely the projection of something else. That is, your scientists with their instruments perceive only the appearance that these structures take when they fall within the physical system. This has nothing to do with the nature of their own reality, for you cannot perceive that in any direct manner.
quotes.translation: 你明白射电星只是某种其他事物的投射。也就是说，你们的科学家用仪器只能感知到这些结构落入物质系统时所呈现的表象。这与它们自身实相的本质毫无关系，因为你无法以任何直接方式感知那种本质。

quotes.text: I am not comparing personality to an orange or an onion, but I want to emphasize that as these things grow from within outward, so does each fragment of the entire self. You observe the outside aspect of objects. Your physical senses permit you to perceive the exterior forms to which you then react, but your physical senses to some extent force you to perceive reality in this manner, and the inside vitality within matter and form is not so apparent.
quotes.translation: 我并非将人格比作橙子或洋葱，但我想强调：正如这些事物由内向外生长，整个自体的每个片段也是如此。你观察物体的外在面向。你们的物质感官允许你感知外在形态并对其作出反应，但你们的物质感官在某种程度上迫使你以这种方式感知实相，而物质与形态内部的生命力则不那么明显。

quotes.text: The core of the self is obviously aware of all realities to some extent. If portions of the self did not coincide then it would be impossible for the whole personality to ever operate as a unit. Here we simply have spirals, so to speak, of ever moving actions that compose the whole self. But portions of these spirals coincide, and in this analogy the spirals of action not only have those dimensions which you understand, but other dimensions with which you are not yet familiar.
quotes.translation: 自体的核心显然在某种程度上知晓所有实相。如果自体的各个部分不重合，那么整个人格就永远无法作为一个整体运作。这里我们只需说，构成整个自体的是一圈圈不断运动的行动螺旋。但这些螺旋的部分区域相互重合，在这个类比中，行动螺旋不仅具有你所理解的维度，还具有你尚未熟悉的其他维度。

quotes.text: He remembered his mother's constant criticism of him, but barely recalls his scandalized disapproval of her swearing, for example, on his return home. He threw himself headlong into the Catholic reality, pursued it with great stubborn diligence, used it as a framework of conventionality in which he could allow his mystic nature to grow.
quotes.translation: 他记得母亲对他不断的批评，却几乎想不起自己回家时对她咒骂的震惊与不赞同。他全身心投入天主教现实，以极大的顽固勤勉追寻它，将其用作一个传统框架，让他的神秘本性得以在其中成长。

quotes.text: A scientist examining nature studies its exterior, observing the outsideness of nature. Even investigative work involving atoms and molecules, or [theoretical2] faster-than-light particles, concerns the particle nature of reality. The scientist does not usually look for nature's heart. He certainly does not pursue the study of its soul.
quotes.translation: 研究自然的科学家观察其外在，审视自然的外部性。即使涉及原子和分子，或[理论上的]超光速粒子的研究工作，也关注现实的粒子本质。科学家通常不寻找自然的核心。他当然不会研究其灵魂。

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1

quotes.text: While still preserving the integrity of physical events as you understand them, [each of] you must alter the focus of your attention to some extent, so that you begin to perceive the connections between your subjective reality at any given time, and those events that you perceive at any given time. You are the initiator of those events.
quotes.translation: 在保持你所理解的物理事件完整性的同时，你们每个人都必须在某种程度上调整注意力的焦点，以便开始感知任何特定时刻你的主观现实与你在任何特定时刻感知的那些事件之间的联系。你是那些事件的发起者。

source_raw.title: (Five weeks ago [in the notes leading off Session 821], I wrote that Jane could resume work on The Further Education of Oversoul Seven -- or Seven Two -- at any time. She finished her first novel about Seven in July 1972, and within a month, long before it was published, she wrote the first five chapters for Seven Two. Then we became involved in so many other projects that she laid it aside until August 1976, when she wrote two more chapters. The book has hovered in the back of her consciousness ever since, waiting until she focused her attention upon it once again. "Seven's got all the time in the world," she laughed more than once. But now that her editor, Tam Mossman, has scheduled a visit to us at the hill house in a couple of weeks [on April 10, to be exact], Jane feels that she wants to study what she's done on Seven Two, go over it with Tam, and perhaps take up work on it again.)

quotes.text: I want to make one note here, that again experience in the use of psychological time will bring you close to an understanding of the value climate of psychological reality, for obvious reasons. Psychological time indeed is a part of this climate as it appears in fairly uncamouflaged form in your own universe. You can get the feel of it.
quotes.translation: 我想在此说明一点，出于显而易见的原因，使用心理时间的经验将再次让你接近对心理现实价值氛围的理解。心理时间确实是这种氛围的一部分，因为它以相当未伪装的形式出现在你自己的宇宙中。你可以感受到它。

quotes.text: The subconscious has great and rather astounding effect in dimensions other than your own, and it sends vivid projections into these other perspectives, that appear there and are in their turn perceived in distorting manner by the outward camouflage senses of those inhabitants. And yet their inner senses give them hints of your reality.
quotes.translation: 潜意识在你自己的维度之外具有巨大且相当惊人的影响，它向这些其他视角发送生动的投射，这些投射出现在那里，并反过来被那些居民的外在伪装感官以扭曲的方式感知。然而，他们的内在感官会给他们关于你的现实的提示。

quotes.text: All events are known in advance, but still there is a selectivity that is unknown. Dreams as you know have their own electric reality, their own psychic energy, and their effect upon physical events is extremely strong. The effect is undiluted, so to speak. The emotional intensity of a dream is very seldom recalled in its full strength.
quotes.translation: 所有事件都预先被知晓，但仍然存在一种未知的选择性。如你所知，梦有其自身的电性现实、自身的灵性能量，它们对物理事件的影响极为强烈。可以说，这种影响是未经稀释的。梦的情感强度很少以其全部力量被回忆起来。

quotes.text: A portrait must contain a searching and a deep statement of the human condition, a reaching out toward the mystery that is another person, whether the person exists in your mind, or physical reality, or both. A portrait must contain a journey into personality, and the technique and the form will then follow naturally and spontaneously.
quotes.translation: 一幅肖像画必须包含对人类处境的深刻探寻与陈述，必须伸向他人存在的奥秘——无论此人存在于你的心智中、物质实相中，或两者兼具。肖像画必须包含一场进入人格的旅程，而技巧与形式将自然而自发地随之而来。

quotes.text: (A one-minute pause at 11:20.) While you were so concerned with protecting what you thought of as the boundaries and integrity of one selfhood, as a race you actually arrived at a point where you were beginning to deny your own greater reality. But all of this is part of the experiment upon which the race embarked in your probability.
quotes.translation: （11:20停顿一分钟）当你们如此执着于保护自认为的个体自我边界与完整性时，作为种族，你们实际上已抵达一个开始否认自身更大实相的关键点。但这一切都是你们种族在你们这个可能性中展开的实验的一部分。

quotes.text: I cannot stress too strongly the fact that any investigation into the nature of the human personality must indeed follow the lines which have been here given. The nature of reality, uncamouflaged, can be glimpsed to some degree as you study the personality in the dream state, where awareness does not operate in an ego-directed manner.
quotes.translation: 我必须再三强调：任何对人类人格本质的探究，都必须遵循此处给出的路径。当你研究梦境状态中的人格时——此时意识不再以自我导向的方式运作——你便能在某种程度上瞥见未经伪装之实相的本质。

quotes.text: As it is these dreams, having an electrical reality, are deposited in coded form, with all other experience, within but independent of the physical cells. Dream experience is as real to the personality as waking experience. Only the ego makes any distinction. Therefore the personality that has survived makes no distinction on its own.
quotes.translation: 这些具有电性实相的梦境，正如其他所有经验一样，以编码形式被储存于肉体细胞之内却又独立于其外。对人格而言，梦境经验与清醒经验同样真实。唯有自我会区分两者。因此，已存续的人格本身并不做此区分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: At the end of the reincarnational cycle, the whole self is far more developed than it was before. It has realized and experienced itself in a dimension of reality unknown to it earlier, and in doing so, has of course increased its being. It is not a matter, then, of a whole self splitting in half, and then simply returning to itself.
quotes.translation: 在轮回周期结束时，整体自性远比之前更为发展。它在一个先前未知的实相维度中认识并体验了自身，并在此过程中自然扩展了其存在。因此，这并非整体自性分裂为二再简单回归自身的问题。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You are not to hammer at yourself consciously. Imagination and emotion are your great allies. Your conscious direction will automatically bring them into play. You can see why it is so important that you examine all of your beliefs about yourself and the nature of your reality; and one belief, if you let it, will lead you to another.
quotes.translation: 你不可刻意苛责自己。想象力与情感是你最伟大的盟友。你的有意识方向会自动将它们调动起来。由此你便能理解，检视所有关于自身及实相本质的信念何其重要——若你允许，一个信念将引领你走向另一个信念。

quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that the word indeed would have no meaning. Psychological frameworks and psychic gestalts form the basis for individual reality regardless of system. All of these do imply a whole, but the very term whole would again be meaningless if the whole, through self conscious individual parts, were not conscious of itself.
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着词语确实毫无意义。无论体系如何，心理框架与心灵完形构成了个体实相的基础。所有这些都暗示着一个整体，但若整体不能通过自觉的个体部分意识到自身，那么"整体"这个术语本身也将毫无意义。

quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now. From your viewpoint in three-dimensional reality it is safe, most advantageous, to journey into other dimensions only when you have a reliable vehicle in which to travel. You cannot leap out of the craft in midstream, so to speak, nor have the craft develop serious difficulties when you are far from shore. This is what happened.
quotes.translation: 现在。从你们三维实相的角度来看，唯有当你们拥有可靠的载具时，进入其他维度才是安全且最有利的旅程。可以说，你们不能在中途跳出飞船，也不能在远离岸边时让飞船出现严重故障。这正是所发生的情况。

quotes.text: Medicine men may do a rain dance. They understand the innate relationship that exists within all portions of nature. You are taught to believe that faith can move mountains, yet many of you will find it extremely difficult to accept your own relationship with the environment. Your beliefs (often as opposed to your desires) cause wars. Your feelings represent the inner reality behind what you think of as purely natural phenomena, such as weather.
quotes.translation: 巫医可能会跳祈雨舞。他们理解自然所有部分之间存在的内在关联。你们被教导相信信念可以移山，然而许多人会发现极难接受自己与环境的关系。你们的信念（往往与欲望相悖）引发了战争。你们的情感代表了你们视为纯粹自然现象（如天气）背后的内在实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You can read the world in a different way, while still maintaining your own identity, or you can move into a different country of yourself that speaks your native language but with a different slant. You do this to some extent or another whenever you tune in to broadcasts to which you usually pay no attention. The news is slightly foreign, while it is still interpreted through the language that you know. You are getting a translation of reality.
quotes.translation: 你们可以在保持自身身份的同时，以不同方式解读世界；或者可以进入自己内在的不同国度，那里说着你们的母语，但带有不同的倾向。每当你们调频到平时不注意的广播时，都会在某种程度上做到这一点。新闻略显陌生，却仍通过你们熟悉的语言被诠释。你们正在获得实相的翻译。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Some discipline is of course needed. But a sense of spontaneity is most important, and indeed a momentary lapse of critical attention. I bring this up now since there is a connection here, if you will excuse a pun, but there is a connection here with the electrical field. You realize now that psychological conditions have their existence within electrical reality, and so certain frames of mind will then be duplicated within the electrical field.
quotes.translation: 当然需要一定的自律。但自发性最为重要，甚至需要片刻批判性注意的松懈。我现在提起这点，是因为这里与电场存在关联——请原谅我的双关语——但这里确实与电场存在关联。你们现在明白心理状态存在于电性实相中，因此某些心境会在电场中被复制。

quotes.text: Remember that reincarnation does not contradict the theory of the spacious present , for such lives within the spacious present are simultaneous. In dreams you journey through inner realities as actually as you walk physically through the matter of the physical world. It is true that the experiences you encounter may not be encountered by another in precisely (underline precisely) the same way, but physical experience is never the same for any two given individuals either.
quotes.translation: 记住，转世并不与广袤当下的理论相矛盾，因为在广袤当下中，这些生命是同时存在的。在梦中，你们穿越内在实相，其真实性如同你们以肉身行走于物质世界。你们所遭遇的经历，他人未必会以完全相同的方式遭遇，但任何两个人的物质体验也从未完全相同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The Hebrews conceived of an overseer god, an angry and just and sometimes cruel god; and many sects denied, then, the idea that other living beings beside man possessed inner spirits. The earlier beliefs represented a far better representation of inner reality, in which man, observing nature, let nature speak and reveal its secrets.
quotes.translation: 希伯来人构想了一位监督之神，一位愤怒、公正、有时甚至残忍的神；于是许多教派否认人类之外的其他生灵拥有内在灵魂。早期信仰反而更真实地反映了内在实相——当人类观察自然时，让自然自行诉说并揭示其奥秘。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (Humorously:) Now, all probabilities are related. Joseph's mother is dead, in your terms, and aware to some extent of the nature of her own reality beyond the physical. She is able, again to some extent, to follow through with her own probable existences. That is, she is conscious of her own being outside of the official framework.4
quotes.translation: （幽默地）现在，所有可能性都相互关联。约瑟夫的母亲在你们的时间概念中已逝，并在某种程度上知晓自身超越物质实相的本质。她同样能在某种程度上追踪自己可能存在的生命轨迹。也就是说，她意识到自身存在已脱离官方框架。

quotes.text: During these years, then, Ruburt's position within his psyche has gradually shifted until he found a new, for him better, firmer point of basis. From this new framework he can more effectively handle different kinds of stimuli, and form these together to construct an understandable model of other realities. I will continue to speak from my own unique viewpoint, but in your terms Ruburt is one of you, and his explorations, taken from your perspective, can be most valuable.
quotes.translation: 在这些年间，鲁柏在其心灵中的位置逐渐转移，直到他找到一个新的、对他而言更稳固的立足点。从这个新框架出发，他能更有效地处理不同类型的刺激，并将这些刺激整合成可理解的其他实相模型。我将继续从自己独特的视角发言，但在你们看来，鲁柏是你们中的一员，他的探索从你们的角度来看极具价值。

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There is much here to be studied about personality. From your viewpoint the information available to you can be practically endless. There is much to be learned about perceiving other realities. Trance states are only a beginning. The self is made of action. Teaching the self to expand is most important, and the ways are nor difficult... this is what makes the experiment interesting. This is not beyond human abilities. The structure of the personality makes this possible.
quotes.translation: 关于人格，这里有许多值得研究之处。从你们的视角看，可获取的信息几乎无穷无尽。感知其他实相的方法值得深入探索。出神状态仅是开端。自我由行动构成。教导自我扩展至关重要，而方法并不困难……这正是实验的趣味所在。这并未超出人类能力范围。人格结构使这成为可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We do not know death in your terms. Our existence takes us into many other environments, and we blend (gesture) into these. We follow what rules of form exist within these environments. All of us here are teachers, and we therefore adapt our methods, also, so that they will make sense to personalities with varying ideas of reality.
quotes.translation: 我们并不知晓你们所说的死亡。我们的存在会进入许多其他环境，并（手势）融入其中。我们遵循这些环境中存在的形式规则。此处的我们皆是教师，因此我们也会调整方法，使其对持有不同实相观念的人格具有意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Birth is perhaps the most forceful aggression, in your terms, of which you are capable in your system of reality (emphatically). In the same way, the growth of any idea into temporal realization is the result of creative aggression. It is impossible to try to erase true aggressiveness. To do so would obliterate life as you know it.
quotes.translation: 在你们的实相系统中，出生或许是你们所能采取的最具攻击性的行为（强调地）。同样，任何理念在时间中的具现化，都是创造性攻击的结果。试图抹除真正的攻击性是不可能的。若如此做，你们所知的生命将不复存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: None of us are ever equipped, for general purposes, to perceive reality in all of its forms. The pyramid gestalts can do this, and we help the pyramid gestalts perform this feat. But as a rule we must pick and choose. There is too much for any consciousness to digest except those so highly developed that even I know little of them.
quotes.translation: 我们之中没有任何人天生具备能力，能够为了普遍目的而感知所有形式的实相。金字塔完形可以做到这一点，而我们协助金字塔完形完成这项壮举。但通常我们必须有所取舍。任何意识能消化的信息都太多了，除非是那些高度发展的意识——连我对它们也所知甚少。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You construct your own camouflage existence as the spider constructs his web, but you are not aware of the threads. You do not understand that they originate within yourself, although it is very simple to smile as the lowly spider weaves its web. The spiders construction is severely limited to one plane, but this is not the case with your constructions, which may have reality on many planes at once, and in ways with which you are not familiar.
quotes.translation: 你构建自己的伪装存在，如同蜘蛛编织它的网，但你并未意识到那些丝线。你不明白它们源于你自身，尽管看着卑微的蜘蛛织网时很容易微笑。蜘蛛的构造严格局限于一个层面，但你的构造并非如此——它们可能同时在多个层面具有实相，并以你不熟悉的方式运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I cannot impress upon you too strongly that imagination is another such basically nonphysical reality, with a basis however, and interrelationship, in both dream and matter. Again, its effects may appear within matter but it is of itself not composed of matter.
quotes.translation: 我再怎么强调也不为过：想象力是另一种本质上非物质的实相，但它与梦境和物质都有基础关联和相互关系。它的影响可能显现在物质中，但其本身并非由物质构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the life of the psyche a dream is no more or less "true," whether or not it is duplicated in waking life. Dream events happen in a different context -- one, you might say, of the imagination. Here you experience a valid reality that exists on its own, so to speak; one in which the psyche's own language is given greater freedom.
quotes.translation: 在心灵的生命中，一个梦无论是否在清醒生活中重现，其"真实性"并无高低之分。梦境事件发生在不同的脉络中——你可以说，那是想象的脉络。在此你体验到一个独立存在的有效实相；在这个实相中，心灵自身的语言获得了更大的自由。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Instead, you are not only reading but writing many such books of living experience, that represent existences. Creativity is endless, and the psyche is the greatest source of creativity. Pretend that you are a writer of fiction, and you create a character. This character is so independent, alive and real, that it in turn forms other characters -- and each writes its own book, or forms its own reality. That is a truer picture of your position.
quotes.translation: 相反，你不仅是在阅读，更是在书写许多本这样的生命经验之书，它们代表着各种存在。创造力是无穷的，而心灵是创造力的最大源泉。假设你是一位小说作家，创造了一个角色。这个角色如此独立、鲜活而真实，以至于它又衍生出其他角色——每个角色都书写自己的书，或形成自己的实相。这才是你处境的更真实写照。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 728
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Perhaps you will see how expectations are indeed translated by the individual into concrete reality. Learning is always possible. If this were not so, you would be much more severely limited. These sessions are certainly speeding up your learning process, and they are in themselves naturally the result of your inner expectations.
quotes.translation: 或许你会明白期待如何被个体转化为具体实相。学习总是可能的。若非如此，你的限制将严苛得多。这些课无疑在加速你的学习过程，而它们本身自然是你内在期待的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There are obviously many kinds of identities. Now in our last session I told you that our imaginary sender "A" does not transmit a given thought. He does not even send an exact duplicate. Action, the very action of transmission, alters the nature, the electrical reality of the thought itself. This is an extremely important point.
quotes.translation: 显然存在多种身份。在上一节中我曾告诉诸位，我们假想的发送者"A"并非传递某个既定的思想，他甚至不会发送精确的副本。行动——传递行为本身——会改变思想的本质及其电性实相。这是极为关键的一点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I spoke in a recent session concerning the connection between distance and emotions. The true reality of distance as you know it is dependent upon the intensity of emotion, and has nothing to do with your idea of space. The emotion which is intense is felt at its peak as present in time, and immediately here in terms of distance.
quotes.translation: 在最近一节中，我谈及距离与情感之间的关联。你们所认知的距离的真实本质，取决于情感的强度，与你们对空间的认知毫无关系。强烈的情感在其巅峰时刻会被感知为当下的存在，就距离而言则表现为即刻的在场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （Tracing of the photographic negative used in the 7th envelope test, in Session 187, September 13,1965.）

quotes.text: While your feeling-tone is uniquely yours, still it is expressed in a certain fashion that is shared by all consciousnesses focused in physical reality. So in those terms you spring from the earth as all the other creatures and natural living structures. You are, while physical, a portion of nature, therefore, not apart from it.
quotes.translation: 虽然你们的情感基调是独一无二的，但它仍以某种特定方式表达，这种表达方式为所有聚焦于物质实相的意识所共享。因此就这些层面而言，你们与其他生物及自然生命结构一样，皆源于大地。当你们处于物质形态时，便是自然的一部分，而非与之分离。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: They were adapted to meet a specific situation in which the inner self found it must operate, and it therefore took unto itself the adoption of these specific constructions. Therefore since dreams are manifestations of inner reality, they cannot be interpreted or investigated with any success through the use of the outer senses.
quotes.translation: 它们被调整以适应内在自我发现必须运作的特定情境，因此内在自我将自身融入这些特定构造之中。既然梦境是内在实相的表现，那么通过外在感官对其进行解读或探究，都无法获得成功。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The paintings already exist however as definite potential forms, already created by your whole self. Only you can give them physical reality however. You can only fail in not giving them physical form, and you can only fail to give them physical form by refusing to open up your inner channels to the intuitions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 然而，这些画作早已作为明确的潜在形式存在，由你们的整体自我所创造。但只有你们能赋予它们物质实相。你们唯一可能失败之处，在于未能赋予它们物质形态；而你们之所以无法赋予其物质形态，唯一的原因便是拒绝向整体自我的直觉敞开内在通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: We have seen that all experience is retained in electrically coded data within the cells, and that the material of the cells forms about this coded experience. We have seen that the ego begins, sparked into being, by the inner self, greatly influenced by heredity and physical environment; and that this ego as it continues to exist gradually builds up an electrical reality of its own, as its experiences form into coded data within the cells.
quotes.translation: 我们已经看到，所有经验都以电性编码数据的形式保留在细胞中，而细胞的物质结构正是围绕这种编码经验形成的。我们也看到，自我由内在自我激发而生，深受遗传与物质环境的影响；随着自我持续存在，它逐渐构建起自身的电性实相，因为其经验在细胞中形成了编码数据。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Gradually psychological structures are able to focus upon vaster areas, and in order to achieve proficiency in this manner you do indeed begin to build up layered selves that have been independent identities. These varying perceptive abilities organize so that their perceptive powers are pooled in a gestalt that eventually forms a new identity, a more complicated psychological structure that is capable of perceiving larger areas of reality.
quotes.translation: 逐渐地，心理结构能够聚焦于更广阔的领域，为了以这种方式达到熟练，你们确实开始构建出曾经是独立身份的分层自我。这些不同的感知能力被组织起来，使它们的感知力量汇聚成一个完形，最终形成一个新的身份，一个更复杂的心理结构，能够感知更大范围的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The durability is achieved because of constant expansion in terms of value fulfillment. Your camouflage physical universe does, necessarily, lead you to suppose that time exists in terms of past, present and future, simply because the idea or energy constructed into physical reality therefore operates under physical properties.
quotes.translation: 这种持久性是通过价值实现方面的持续扩展而达成的。你们的伪装物质宇宙必然会引导你们认为时间以过去、现在和未来的形式存在，仅仅因为被构建成物质实相的理念或能量因此必须在物质属性下运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It senses realities usually closed to it. It thinks, "There is more, but beyond I cannot follow." Here with this realization the inner ego may suddenly open. Intuitive springs rush to the surface, and because the outer ego has already been alerted, it is able to accept these realities while still performing its ordinary duties.
quotes.translation: 它感知到通常对它封闭的实相。它想："还有更多，但超出我的能力范围，我无法追随。" 在此领悟中，内我可能突然开启。直觉的泉源涌向表面，因为外我已经被唤醒，它能够在履行日常职责的同时接受这些实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In a very literal manner then you are the knowledge that you have. The interchange is constant. Now. Initially and basically perception is not dependent upon your senses. Any perception is first of all a psychic one that is then translated in ways meaningful to the physical organism. To other organisms in different realities perception would therefore be translated in an entirely different manner.
quotes.translation: 因此，非常具体地说，你们就是你们所拥有的知识。这种交流是持续的。现在。最初和基本上，感知并不依赖于你们的感官。任何感知首先是一种心灵感知，然后以对物质有机体有意义的方式被转译。对于不同实相中的其他有机体，感知因此会以完全不同的方式被转译。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You do have access to the inner self, therefore. You are hardly cut off from your own soul or entity. The ego prefers to consider itself the captain at the helm, so to speak, since it is the ego who most directly deals with the sometimes tumultuous seas of physical reality, and it does not want to be distracted from this task.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们确实能够接触到内我。你们与自己的灵魂或存有并非隔绝。可以说，自我更喜欢将自己视为掌舵的船长，因为正是自我最直接地处理有时波涛汹涌的物质实相之海，它不想从这项任务中分心。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In greater terms, seconds and moments do not exist, either, but the reality that is behind time or that you perceive as time, the "outside time" events, are composed of units that also have their own kind of consciousness. They form what appears as time to you, as atoms and molecules form what appears as space to you. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 从更广的角度看，秒和瞬间也不存在，但时间背后的实相，或你们视为时间的实相，那些"时间之外"的事件，是由也拥有自己那种意识的单位组成的。它们形成了在你们看来是时间的东西，就像原子和分子形成了在你们看来是空间的东西一样。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: None of this is predetermined. An offshoot probable self might leave your reality at age 13, say, but could intersect with you again at age 30 for a variety of reasons -- where to you, you suddenly change a profession, or become aware of a talent you thought you had forgotten, and find yourself developing it with amazing ease.
quotes.translation: 这一切都非预先注定。一个分支的可能自我可能在13岁时离开你的实相，但基于各种原因，可能在30岁时再次与你交汇——对你而言，你会突然改变职业，或意识到自己以为早已遗忘的才能，并发现自己以惊人的轻松将其发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: To me your world is a dream universe which I visit by invitation, a probable reality that I find unique and very dear -- but one in which I can no longer have direct experience. Because I am not as immersed in it as you, I can tell you much about it, since your precise orientation necessitates a more narrow, concentrated view.
quotes.translation: 对我而言，你的世界是一个我受邀造访的梦境宇宙，一个我发现独特且珍视的可能实相——但我已无法在其中获得直接体验。正因我不像你那般沉浸其中，我能告诉你许多关于它的事，因为你精确的定位需要更狭窄集中的视角。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He may, for example, continue within it for several reincarnations. Reincarnated selves are no more than probable selves, choosing to experience various forms. In such circumstances, the personality does not leave your system, in your terms, for some time, though this is all subjective. Experience is the only reality, you see.
quotes.translation: 例如，他可能在其中经历数次转世。转世的自我不过是选择体验各种形态的可能自我。在这种情况下，用你们的话说，人格在相当一段时间内不会离开你们的系统——尽管这一切都是主观的。你看，体验才是唯一的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: If that view is expansive, then you have far greater leeway in creating your experience. You can add greater depth, so to speak, to the characterization. You can, in other words, take advantage of the unknown reality by letting it add to your home station.
quotes.translation: 若那视野足够开阔，你在创造体验时便有更大余地。可以说，你能为角色刻画增添更深层次。换言之，你能让未知实相为你的本位站增色，从而善加利用它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 723
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: These sessions represent what you might call previews of eternity, in that you are to some extent receptors of thought that is not hampered by time, and of a companionship that has not ceased with the stirring of the centuries, and with a valid emotional relationship that has escaped the camouflage aspect of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这些课代表你们所谓的永恒预览——因为你们在某种程度上是未受时间阻碍的思想接收者，是未随世纪流转而消逝的陪伴的接收者，并拥有着已逃脱物质实相伪装的有效情感关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The ego does want to understand and interpret physical reality, and to relate to it. It wants to help you survive within physical existence, but by putting blinders upon it, you hamper its perception and native flexibility. Then because it is inflexible you say that this is the natural function and characteristic of the ego.
quotes.translation: 自我确实想要理解并诠释物质实相，与之建立关联。它想要帮助你在物质存在中存活，但若给它戴上眼罩，你便阻碍了它的感知与天生灵活性。正因它变得僵化，你便说这是自我的自然功能与特性。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your family life in this reality, your parents acted opaquely to each other. There were strong energy shifts, so that the personalities did not meet directly. Give us a moment ... Some of this is difficult to explain. In a way they were unfocused, yet each with strong abilities, but dispersed. There was a reason for this.
quotes.translation: 在你们这个实相的家庭生活中，你们的父母对彼此表现得不够透明。有强烈的能量转移，因此人格并未直接相遇。请稍等片刻……这部分有些难以解释。在某种程度上，他们不够专注，但各自拥有强大的能力，却分散了。这背后是有原因的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The entire act has its own electromagnetic reality, and the event is actually electromagnetic motion. The movement within the atoms mentioned earlier therefore is a part, basically, of the entire perceived event. Does this make the issue plainer for you?
quotes.translation: 整个行为有其自身的电磁实相，事件本质上是电磁运动。因此，之前提到的原子内的运动，基本上是整个感知事件的一部分。这能让问题对你更清晰吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: As mentioned, there is the same kind of connection between that personality and myself as the one that exists between Ruburt and myself. But in your terms, Seth Two is far further divorced from my reality than I am from Ruburt's. You can imagine Seth Two as a future portion of me if you prefer, and yet far more is involved.
quotes.translation: 如前所述，那个人格与我之间的联系，与鲁柏和我之间的联系是同一类型。但在你们的说法中，赛斯二与我实相的距离，远比我与鲁柏的实相距离更远。如果你愿意，可以把赛斯二想象成我未来的一个部分，但其中涉及的内容远不止于此。

quotes.text: I am not cautious, I am simply realistic. When you understand the nature of reality, then you realize that predictions of future events are basically meaningless. You can predict some events and they can occur, but you create the future in every moment.
quotes.translation: 我不是谨慎，我只是现实。当你了解实相的本质时，你就会意识到对未来事件的预测基本上毫无意义。你可以预测某些事件，它们也可能发生，但你在每个当下创造着未来。

quotes.text: The projected form does make some impression upon your physical system. In other words, it is possible for it to be detected. It is a kind of pseudo image, materialistically speaking, but it has definite electromagnetic reality, and chemical properties.
quotes.translation: 投射的形态确实会对你们的物质系统产生一些影响。换句话说，它有可能被探测到。从物质主义的角度来说，它是一种伪影像，但具有明确的电磁实相和化学属性。

quotes.text: If it were scientifically inclined, the body would know that such spontaneous performance was impossible, for science cannot explain the reality of life itself in its present form, much less its origins. Consciousness within the body knows that its existence is within the body's context, and apart from it at the same time.
quotes.translation: 如果身体具有科学倾向，它会知道这种自发表现是不可能的，因为科学无法解释生命本身在现有形态下的实相，更不用说其起源了。身体内的意识知道自己的存在既在身体的脉络中，又同时独立于它。

quotes.text: In such cases however definite atoms and molecules are utilized. Now. quotes.translation: 就其态度与状态而言，它实际上是一种最可靠的衡量标准，因为如果它变得过度关切，这种关切源于对其自身存续的恐惧。而它的存续显然是物理场域内存在形式的必要条件，如果它要有效处理伪装实相的话。

quotes.text: I told you (after 10:26 in this session) that you presently perceive only the surface of the moment; so you also perceive but one line of the species' development. Yet even within your system, there are hints of the other probable realities that also coexist. The dolphins are a case in point.9 In your line of probability they are oddities, yet even now you recognize their great brain capacity, and to some dim extent glimpse the range of their own communication.
quotes.translation: 我告诉过你（在本节课10:26之后），你目前只感知到当下的表面；同样地，你也只感知到物种发展的一条线索。然而，即便在你的系统内，也存在着其他共存可能实相的暗示。海豚就是一个例证。在你的可能性线索中，它们是异类，但即便现在你也认识到它们巨大的脑容量，并在某种程度上隐约窥见它们自身沟通的范围。

quotes.text: You may begin to perceive all physical data through the eyes of that core belief alone. You will not look out upon physical reality with the wonder of a child any more, or with the unstructured curiosity of an individual, but always through parental eyes. Thus you will close yourself off from much of physical experience.
quotes.translation: 你可能开始仅透过那个核心信念的眼睛来感知所有物理资料。你将不再以孩童的惊奇或个体未经结构的求知欲来审视物理实相，而总是透过父母的眼睛。因此，你将把自己与大部分物理体验隔绝开来。

quotes.text: It is erroneous to say that they did not develop, or that their progress was stunted, for it was not. Their reality explored the ramifications of animalhood in a completely different fashion. Their development paralleled man's in many respects, in that they lived simultaneously upon the earth, and shared the environment.
quotes.translation: 说它们没有发展或发展受阻是错误的，事实并非如此。它们的实相以完全不同的方式探索了动物性的分支。它们的发展在许多方面与人类平行，因为它们同时生活在地球上，共享环境。

quotes.text: When I spoke of exercises, I meant exercises; but the purpose of the exercise is to enable you to understand others. This is not an exercise for you specifically, for you to use specifically for your own reasons; it must also wholeheartedly involve other people. You are not to use them as exercises; you are to exercise your own abilities so that you can perceive them clearly; for you do not understand their reality unless you do so.
quotes.translation: 当我谈到练习时，我指的是练习；但练习的目的是让你能够理解他人。这不是专门为你设计的练习，让你出于自己的理由而使用；它也必须全心全意地涉及其他人。你不应该把它们当作练习来使用；你要锻炼自己的能力，以便清晰地感知他们；因为除非你这样做，否则你不会理解他们的实相。

quotes.translation: 这是意识心的一种分裂。它并非源自内在自体。当奥古斯都二世接管时，他完全清醒。他只是通过一套坚定不移的信念系统来审视物质实相。传送给身体的讯息毫无矛盾之处。身体处于极佳的控制之下。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You wanted something that your work provides, but in a different fashion. Do not mistake me here. This is a general statement, subject to some specific alterations. However, generally speaking, those completely focused in physical reality will look for their prime fulfillment within it. They will also have children.
quotes.translation: 你想要你的工作能提供的东西，但方式不同。请别误解我。这是一个一般性陈述，需根据具体情况稍作调整。然而，一般来说，完全专注于物质实相的人会在此中寻求首要的满足。他们也会生儿育女。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: We will maintain some sort of sensible consecutive nature here in the material, though the separation is of course arbitrary. Give us a moment. (Pause.) We will also be developing the God concept in terms of my choosing (amused), the pyramid consciousness gestalts of which I have spoken in the past. This will be given along with and as a part of the basic characteristics of reality, as divorced from camouflage materializations.
quotes.translation: 我们将在此材料中保持某种合理的连贯性，尽管这种划分当然是人为的。请稍等片刻。（停顿。）我们还将以我选择的方式（带着笑意）发展神的概念，即我过去提到过的金字塔意识完形。这将作为实相基本特性的一部分来阐述，与伪装物质化相分离。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You can learn to change your physical environment, therefore, by learning to change and manipulate your dream environment. You can also suggest specific dreams in which a desired change is seen, and under certain conditions these will then appear in your physical reality. Now often you do this without realizing it.
quotes.translation: 因此，你可以通过学会改变和操控你的梦境环境，来学习改变你的物质环境。你也可以建议特定的梦境，在其中看到期望的改变，在某些条件下，这些改变随后会出现在你的物质实相中。现在，你常常在不知不觉中这样做。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Within you is the ability to change your ideas about reality and about yourself, to create a personal living experience that is fulfilling to yourself and others. I would like you to write down your beliefs about yourself as you become aware of them. Later you can use this list in a way that you do not now suspect.
quotes.translation: 你内在拥有改变对实相和对自己看法的能力，能够创造一种对你自己和他人都有益的个人生活体验。我希望你在意识到自己的信念时，将它们写下来。稍后，你可以用一种你现在还猜想不到的方式来使用这份清单。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I mentioned earlier the connection between excess chemicals and the dream field. Now. Before we take a break, let me tell you that hormones within the physical body have not only a chemical but an electric, rather electromagnetic, basis and reality, and that these also are connectors with other fields of existence.
quotes.translation: 我之前提到过过剩化学物质与梦境场域之间的关联。现在。在我们休息之前，让我告诉你，物质身体内的荷尔蒙不仅具有化学基础，还具有电的、更确切地说是电磁的基础和实相，并且它们也是与其他存在场域连接的桥梁。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Yet the inner self offers so many answers, for the inner self is a portion of each individual; and yet it operates outside of physical systems of reference. It is of itself free of all distorted effects peculiar to the physical system. The study of dreams--your scientists consider such work beneath them. Why has no one suspected that dream locations, for example, have not only a psychological reality, but a definite actuality?
quotes.translation: 然而内在自我提供了如此多的答案，因为内在自我是每个个体的一部分；但它却在物质参考系之外运作。它本身不受物质系统特有的扭曲效应影响。对梦境的研究——你们的科学家认为这类工作有失身份。为何无人怀疑梦境场景不仅具有心理实相，更具备明确的真实性？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are seeing shadows upon a blank and a black screen. The three-dimensional system is like a shadow of realities that you do not perceive. Now. (Pause.) The heavy hydrogen molecules had a large part to play in the birth of that system. Consciousness had first to create thevoid, or the dimension in which the system could exist, and also to endow thatvoid with all the probabilities for development that have come about in your time, and are to come about.
quotes.translation: 你们所见的是空白黑幕上的投影。三维系统如同你们未能感知的实相之影。现在。（停顿。）重氢分子在该系统诞生中扮演了重要角色。意识必须先创造虚空，或该系统得以存在的维度，同时赋予该虚空所有发展的可能性——这些可能性已在你们时代实现，并将继续展开。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: They will teach you to find your own sensations of yourself, as divorced from the official context of reality, in which you usually perceive your being Additionally, you will be better able to deal with current events, for your exercised imagination will bring information to you that will be increasingly valuable.
quotes.translation: 它们将教导你们脱离通常感知存在的官方实相语境，去发现对自身的真实感知。此外，你们将能更妥善处理当下事件，因为经过锻炼的想象力会带来日益珍贵的信息。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is not just that such an inner universe is different from your own, but that any real or practical explanation of its reality would require the birth of an entirely new physics--and such a development would first of all necessitate the birth of an entirely new philosophy. The physics cannot come first, you see.
quotes.translation: 不仅因为这样的内在宇宙与你们的不同，更因为对其实相的任何真实或实用解释，都需要诞生全新的物理学——而这种发展首先需要诞生全新的哲学。你们明白，物理学不能先行。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Mankind is to some intimate degree acquainted with this attempt of action to recreate itself, for human reproduction is here a case in point, each individual attempting to create a replica, the attempt doomed to failure, but the attempt itself resulting in a distortion of the original action; that is, a distortion of the original individuals, and in the creation of a new reality, this process then being repeated indefinitely.
quotes.translation: 人类在某种亲密程度上熟悉这种行动自我再造的尝试，人类繁衍正是典型案例：每个个体试图创造复制品，这种尝试注定失败，但尝试本身导致原初行动的扭曲——即原初个体的扭曲，并在创造新实相的过程中无限重复此进程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Studies of space and distance as they are experienced in dreams will be helpful, and our material will indeed deal with such discussions. For investigation into the nature of space and time as they are experienced within the dream framework, will tell you more about the real nature of space and time then you can ever learn through studying their distorted appearances within physical reality. This will be most important to us.
quotes.translation: 对梦境中体验的空间与距离的研究将有所助益，我们的资料确实会涉及此类讨论。因为探究梦境框架内体验的时空本质，比研究它们在物质实相中的扭曲表象，更能揭示时空的真实本质。这对我们至关重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When I come here to speak I focus my energy, but not toward this room as a destination, for in your terms this room does not exist to me. In your terms, this room does not even exist to you. You pretend to agree that it does; we meet in no place of space or time. The true meetings that take place here have nothing to do with the room or the people that you think you are. You know that you hallucinate the room, that you are as much in trance here as you ever are when you are in psychological time. I simply want you to realize that if this life is a trance, then you can turn the direction of your consciousness to perceive greater realities that presently exist. You can be aware of your own greater identity, even as I am. You sit within the miracle of yourselves and ask for signs. It is your inner eyes I would open.
quotes.translation: 当我前来此处说话时，我聚焦我的能量，但并非以这个房间为目的——因为以你们的说法，这个房间对我而言并不存在。以你们的说法，这个房间甚至对你们也不存在。你们假装同意它存在；我们在无空间无时间之处相遇。此处发生的真实会面与这个房间或你们自以为是的身份毫无关联。你们明白自己正在幻觉这个房间，你们在此处陷入的恍惚状态，与你们处于心理时间时毫无二致。我只想让你们意识到：若此生是一场恍惚，那么你们便能扭转意识方向，去感知当下存在的更广大实相。你们能如我一般，觉察到自身更伟大的身份。你们端坐于自身的奇迹之中，却向外寻求征兆。我要开启的是你们的内在之眼。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So-called objective science gives you a picture, a model, that has served well enough in its own fashion, enabling you to travel to the moon, for example, and to advance in a technology that for a time you set your hearts upon. In the framework of objective science as it now exists, however, even the technology will come up against a stone wall. Even as a means, objective science is only helpful for a while, because it will constantly run up against deeper inner realities that are necessarily shunted aside and ignored simply because of its method and attitude.2 No objective science or splendid technology alone will keep even one man or woman alive, for example, if that individual has decided to leave the flesh, or finds no joy in daily life.
quotes.translation: 所谓客观科学提供的图像与模型，在其自身方式上已足够有用——例如使你们得以登月，并在你们一度全心投入的技术领域取得进步。然而在现有客观科学的框架内，即便是技术也将撞上南墙。即便作为工具，客观科学也只能暂时有用，因为它会不断撞见更深的内在实相——这些实相因其方法与态度必然被搁置与忽略。举例而言，没有任何客观科学或卓越技术能单独维系任何人的生命，若此人已决定离开肉身，或在日常生活中找不到喜悦。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 702
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The Roman soldier dreams of the black woman, and of Joseph. There is a reminiscence that appears even in the knowledge of the cells, and a certain correspondence.14 There are connections then as far as cellular recollection is concerned, and dreams. Now the Roman soldier and Nebene and the woman went their separate ways after death, colon: They contributed to the world as it existed, in those terms, and then followed their own lines of development, elsewhere, in other realities. So each of you exists in many times and places, and versions of yourselves exist in the world and time that you recognize. As you are part of a physical species, so you are a part of a species of consciousness. That species forms the races of mankind that you recognize.
quotes.translation: 罗马士兵梦见黑女人与约瑟夫。甚至在细胞知识中也浮现出某种记忆，以及某种对应关系。就细胞记忆与梦境而言，存在着关联。罗马士兵、内贝内与那女人死后各奔东西：他们以那些术语所定义的方式贡献于当时存在的世界，随后遵循各自的发展路线，在别处、在其他实相中继续前行。因此，你们每个人都存在于许多时空之中，而你们所认知的世界与时间里存在着你们的多个版本。正如你们是物质物种的一部分，你们也是意识物种的一部分。这个物种形成了你们所认知的人类种族。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It also "stamps" or "impresses" the universe with its own imprint. No portion of the universe is inactive or passive, regardless of its seeming organization or its seeming lack of organization. Each consciousness, then, impresses the universe in its own fashion. Its very existence sets up a kind of significance, in whose light the rest of the universe will be interpreted. The universe knows itself through such significances. Each consciousness is endowed with creativity of a multidimensional nature, so that it will seek to create as many possible realities for itself as it can, using its own significance as a focus to draw into its experience whatever events are possible for it from the universe itself. It will then attract events from the universe, even as its own existence imprints the universe as an event with the indelible stamp of its own nature.
quotes.translation: 它同时以自身印记"烙印"或"铭刻"宇宙。宇宙中没有部分是不活跃或被动的，无论其看似有组织或看似无组织。每个意识都以自身方式铭刻宇宙。其存在本身便建立起某种意义，宇宙的其余部分将在此意义之光中被诠释。宇宙通过这样的意义认识自身。每个意识都被赋予多维本质的创造力，因此它会寻求为自己创造尽可能多的可能实相，以自身意义为焦点，从宇宙中汲取其经验范围内可能发生的任何事件。它随后会吸引宇宙中的事件，正如其自身存在作为事件，以自身本质的不可磨灭印记铭刻宇宙。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时应用安全阀，并在外在自我警觉之前便意识到危险。内在自我关注维持整个自我的基础与平衡——这极为重要——并且对来自整体存有的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并觉察到外在自我因其专门化而无法承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应在某种程度上代表仍居于潜意识中的次主导人格。当外在自我狭隘且未能充分代表这些次主导人格时，它们便会揭竿而起；当条件有利时，它们会试图通过主导自我的短暂弱点来表达自己。但即便不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These dreams go unrecognized by the conscious ego; but they do not go unrecorded by the inner self, and they therefore exist, and they form electromagnetic channels of their own to which--make that by which--the physical body itself is affected. The physical organism is constantly changed by all stimuli, whether or not the ego is aware of the stimuli. And it is affected by stimuli, whether or not science realizes that the particular stimuli even exists. Therefore, the physical organism reacts to this continuous unconscious Mental activity in the form of continuing dream experiences, whether or not the individual is awake or asleep. All of these realities go into the formation of the personality, and unless they are all understood the personality itself will remain a mystery.
quotes.translation: 这些梦境未被意识自我认知；但它们未被内在自我遗漏记录，因此它们确实存在，并形成自身的电磁通道——通过这些通道，物质身体本身受到影响。无论自我是否意识到刺激，有机体都不断被所有刺激改变。无论科学是否意识到特定刺激的存在，有机体都受其影响。因此，无论个体是清醒还是睡眠，物质有机体都会以持续梦境体验的形式，对这种连续的无意识心智活动做出反应。所有这些实相都参与人格的形成，除非它们全部被理解，否则人格本身将始终是个谜。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Those in your system are relatively impatient, have decided to work with large amounts of energy. Your physical system itself rapidly responds and mirrors the use of this energy. Results are seen quickly. Large groupings and regroupings occur within the mass psyche, huge waves of energy as the race makes important decisions. All of this is done on an unconscious basis, but as a teaching method the results must be seen physically. Because you respond as physical creatures you respond best of all to tangible physical results. You do not know how far you can go in any given waves of activity until you see it objectified, or nearly so. If you knew how to handle energy effectively, if you fully realized that your thoughts were the motivating factor, were the realities, then you would not need a physical existence, for that is the reason for the physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们系统中的个体相对缺乏耐心，决定运用大量能量。你们的物质系统本身会迅速响应并映照这种能量的运用，结果很快显现。当种族做出重要决定时，集体潜意识内会发生大规模的重组与再重组，形成巨大的能量浪潮。这一切都在无意识层面进行，但作为教学方法，其结果必须通过物质形式显现。由于你们以物质生物的身份回应，你们对具体可见的物质结果反应最佳。你们在特定活动浪潮中能走多远，只有看到它被具象化或近乎具象化时才会知晓。若你们懂得如何有效运用能量，若你们完全意识到思想才是驱动因素、才是实相，你们便无需物质存在——因为物质环境存在的意义正在于此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The beliefs whose energy generated this "alternate self image" then appeared in the daylight, acting out their natural results in physical reality. Augustus One, now in manhood, was forced to perceive the nature of these beliefs to some extent, yet when he was here visiting Ruburt he still would not examine them.
quotes.translation: 那些产生"替代自我形象"的信念能量随后在白昼显现，在物质实相中演绎其自然结果。已步入成年的奥古斯都一号被迫在一定程度上觉察这些信念的本质，然而当他来此拜访鲁柏时，仍拒绝检视它们。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In your theory of time however you believe yourselves bound to the road, do not realize that you have made it, and are unable to perceive other realities. You have chosen to do this however. Since you are learning and can only handle so many perceptions, you have forgotten that you have created the road. Multidimensional personalities do not need to forget. They are also aware of different such devices formed by others. (One minute pause; eyes closed.)
quotes.translation: 但在你们的时间理论中，你们自认被束缚于这条道路，既未意识到是自己铺就了它，也无法感知其他实相。不过这是你们自己的选择。由于你们正在学习且只能处理有限感知，你们遗忘了自己才是道路的创造者。多维人格无需遗忘，他们同样知晓他人构建的其他此类装置。（停顿一分钟；闭目）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: So do you, viewing the seeming chaos of dream reality, wonder how I can say that similarity here occurs, and cohesiveness and actuality and comparative permanence. The dream means something to the individual who originates it, selects its elements most carefully, but in order for him to use it he must create it.
quotes.translation: 因此当你们审视梦境实相表面的混沌时，是否疑惑我为何声称此处存在相似性、凝聚性、真实性与相对恒常性？梦境对创造它的个体具有意义，其元素经过最审慎的筛选，但个体若要运用梦境，必须先创造它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Time, physical matter, these are but portions of action as perceived in one particular fashion. The basic stuff, or the basic action of the universe, is one. It is perceived differently, and therefore reality constantly wears a different face. It is speeded up or slowed down according to the scope of perception.
quotes.translation: 时间、物质——这些仅是行动以特定方式被感知的片段。宇宙的基本材料或基本行动是同一的。它被以不同方式感知，因此实相始终呈现不同面貌。根据感知范围的差异，它或被加速，或被减缓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This can work, and should work, to your advantage. However when there is a distortion, as when an ulcer is created, then we begin what can indeed be a vicious circle, for the idea and the reality of the ulcer is then accepted as part of the self-image. And as such it is then more or less automatically recreated.
quotes.translation: 这可以且应当对你们有利。然而当扭曲产生时——例如溃疡的形成——我们便开启了真正的恶性循环：溃疡的观念与实相随后被接纳为自我形象的一部分，并因此或多或少地被自动再创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In other words the ego is not familiar with the probable self, but certain portions of the subconscious are. For the subconscious, like the probable self, is aware of its existence in the inverted time system. The subconscious is aware of many realities which are not accepted by the ego as actual physical events, and it reacts to many stimuli of which the ego is completely unaware.
quotes.translation: 换言之，自我并不熟悉可能的自己，但潜意识的某些部分却熟悉它。因为潜意识与可能的自己一样，意识到自己在倒转时间系统中的存在。潜意识意识到许多不被自我视为实际物理事件的实相，并对许多自我完全不知的刺激做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is very difficult for them to understand your ideas of past, present and future. Now give us a moment. (No real pause.) In other dimensions, or if you prefer at other stages of development, the multidimensional personality is aware of its primary identity, and is also aware simultaneously of personality offshoots that it has sent into many realities, into probable systems, as it pursues all of the probable acts and creations inherent in its nature.
quotes.translation: 他们很难理解你们对过去、现在和未来的概念。现在请给我们一点时间。（没有真正的停顿。）在其它维度，或者如果你更喜欢说在其它发展阶段，多维人格意识到自己的主要身份，同时也意识到它送入许多实相、送入可能系统的分支人格，因为它追求其本性中固有的所有可能行为和创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: The original source of the Speaker data is the inner knowledge of the nature of reality that is within each individual. The Speakers are to keep the information alive in physical terms, to see that men do not bury it within and dam it up, to bring it -- the information -- to the attention of the conscious self.
quotes.translation: 说话者资料的原始来源是每个人内在对实相本质的内在知识。说话者要以物质术语保持信息的活力，确保人们不将其埋藏于内并堵塞它，将信息带到意识自我的注意中。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: New paragraph. (Very quietly): Once you understand the symbolic nature of physical reality, then you will no longer feel entrapped by it. You have formed the symbols, and therefore you can change them. You must learn, of course, what the various symbols mean in your own life, and how to translate their meaning.
quotes.translation: 新段落。（非常轻声地）：一旦你理解物质实相的象征性本质，你就不会再感到被它困住。你创造了这些象征，因此你可以改变它们。当然，你必须学会各种象征在你生活中的含义，以及如何翻译它们的意义。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Again, this is not symbolic. Only by the use of the inner senses can you obtain a viewpoint that is to some extent free of your own system. The inner self realizes the nature of its own reality, is sure of its identity and well aware of its power in the creation of actions which it projects outward from itself.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，这并非象征性的。只有通过使用内在感官，你才能获得某种程度脱离自身系统的视角。内在自我认识到自身实相的本质，确信自己的身份，并清楚知道自己在创造从自身向外投射的行动中的力量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: All of these issues bear on Ruburt's idea of a job. His money potential will be strengthened if these matters are highly considered. It is not a question of fearing to face reality financially. There is an effective and efficient way for him to do so, and he has been too frightened and panic-stricken to try it.
quotes.translation: 所有这些议题都与鲁柏的工作观念有关。如果这些事项得到高度重视，他的金钱潜力将会增强。这不是害怕面对财务实相的问题。他有一种有效且高效的方式可以做到这一点，但他一直过于恐惧和惊慌而不敢尝试。

quotes.text: In one way you are the steps leading up to yourself, or the spirals leading in to yourself. The painting spirals outward from your inner reality, and it brings forth energy and previous connections and interpretations. You form these anew, however, adding to them the knowledge and vitality of your present self.
quotes.translation: 从某个角度来说，你就是通往你自己的阶梯，或是通往你自己的螺旋。画作从你的内在实相向外螺旋延伸，带出能量、先前的连结与诠释。然而，你重新塑造它们，将你当下自我的知识与活力注入其中。

quotes.text: You will be able to perceive physical reality because you want to, knowing it to be one of many realities. You will not be forced to perceive it alone, out of ignorance.
quotes.translation: 你将能够感知物质实相，因为你想这么做，并知晓它只是众多实相之一。你不会因为无知而被迫只能感知这一种实相。

quotes.text: The thoughts may rather faithfully, though never completely, translate such data, or they may considerably distort it. Behind thoughts are images, which are more basic but still physically oriented. Because they are more basic, they have a stronger effect. They are more Emotionally charged, more concise than thoughts, and they are directly connected with the mechanics involved in translating inner data to physical reality.
quotes.translation: 思想或许能相当忠实地——尽管永远无法完全——转译这类资料，也可能大幅扭曲它。思想背后是意象，这些意象更基础，但仍以物质为导向。因为它们更基础，所以效果更强。它们比思想更具情感能量、更简洁，并且直接与将内在资料转译为物质实相的机制相连。

quotes.text: "And so there may be others now (like Seth), also without images, but knowing -- others who have been what we are and more -- others who remember what we have forgotten. They may have discovered through some acceleration of consciousness other forms of being, or dimensions of reality of which we are also part.
quotes.translation: "因此，现在可能还有其他人（比如赛斯），同样没有意象，却了悟——那些曾是我们所是、甚至超越我们的存在——那些记得我们所遗忘之事的存在。他们或许通过某种意识的加速，发现了其他存在形式，或我们也是其中一部分的实相维度。

source_raw.title: Seth began dictating the book in our next Session 511, January 21, 1970, and finished it in Session 591, August 11, 1971. The intervening sessions did not all involve book dictation, however. Some were devoted to personal matters, some given for specific people who needed help, and some were in answer to philosophical questions not connected with the book. I also took several "little vacations." Despite such layoffs, Seth always picked right up, precisely where he left off dictation.

quotes.text: When you let your attention waver, however, you may often fall into a state in which you momentarily perceive glimpses of another alternate present. The whole self, the soul, knows of its reality in all such systems, and you, as a part of it, are working toward the same state of self-awareness and development.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你让注意力游移时，你常会落入一种状态，瞬间瞥见另一个替代性当下的片段。整体自己、灵魂，知晓它在所有这类系统中的实相，而你作为它的一部分，正朝着相同的自我觉知与发展状态迈进。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: You cannot find your psyche by thinking of it as a separate thing, like a fine jewel in an eternal closet. You can only experience its strength and vitality by exploring the subjective reality that is your own, for it will lead you unerringly to that greater source of being that transcends both space and time.
quotes.translation: 你无法将心灵视为一个独立的东西来寻找它，就像永恒橱柜里的一颗精美宝石。你只能通过探索属于你自己的主观实相来体验它的力量与活力，因为它将无误地引领你走向那超越时空的更大存在之源。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: Everything becomes plain. Such and such happened to me at the age of five or six, and ever after have I acted thus and so. So it is with Ruburt's eyes. The panic reaction, which is true, the fear of seeing reality as it was when he was a child; but this indeed is only a symptom of a symptom, and not an origin.
quotes.translation: 一切变得清晰明了。我在五六岁时经历了这样那样的事，此后便一直如此行事。鲁柏的眼睛也是如此。恐慌反应是真实的——那是他童年时对看见实相本来面目的恐惧；但这确实只是症状的症状，而非根源。

quotes.text: Either way the ideas of reality are reinforced both consciously and unconsciously, not only within the family but among all those with whom the family comes in contact.
quotes.translation: 无论如何，关于实相的观念都在意识与无意识层面被强化，不仅限于家庭内部，更延伸至所有与这个家庭接触的人之间。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are organizations of consciousness, however, that leapfrog the species, that produce no arts or sciences per se -- yet these together form the living body of the earth and the physical creatures thereon. Their products are the seas upon which you sail your ships, the skies through which your airplanes fly, the land upon which your cities sprawl, and the very reality that makes your culture, or any culture, possible.
quotes.translation: 然而，存在某些跨越物种的意识组织，它们本身不产生艺术或科学——但这些组织共同构成了地球及其上生物的有形躯体。它们的产物是你航行其上的海洋、飞机翱翔的天空、城市蔓延的土地，以及使你的文化——或任何文化——成为可能的那个实相本身。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: So when I told you to look where there was nothing, then I spoke because this uncamouflaged experience can be most directly perceived where nothing is perceived with the outer senses. In one sense anything that you can see or feel or touch is not real, and yet in another sense it is the nature of all reality.
quotes.translation: 因此，当我告诉你要看向"空无"之处时，我这样说是因为这种未经伪装的体验，能在外在感官感知不到任何事物时被最直接地觉察。从某种意义而言，你所能见、所感、所触的一切都不是真实的，但从另一层面来说，这正是所有实相的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In the time framework within which you now exist I can help you, but you cannot help me except by allowing me to help you, you see. In the gestalt which could develop we would be in a position of helping each other more equally. Now through you I affect physical reality, and this is indeed one of my purposes.
quotes.translation: 在你当前存在的时空架构中，我能帮助你，但你无法帮助我——除非通过允许我帮助你来实现，你明白吗。在可能发展出的完形中，我们将能更平等地相互协助。此刻我通过你影响物质实相，这确实是我的目的之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: If I were to make the same statement for example to any of my readers, I would be accused of saying that physical reality was composed of the discards of the universe.
quotes.translation: 倘若我对任何读者说出同样的话，恐怕会被指责说物质实相是由宇宙的废弃物构成的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In your terms, obviously, atoms do not dream of cats chasing dogs, yet (intently) there are indeed "lapses" from physical focus that are analogous to your dreaming state. Give us a moment ... In those conditions the atoms pursue their own probable activities, and indeed make astounding calculations, bringing into your actuality the necessary probable actions to insure official life forms. But neither are they limited otherwise, for their other probable directions are also actualized. Period. On different levels in the dream state, then, you are also subjectively aware of other probable realities. Your conscious intent is unconsciously brought into the dreaming condition, and that intent helps you sort the data. (See Note 4.)
quotes.translation: 就你们而言，显然原子不会梦见猫追狗，但（专注地）确实存在与你们梦境状态类似的"脱离"物理聚焦的时刻。请稍等片刻……在这些状态下，原子会追求自身的可能活动，并确实进行惊人的计算，将必要的可能行动带入你们的现实，以确保官方生命形式的存续。但它们也并非仅受此限制，因为它们的其他可能方向同样被实现了。句号。因此，在梦境状态的不同层次中，你们也在主观上意识到其他可能的实相。你们有意识的意图会无意识地被带入梦境状态，而那个意图会帮助你们整理资料。（见注4）
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 699
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: This first state of agonized search for expression may have represented the birth throes of All That Is as we know it. There existed, and clearly, the possibilities of creation as we know it, but the means were not known. Pretend then that you possessed within yourself the knowledge, the sight, of all the world's masterpieces in sculpture and art, that they throbbed and pulsed as realities within you, but that you had no physical apparatus, no knowledge of how to achieve it; that there was neither rock, nor pigment, nor source of any of these, and you ached with the yearning to produce them--and this, on an infinitesimally small scale, will perhaps give you, as an artist, some idea of the agony and the impetus that was felt.
quotes.translation: 这种痛苦寻求表达的第一阶段，可能代表了我们所知的"一切万有"的诞生阵痛。显然，我们所知的创造可能性确实存在，但实现手段尚未可知。那么请设想，你内在拥有全世界所有雕塑与艺术杰作的知识与视野，它们作为实相在你体内悸动与脉动，但你却没有物理装置，不知如何实现它们；既无岩石、颜料，也无任何这些材料的来源，你因渴望创造它们而痛苦——这以极其微小的规模，或许能让你作为艺术家，略微体会到那种被感受到的痛苦与驱动力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: All of these issues prepared you psychically and psychologically to make this kind of contact. The balance between aggressiveness and passivity on Ruburt's part also forms a highly charged medium that allows him to act in his present capacity in the sessions. Any exploration into other realities involves an aggressive thrust on the one hand toward fulfillment, with hope of freedom you see. This has its psychological connotations within your system.
quotes.translation: 所有这些议题都在心理与心灵上为你做好了进行这种接触的准备。鲁柏身上攻击性与被动性的平衡，也形成了一种高度活跃的媒介，使他能以目前的能力在课程中运作。任何对其它实相的探索，一方面都包含着朝向圆满的攻击性推进，并伴随着你们所见的自由希望。这在你们的系统中具有其心理意涵。

quotes.text: Now: Electrons themselves operate at different "speeds." The structure of the atom that you recognize, and its activity, is in larger terms one probable version of an atom.11 Your consciousness, as it is allied with the flesh, follows the activity of atoms as far as it is reflected in your system of reality.
quotes.translation: 现在：电子本身以不同的"速度"运作。你们所认知的原子结构及其活动，从更宏观的角度来看，只是原子的一个可能版本。11 与肉体相连的你们意识，会跟随原子的活动，只要它反映在你们的实相系统中。
