source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: No concepts can be boxed in. The reality with which we are concerned flows through your camouflage world, forms the material with which you build your constructions, permeates every atom and molecule in your world, but does not originate in your world. That is, it does not originate in your camouflage world.
quotes.translation: 没有任何概念能被框限。我们所关注的实相流经你们的伪装世界，构成你们建造结构所用的材料，渗透你们世界中的每个原子与分子，但并非起源于你们的世界。也就是说，它并非起源于你们的伪装世界。

quotes.text: The reason should be apparent; if you consider for the sake of analogy, you may think of our fifth dimensional space once more. Your universe of positive matter is but one portion of the stuff of reality or energy as it is temporarily apparent, instantaneously, at one point within one of our imaginary cubes.
quotes.translation: 原因应该显而易见；如果你们以类比的方式思考，可以再次想象我们的第五度空间。你们由正物质构成的宇宙，只是实相或能量材料的一部分，如同它暂时显现的样貌，瞬间存在于我们某个想象立方体中的一个点上。

quotes.text: For your identity is dependent upon primary reality, which is a certain kind of action, and all of this will lead to heightened consciousness under all circumstances.
quotes.translation: 因为你的身份认同依赖于首要实相，那是一种特定的行动，而这一切在任何情况下都将导向更高的意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时间旅行者会愿意放弃当前的心智与身体焦点，完全进入一个较早的人格吗？我认为在绝大多数情况下不会——或许永远不会——因为就那些条件而言，这意味着放弃整体自性或存有的一部分，而这部分曾通过投射进入我们"当下"时间的架构，获得了某种独特程度的意识与物质形态。然而，转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种奇特的发展。或许这种转移能够且确实在可能实相的广阔领域内发生（我将在本文中进一步讨论）。如果是这样，那么它们仅从我们有限的视角来看才会显得奇怪。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."

quotes.text: Yet in many such instances, the Ouija board operator or the automatic writer is to some extent or another tuning in to a world view, struggling to open roads of perception free enough to perceive an altered version of reality, but not equipped enough through training and temperament, perhaps, to express it.
quotes.translation: 然而在许多此类案例中，通灵板操作者或自动书写者在某种程度上正调频进入一种世界观，努力开辟足够自由的感知路径以感知实相的变体版本，但或许因训练与气质不足而未能充分表达它。

source_raw.title: I said (in sessions 711 and 716, for instance) that your normal focus of consciousness can be compared to your home station. So far, exercises have been described that will gently lead you away from concentration upon this home base, even while its structure is strengthened at the same time. You can also call this home station or local program your world view, since from it you perceive your reality. To some extent it represents your personal focus, through which you interpret most of your experience. As I mentioned (in Session 715, for instance), when you begin to move away from that particular organization, strange things may start to happen. You may be filled with wonder, excitement, or perplexity. You may be delighted or appalled, according to whether or not your new perceptions agree or disagree with your established world view.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Each of you is couched now in the natural world, and that world is couched in a reality from which nature emerges. The psyche's roots are secure, nourishing it like a tree from the ground of being. The source of the psyche's strength is within each individual, the invisible fabric of the person's existence.
quotes.translation: 你们每个人此刻都安处于自然世界中，而那个世界又安处于一种实相之中，自然从中涌现。心灵之根稳固，如同树木从存在之基汲取养分。心灵力量的源泉存在于每个个体之内，那是个人存在的无形织锦。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The ego's false ideas prevent it from accepting this energy, but once the ego is aware of its position as a portion of the self, then it should not be shunted aside, but can take its place. It is sometimes referred to almost as if it stood entirely outside of basic reality. It is, of course, within it also.
quotes.translation: 自我的错误观念阻止它接纳这股能量，但一旦自我意识到它作为自性一部分的位置，它就不应被搁置一旁，而能各就其位。有时它被描述得仿佛完全置身于基本实相之外。当然，它也在其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: We go back to our fundamentals: You create reality through your feelings, thoughts, and mental actions. Some of these are physically materialized, others are actualized in probable systems. You are presented with an endless series of choices, it seems, at any point, some more or less favorable than others.
quotes.translation: 我们回到根本：你通过感受、思想和心智行动创造实相。其中一些在物质层面具体化，另一些则在可能系统中实现。在任何时刻，你似乎都面临无尽的系列选择，有些比另一些更有利或更不利。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Many individuals are completely blind to their own beliefs about themselves, and the nature of reality. Your own conscious thoughts will give you excellent clues. Often you will find yourself refusing to accept certain thoughts that come to your mind because they conflict with other usually accepted ideas.
quotes.translation: 许多人对自己及现实本质的信念完全视而不见。你自身的意识思维会提供绝佳线索。你常会发现自己在拒绝接受某些浮现的念头，因为它们与其他通常被接纳的观念相冲突。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The intuitions are able to accept conceptual reality to some degree. They can feel the content and validity of a concept, where the brain itself may fall short. I am tempted to go into more laws this evening. However it is best that I withhold them until you grow more familiar with this evening's material.
quotes.translation: 直觉能在某种程度上接纳概念性现实。它们能感知概念的内涵与有效性，而大脑本身可能力有未逮。今晚我本想探讨更多法则，但最好还是等你们对今晚的材料更熟悉后再行阐述。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is as much camouflage as the glass on the table, （pointing） and its knowledge must come through the physical system. Now. The mind is uncamouflaged. It perceives the uncamouflaged reality of sense data, or its sees the energy that exists. It sees the energy independently of the physical object, you see.
quotes.translation: 它（指物质）与桌上的玻璃杯一样是伪装物，其认知必须通过物质系统获得。而心灵未经伪装。它感知感官资料的未伪装实相，或看见存在的能量。它看见独立于物质对象的能量，明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The first volume, like this one, defies easy description, then, since it leaps over many definitions we usually take for granted; and with its lack of chapter divisions it even confounds our ideas of what a book is. Yet it certainly contains a most intriguing, multidimensional view of the nature of probabilities, a view in which our ideas of a "simple, single event" must vanish; at least we can never again look at any event as being concrete, finished, or absolute. Seth stresses the importance of probabilities as they exist in relationship to a thought, an ordinary physical event, or the mass event of Homo sapiens as a species, and emphasizes the existence of probable realities as the understructure of free will.
quotes.translation: 第一卷与本书一样难以简单描述，因为它跨越了我们习以为常的诸多定义；没有章节划分的编排甚至颠覆了我们对"书"的认知。然而它确实呈现了关于概率本质最引人入胜的多维视角——在此视角中，"单一事件"的概念必须消融；至少我们再也无法将任何事件视为具体、完成或绝对的。赛斯强调概率与思想、普通物质事件或智人物种集体事件的关系，并指出概率性实相是自由意志的基础结构。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Session 744:    This Book and Probable Ones. Seth's Reality
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 6: Reincarnation and Counterparts: The "Past" Seen Through the Mosaics of Consciousness

quotes.text: Many people are unable to endow fragments with such physical reality, and thus shove them more or less harmlessly away at arm's length. It is as if in Ruburt's great experience the other night that the dissociated part of the personality donned another identity and battled with Ruburt's own for dominance.
quotes.translation: 许多人无法赋予碎片如此具体的物质实相，因而只能将其保持在一臂之遥的无害距离。就像鲁柏那晚的强烈体验中，人格的分离部分披上另一重身份，与鲁柏自身争夺主导权。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Death is not an end, but a transformation of consciousness. Nature, with its changing seasons, constantly brings you that message. In that light, and with that understanding, nature's disasters do not claim victims: Nature and man together act out their necessary parts in the larger framework of reality.
quotes.translation: 死亡并非终结，而是意识的转化。自然以其四季更迭不断向你传递这个讯息。在此洞见与理解下，自然灾难并非在索取牺牲：自然与人类共同在更大的实相框架中扮演着必要角色。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Regardless of your histories, those early men and women were quite healthy. They had strong teeth and bones. They dealt with the physical world through the purposeful use of the imagination, however, in a way now most difficult to understand. They realized they were mortal, and must die, but their greater awareness of Framework 2 allowed them a larger identification, so they understood that death was not only a natural necessity, but also an opportunity for other kinds of experience and development (see Note 1 for Session 803).
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: (Smile.) Basically however you see perception has nothing to do with the outer senses at all. These are dim receivers at best. Some of your dreams tell you far more about the nature of reality than the most vivid physical experience.
quotes.translation: （微笑）基本上，无论你如何看待，感知与外在感官毫无关系。这些感官充其量只是迟钝的接收器。你的一些梦境比最生动的物质体验更能告诉你关于实相本质的真相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: To a certain extent, I must travel from those realities into your comprehension, wrest myself free in order to form an ever-changing, ever-moving, ever-on-the-move entity that can speak here and be there at the same time. So I am distant and close at once. That distance from you also represents the reaches, however, of the human psyche, and the vast corridors of psychological activity from which it is formed, and from which your world emerges.
quotes.translation: 在某种程度上，我必须从那些实相中进入你的理解范畴，挣脱自身束缚，以便形成一个不断变化、不断移动、始终在途的存有，能同时在此处言说、在彼处存在。因此我既遥远又亲近。然而，这种与你的距离也代表着人类心灵所及的疆域，以及构成它的心理活动之广阔走廊——你的世界正由此涌现。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: When the ego is a very rigid one however, it will not accept the reality of these rejected patterns so easily, and according to the nature of its rigidity it may restrict so many areas of activity that the inside action, or the inside impetus for expression, almost equally balances the ego force itself.
quotes.translation: 然而，当自我极为僵化时，它不会轻易接受这些被排斥模式的实相，并且根据其僵化的性质，它可能会限制如此多的活动领域，以至于内在行动或内在表达驱力几乎与自我力量本身形成平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: When you meet with any fact, you encounter the tail end of a certain kind of creativity. The psyche, however, is responsible for bringing facts into existence. In that reality a so-called fact is equally true or equally false. The dream that you remember is already a translation of a deeper experience.
quotes.translation: 当你面对任何事实时，你遇到的是某种创造力的末端。然而，心灵负责将事实带入存在。在那个实相中，所谓的事实同样真实或同样虚假。你所记得的梦境已是更深层体验的转译。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am no secondary personality. There is no case of multiple personality here. What you have if you take advantage of it, is Ruburt's personality, which with Josephs help is capable and willing to perceive more than one reality at once. You will not, my dear doctor, get a second chance in this endeavor.
quotes.translation: 我并非次人格。这里不存在多重人格案例。如果你善加利用，你所拥有的是鲁柏的人格——在约瑟的协助下，它能够且愿意同时感知多重实相。亲爱的医生，在这项努力中你不会得到第二次机会。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: These points, these coordinates, are all about you and impinge upon your physical form and your universe constantly, but you cannot understand nor perceive them. Consciously you work with what you call a one reality field psychological structure. Other portions of your entire entity are not so limited.
quotes.translation: 这些点、这些坐标，遍布你周身，持续冲击着你的物质形态与宇宙，但你无法理解或感知它们。在意识层面，你运作于所谓的单一实相场心理结构中。你整个存有的其他部分则不受此限。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: (1.) It is quite possible, for example, for several selves to occupy a body, and were this the norm it would be easily accepted. That implies another kind of multipersonhood, however, one actually allowing for the fulfillment of many abilities of various natures usually left unexpressed. It also implies a freedom and organization of consciousness that is unusual in your system of reality, and was not chosen there.
quotes.translation: 例如，多个自我完全可能共用一个身体，若此为常态，则极易被接受。但这暗示着另一种多重人格形态——一种实际上允许各种通常未被表达的多元能力得以实现的形态。这也暗示着一种在你们的现实系统中非同寻常的意识自由与组织方式，而这种方式并未被选择采用。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (So far we've been dealing with the idea of counterparts in our own physical reality. By way of contrast, however, Seth stated last month in the 713th session, after 10:32:) Nothing exists outside the psyche, however, that does not exist within it, and there is no unknown world that does not have its psychological or psychic counterpart. (Before that, from Session 712:) To some extent or another, there are counterparts of all realities within your psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Adequate scientific proofs, such as science so surely needs, requires the enlargement of consciousness; not, my dear doctor, on my part, but on the part of science. There are some things that I can indeed do, and I will do what I can. Nevertheless the fact remains that I am indeed extending myself, and my dear doctor it is science which is not extending itself, and it is science that will not meet reality halfway.
quotes.translation: 科学如此确信所需的充分科学证据，要求意识的扩展；亲爱的博士，这并非指我这一方，而是指科学那一方。有些事我确实能做到，也会尽力而为。然而事实依然是：我确实在扩展自身，而亲爱的博士，恰恰是科学没有扩展自身，恰恰是科学不愿与现实相向而行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: In those times men spoke and confided to the spirits of birds, trees, and spiders, knowing that in the interior reality beneath, the nature of these communications was known and understood. In those times, death was not feared as it is in your terms, now, for the cycle of consciousness was understood.
quotes.translation: 在那个时代，人们向鸟、树和蜘蛛的灵性倾诉衷肠，深知在内在实相之下，这些沟通的本质已被知晓和理解。在那个时代，死亡并不像你们现在这样被恐惧，因为意识的循环已被领悟。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: We will later discuss the nature of mass reality, but for now we are dwelling upon the personal aspects. The main point I wanted to make in this chapter was that your conscious beliefs are extremely important, and that you are not at the mercy of events or causes that dwell far beneath your awareness.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后将讨论群体实相的本质，但目前我们专注于个人层面。本章我想强调的重点是：你们有意识的信念极为重要，你们并非受制于潜藏于意识深处的事件或原因。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Each portion, by whatever name, contains within it the latent potentials of the whole. If the unknown reality exists, it is because you play one melody over and over and so identify yourself, while closing out, consciously at least, all of the other possible variations that you could add to that tune.
quotes.translation: 每个部分，无论以何种名称存在，都内含着整体的潜在可能性。若未知实相存在，那是因为你反复演奏同一段旋律并以此认同自我，同时——至少在意识层面——排除了所有你本可加入该曲调的其他可能变奏。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 735
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: And since you are not, you do not have the peculiar sets of camouflage perception necessary to experience existence within them. Now. Within the same space and time that you at this moment occupy, there are numberless planes of reality. You simply do not have the camouflage equipment to perceive them.
quotes.translation: 既然你不在其中，你便不具备体验它们存在所需的特殊伪装感知系统。此刻，就在你所占据的同一时空内，存在着无数实相层面。你只是没有相应的伪装设备去感知它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You will sometimes automatically translate this reality into physical terms. Such images will be hallucinatory, but it may take a while for you to distinguish their real nature. It must be understood however here that all physical objects are also hallucinatory. They may be called mass hallucinations.
quotes.translation: 你有时会自动将这种实相转译为物质术语。这类影像会是幻觉性的，但你可能需要一段时间才能分辨出它们的真实本质。然而必须了解的是，所有物质物体也都是幻觉性的，它们可被称为集体幻觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: You will never find a first action, and only within your system does such a search have any meaning. You form the reality, the shape, of thoughts, for they have shape, in much the same way that you breathe; and you have as little control of them, once you have created them, as you have of your breath.
quotes.translation: 你永远找不到第一个行动，只有在你这个系统内，这种追寻才有意义。你形成思想的实相与形状——因为思想确实有形状——其方式几乎与你呼吸相同；而一旦你创造了它们，你对它们的控制力就与你对呼吸的控制力一样微乎其微。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (We received a letter from Pat Norelli today in which she substantiates some clairvoyant material concerning her, given by Seth in Session 340. Notes are included in that session.)

quotes.text: It does not matter that I am a part of more. What I am as you have known me is legitimate. I go beyond the apparent boundaries of that self by which you have known me, but it is that self that could communicate with you before you could know anymore about my reality or understand that I might be more.
quotes.translation: 我是"更多"的一部分，这并不重要。你所认识的那个我，是正当合法的。我超越了你所认知的那个自我的明显界限，但正是那个自我，在你能够进一步了解我的实相或理解我可能不止于此之前，就能与你沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: What we will be discussing for several sessions, with your permission jointly -- and, I hope, with your joint enthusiasm -- will be the magical approach to reality, and to your private lives specifically, in order to create that kind of atmosphere in which the answers become experienced (underlined).
quotes.translation: 在你们共同的许可下——我希望，也怀着你们共同的热情——我们将用几节课讨论的，是对实相及你们个人生活的魔法取向，目的是创造那种能让答案被经验到的氛围（强调）。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: As you know, inner data must be perceived through the inner senses. In formulating a theory concerning the primary energy gestalt, the data is distorted by the peculiar set of outer sensory equipment characteristic of any given plane of reality. This is known, that man forms his god in his own image.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，内在资料必须透过内在感官来感知。在构建关于原初能量完形的理论时，资料会被任何特定实相层面特有的那套外在感官设备所扭曲。这是众所周知的：人按自己的形象塑造了他的神。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I have avoided it in order to steer clear of a stereotyped image. It was when Ruburt began reading other peoples material that the word began to appear. This does not mean that a God did not exist. It means that use of the term automatically limits the reality of All That Is by its very connotations.
quotes.translation: 我一直避免使用这个词，以免落入刻板印象。直到鲁柏开始阅读其他人的资料时，这个词才开始出现。这并不意味着神不存在，而是说使用这个术语会自动以其内涵限制"一切万有"的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: There are of course mass constructions , psychic pools whose energy is derived from many individuals, all predisposed because of their own inclinations toward specific areas of activity. Various groups of individuals therefore, massed together, help form and maintain particular areas of your reality.
quotes.translation: 当然存在群体建构，这些心灵能量池的能量来自许多个体，他们因自身倾向而预先朝向特定的活动领域。因此，不同群体的个体聚集在一起，共同形成并维持你们实相中的特定区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is no other valid way of changing physical events. It might help if you imagine an inner living dimension within yourself in which you create, in miniature psychic form, all the exterior conditions that you know. Simply put, you do exactly this. Your thoughts, feelings and mental pictures can be called incipient exterior events, for in one way or another each of these is materialized into physical reality.
quotes.translation: 没有其他有效的方法可以改变物质事件。如果你能想象自己内在有一个活生生的维度，在那里你以微型心灵形式创造你所知的所有外在条件，这会有所帮助。简单来说，你确实在这样做。你的思想、情感和心灵画面可被称为初期的外在事件，因为无论如何，这些都会以某种方式物质化为物理实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your visitor would then be forced to translate that information as best he could through his own native structure, if it were to make any sense to his consciousness in its usual orientation. All realities are the result of certain unique focuses taken by consciousness, therefore. In those terms, there is no outside. The effects of objectivity are caused as the psyche projects its experience into inner dimensions that it has itself created.
quotes.translation: 那么，你的访客将被迫尽其所能通过自己的原生结构来翻译这些信息，如果这些信息要对其意识在通常取向中产生意义的话。因此，所有实相都是意识采取特定焦点的结果。就这些术语而言，不存在外在。客观性的效果是由于心灵将其体验投射到它自身创造的内在维度中而产生的。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The only way out of it is to become aware of your beliefs, aware of your own conscious thought, and to change your beliefs so that you bring them more in line with the kind of reality you want to experience. Imagination and emotion will then automatically come into play to reinforce the new beliefs.
quotes.translation: 摆脱困境的唯一方法是觉察你的信念，觉察你自己的有意识思想，并改变你的信念，使它们更符合你想要体验的那种实相。然后，想象力和情感将自动发挥作用，以强化新的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In terms of energy, intent is stabilizing. There is a center to the self, again, that acts as a nucleus. The nucleus may change, but it will always be the center from which physical existence will radiate. Physically, intent or purpose forms that center, regardless of its reality in terms of energy.
quotes.translation: 就能量而言，意图是稳定的。自我有一个中心，再次充当核心。这个核心可能会改变，但它始终是物质存在辐射的中心。从物质层面看，意图或目的形成那个中心，无论其在能量层面的实相如何。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The fact is that the basic nature of reality shows itself in the nature of the dream state quite clearly, where in any given night you may find yourself undertaking many roles simultaneously. You may change sex, social position, national or religious alliance, age, and yet know yourself as yourself.
quotes.translation: 事实上，实相的基本性质在梦境的本质中表现得相当清楚，在那里，在任何特定的夜晚，你可能会发现自己同时扮演许多角色。你可能会改变性别、社会地位、国家或宗教联盟、年龄，却仍然知道自己就是自己。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Give us a moment. (Pause.) The brain is capable (underlined)of interpreting and transmitting far more inner information than it does. It is the ego's idea of what is possible, the ego's concept of reality, that determines in a large manner whether or not the brain will interpret any particular data.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻。（停顿。）大脑有能力（强调）解读和传递比它实际所做的更多的内在信息。是自我对可能性的看法、自我对实相的概念，在很大程度上决定了大脑是否会解读任何特定资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When he is finished you see he will understand something extremely important for him, and experience a corresponding relief. For seeing that he creates his own reality now, he will understand that he also helped form the environment in which he grew, and that his mother was not entirely responsible.
quotes.translation: 当他完成时，你会看到他将会理解对他而言极为重要的事情，并体验到相应的解脱。因为看到他现在创造了自己的实相，他会明白他也帮助形成了自己成长的环境，而他的母亲并非负全责。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are used to a particular kind of orientation, accustomed to using your consciousness in one particular manner. In order to study the "unknown" reality, however, you must try to see what else your consciousness can do. This really means that you must learn to regain the true feeling of yourself.
quotes.translation: 你习惯于一种特定的导向方式，习惯于以一种特定方式运用你的意识。然而，为了研究"未知"的实相，你必须试着看看你的意识还能做什么。这实际上意味着你必须学会重新获得你对自己的真实感受。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 709
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Whether or not A, the sender, knowingly transmits this apparent duplicate, at the point of its transmission the sender forms an electrical impulse pattern that is supposed to duplicate the original thought. But no such identical duplication is possible, as far as I know, within reality of any kind.
quotes.translation: 无论发送者A是否有意识地传递这个看似复制的信息，在传递的瞬间，发送者会形成一个电脉冲模式，旨在复制原始思想。但据我所知，在任何类型的实相中，都不可能存在完全相同的复制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I said probabilities were realized (in the 653rd session in Chapter Fourteen) ... and she is suddenly open to her (imagined) events as actualities. Because you are space-time oriented, her realizations, accepted momentarily as physical reality, cause gaps in what you think of as normal experience.
quotes.translation: 我说过概率被实现了（在第十四章第653节中）……而她突然将她的（想象的）事件视为现实。因为你是时空导向的，她暂时被接受为物质实相的认知，会在你认为的正常经验中造成空隙。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It cannot be considered separately. It may appear in many guises, due to the nature of the particular reality of which it is part, and it involves much more than motion. Action may be considered also simply as the spontaneous nature of the inner vitality toward various expressive materializations.
quotes.translation: 它不能被单独考虑。由于它所属特定实相的性质，它可能以多种面貌出现，并且它涉及的不只是运动。行动也可以简单地被视为内在活力朝向各种表达性物质化的自发本性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In your present daily life the same process continues. Most of these dreams are very disconnected from the ego, and will seldom be recalled. The self who pursues these divergent paths is actual however. These are legitimate projections. They represent systems of reality of which you are not aware.
quotes.translation: 在你们目前的日常生活中，同样的过程仍在继续。这些梦大多与自我意识极度脱节，很少会被记起。然而，追寻这些不同路径的自己是真实存在的。这些都是合法的投射。它们代表了你们尚未察觉的实相系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is meant therefore to go its own way. You have simply formed a bridge that helps it make the transition from one reality to another. It is bound to carry within it only those memories however of which even you are unaware (pointing to Sue and Carl), that belong to your species and to your kind.
quotes.translation: 因此，它注定要走自己的路。你们只是搭建了一座桥梁，帮助它从一个实相过渡到另一个实相。然而，它必然只携带那些连你们自己（指向苏和卡尔）都未察觉的记忆，这些记忆属于你们的物种和同类。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is an obviously intimate relationship between each cell and another. There is a constant give-and-take and grouping of awareness within the body's own miraculous corporeal structure. Your idea of reality and its experience is much different than that of any cell, yet each is interconnected.
quotes.translation: 每个细胞之间显然存在着亲密的关系。在身体自身奇妙的物质结构中，存在着持续的能量交换和意识聚合。你们对实相及其体验的看法与任何细胞都大不相同，然而每个细胞都是相互关联的。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The habitual pattern or characteristic nature of the ego may then be led to refuse to accept an emotion, at the same time that a pattern has already been set to receive the particular type of emotion. Here the ego fights against itself. Such an emotion may of course be given release through dreams, but this is of limited value to the ego involved, since the ego does not accept the reality of dream existence.
quotes.translation: 自我意识的习惯模式或特性可能会被引导去拒绝接受某种情绪，而同时一个接收特定情绪的模式已经建立。在这里，自我意识与自己对抗。这种情绪当然可以通过梦境释放，但对涉及的自我意识来说价值有限，因为自我意识不承认梦境存在的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This is a slight aside. Many people dreamed of Jack Kennedy's death in advance, as you know. On one level this knowledge was available to the man himself. This does not mean that the death have to happen. It was a vivid possibility. It was also one of many solutions to several problems. While it was not the most suitable solution, it was the closest man could come at that particular time in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这是一个小小的题外话。如你们所知，许多人提前梦到了杰克·肯尼迪的死亡。在某个层面上，这个人自己也能获得这种知识。这并不意味着死亡必然发生。那是一个生动的可能性。它也是解决几个问题的众多方案之一。虽然它不是最合适的解决方案，但在那个特定时刻的物质实相中，这是人类所能达到的最接近的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Your father's greatest vitality was in the inventor's reality, and so in your terms this one suffered. This does not mean that each personality, regardless of probabilities, is not endowed with free will, and so forth. Each is born, in whatever system, from a source gestalt energy, and develops.
quotes.translation: 你们父亲最大的活力在于发明家的实相，所以用你们的话说，这个实相受苦了。这并不意味着每个个性，无论概率如何，都不被赋予自由意志等等。每个个性，无论在哪个系统中，都从一个源头的完形能量中诞生，并不断发展。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 680
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The inner senses can and do perceive this reality in an undistorted fashion. Your brain is itself a camouflage pattern. It can only translate and perceive what seems to be the evidence of the physical senses. It cannot step outside of itself. （Smile.） It is that which it attempts to investigate.
quotes.translation: 内在感官能够且确实以未扭曲的方式感知这个实相。你的大脑本身就是一个伪装模式。它只能转译并感知那些看似是物质感官证据的东西。它无法跳出自身。（微笑）它正是它试图去调查的对象。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Even physically you have not categorized all of the life-forms, and there are many co-inhabiting your system that you will never physically perceive. You do not understand the multiple reality of your own thoughts or thought forms, and you are not able to follow them out of your own mental home.
quotes.translation: 即使在物质层面，你们也尚未对所有生命形态进行分类，而有许多生命形态与你们共存于同一系统中，你们却永远无法以物质方式感知。你们不了解自己思想或思想形态的多重实相，也无法跟随它们离开自己心灵的居所。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You are as a rule aware of one system only and not generally conscious of yourself as anything but a creature of that system. I refer here to humanity at this time. These psychological structures through value fulfillment, ever enlarge their abilities to form new realities and to act within them. It should not be forgotten that these environmental systems are directly created by those who dwell within them, and this includes your own.
quotes.translation: 通常你们只意识到一个系统，并且一般不会意识到自己除了是该系统的生物之外还有其他身份。我在此指的是当前的人类。这些心理结构通过价值完成，不断扩展其能力，以形成新的实相并在其中运作。不应忘记，这些环境系统直接由居住其中者所创造，这包括你们自己的系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Your friends and acquaintances will be concerned with the same problems, for you will draw to yourself those with the same concerns. I am telling you again, therefore, that many of your ideas of good and evil are highly distortive, and shadow all understanding you have of the nature of reality.
quotes.translation: 你的朋友和熟人会关注相同的问题，因为你会吸引那些有相同关注点的人到你身边。因此，我再次告诉你，你们许多关于善与恶的观念具有高度扭曲性，并遮蔽了你们对实相本质的所有理解。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Force of various kinds is also exerted by these fields upon your universe. Until it is thoroughly understood little real progress can be made. Mankind still deals with surfaces, depending mainly as he does upon the powers of the outer ego, whose purpose it is to deal only with surface reality.
quotes.translation: 这些场域也会对你们的宇宙施加各种力量。除非彻底理解这一点，否则难以取得真正的进展。人类仍然只处理表面现象，主要依赖外在自我的能力，而外在自我的目的仅在于处理表面实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In this case also your reality colors your beliefs, and your experience is a direct result of your conscious attitudes. By such attitudes as these just mentioned you put clamps upon your inner self, purposely hamper your experience, and reinforce beliefs in the negative aspects of your being.
quotes.translation: 在这种情况下，你们的实相也会影响你们的信念，而你们的经验是你们有意识态度的直接结果。通过刚才提到的这类态度，你们给自己的内在自我套上枷锁，故意限制自己的经验，并强化对自身存在负面方面的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Certain chemicals may affect dreaming by altering the cells' reality. Many sleeping pills are detrimental, in that they inhibit the body's natural response to its environment while an individual is sleeping, and deaden the intimate relationship between the dreaming mind and the sleeping body.
quotes.translation: 某些化学物质可能通过改变细胞的实相来影响做梦。许多安眠药是有害的，因为它们抑制了身体在睡眠时对环境的本能反应，并削弱了做梦心智与睡眠身体之间的亲密联系。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text:
We learned the methods
so long ago
that they're unconscious,
and we've hypnotized ourselves
into believing
that we're the audience,
so I wonder where we served
our apprenticeship.
Under what master magicians did we learn
to form reality
so smoothly that we forgot to tell ourselves
the secret?
quotes.translation: 我们习得这些方法
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The solution may or may not be given to the consciousness. In many instances this would not be necessary. The inner ego of which we have spoken is the director of such unifying activities, and while the inner ego is mainly concerned with inner reality, it is also aware of physical existence.
quotes.translation: 解决方案可能给予意识，也可能不给予。在许多情况下这并非必要。我们所说的内在自我是这类统一活动的导演，而内在自我主要关注内在实相，同时也觉察到物质存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your painting was meant to bring out from the recesses of your being the accumulation of your knowledge in the form of images -- not of people you might meet now on the street, but portraits of the residents of the mind. The residents of the mind are very real. In a certain fashion, they are your parents more than your parents were, and when you express their realities, they are also expressing yours. All time is simultaneous. Only the illusion of time on each of your parts keeps you from greeting each other. To some extent, when you paint such portraits you are forming psychic bridges between yourself and those other selves: Your own identity as yourself grows.
quotes.translation: 你的画作本意是从你存在的深处，以图像的形式引出你知识的积累——不是你现在可能在街上遇到的人，而是心灵居民的肖像。心灵居民非常真实。从某种角度来看，他们比你的父母更像是你的父母，当你表达他们的实相时，他们也在表达你的实相。所有时间都是同时存在的。只是你们每个人对时间的幻觉阻止了你们互相问候。在某种程度上，当你画这样的肖像时，你正在自己与那些其他自我之间搭建心灵桥梁：你作为自己的身份在成长。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 834, FEBRUARY 5, 1979
8:59 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Your idea of space is then highly distorted, since space to you is simply where nothing is perceived. It is obviously filled with all kinds of phenomena (pause), that make no impression at all upon your perceptive mechanisms. Now in various ways and on occasion, you can tune into these other realities to some degree -- and you do so spasmodically, though in many cases the experience is lost because it does not register physically.
quotes.translation: 那么你对空间的观念是高度扭曲的，因为对你而言，空间只是感知不到任何东西的地方。它显然充满了各种现象（停顿），这些现象对你的感知机制毫无影响。现在，通过各种方式并偶尔地，你可以在某种程度上调频到这些其他实相——而且你间歇性地这样做，尽管在许多情况下，这种体验因为无法在物质层面留下记录而丢失了。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Self structures and identities are not the same. Identity requires no structure. Identity knows, and knows that it knows. self structures know and do not know that they know. self structures are a part of identity. Identities can contain pure knowledge without translation, and use it to seed various existences and to form realities. They do this consciously in your terms. They are far more conscious than you can presently imagine.
quotes.translation: 自我结构和身份并不相同。身份不需要结构。身份知道，并且知道它知道。自我结构知道，却不知道它们知道。自我结构是身份的一部分。身份可以包含无需翻译的纯粹知识，并用它来播种各种存在并形成实相。用你们的说法，它们有意识地这样做。它们比你们目前所能想象的要有意识得多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: As this effective field of perception patterns changes, so do the apparent boundaries of the practical self. It is imperative that we move away from the concept of a self as an indivisible, rigid and limited reality. Indeed, I hesitate almost to continue, since I do not want to confuse you.
quotes.translation: 随着这个有效的感知模式场域改变，实用自我的明显界限也随之改变。我们必须摆脱将自我视为不可分割、僵化且有限的实相概念。事实上，我几乎犹豫是否要继续，因为我不想让你们感到困惑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The book will explain how personal reality is formed, with great stress laid upon the ways of changing unfavorable aspects of individual experience.
quotes.translation: 本书将解释个人实相是如何形成的，并着重强调改变个人经验中不利面向的方法。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now as you know, I am a teacher, and interested in instruction. I am not a doctor. This means that my approach to a given problem will be vastly different than the approach of another personality, even on my plane, who has different interests. Therefore I am concerned with, and I emphasize, the importance of inner knowledge, and see physical symptoms for what they are--a reflection of an inner reality.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，我是一位教师，专注于教导。我不是医生。这意味着我对某个特定问题的处理方式，会与同层面其他具有不同兴趣的人格截然不同。因此，我关注并强调内在知识的重要性，并将身体症状视为其本质——内在实相的一种反映。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The reality of the inner universe also does not exist basically in time as you conceive it, although in some instances parts of it may be glimpsed from the camouflage time perspective; only however a very small portion.
quotes.translation: 内在宇宙的实相基本上也不存在于你所认知的时间中，尽管在某些情况下，其部分内容可能从伪装时间视角被瞥见；但仅是非常微小的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is what I am leading to. Outer constructions are always translations of actions from inner reality into material. Their validity is dependent upon the individuals ability to receive inner data, to translate inner data, to manipulate energy, and to construct it onto the material field.
quotes.translation: 这就是我要引导的方向。外在建构始终是内在实相行动转化为物质的过程。其有效性取决于个体接收内在资料、翻译内在资料、操控能量并将其建构到物质场域的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is, in no circumstance, any closed system. Action therefore flows within all systems and realities. Your physical senses are therefore adapted to deal with a particular camouflage system. They are therefore only equipped to perceive the realities within the physical camouflage field.
quotes.translation: 在任何情况下都不存在封闭系统。因此，行动在所有系统与实相中流动。你的肉体感官因此适应于处理特定的伪装系统。它们因此仅能感知物理伪装场域内的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: Now, I can be playful because I am not as serious and mystical as the rest of you. I am myself, and if you were yourselves,28 you would not be so self-consciously profound about your beliefs and the nature of your reality. (Humorously, to a certain student:) You would trust your mustache!
quotes.translation: 现在，我可以带着玩心，因为我不像你们那么严肃又神秘。我就是我自己，如果你们也做自己，就不会对自己的信念和实相的本质如此故作深沉。（幽默地对某位学生说：）你会信任你的胡子！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: I do not wish to become so involved that you literally screech at me for explanations. Nevertheless, once you asked me about the weather where I am, and I put you off. This is, I admit, somewhat of a play on words. Nevertheless, I have spoken of the value climate of psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 我不想陷入太深，以至于你们真的对我尖叫着要求解释。不过，你们曾问过我所在之处的天气，我当时避开了这个问题。我承认，这多少有点文字游戏。但我确实谈过心理实相的价值气候。

quotes.text: It is impossible to separate your daily experience in any of its aspects from your beliefs and those judgments that you place upon them. The beliefs boil down to your ideas of right and wrong, and they involve all of your attitudes concerning illness and health, wealth and poverty, the relationships of the races, religious conflicts, and more important, your intimate day-by-day psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 你们日常经验的任何方面，都不可能脱离你们的信念以及你们对信念所做的判断。这些信念归根结底是你们关于对与错的观念，涉及你们对疾病与健康、贫穷与财富、种族关系、宗教冲突的所有态度，更重要的是，涉及你们私密的、日复一日的心理实相。

quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: [However, as] you begin to question the nature of time itself, then the "when" of the universe is beside the point. The motion and energy of the universe still comes from within. I certainly realize that this is hardly a scientific statement -- yet the moment that All That Is conceived of a physical system it was invisibly created, endowed with creativity, and bound to emerge [into physical reality].
quotes.translation: 然而，当你们开始质疑时间本身的本质时，宇宙的"何时"就无关紧要了。宇宙的运动和能量仍然来自内在。我当然明白这很难称得上科学陈述——但"一切万有"构想出一个物质系统的那一刻，它就被无形地创造出来，被赋予创造力，并注定要显现为物质实相。

quotes.text: Quite frankly, your earth is expendable, for it will be created again as often as it is needed. I use the term again, speaking in terms of time again for you. But understand (smile) that others are forming their own clay of realities simultaneously. If they do not like what they have created often they throw it away; but always with the idea of learning from their errors, and forming another from the knowledge they have gained.
quotes.translation: 坦白说，你们的地球是可以替换的，因为它会在需要时被一再创造。我再次使用"一再"这个词，是为了你们而用时间术语来说。但请理解（微笑），其他存在同时也在塑造他们自己的实相之泥。如果他们不喜欢自己创造的东西，常常会将其丢弃；但总是带着从错误中学习、并利用所获知识塑造新形态的意图。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In your terms they may be living dramas. They will always be psychic structures, however, existing apart from any given system of reality, but at least partially perceived by many. Some exist in what you might term the astral plane, and you perceive them in visits during the sleep state.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，它们可能是活生生的戏剧。然而，它们永远是心灵结构，独立于任何给定的实相系统而存在，但至少能被许多人部分感知。有些存在于你们所谓的星光层，你们在睡眠状态中造访时会感知到它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: In physical existence usually you simply do not perceive it. There is a psychic structure also that has a form. This is the self as it appears within what you may call for now fifth-dimensional reality, but it does not exist at all in terms of matter. On occasion you travel in this form.
quotes.translation: 在物质实相中，你们通常根本感知不到它。还存在一种具有形态的心灵结构。这个自体以你们目前可称为第五维度实相的形式显现，但它完全不以物质形态存在。有时你们会以此形态出游。

quotes.text: Now: There is no such thing, basically, as random motion. There is no such thing as chaos. The universe, by whatever name and in whatever manifestation, attains its reality through ordered sequences of significances.
quotes.translation: 现在：基本上不存在所谓的随机运动。不存在所谓的混沌。宇宙无论以何种名称或何种显化形式，都是通过意义的有序序列获得其实相。

quotes.text: Suppose you have a particular goal in mind as a youngster, toward which you work. Your intent, images, desires and determination form a psychic force that is projected out ahead of you, so to speak. You send the reality of yourself from your present into what you think of as the future.
quotes.translation: 假设你年轻时心中有个特定目标，并为之努力。你的意图、意象、渴望和决心会形成一种心灵力量，可以说被投射到你前方。你将当下的自体实相送入你认为的未来之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You should be close to this sort of thing. You should pay more attention to the basis on which the company ultimately rests, or the company will be outstripped. Your judgment of people will stand you in good stead here, but you must join all your forces and tell yourself that you have made up your mind, for this is your one chance now, as you have lived your life, to shape a strong area of reality.
quotes.translation: 你应该贴近这类事物。你应该更关注公司最终赖以存续的基础，否则公司将被超越。你识人的判断力在此将大有助益，但你必须凝聚所有力量，告诉自己已下定决心，因为这是你此生中唯一的机会，去塑造一个坚实的实相领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The personality is given the greatest gift of all; you get exactly what you want to get. You create from nothing the experience that is your own. If you do not like your experience, then look within yourself and change it. But realize also that you are responsible for your joys and triumphs, and that the energy to create any of these realities comes from the inner self. What you do with it is up to the individual personality.
quotes.translation: 人格被赋予了最伟大的天赋：你得到的恰好是你想要得到的。你从无中创造出属于你自己的经验。若你不喜欢自己的经验，就向内审视并改变它。同时也要认识到，你的喜悦与胜利皆由你负责，创造这些实相的能量皆来自内在自体。如何运用它则取决于个体人格。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is the self that looks outward. It is the self that you call egotistically aware. The inner self became what I refer to as the inner ego. It looks into that inner reality, that psychic dimension of awareness from which both your own consciousness and your body consciousness emerged.
quotes.translation: 这是向外看的自体。这是你们称之为自我意识的自体。内在自体成为了我所说的内在自我。它向内审视那个内在实相，那个心灵意识的维度——你们自己的意识与身体意识皆由此而生。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Distortion is not falsehood. It is merely an interpretation of reality, colored or seen through a state of limited perception. I wish to make this most clear. I do intend to go into this matter thoroughly, since it involves various stages of consciousness through which we must journey.
quotes.translation: 扭曲并非虚假。它只是对实相的一种诠释，透过有限感知的滤镜被着色或看见。我希望把这点说得非常清楚。我确实打算彻底探讨这个问题，因为它涉及我们必须穿越的各种意识阶段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Ruburt has allowed a portion of his this-life consciousness to go off on a tangent, so to speak, on another path into another system of actuality (i.e., into his psychic library). His life there is as valid as his existence in your world. In the waking state he is able, now, to alter the direction of his focus precisely enough to bring about a condition in which he perceives both realities simultaneously. He is just beginning, so as yet he is only occasionally conscious of that other experience. He is, however, aware of it now in the back of his mind more or less constantly. It does not intrude upon the world that he knows, but enriches it.
quotes.translation: 可以说，鲁柏允许他此生意识的一部分偏离正轨，进入另一条通往另一个实相系统（即他的心灵图书馆）的路径。他在那里的生活与他在你们世界的存在同样真实。在清醒状态下，他现在能够足够精确地改变他的焦点方向，从而引发一种同时感知两种实相的状态。他刚刚开始，所以目前只是偶尔意识到那种其他经验。然而，他现在或多或少持续地在脑海深处意识到它。它并不侵扰他所知的世界，反而丰富了它。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It plays hopscotch in and out of reality. It is gone sometimes and you are not aware of it. On such occasions your attention is focused elsewhere, in what you might call mini-dreams or hallucinations, or associative and intuitive processes of thought that go quite beyond normal focus.
quotes.translation: 它在实相内外跳房子。它有时消失，而你并未察觉。在这种时候，你的注意力集中在别处，集中在你们所谓的迷你梦境或幻觉，或远超正常焦点的联想性和直觉性思维过程上。

quotes.text: But here you become involved with one of the most meaningful aspects of the nature of personal reality, as you test your thoughts against what seems to be. There may be a time before you learn how to change your thoughts effectively, but you are engaged in a basic meaningful endeavor.
quotes.translation: 但在这里，当你用你的思想去检验看似存在的事物时，你便涉入了个人实相本质中最具意义的面向之一。在你学会如何有效改变你的思想之前，可能会有一段时间，但你正投身于一项基本而有意义的努力。

quotes.text: Dineen, denied the support of the framework she had chosen, would have to face the questions that she had projected there. But all of the inner difficulties can be resolved by understanding that you form your own reality, and that your point of power is in the present (with emphasis).
quotes.translation: 迪宁，若被剥夺了她所选择的架构的支持，将不得不面对她投射到那里的问题。但所有内在的困难都可以通过理解你形成你自己的实相，以及你的力量点就在当下（强调）来解决。

quotes.text: One note to Mark. I have mentioned rather strenuously that it is most necessary for him to find his own establishment. The twinges that he feels are indeed warnings, or nudges rather, from his own subconscious mind, that he do this and thus bring the plans for it into actual reality.
quotes.translation: 给马克一点提示。我曾相当强烈地提到，他找到自己的立足之地是极为必要的。他所感受到的刺痛，确实是来自他潜意识的警告，或更确切地说是推动，要他这样做，从而将计划带入实际实相。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: It is far from a closed system in any way. Not only does it feed the physical universe, but in it many aspects of your own dreams become actual. Do you dream of an apple? Do you dream of a child, who has no existence in physical reality? Often these exist in the field of probability.
quotes.translation: 它绝非一个封闭系统。它不仅滋养着物质宇宙，而且你们许多梦境的面向在其中成为实相。你梦见一颗苹果吗？你梦见一个在物质实相中不存在的孩子吗？这些往往存在于可能性场域中。

quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking, dream reality is closer to the true nature of events than your experience with physical events leads you to suppose.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来说，梦境实相比你们对物质事件的体验所暗示的更接近事件的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: While you have highly limited concepts about the nature of the self, you cannot begin to conceive of a multidimensional godhood, or a universal reality in which all consciousness is unique, inviolate -- and yet given to the formation of infinite gestalts of organization and meaning.
quotes.translation: 当你们对自我本质持有高度局限的概念时，便无法开始构想一个多维的神性，或一个所有意识皆独特、不可侵犯——却又被赋予形成无限组织与意义之完形结构的宇宙实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Every so often I've thought of averaging Jane's dictation time for Seth Speaks and Personal Reality in the same way, but haven't done so. I'm somewhat puzzled to note, however, that her very short working times for the Seth books seem to be either ignored or taken for granted by practically everyone -- or, perhaps, those factors just aren't understood in terms of ordinary linear time. Maybe I'm alone in my interest here, for even Jane doesn't express any great curiosity about the time she has invested in the Seth material; she just delivers it. But given her abilities, I think her speed of production is a close physical approach to, or translation of, Seth's idea that basically all exists at once -- that really there is no time, and that the Seth books, for example, are "there" to be had in final form for just the tuning in. (In Section 3 of this volume, Note 2 for Session 692 contains information on another way by which we can move closer to Seth's idea of simultaneity from our physical reality, but that method grows out of material not discussed here.)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: The inner self that knows its existence within action, has a firm foothold within reality. The ego can perform its function, fulfill its responsibilities within the physical field, and be free to know adequate joys and pleasures. But such an inner self must be renewed within action.
quotes.translation: 那知晓自身存在于行动中的内在自我，在实相中拥有稳固的立足点。自我能在物质场域中执行其功能、履行其责任，并自由地体验足够的喜悦与欢愉。但这样的内在自我必须在行动中不断更新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The reality may be a problem. A doctor will try to the best of his ability to relieve the symptoms, and most of them, regardless of their plane of endeavor, are content with this. To heal a disease by any method is not to remove the inner cause, unless other precise steps are taken.
quotes.translation: 实相可能是个问题。医生会尽其所能缓解症状，而多数人——无论其努力层面如何——都满足于此。用任何方法治愈疾病并不等于移除内在原因，除非采取其他精确步骤。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Now in your terms only, these other counterparts are like latent patterns within your mind. Echoes. How many of you have actually thought of what the unconscious may be? Or, the voices that you hear within your mind or heart? Are they yours? To what counterparts do they belong? And yet each of you, in your own identity, has the right to do precisely as you wish, and to form your own reality....
quotes.translation: 现在仅就你们的角度而言，这些其他对应体就像你们心智中的潜在模式、回响。你们中有多少人真正思考过无意识可能是什么？或者你们在内心或心灵中听到的声音？那是你们自己的吗？它们属于哪些对应体？然而你们每个人，在自身身份中，都拥有完全按自己意愿行事、并形成自己实相的权利……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (The material in these recent excerpts rather prepared us for Seth's introduction of counterparts, then, in Session 721. In ESP class the next evening [on November 26], Seth began contending with some of the questions that instantly arose as a result of his new material. I'd just read aloud portions of the 721st session when one longtime student, whom I'll call Florence, commented that there "has to be a balance between each of us and our counterparts." Speaking strongly and humorously, Seth immediately took over the discussion.
