This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It is formed equally by those experiences which are purely subjective, and which exist only within the psychological time framework. The subjective experiences therefore result in definite changes within the physical body framework. These changes are not caused because of a physical event, but because of an event occurring within a dream condition which has no reality in your physical universe.
quotes.translation: 它同样由那些纯粹主观的、仅存在于心理时间框架内的经验所构成。因此，主观经验会在肉体框架内引发明确的变化。这些变化并非由物理事件造成，而是源于梦境中发生的事件——该事件在你的物质宇宙中并无实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Projection from a dream state is something else again, therefore, and when it is executed successfully then you have a fine example of the self as it changes the focus of its own awareness. Here the critical consciousness is quite apparent, while the body sleeps. Projections occur quite naturally under these conditions. For the development of the whole self however, and for the perfection of such experiences, it is beneficial that such projections be carried out by the conscious wish of the projector. You learn therefore to manipulate your own consciousness in different realities than the ones with which you are usually concerned.
quotes.translation: 从梦境状态投射则完全是另一回事。当投射成功时，你便能看到自我改变其意识焦点的绝佳范例。此时身体虽在沉睡，批判性意识却极为清晰。在这种状态下，投射会自然发生。然而，为了全我的发展及此类经验的完善，由投射者自觉意愿发起的投射更为有益。因此，你学会在不同实相中操控自己的意识——这些实相与你通常关注的截然不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Other portions of yourself, therefore, of which you are not consciously aware, do inhabit what you could call a supersystem of reality in which consciousness learns to handle and perceive much stronger concentrations of energy, and to construct "forms" of a different nature indeed.
quotes.translation: 因此，你尚未意识到的其他自我部分，确实栖居于可称为"实相超系统"的领域。在此系统中，意识学会处理并感知更强烈的能量凝聚，并构建出性质迥异的"形态"。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: When you have done this often enough so that you are intimately aware of the contrast, you will have a subjective feeling, a point of knowing within yourself, that will clearly indicate to you how your consciousness feels when it is at its finest point of focus in physical reality.
quotes.translation: 当你反复实践直至深刻体悟这种对比时，内心会产生一种主观感受——一种内在的认知点——它将清晰指示出：当你的意识在物质实相中处于最佳聚焦状态时，其感受究竟如何。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Each particular "station" of consciousness perceives in a different kind of reality, and as mentioned earlier (in Session 711, for instance), you usually tune in to your home station most of the time. If you turn your focus only slightly away, the world appears differently; and if that slightly altered focus were the predominant one, then that is how the world would seem to be. Each aspect of the psyche perceives the reality upon which it is focused, and that reality is also the materialization of a particular state of the psyche projected outward. You can learn to encounter other realities by altering your position within your own psyche.
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The intuitions must go hand in hand with the intellect. The intellect is useful in interpreting your data in terms that the ego can understand. The intuitions come close to mankinds source, and it is through the intuitions that information pertaining to the dream reality will come.
quotes.translation: 直觉必须与智性携手并进。智性有助于以自我能理解的方式诠释你的数据。而直觉则更接近人类的本源，关于梦境实相的信息正是通过直觉传递而来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We will use an analogy for its excellent implications. It is as if the personality in sleep projected out of himself bits of himself, of his own physical matter, thinned out, stretched into an amazing plasticity; plastic properties that can change instantly from one form to another. He goes out with these portions of himself, but because of the nature of reality projections cannot be recalled.
quotes.translation: 我们将用一个极具启发性的比喻：仿佛睡眠中的人格从自身投射出部分自我——其物质身体被拉伸、稀释成惊人的可塑性；这种可塑性能瞬间从一种形态转变为另一种。他带着这些自我部分外出，但由于实相投射的本质，这些投射无法被召回。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now, in primary constructions, a consciousness, usually fully aware and alert, adopts a form -- not his "native" one -- and consciously projects it, often into another level of reality. Even this is a rather complicated endeavor, and one seldom used for purposes of communication.
quotes.translation: 在初级建构中，意识通常完全清醒警觉，会采用一种非其"原生"形态的形式，并有意识地将其投射到另一个实相层面。即便这种操作也相当复杂，极少用于沟通目的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now: God is more than the sum of all the probable systems of reality he has created, and yet he is within each one of these, without exception. He is therefore within each man and woman. He is also within each spider, shadow, and frog, and this is what man does not like to admit.
quotes.translation: 神不仅超越祂所创造的所有可能实相系统的总和，更无一例外地存在于每个系统之中。因此祂存在于每个男人女人之内，也存在于每只蜘蛛、每道阴影、每只青蛙之内——这正是人类不愿承认的事实。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Because of its own nature it must act, yet no action can ever complete itself. The sphere would act in as many ways as were open to it, and every action changes that which is acted upon. Therefore each action would create a new reality. In such a manner are all fields activated.
quotes.translation: 因其本性使然，它必须行动，但任何行动都无法自我完成。这个场域会以所有可能的方式运作，每个行动都会改变被作用的对象。因此每个行动都会创造新的实相，所有场域皆以此方式被激活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Emotional charged feeling immediately sets up what you may think of as a tangent. It is expressed in some reality system. This is the inner nature of action. Those inner thoughts or desires, impulses not made physically real in your terms, will be made real within other systems.
quotes.translation: 充满情感的感受会立即形成你们所谓的切线，并在某个实相系统中表达出来。这就是行动的内在本质。那些在你们看来未在物质层面实现的内在思想、欲望或冲动，将在其他系统中成为真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: From the beginning we have been dealing with the nature of reality, beneath its many guises. The intellectual concepts will be enlarged in all areas--the scientific, metaphysical, psychological and psychic. These are the areas in which you and Ruburt are so personally intrigued.
quotes.translation: 从一开始我们就在探讨实相的本质，穿透其层层伪装。这些知性概念将在科学、形而上学、心理学和灵性等所有领域得到扩展——这些正是你和鲁柏深感兴趣的个人领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is a basic difference you see between a survival personality, and the personality as you know it. The individual in physical life shows his surface face, so to speak, outward. Inner psychological realities are hidden beneath the physically-oriented ego simply because it cannot afford to deal with them. Its one main purpose is simply to allow the personality to operate effectively within its physical environment.
quotes.translation: 你们要明白，存续人格与你所知的人格存在根本差异。可以说，物质生命中的个体展现的是其表面面貌，内在心理实相隐藏在物质导向的自我之下，只因自我无法处理这些实相。它的主要目的就是让人格在物质环境中有效运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This is the end of our analogy. The spirit of each of the four islands was itself intact, and the interchanges were chosen. You are not islands unto yourselves, except when you choose to be. Each counterpart views reality from its own viewpoint, and there is never any invasion.
quotes.translation: 我们的比喻到此结束。四个岛屿各自的灵性本质完好无损，而交流是自愿选择的。你们并非彼此孤立的岛屿，除非你们选择如此。每个对应体都从自身视角看待实相，且绝无任何侵犯。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 726
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: We shall have to consider, later, color as it appears in dreams, but this is not the time for such a discussion. Identities exist within dreams also, and here the same nature of identities applies, as those given earlier. The laws of action also apply here in the dream reality.
quotes.translation: 我们稍后必须探讨梦境中出现的色彩，但此刻并非讨论此事的时机。身份认同同样存在于梦境中，且在此处适用的身份本质与先前所述相同。行动法则在梦境实相中同样适用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind had nothing to do with this. He strongly wished for the friend's presence. The wish became reality. You must understand the rules that apply. For they apply whether or not you understand them, and whether or not the wish is one that you really want fulfilled.
quotes.translation: 意识心与此毫无关联。他强烈渴望那位朋友的出现。这渴望变成了实相。你必须理解适用的法则——无论你是否理解它们，无论这渴望是否真是你希望实现的，这些法则都同样适用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Here, however, the "reflections" do indeed speak, and take their own form. In a certain sense they are freewheeling, in that they have their own kind of reality. In the dream state your joys and fears talk back to you, perform, and act out the role in which you have cast them.
quotes.translation: 然而在此处，“倒影”确实会说话，并拥有自己的形态。从某种意义而言，它们是自由流转的，因为它们拥有自身独特的实相。在梦境状态中，你的喜悦与恐惧会对你回话，进行表演，并扮演你为它们设定的角色。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 721
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Again, the dimensions of the psyche must be experienced, to whatever degree. They cannot be simply defined. In the following chapter, then, I will suggest some exercises that will allow you direct experience with portions of your own reality that may have escaped you thus far.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，心灵的各维度必须被亲身经验——无论程度深浅。它们无法被简单定义。因此在下一章中，我将建议一些练习，让你能直接体验自身实相中那些至今可能被你忽略的部分。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: A direct cognition is involved in which each consciousness knows what each other one is doing, its "position," and the implications of its experience. The entire fabric and framework of time and reality at each point is ascertained, and the probabilities probed and understood.
quotes.translation: 这涉及一种直接认知：每个意识都知晓其他意识在做什么、其“位置”以及其经验的意涵。时间与实相的整体架构在每个节点都被确知，可能性被探查并理解。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I want to show you how form can be changed, even on your own plane, and give you clear examples here so that you will see how in the inner reality universe, vitality can and does change its form at will. This may sound difficult but I hope that it will be plain when I am done.
quotes.translation: 我想向你们展示形态如何能够改变，即使在你们自己的层面上也是如此，并在此给出清晰的例子，以便你们看到在内在实相宇宙中，活力如何能够且确实会随意改变其形态。这听起来可能有些困难，但我希望当我讲完后，它会变得清晰明了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Having determined upon physical reality as a dimension in which it will project itself, the inner self therefore first of all takes care to form and maintain the physical basis upon which all else must depend--those Physical properties of earth that can be called natural ones.
quotes.translation: 内在自体在决定将物质实相作为其投射自身的维度后，首先会小心地形成并维持所有其他事物必须依赖的物质基础——那些可被称为自然属性的地球物质特性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The inner ego has access, again, to a much vaster amount of knowledge. It is aware not only of its own private position, as you are of yours, but it is also familiar with the mass events of its reality. It is intimately involved in the creation of your own private experience.
quotes.translation: 内在自我同样能够接触到更为广博的知识。它不仅知晓自身的私人处境，就像你们了解自己的处境一样，还熟悉其所在实相中的群体事件。它密切参与着你们个人经验的创造。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 823, FEBRUARY 27, 1978
9:43 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: It is natural then that such a study will involve us in many allied matters. I may say that Buddhism does indeed come closer in essence to reality than other religions. However, the Buddhists either have not gone far enough, or have gone too far, according to your viewpoint.
quotes.translation: 因此，这样的研究自然会涉及许多相关议题。我可以说，佛教在本质上确实比其他宗教更接近实相。然而，根据你们的观点，佛教徒要么走得不够远，要么走得太远了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Learning is not simply passed on from living tissue to living tissue -- this your biologists have discovered -- but it is also passed on through the body's present corporeal reality, sometimes entirely changing the messages to past cells, that in your terms no longer exist.
quotes.translation: 学习并非简单地从活组织传递到活组织——你们的生物学家已经发现了这一点——它还会通过身体当前的物质实相传递，有时会完全改变传递给过去细胞的信息，而这些细胞在你们的时间观念中已不复存在。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It dwells in the physical universe, but it can indeed also perceive and appreciate other realities. The ego is part of the personality, and as such it can partake of sturdier, heartier, more vivid realities. The personality can dwell, and does dwell, in many worlds at once.
quotes.translation: 它栖居于物质宇宙中，但确实也能感知并欣赏其他实相。自我是人格的一部分，因此它能够参与更坚实、更丰沛、更生动的实相。人格可以同时栖居于——也确实栖居于——许多世界之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: This man will not be a stranger, yet he will not be the old Bernard, and Sarah can only help him by letting him know that she is there, and waiting. This is more important than it may appear, for the new ego will need guides to manipulate within physical reality once again.
quotes.translation: 这个人不会是个陌生人，但他也不会是过去的伯纳德，莎拉只能通过让他知道她在那里、在等待来帮助他。这比表面看起来更重要，因为新的自我需要向导，才能再次在物质实相中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is Seth's way of making still more information available. None of this is meant to deny the reality of your own physical system for you. The very nature of our sessions should show you that self structures are indeed transparent, and communications can flow through them.
quotes.translation: 这是赛斯提供更多信息的方式。这一切并非要否定你们自己的物质系统的实相。我们课程的实质应该向你们表明，自我结构确实是透明的，沟通可以通过它们流动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You exist and have effects in more realities than you know, and you perceive bits and pieces of other perspectives that appear in your own dimension. This is why I have told you, long ago, that your cause and effect theory was ludicrous. It only applies to your own dimension, and will never make headway in explaining those numberless projections that appear within your universe from a dimension separated from it.
quotes.translation: 你们存在于比你们所知的更多实相中，并在其中产生影响，你们还感知到出现在你们维度中的其他视角的片段。这就是为什么我很久以前告诉你们，你们的因果理论是荒谬的。它只适用于你们自己的维度，永远无法解释那些从与你们维度分离的维度中出现在你们宇宙中的无数投射。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: That soul constantly creates the body, and each individual on the face of the earth at any given time places his or her trust in that reality. That feeling of certainty is the same that any plant knows. Any idea, creative insight, or dream, rides upon the same sure thrust.
quotes.translation: 那个灵魂不断创造身体，地球上任何时刻的每个个体都将自己的信任寄托在那个实相中。那种确定感与任何植物所知的相同。任何想法、创造性洞见或梦境，都乘着同样确定的推力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 733
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I do not mean to speak of reason in derogatory terms, for it is well suited to its purposes, which are vital in your reality. It is also true that in the deepest terms you have not developed your reasoning, so that your version of it is bound to result in some distortions.
quotes.translation: 我并非要以贬义的方式谈论理性，因为它非常适合其目的，在你们的实相中至关重要。同样真实的是，在最深层的意义上，你们尚未发展出你们的理性，因此你们的理性版本必然会导致一些扭曲。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 825, MARCH 6, 1978
9:31 P.M. MONDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: He is reacting in an exaggerated manner to a truth--and the truth is that thoughts cause reality. He interprets this negatively (pause) because he is so afraid of hurting others. He takes it for granted that natural thought, left alone, will be destructive and hurt others.
quotes.translation: 他对一个真相反应过度——这个真相就是思想创造实相。他以消极的方式解读这一点（停顿），因为他如此害怕伤害他人。他理所当然地认为，自然的思想若不加干预，就会具有破坏性并伤害他人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Energy projected into any kind of construction, psychic or physical, cannot be recalled, but must follow the laws of the particular form into which it has been for the moment molded. Therefore, when the dreamer contracts his multi-realistic objects backward, ending for himself the so-called dream that he constructed, he ends it for himself only. But the reality of the dream continues.
quotes.translation: 投射到任何结构（无论心灵或物质）中的能量无法被召回，而必须遵循其暂时塑形所依循的特定形式法则。因此，当做梦者将多重实相客体向内收缩，为自己终结那所谓由他构建的梦境时，这终结仅对他自身有效。但梦境的实相仍在延续。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now, your physical universe is obviously composed of shared perceptions, and mass dreams would of course be of the same nature. Mass dreams are indeed a reality. They exist mainly at one particular level, and they have to do with what you may call for now, world pictures.
quotes.translation: 你们的物质宇宙显然由共享感知构成，而集体梦境自然也具有相同本质。集体梦境确实是实相。它们主要存在于某个特定层面，并与你们暂且可称为"世界图景"的事物相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: A large segment will also be concerned with that portion of reality that has time connotations for you. For you must deal with your idea of time, and manipulate within it while you hold it valid. When you realize it is not valid (smile), then instructions will be useless.
quotes.translation: 很大一部分还将涉及对你们具有时间意涵的那部分实相。因为当你们认定时间概念有效时，就必须处理时间观念并在其中运作。当你们意识到它无效时（微笑），指令便失去意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Ours is the voice that whispers through the corridors. The very matter of your physical brain has its greater reality in the mind, and behind that mind is another mind, and behind that another, and yet all of this is your mind. The mind of the larger self you do not know.
quotes.translation: 我们是那穿行于回廊间的低语。你们物质大脑的实质，其更大实相存在于心智中，而心智背后另有心智，再背后还有心智，然而这一切皆是你的心智。那更大自我的心智，你尚未知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: For many people, a natural calamity provides their first personal experience with the realities of creaturehood's connection with the planet. Under such conditions men who feel a part of nothing, of no structure or family or country, can understand in a flash their comradeship with the earth, their place upon it and its energy; through suddenly recognizing that relationship they feel their own power for action.
quotes.translation: 对许多人而言，自然灾害首次让他们亲身体验到生物性与地球相连的实相。在这种情境下，那些自觉不属于任何结构、家庭或国家的人，能瞬间领悟他们与地球的同胞情谊、自身在地球上的位置及其能量；通过突然认清这层关系，他们感受到自身行动的力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It cannot relate to a reality that you will not allow it to perceive. It can poorly help you to survive when you do not allow it to use its abilities to discover those true conditions in which it must manipulate. You put blinders upon it, and then say that it cannot see.
quotes.translation: 它无法关联到你不允许它感知的实相。当你不允许它运用能力去发现必须运作的真实状况时，它便难以助你生存。你给它戴上眼罩，然后说它看不见。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The answers to the nature of reality, the intimate knowledge of All That Is that you all seek, is within your present experience. It will not be found outside of yourselves, but through an inner journey into yourself, through yourself and through the world that you know.
quotes.translation: 关于实相本质的答案，以及你们所有人寻求的对一切万有的亲密认知，都存在于你们当下的体验之中。它不会在你们自身之外被找到，而是要通过一场向内探索自身的旅程，穿越自我、穿越你们所认知的世界才能获得。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You will learn to manipulate and control various levels of awareness, and the habit will carry over into other aspects of reality. With continued development you will be able to keep appointments and pass information in the dream state, and have your records to prove it.
quotes.translation: 你们将学会操控和掌握不同层次的觉知，这种习惯会延续到实相的其他面向。随着持续发展，你们将能在梦境状态中赴约并传递信息，并有记录为证。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner significances, however, the associations, existed all at once, to be tuned in to at any point of time. They had their reality basically apart from time, even though they appeared within it.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在的意义与关联是同时存在的，可以在任何时间点被调谐接收。它们本质上独立于时间而存在，即便它们显现于时间之中。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

quotes.text: These various stages of consciousness and fluctuations of psychic activity can also be examined through direct experience from the waking state. In the following chapter we will let you become more aware of these ever-active portions of your own reality. End of chapter.
quotes.translation: 这些不同的意识阶段与心灵活动的波动，也可以通过清醒状态下的直接体验来检视。在下一章中，我们将让你们更清楚地意识到自身实相中这些始终活跃的部分。本章结束。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: The units form themselves into the various systems that they have themselves initiated. They transform themselves, therefore, into the structured reality that they then become. Ruburt is quite correct in his supposition of what he calls "multipersonhood" in Adventures.1
quotes.translation: 这些单位会自行组织成它们所发起的各种系统。因此，它们将自身转化为结构化的实相，而后成为这样的实相。鲁柏在《探险》一书中关于他所谓的"多重人格"的假设是相当正确的。

quotes.text: You do not even perceive camouflage reality with your outer senses with any dependability. Telepathy, which belongs to the inner senses, is used constantly. Without it your languages would be meaningless. The inner senses, Philip, experience direct data instantaneously.
quotes.translation: 你们甚至无法可靠地通过外在感官感知伪装实相。属于内在感官的心灵感应被持续使用着。没有它，你们的语言将毫无意义。菲利普，内在感官能瞬间体验直接的数据。

quotes.text: The painting that results is a new reality, but it is also a distortion of the original landscape. The artist may hint at time within his painting, but he cannot capture the physical eons that might be contained in the mountains themselves, which he wishes to reproduce.
quotes.translation: 最终完成的画作是一个新的实相，但它也是对原始景观的扭曲。艺术家或许能在画中暗示时间，却无法捕捉山峦本身可能蕴含的物理纪元——那些他渴望再现的永恒。

quotes.translation: 口授：这些实相蓝图相对隐形，因为你们允许自己遗忘了它们的存在。

quotes.text: "I now want to put the sinful-self material in a larger spectrum," Seth told us in part. "Ideally, infants 'bond' with their parents, particularly with the mother but with the father also, and they bond with the general ideas of their society. This offers the sense of safety in which the youngster can then feel free and curious enough to explore its world and the nature of reality.
quotes.translation: 赛斯在部分内容中告诉我们："我现在想把有罪自我的材料放在更广阔的范畴中。理想状态下，婴儿与父母'联结'——尤其与母亲，也与父亲——并与社会的普遍观念建立联结。这种联结提供了安全感，使年轻人能够自由且充满好奇地探索其世界与实相的本质。"

quotes.text: Now in a very small way, admittedly, that analogy hints at the kind of deeper events that occur as selves are born out of selves to operate in various levels of activity. In the case of entities, each such self dwells entirely in its own dimension or system of reality.
quotes.translation: 诚然，这个比喻以极微小的方式暗示了更深层事件的发生过程：当自我从自我中诞生，在不同活动层面运作时。就存有而言，每个这样的自我完全栖居于自身的维度或实相系统中。

quotes.text: It is rather important that the reality of these electromagnetic systems be understood, as they are so important in the construction of physical images and dream images, and since they are responsible for the inner communication which takes place beneath consciousness.
quotes.translation: 理解这些电磁系统的实相相当重要，因为它们对构建物质影像与梦境影像至关重要，且负责意识层面之下发生的内在沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: The next adjacent level now would be A-1-c, which is an extension of the one just given, in which there is greater freedom of action, mobility and experience. Here to some extent there is some participation in the events perceived. There is no need to go deeply into any of these beyond this point, because ordinarily you will not be involved with them, and they lead into realities that have little reference to your own. They are states of consciousness too divorced, and under usual circumstances, this is as far as your present consciousness is able to go in that particular direction.
quotes.translation: 下一个相邻层级将是A-1-c，这是前述层级的延伸，在此有更大的行动自由、移动性与经验。在此，对感知到的事件有某种程度的参与。无需深入探讨这些层级，因为通常情况下你们不会涉及它们，它们导向与你们自身实相几无关联的实相。这些意识状态过于疏离，在正常情况下，你们当前的意识在特定方向上只能到达此处。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These camouflage ideas are as real and as useful, if not more so, than physical camouflage patterns. They also enable you to manipulate, and they of course also serve to hide you from or shield you from direct reality experiences which you cannot handle on your plane.
quotes.translation: 这些伪装观念与物质伪装模式同样真实有用，甚至有过之而无不及。它们同样能让你操控现实，当然也会将你无法在自身层面处理的直接实相体验隐藏或屏蔽起来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: They will do so in the same way that a nightmare will disappear if you realize that it is a product of your own subconscious. If you treat it as a reality however, then you must deal with it as such, until you realize its origin, or return to the ordinary dream state.
quotes.translation: 它们的作用方式如同噩梦——当你意识到它是自身潜意识的产物时，它便会消散。但若你将其视为实相，就必须以实相待之，直到认清其本源，或回归寻常梦境状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: This leads us then to an obvious conclusion: if event X were not perceived it would still be a probability only. By the same token, if our individual chose to perceive and experience, say, event Y, then event Y would be the reality, and event X would still be unreal.
quotes.translation: 这便引出一个显而易见的结论：若事件X未被感知，它便仅是一种可能性。同理，若个体选择感知并体验事件Y，那么事件Y便成为实相，而事件X仍属非实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is rather difficult for those who have not been in your system to understand that you give time and images a reality of their own, as if they existed apart from you. Form does not necessarily presuppose the existence of images. (Long pause.) Give us a moment here.
quotes.translation: 未曾身处你们系统的人很难理解：你们赋予时间与影像独立的实相性，仿佛它们能脱离你们而存在。形态未必预设影像的存在。（长停顿）请稍待片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The same atoms and molecules that are perceived in your system as physical objects are perceived in other systems as entirely different realities. Basically the same energy that composes a system projects into other systems, and it is perceived differently. Space, time, size, density, all of these are the results of your own perception.
quotes.translation: 在你们系统中被感知为物质实体的原子与分子，在其他系统中会被感知为截然不同的实相。构成某一系统的同一能量会投射到其他系统中，并以不同方式被感知。空间、时间、大小、密度——这一切皆是你们自身感知的结果。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You can project your dilemmas or your abilities outward into other avenues of activity, then, but until you realize that you form your reality and that your power resides in the moment, you will not be able to solve your problems nor utilize your strengths properly.
quotes.translation: 你们可以将困境或能力投射到其他活动途径中，但除非你们意识到自己创造实相，且力量存于当下，否则既无法解决问题，也无法善用自身优势。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: What you have, really, is a manifested and an unmanifested consciousness, but only relatively speaking. You do not perceive the consciousness of objects. It is not manifest to you because your range of activities requires boundaries to frame your picture of reality.
quotes.translation: 你真正拥有的是显意识与潜意识，但这只是相对而言。你无法感知物体的意识，因为它对你而言并不显化——你的活动范围需要界限来框定现实图景。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: His ego is indeed a healthy and vigorous one, but of a stubborn bent. For our purposes however this is actually excellent, for he is learning effectively to operate well in the physical environment while at the same time he is manipulating within that inner reality.
quotes.translation: 他的自我确实健康而充满活力，但带有固执倾向。不过这对我们的目的而言实属绝佳，因为他正有效学习在物质环境中良好运作，同时也在内在现实中运筹帷幄。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Until you learn this you learn little, and until you learn this you do not know what it means to be practical. If you did not think projection was possible for you, you would never achieve a projection. You create your reality, and no one else can create it for you.
quotes.translation: 除非你领悟这点，否则所学甚少；除非你明白这点，否则不懂何为务实。若你认为投射不可能实现，便永远无法达成投射。你创造自己的实相，无人能替你创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Often you do not trust your imagination, considering that it deals with phenomena that cannot be called fact. Therefore you artificially form a situation in which overall traces must be made. If you are too imaginative, for example, you may not be able to adequately deal with physical life. This applies only in the cultural media in which you presently operate, however. Originally, and in your terms of time, it was precisely the imagination that in its own way set you apart from other creatures, enabling you to form realities in your mind that you could "later" exteriorize.
quotes.translation: 你常不信任想象力，认为它处理的现象不能称为事实。因此你人为制造出必须留下整体痕迹的情境。例如，若想象力过于丰富，可能无法妥善处理物质生活——但这仅适用于你当前运作的文化媒介。按你们的时间概念而言，最初正是想象力以其独特方式将你与其他生物区分开来，使你能在心灵中构建出"日后"可外化的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Ruburt does extremely well with interior sound, and so I use that method rather than, say, an image to make my independent existence known. Now Ruburt called me originally (last Saturday night) at unconscious levels because he was upset with "earth programming." He thought that you needed some help from the outside, so to speak. That intent set up certain signals that reached into other realities or stations, and I answered. I was not speaking to Ruburt personally when he heard me, but addressing myself to the world at large in a program that was indeed picked up by others.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏极擅处理内在声音，因此我采用此法而非图像来彰显独立存在。上周六晚，鲁柏在潜意识层面最初召唤我，是因他对"地球程式"感到困扰。他认为你需要外界协助——这个意图在其它实相或站台建立了特定信号，而我回应了。当他听见我时，我并非对鲁柏个人说话，而是向整个世界的程式发言——这程式确实被其他人接收到了。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The chair is neither durable nor continuous, and its reality is limited to the recognition which you give it as an object.
quotes.translation: 椅子既不持久也不连续，它的实相仅限于你将其视为物体时所赋予的认知。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: And so it is from your larger identity that you form the reality that you know. It is up to you to do this with joy and vigor, clearing your conscious mind so that the deeper knowledge of your greater identity can form joyous expressions in the world of the flesh.
quotes.translation: 因此，正是从你更大的身份中，你构建了你所知的实相。你有责任以喜悦与活力完成此事，清理你的意识心智，以便你更大身份的深层知识能在肉身世界中形成喜悦的表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: New paragraph (as Seth often declares). When you identify with only one particular level of your thought processes, however, the others -- when you sense them -- appear alien. You begin to feel threatened, determined to uphold your old ideas of selfhood. Plants grow many leaves. One leaf does not threaten the existence of others, and the plant is not jealous of its own foliage. So there is no need to protect your own individuality because it may send out other shoots into probable realities. This is simply the self growing in different directions, spreading its seeds.
quotes.translation: 新段落（如赛斯常宣告的）。然而，当你只认同自己思维过程的某一个特定层面时，其他层面——当你感知到它们时——便会显得陌生。你开始感到威胁，决心维护你旧有的自我观念。植物生长出许多叶片。一片叶子不会威胁其他叶子的存在，植物也不会嫉妒自己的枝叶。因此，你无需保护自己的个体性，因为它可能将其他枝芽伸入可能的实相。这不过是自我向不同方向生长、播撒种子的过程。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. quotes.text: In one way or another, the living genetic system has an effect upon your cultural reality, and the reverse also applies. All of this is further complicated by the purposes and intents of the generations in any historical period, and the reincarnational influences.
quotes.translation: 活生生的基因系统会以某种方式影响你的文化实相，反之亦然。这一切又因任何历史时期中世世代代的目的与意图，以及转世影响而变得更加复杂。

source_raw.title: Here in Dreams Seth uses the uncertainty principle as an analogy (and an excellent one), meaning that as the positions and motions of elementary particles, say, cannot be simultaneously measured precisely, so our genetic qualities and their motions can not always be specifically determined. In Dreams he's already said (in Session 909) that the human species has an "amazing interplay between genetic preciseness and genetic freedom," and (in Session 910) that "your genetic structure reacts to each thought that you have, to the state of your emotions, to your psychological climate." Choices and probabilities apply. Thus do we avoid genetic rigidity.

quotes.text: Art is created, then, using time -- for example -- as a structure. In your terms time and space might be mixed. The beauties of various ages, the natural beauties, the paintings and buildings are all recreated as learning methods for these beginners. One of their main preoccupations is to create beauty that impinges itself in as many various dimensions of reality as possible.
quotes.translation: 艺术因此被创造出来——例如，以时间作为结构。以你们的说法，时间与空间可能被混合。各个时代的美景、自然之美、画作与建筑，都被重新创造，作为这些初学者的学习方法。他们的主要专注之一，是创造能尽可能多地冲击各种实相维度的美。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The crisis is a kind of therapy, however. It is a teaching method that you have set up for yourselves because you need it. And you need it now, before your species embarks upon journeys to other physical realities. You must learn your lessons now in your own backyard before you travel to other worlds. So you have brought this upon yourself for that purpose and you will learn. (End session at 11:55 P.M.)
quotes.translation: 然而，危机是一种疗法。这是你们为自己设定的教学方法，因为你们需要它。而你们现在就需要它，在你们的物种踏上前往其他物质实相的旅程之前。你们必须在前往其他世界之前，先在自己的后院学好功课。因此，你们为了这个目的而将这一切加诸自身，你们将会学会。（晚上11:55结束课程）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now the quasars represent pure energy, basically speaking. Your scientists presently have little idea of what this means, for comparatively speaking they conceive of energy in one-dimensional terms. You know what antimatter is. You know what positive matter is. Both of these represent realities that you can understand rather easily.
quotes.translation: 现在，类星体基本上代表纯粹的能量。你们的科学家目前对此几乎一无所知，因为相对而言，他们以单向度的概念来理解能量。你们知道反物质是什么。你们知道正物质是什么。这两者都代表你们能够轻易理解的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They are, you see, the only true realities. They are the only real foundations of existence. It is foolish, as Ruburt once said, to hate a storm or shake your fists at it and call it names. You laugh if you think of children or natives in such activities. It is useless to personify a storm and treat it as a demon, focusing upon its destructive elements, or those elements that to you appear destructive.
quotes.translation: 你看，它们才是唯一的真实实相。它们是存在唯一真实的基础。正如鲁柏曾说，憎恨一场风暴或对它挥舞拳头、辱骂它是愚蠢的。若你想到孩童或土著做这种事，你只会发笑。将风暴拟人化并视其为恶魔，只聚焦于它的破坏性元素——或那些在你看来具有破坏性的元素——是毫无益处的。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, regarding again the nature of action, I would like to discuss action in relation to the dream reality, for you are intimately familiar with action in dreams, and your practical experience will enable you to understand the true nature of action more clearly.
quotes.translation: 现在，再次论及行动的本质，我想讨论行动与梦境实相的关系，因为你对梦中的行动极为熟悉，你的实际经验将使你更清晰地理解行动的真实本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The spacious present is much more a vivid reality to those outside of your system. Your time seems marked, individually, by birth and death. When these are known for what they are, when the personality can change form at will, such quote "timing" is meaningless.
quotes.translation: 对你们系统之外的存在而言，"广袤的当下"是远为生动的实相。你们的时间似乎被出生与死亡所标记。当这些被认知为它们本来的面目，当人格能随意改变形态时，这种所谓的"时间标记"便毫无意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: These fundamental laws are followed on many levels in your own universe. So far I have given you but one, which is value fulfillment. In your physical universe this rule is followed as physical growth. The entity follows it through the cycle of [simultaneous] reincarnations. The species of mankind, and all other species in your universe on your particular horizontal plane, follow this law [value fulfillment] under the auspices of evolution (my emphasis).5 In other camouflage realities, this law is carried through in different manners, but it is never ignored.
quotes.translation: 这些基本法则在你们宇宙的许多层面上被遵循。到目前为止，我只给了你们一条法则，即"价值完成"。在你们的物质宇宙中，这条法则以物质成长的形式被遵循。存有通过[同时]转世的循环遵循它。人类物种以及你们宇宙特定水平面上所有其他物种，都在演化的庇护下遵循这条法则（我的强调）。在其他伪装实相中，这条法则以不同方式被贯彻，但从未被忽视。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Let us make a clear distinction here: Your conscious beliefs direct the flow of unconscious processes which bring your ideas into physical reality, so while your thoughts cause your experience, you are not consciously aware of how this takes place (forcefully).
quotes.translation: 让我们在此明确区分：你有意识的信念引导着无意识过程的流动，这些过程将你的想法带入物质实相。因此，虽然你的思想导致你的体验，但你并未有意识地知晓这如何发生（有力地）。

quotes.text: In a way, it is meant to familiarize you with elements of your own reality of which you may have been unaware, and to introduce you to certain subjective states of mind that are automatically aroused because of the manner in which the book was produced. Period.
quotes.translation: 从某种意义上说，它旨在让你熟悉自己实相中可能未曾察觉的元素，并引导你进入某些自动被唤起的主观意识状态——这些状态因本书的创作方式而被激发。句号。

quotes.translation: 一般而言，它们并不像云朵那样坚实，却具有形状、一定程度的边界，当然还有运动。它们确实具有实相，你看，尽管你通常无法用肉体感官感知它。

quotes.text: The realization that you form your own reality should be a liberating one. You are responsible for your successes and your joys. You can change those areas of your life with which you are less than pleased, but you must take the responsibility for your being.
quotes.translation: 认识到你创造自己的实相应是一种解放。你为自己的成功与喜悦负责。你可以改变生活中那些不尽如人意的领域，但你必须为自己的存在承担责任。

quotes.text: You originate ideas then and receive them, but you are not forced to actualize unrealized probable acts that come to you from other probable selves. Now there is a natural attraction between yourself and other probable selves, electromagnetic connections having to do with simultaneous propulsions of energy. By this I mean energy that appears simultaneously both to you and probable selves in other realities; psychic connections having to do with a uniting, sympathetic, emotional reaction and a connection that shows up very strongly in the dream state.
quotes.translation: 你既创造想法也接收想法，但你不必被迫实现来自其他可能自我的未实现可能行动。现在，你与其它可能自我之间存在一种自然吸引力，即与能量同时推进相关的电磁连接。我指的是同时显现在你与其它实相中可能自我面前的能量；以及涉及统一、共情、情感反应的心灵连接——这种连接在梦境状态中表现得尤为强烈。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Now: Others, finished with reincarnations and of a different overall nature, may begin the long journey leading toward the vocation of a creator. On a much different plane, this can be compared to geniuses in creative fields within your own physical reality.
quotes.translation: 现在：那些已完成轮回、具有不同整体本质的存有，可能开始迈向创造者使命的漫长旅程。在截然不同的层面上，这可比拟为你们物质实相中创意领域的天才。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your Christ had abilities which I still do not have... and he did appear in your form, but he was not of your form... Your people saw but a small fragment that they could understand... a fragment that was part of a larger reality they could not understand...
quotes.translation: 你们的基督拥有我至今仍不具备的能力……他确实以你们的形态显现，但他并非源自你们的形态……你们的人民只看到他们能理解的一小片段……那片段属于他们无法理解的更大实相的一部分……
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: This, again, is not to say that it is not real, but that it is not a primary reality that is more or less constant for the inner self. If an experience is a part of all levels of consciousness--this includes the trance state--then it is a primary experience.
quotes.translation: 这并非说它不真实，而是说它并非内在自我所感知的那种或多或少恒常的主要实相。若某体验涉及所有意识层次——包括出神状态——那它便是主要体验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: As a result however, you are somewhat less apt to accept dream reality as actual, and I must tell you that it is, particularly since you are considering certain experiments along these lines. You are in control as long as you realize that you are in control.
quotes.translation: 然而因此，你较不易将梦境实相视为真实，而我必须告诉你它确实真实，尤其当你正考虑沿此方向进行某些实验时。只要你意识到自己处于掌控之中，你便始终掌控着局面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Form of any kind, and there is form within dream reality, form is first of all a potential form, existing within psychic energy. The potential form therefore exists long before it's physical materialization, as far as your physical perceptions are concerned.
quotes.translation: 任何形态——梦境实相中亦存在形态——首先都是存在于心灵能量中的潜在形态。就你的物质感知而言，这种潜在形态在其实体物质化之前早已存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Knowledge is usually passed down through the ages in your reality, through books and historic writings, yet each individual contains within himself or herself a vast repository: direct knowledge of the past, in your terms, through unconscious comprehension.
quotes.translation: 在你们的实相中，知识通常通过书籍与历史文献代代相传，然而每个个体内在都蕴藏着浩瀚宝库：以你们的时间观而言，通过无意识领悟获得的关于过去的直接知识。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: Now: Dictation: There are natural feedback systems within the body and psyche that operate to set up optimum frameworks of balance, in which your growth and development can take place. There is some difference here, which was mentioned earlier (in the 636th session in Chapter Nine), between you and the animals and the particular way in which you create your reality ...
quotes.translation: 现在：口授：身体与心灵内部存在天然反馈系统，运作以建立最佳平衡框架，使你们的成长与发展得以进行。此处存在些许差异（于第九章第636节中曾提及），关乎你们与动物之间，以及你们创造自身实相的特殊方式……
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: -- no Preface. Chapter One: You come into the condition you call life, and pass out of it. In between you encounter a lifetime. Suspended -- or so it certainly seems -- between birth and death, you wonder at the nature of your own being. You search your experience and study official histories of the past, hoping to find there clues as to the nature of your own reality.
quotes.translation: ——无前言。第一章：你们进入你们称之为生命的境况，而后离开它。在此之间，你们经历一生。悬置于——或至少看似如此——出生与死亡之间，你们对自身存在的本质感到惊奇。你们审视自身经验，研习过往的官方历史，期望从中找到关于自身实相本质的线索。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The purpose of the Speakers is to help you correlate and understand this multidimensional existence, and to bring as much as possible of it to your conscious attention. Only by learning to feel, or sense, or intuitively perceive the depths of your own experience can you glimpse the nature of All That Is. By becoming more aware of your consciousness as it operates in physical life, you can learn to watch it as it manipulates through these other less familiar areas. Probable realities are only probable to you because you are not aware of them.
quotes.translation: 传述者的目的是协助你关联并理解这多维存在，尽可能将其中大部分内容带入你的意识觉知。唯有通过学习感受、感知或直觉体悟自身经验的深度，你才能一窥一切万有的本质。当你更清晰地觉察意识在物质生命中的运作时，便能学会观察它如何穿梭于这些较不熟悉的领域。或然实相对你而言之所以只是或然的，是因为你尚未觉察到它们。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: These psychic entities are real, however. It is quite true to say that their reality consists not only of the core of their own identity, but also is reinforced by those projected thoughts and feelings of the earthly audience for whom the drama is enacted.
quotes.translation: 然而这些灵性实体是真实的。完全可以这样说：它们的实相不仅包含自身核心的身份认同，更因那些为戏剧上演的人间观众所投射的思想与情感而得到强化。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The reality and the framework within which these sessions exist have electrical and chemical organizations also, that require a delicate focus that was upset this evening. It is simply more difficult then for Ruburt to make the necessary inner adjustments.
quotes.translation: 这些课程存在的实相与框架同样具有电性与化学组织，需要精微的聚焦——而今晚这种聚焦被打乱了。因此鲁柏更难做出必要的内在调整。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Here now once more, let me repeat that thoughts are definite electromagnetic realities. Therefore, being actions, they affect all other actions, and if I repeat this in session after session, I do so, so that it will never be forgotten. Therefore these secondary conditions are strengthened through the very act, or misact of thinking that they are primary rather than secondary elements in action.
quotes.translation: 在此再次重申：思想是明确无误的电磁实相。既然思想是行动，它们就会影响所有其他行动。若我一再在课程中重复这点，正是为了确保它永不被遗忘。因此，当人们错误地将次要元素视为行动中的主要元素时，这些次要条件便通过这种思维行为或错误思维行为本身得到强化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: In all cases, however, such situations instantly bring to mind questions of man's own reality and source, his connections with God, his planet, and the universe. He interprets those questions according to his own beliefs. Let us then look at some of them.
quotes.translation: 然而在所有情况下，这类情境都会立即引发关于人类自身实相与本源、与神、与地球及宇宙关联的疑问。人们会依据自身信念诠释这些疑问。现在让我们审视其中一些。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: You form your own reality. If you are tired of having me stress that point, I can only say that I hope the repetition will serve to make you understand that the statement applies to the most minute and the most important of the events that you experience.
quotes.translation: 你创造自己的实相。若你已厌倦我强调这点，我只能说，希望这重复能让你明白：这个陈述适用于你所经历的最细微与最重要的事件。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are, then, constructions that are known only through their effects. These constructions are those which most closely approximate inner reality, in that they are not as completely imprisoned in form or matter, but in themselves change form or matter.
quotes.translation: 因此，有些建构仅通过其效应而被认知。这些建构最接近内在实相，因为它们并未完全受困于形式或物质，而是自身能改变形式或物质。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Our friend attempted to choose a different battleground last evening. He decided to think of his symptoms as an enemy, and to give them form in another plane of reality where he could do battle with them. Now this was not an astral plane, but a lower one.
quotes.translation: 昨晚我们的朋友试图选择不同的战场。他决定将自己的症状视为敌人，并在另一个实相层面赋予其形式，以便与之战斗。这并非星光层，而是一个较低的层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The idiot is often able to experience in his or her own reality a freer, more generous, more faithful flow of emotional states, unhampered by reason's sometimes stern dictates, and it is important that such a moderating tendency does operate genetically.
quotes.translation: 白痴往往能在其自身实相中体验到更自由、更丰沛、更忠实的情感流动，不受理性有时严苛指令的束缚，而此类调节倾向在基因层面运作，这一点至关重要。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The inner senses perceive the psychic reality and transmit messages from it. We speak of these as separate, again, only for convenience, for we have but various abilities and various aspects of a self. The divisions are arbitrary. This is very important.
quotes.translation: 内在感官感知心灵实相并从中传递信息。我们再次仅为了方便而将其分开讨论，因为我们拥有的不过是自我的不同能力与不同面向。这些划分是武断的。这一点非常重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Yet within the dream state the familiar physical props sometimes disappear. The inner I operates very well without them. In order to manipulate a physical reality however, the inner I needs a self that is acclimated to physical conditions; hence the ego.
quotes.translation: 然而在梦境状态中，熟悉的物质支撑有时会消失。内在自我无需它们也能运作自如。但为了操控物质实相，内在自我需要一个适应物质条件的自我，因此便有了自我（ego）。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: There are space-time coordinates that operate from your viewpoint -- and space travel from the standpoint of your time, made along the axis of your space, will be a relatively sterile procedure. (In parentheses: Some reported instances of UFO's happened in the past as far as the visitors were concerned, but appeared as images or realities in your present. This involves craft sightings only.* )
quotes.translation: 从你们的视角来看，存在时空坐标——而从你们的时间立场出发，沿着你们空间的轴线进行的太空旅行，将是一个相对贫瘠的过程。（括号内：一些关于UFO的报告案例，就访客而言发生在过去，但在你们的当下却显现为影像或实相。这仅涉及飞船目击事件。）

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Energy cannot be imprisoned for long within one form. The individual whole self, by its very nature, will not restrain itself indefinitely to the particular set of necessities and perceptions necessary for survival within any one given field of reality.
quotes.translation: 能量无法长久地被禁锢在单一形态中。个体整体自性，就其本质而言，不会无限期地自我限制于任何特定实相领域内生存所需的特定条件与感知模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Either will be some experience for you, I can promise you. (Humorously and emphatic.) Both demand a concentration and focus into the basic reality from which painting comes, rather than upon the painting itself. They will acquaint you with their source.
quotes.translation: 我可以向你保证，两者都将为你带来某种体验。（幽默而强调地）两者都需要你将注意力与焦点集中于绘画所源自的基本实相，而非画作本身。它们将引领你认识其源头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now when I say there was a state of nonbeing, and yet speak of All That Was, existing simultaneously in that state, I mean (Pause), that All That Is did exist, itself, obviously in a state of being, but in a state in which it could not find expression for its own being. This was the state of agony of which I spoke. Yet it is doubtful that without this "period" in quotes, of contracted yearning, that All That Is could concentrate its energy sufficiently enough to create the realities that existed in probable suspension within it.
quotes.translation: 现在，当我说存在一种"非存在"的状态，却又谈及"万有"同时存在于该状态时，我的意思是（停顿）："万有"确实以存在状态存在，但处于一种无法表达自身存在的状态。这就是我所说的痛苦状态。然而，若没有这个带引号的"收缩渴望期"，"万有"很可能无法充分凝聚其能量，创造出那些曾以潜在悬浮状态存在于其内的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There is a strong connection between what I have been saying and the way in which you translate inner reality into symbolic form, either in the waking life, as objects, or in the dreaming state as dream images. I am working from the other end, you see.
quotes.translation: 我一直在说的内容，与你们将内在实相转化为象征形式的方式之间存在强烈关联——无论是在清醒生活中转化为物体，还是在梦境状态中转化为梦象。你看，我是从另一端着手工作的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: For this projection of inner into outer is automatic. Understanding the processes involved is of great benefit. The physical self seems(underlined) to react to physical stimuli. Actually, of course, it is reacting to its own reality, projected outward.
quotes.translation: 因为这种内在向外在的投射是自动发生的。理解其中所涉及的过程大有裨益。物质自我看似（划线强调）对物质刺激做出反应。实际上，它当然是在对其自身向外投射的实相做出反应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You do not know the self as it is within physical existence, and until you do you cannot hope to know what survives physical death, or what part of you is awake while the ego sleeps. When I refer to the ego I do so for simplicity's sake, since the term has meaning to you. There are obviously portions of the self that never operate directly within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 你并不了解物质存在中的自性本貌，除非你了解这一点，否则你无法期望知道什么在物质死亡后依然存续，或当自我沉睡时你的哪一部分是清醒的。我提及"自我"一词是为了简便起见，因为这个术语对你们而言具有意义。显然，自性中有某些部分从未直接在物质实相中运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The dream world and the mind are touched by time, and exist in it only in so far as these realities dip into the camouflage universe. Basically both the dream world and the ideas of the inner mind do not have their existence in time, although they may be visible from the perspective of time, viewed from the physical form.
quotes.translation: 梦境世界与心灵皆受时间触及，仅当这些实相潜入伪装宇宙时才存在于时间之中。从根本上说，梦境世界与内在心灵的理念并不存在于时间里，尽管从物质形相的角度来看，它们可能从时间的视角被看见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality I stated that the point of action occurs in the present.10 In Adventures in Consciousness Ruburt said, quite properly, that time experience actually splashed out from the present to form an apparent past and future.11
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中，我曾指出行动的点发生在当下。在《意识探险》中，鲁柏恰当地说，时间体验实际上从当下溅射而出，形成看似存在的过去与未来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: The personality can indeed put itself together in multitudinous fashions. There is great leeway in the use of inner and outer perceptions, and the manners in which these are mixed and matched to form an acceptable picture of reality at any given time.
quotes.translation: 人格确实能以无数种方式重组自身。内在与外在感知的运用有极大弹性空间，这些感知被混合搭配的方式，在任何特定时刻都能形成可接受的实相画面。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

source_raw.title: At the beginning of the notes for this 920th session I wrote that the session isn't dictation for Dreams. Yet it is, of course, since in it Seth illuminates from still another perspective his concept of value fulfillment.8 The session grew out of the encounter we had yesterday afternoon with an unexpected visitor from out of state. Seth hardly mentions the individual involved, however, but instead goes into the subject of mental illness in more inclusive terms. I see many correlations between this evening's material and that in Session 917 for Chapter 8; there, among other things, Seth had discussed the reasoning mind, the imaginative mind, and schizophrenia. That session had been triggered, at least in part, by a letter Jane had found to be quite upsetting.

quotes.text: Your inner environment is the total of your inner (underlined) perceptions of inner reality. This is what you have to work with, and the raw material practically available. You then project this into physical events which you then physically perceive.
quotes.translation: 你的内在环境是你对内在实相的全部内在感知的总和。这是你必须与之共事的素材，也是实际可用的原材料。然后你将其投射到物质事件中，再以物质方式感知这些事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Jehovah and the Christian version of God brought about a direct conflict between the so-called forces of good and the so-called forces of evil by largely cutting out all of the intermediary gods, and therefore destroying the subtle psychological give-and-take that occurred between them--among them--and polarizing man's own view of his inner psychological reality.
quotes.translation: 耶和华与基督教版本的上帝，通过大幅剔除所有中间神祇，从而摧毁了它们之间——以及它们彼此之间——微妙的心理互动，并将人类对其内在心理实相的看法极化，直接导致了所谓善与所谓恶力量之间的冲突。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The agony itself and the stupendous desire to create represented its proof of its own reality. The feelings in other words were adequate proof to All That Is that it was. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 痛苦本身与那巨大的创造欲望，便是其自身实相的证据。换言之，这些感受对一切万有而言，足以证明它的存在。（停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: When the thought is thought, it is, say, broken down again to those components. Your thoughts have an emotional basis, also. The smallest c-e-l-l (spelled) within your body contributes to that emotional reality, and reacts instantly to your thoughts.
quotes.translation: 当念头被思考时，它会被分解回那些组成部分。你的念头也有情感基础。你身体里最小的细胞也贡献于那个情感实相，并立即对你的念头做出反应。

quotes.text: When the lessons are learned there is no need for physical reality. The survival instinct, strongly connected with the physical self, keeps it anchored in focus within your system. Without it consciousness would tend to float free. It is your anchor.
quotes.translation: 当功课被学会后，物质实相就不再需要了。与物质自体紧密相连的生存本能，将其锚定在你的系统焦点内。没有它，意识就会倾向于自由漂浮。它是你的锚。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Personality is a gestalt of ever-changing perception. It is the part of the identity which perceives. I do not force my perceptions upon the woman through whom I speak, nor is her consciousness blotted out during our communications. Instead there is an expansion of her consciousness and a projection of energy that is directed away from three-dimensional reality.
quotes.translation: 人格是不断变化的感知的完形。它是身份中感知的部分。我不将我的感知强加于我所借以说话的女人，在我们的沟通中她的意识也不会被抹去。相反，她的意识会扩展，能量会投射，远离三维实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In its way the meson may have all of the "time" it needs, or wants. It may look upon our world as one frozen or motionless, upon other subatomic particles as very slow-moving indeed, or even faster than it is. (As far as "time" goes, some particles live for far less than a trillionth of a second.) I'm quite sure, however, that the meson, or any short-lived particle, searches out its own kind of value fulfillment while here with us. Probable realities, which I haven't even mentioned, must be deeply involved also.
quotes.translation: 以其方式，介子可能拥有它所需或想要的所有"时间"。它可能将我们的世界视为冻结或静止的，将其他亚原子粒子视为确实移动得非常缓慢，甚至比它更快。（就"时间"而言，有些粒子的寿命远低于万亿分之一秒。）然而，我很确定，介子或任何短命粒子，在和我们一起时，会寻找它自己的那种价值完成。我甚至还没提到的可能实相，也必定深深参与其中。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 1. In Volume 1 of "Unknown" Reality, I wrote in Note 7 for Session 681 that atoms are "processes" rather than things. The classical conception of the typical atom as being composed of a neat nucleus of indivisible protons and neutrons circled by electrons is largely passé, although for convenience's sake we may still describe the atom that way. (In those terms, the one exception is the hydrogen atom, which evidently consists of but one proton and one electron cloud, or "smear.") For the simple purposes of this note, then, I'm leaving out considerations involving quantum mechanics, which concept repudiates the idea of "particles" to begin with. (And surely that notion involves more than a little of the psychic, or "irrational." What a heretical thought from the scientific viewpoint!) But each atom of whatever element is an amazingly complicated, finely balanced assemblage of forces and particles woven together in exquisite detail--one of the more basic examples of the unending and stupendous creativity, order, and design of nature, or consciousness, or All That Is.

quotes.text: They are equipped to focus along particular directions. This material will be extremely interesting when we come to it. It is extremely difficult for a psychological structure to view itself, for in order to do so it must lift itself from the limitations and abilities of its own nature. In many realities such scrutiny is simply impossible, while the structure operates in a given fashion.
quotes.translation: 它们被配备来沿着特定方向聚焦。当我们谈到这个时，这资料会非常有趣。一个心理结构极难审视自身，因为为了这样做，它必须将自己从其本性的限制和能力中提升出来。在许多实相中，当结构以特定方式运作时，这样的审视根本不可能。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: They come to understand then their basic oneness, while still retaining their own identity, since change is never still. In quotes: "By the time" this realization comes, inner value fulfillment has already created new realities. The answer, as closely as I can approximate it for you, is this: the purpose is being. This is something different than your idea (underlined) of brute survival.
quotes.translation: 然后它们开始理解它们基本的一体性，同时仍保留它们自己的身份，因为改变从未停止。引号内："到"这个领悟"到来时"，内在价值完成已经创造了新的实相。答案，尽我所能为你近似表达，是这样的：目的是存在。这与你（划线强调的）野蛮生存的想法不同。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It is like your stereophonic reality from many levels. You are operating on mono, you see, as a rule. There is no doubt that this sort of experience is new to the ego, which is used to interpreting Sense data in highly rigid and specialized terms.
quotes.translation: 这就像你们从许多层面体验到的立体实相。通常来说，你们只运作在单声道上。毫无疑问，这种体验对自我来说是陌生的，因为自我习惯用高度僵化且专门化的术语来解读感官资料。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The coordinates have nothing to do with time as you know it, nor with space as you know it, though in your system they form the reality in which time and space appear. A creative event is far more significant than twenty years of boredom, you see.
quotes.translation: 这些坐标与你们所认知的时间无关，也与你们所认知的空间无关，尽管在你们的系统中，它们构成了时间与空间得以显现的实相。一个创造性的事件远比二十年的乏味生活更有意义，你们明白吗？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Other personalities, again, are being born "there," but their season or reality is different than yours.
quotes.translation: 同样地，其他人格正在"那里"诞生，但他们的季节或实相与你们的不同。

quotes.text: Again generally speaking, they are always more at home with ideas, philosophies, and nontangible realities. They are thinkers always a bit apart, their body types showing a lack of muscular development. Poets and artists, while somewhat of this nature, as a rule are more deeply appreciative of the physical values of earthly existence, although they have many of the same characteristics.
quotes.translation: 再次泛泛而言，他们总是更自在于理念、哲学和非物质实相。他们是永远有些疏离的思想家，其体型显示出肌肉发育不足。诗人和艺术家虽然多少带有这种特质，但通常更深刻地欣赏尘世存在的物质价值，尽管他们也有许多相同的特征。

quotes.text: Philosophies that teach denial of the flesh must ultimately end up preaching a denial of the self and building a contempt for it, because even though the soul is couched in muscle and bone it is meant to experience that reality, not to refute it.
quotes.translation: 教导否定肉体的哲学，最终必然导致否定自我并建立对自我的轻蔑，因为即使灵魂被包裹在肌肉与骨骼之中，其本意也是要体验那个实相，而非否定它。

quotes.text: I close by saying, as I have said before: You are given the gift of the gods; you create your reality according to your beliefs; yours is the creative energy that makes your world; there are no limitations to the self except those you believe in.
quotes.translation: 最后我要重申之前说过的话：你被赋予了神明的礼物；你根据自己的信念创造自己的实相；你的创造力塑造了你的世界；除了你相信的限制之外，自我没有任何限制。

quotes.text: Underneath this recognized order of events, however, there is actually a vast field of ever-occurring action. These fields of probabilities are action sources for your reality; but your world-action is also a source for these other probabilities.
quotes.translation: 然而，在这被认可的事件秩序之下，实际上存在着一个不断发生行动的广阔领域。这些或然性领域是你实相的行动来源；但你的世界行动也是这些其他或然性的来源。

quotes.text: Remember, again, the manifest [universe] emerges from a subjective reality, one that is implied in the very nature of your world itself. I would like you, then, to think of those units of consciousness from an entirely different scale of events.

quotes.text: It is very difficult to explain to you that the universes that you see, the stars and planets that you view, are one-dimensional, comparatively speaking. You only perceive the portions of them that are apparent within your own system of reality.

quotes.text: Ruburt is learning to minutely experience -- change that -- Ruburt is learning to minutely alter his experience with the probable atomic correlations that exist quite as validly as does the particular kind of atomic integrity that you generally recognize. When he does so, in your terms, he alters atomic receptivity. This automatically brings probabilities to the forefront. To perceive other realities you alter your own coordinates, tuning them in to other systems and attracting those into your focus.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏正在学习细微地体验——修正一下——鲁柏正在学习利用同样真实存在的或然原子关联，来细微地改变他的经验，正如你们通常认知的那种特定原子完整性一样真实。当他这样做时，用你们的话说，他改变了原子的接受性。这自动将或然性带到前台。要感知其他实相，你改变自己的坐标，将它们调谐到其他系统，并吸引那些进入你的焦点。

quotes.text: This is not the result of any inherent egotistical quality. It is true that the egos responsibility is with the relationship between the self and the physical environment. It must of necessity be focused within the confines of physical reality.
quotes.translation: 这并非任何固有的自我中心特质的结果。确实，自我的责任在于处理自我与物质环境之间的关系。它必然必须聚焦于物质实相的界限之内。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Now: To some extent or another there are counterparts12 of all realities within your psyche. When you slow down, or quicken your thoughts or your perceptions, you automatically begin to alter your focus, to step aside from your officially recognized existence. This is highly important, for in certain terms you are indeed transcending the time framework that you imagine to be so real.
quotes.translation: 现在：在某种程度上，所有实相都在你的心灵中有其对应物。当你放慢或加快你的思想或感知时，你自动开始改变你的焦点，从你官方认可的存在中抽身而出。这非常重要，因为在某些方面，你确实在超越你想象中如此真实的时间框架。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now, even the home skies about you are filled with other realities, as I have said often. You will perceive the existence of these realities with various instruments in the future, but only their existence. You will not perceive their nature.
quotes.translation: 现在，正如我常说的，甚至你们头顶的天空也充满了其他实相。未来你们将用各种仪器感知到这些实相的存在，但只能感知到它们的存在。你们无法感知它们的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: You do not understand the diversity of life-forms within your own reality. Their scope escapes you. You perceive them stuck like living specimens on the glass of present time, with no comprehension of their multitudinous expression elsewhere.
quotes.translation: 你们不了解自己实相内生命形式的多样性。它们的范围超出了你们的理解。你们将它们视为像活标本一样粘在当下时间的玻璃上，完全不了解它们在其他地方的无数种表达方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Man has always attempted to examine those realities that he could perceive through the outer senses. Because of the apparent objectivity involved, this has been comparatively easy for him to do. The entire inner universe is far more varied, more complicated, than your physical universe, yet it could be conceived of as the same sort of universe with certain substitutions being made.
quotes.translation: 人类始终试图检视那些能透过外在感官感知的实相。由于涉及明显的客观性，这对人类而言相对容易。整个内在宇宙远比你们的物质宇宙更多样、更复杂，然而它可被视为同一类宇宙，只需进行某些替换。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are not known for what you are in these dimensions. You are not recognized in your human form. You are known only by effects. In some of these dimensions you are chemically and even electrically a reality, in others electro-magnetically.
quotes.translation: 在这些维度中，你们并不因本相而被知晓。你们不以人类形态被识别。你们仅凭效应被认知。在某些维度中，你们是化学甚至电性实相，在其他维度中则是电磁性实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: I can say little until much more background is given, but this electrical reality is vastly dense.
quotes.translation: 在提供更多背景之前我无法多言，但这电性实相极为稠密。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Individually, you move in a very limited area of this vast universe, and yet inner reality is more
quotes.translation: 个体而言，你们在这浩瀚宇宙中仅活动于极有限区域，然而内在实相更为广阔。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: In other words, subjective play is the basis for all creativity, of course--but far more, it is responsible for the great inner play of subjective and objective reality.
quotes.translation: 换言之，主观游戏当然是所有创造力的基础——但远不止于此，它更负责主观与客观实相那伟大的内在游戏。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: "You do not perceive the consciousness within the self. You do not perceive the consciousness within a star, either--yet the star is the physical materialization in your reality of another kind of consciousness, and all you perceive of it."
quotes.translation: "你们并未感知自我内的意识。你们也未感知星辰内的意识——然而星辰是另一种意识在你们实相中的物质化显现，而你们所感知的仅是它的表象。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
