source_raw.title: 2. Sometimes together, sometimes separately, Jane and I listen to portions of the tapes students had made of the sessions and other exciting happenings in her ESP classes. I'd hardly put into shape for Session 933 my musings about the workings of consciousness than I heard Seth come through with these two passages; at once they reminded me of what I'd just been writing about.

quotes.text: I am interested in adding now to our own discussions, for it is time that we enlarged both their quality and scope. We will almost immediately embark upon a more concentrated study of the personality as it operates within its dream reality.
quotes.translation: 我现在有兴趣为我们的讨论增添新内容，因为到了该拓展其品质与范围的时候了。我们将几乎立即开始更深入地研究人格在其梦境实相中的运作方式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Inner perceptions enlarge the ego's idea of reality however so adjustments are made. It is the ego that insists upon separating itself from events, preferring to imagine itself a spectator above events, rather than a participator in events.
quotes.translation: 内在感知拓展了自我对实相的概念，因此会做出调整。正是自我坚持将自己与事件分离，宁愿把自己想象成事件的旁观者，而非参与者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: An artist does the same thing in different terms, when he or she imagines the probable versions that a painting, or a book or a sculpture, for example, might take. (Pause.) The artist does not usually understand, however, that those probable art productions do literally exist; he perceives only the final, physically chosen work. Speaking simply, some of us are able to hold intact the nature of our own identities while following patterns of probable realities in which we also play a part.
quotes.translation: 现在：艺术家用不同的方式做着同样的事，当他或她想象一幅画、一本书或一件雕塑可能呈现的版本时。（停顿。）然而，艺术家通常并不理解那些可能的艺术作品确实存在；他只感知到最终在物质层面被选中的作品。简单来说，我们有些人能够在遵循我们参与其中的可能实相模式时，完整保持自身身份的本质。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Consciousness or action forms all realities. What is not simply represents a possibility which consciousness may bring to life. (Long pause.) Consciousness then formed out of itself a new dimension which was the physical one. The formation, the explosion, of energy, shattered consciousness into an infinity of parts, each with all the abilities in here within consciousness itself.
quotes.translation: 意识或行动形成所有实相。未显现的只是意识可能赋予生命的可能性。（长停顿。）意识随后从自身形成一个新的维度，即物质维度。能量的形成与爆发将意识粉碎成无限部分，每个部分都具备意识本身内在的所有能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You seem to perceive exclusively through your physical senses, and yet you have only to extend your egotistical idea of reality, and you will find even your egotistical self accepting quite readily the existence of nonphysical information.
quotes.translation: 你似乎只通过物质感官感知，但你只需扩展你对实相的自我概念，就会发现即使你的自我也相当乐意接受非物质信息的存在。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In your terms the earth at any given time represents the most exquisite physical, spiritual, and psychic cooperation, in which all consciousnesses are related and contribute to the overall reality. Physically, this is somewhat understood.
quotes.translation: 用你们的说法，地球在任何特定时刻都代表着最精妙的物质、灵性与心灵合作，其中所有意识都相互关联并贡献给整体实相。在物质层面，这一点已得到某种程度的理解。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All limitations, basically, are self-adopted. They may be necessary at one time or another, but they can never be primary realities. Limitations, in other words, are illusion. You have to deal with them only because you have created them. Your exterior circumstances are the materializations of inner climate.
quotes.translation: 所有限制，基本上都是自我采纳的。它们可能在某些时候是必要的，但永远不能成为首要实相。换句话说，限制是幻相。你之所以必须处理它们，只是因为你自己创造了它们。你的外在环境是内在气候的物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: "Nothing in the universe is ever lost, or mislaid, or wasted, so the energy of your own thoughts, while they are still your own thoughts, helps to form the natural attributes of physical realities that you do not perceive. So is your own world formed by units of consciousness. Its natural elements are the glistening remnants of other units of consciousness that you do not see."
quotes.translation: "宇宙中没有任何东西会丢失、错放或浪费，因此你思想本身的能量，当它们仍是你自己的思想时，有助于形成你未感知到的物质实相的自然属性。你的世界就是这样由意识单位形成的。它的自然元素是你未见的其他意识单位的闪烁残余。"
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now when this ego becomes overly concerned over practical matters it becomes overly conditioned to negative responses. The outer senses are not as quick or as fluent. The creative energies build up their thickly-dimensioned pseudo realities of pain. For a certain amount of time, according to your condition, they automatically create the patterns of fear that belong to the ego.
quotes.translation: 当这个自我过度关注实际事务时，它就会过度受制于负面反应。外在感官变得不那么敏捷或流畅。创造性能量堆积起它们那厚密维度的痛苦伪实相。根据你的状况，在一段时间内，它们会自动创造出属于自我的恐惧模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The portions of the psyche reflect and create the portions of the universe from its most minute to its greatest part. You identify with one small section of your psyche, and so you name as reality only one small aspect of the universe.
quotes.translation: 心灵的部分反映并创造了宇宙从最微小到最宏大的部分。你认同于自己心灵的一小部分，因此你只将宇宙的一个小方面命名为实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

quotes.text: In a manner of speaking (underlined), the physical universe is "transposed" upon another reality that must be its source. The world was and is created in dimensions outside of time, and outside of space as you understand it (intently).
quotes.translation: 可以说（着重强调），物质宇宙是"转置"于另一个必定是其源头的实相之上的。世界过去和现在都是在时间之外、在你所理解的空间之外（专注地）的维度中创造的。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: At any given point, the ego is as complete within electrical reality as it is psychologically complete within the physical universe. This includes of course the retention of its dreams, as well as the retention of purely physical data.
quotes.translation: 在任何给定点上，自我在电性实相中的完整性，如同它在物质宇宙中心理上的完整性一样。这当然包括对其梦境的保留，以及对纯粹物质数据的保留。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The episode did involve projection, mainly through intensities. These intensities you interpret as time and space. Now in a different kind of projection, you could face for example the girl's thought forms as a pseudo physical reality.
quotes.translation: 该事件确实涉及投射，主要通过强度进行。这些强度你诠释为时间和空间。现在，在另一种投射中，你可能会面对例如那女孩的思想形态，作为一种伪物理实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Whenever you are attached in any way, whenever consciousness is attached to a physical organism, then inner data will be interpreted in physical terms. You can indeed learn to perceive reality in other terms, and you are both doing so.
quotes.translation: 每当你在任何方面有所依附，每当意识依附于一个物理有机体时，内在资料就会被以物理术语诠释。你确实可以学会以其他方式感知实相，而你们两人都在这样做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It is very possible that physics rather than psychology will give the first hint that human personality is multidimensional and that the inner reality of the mind far surpasses the physical universe that it attempts to probe. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 很可能物理学而非心理学将首先暗示人类人格是多维度的，并且心灵的内在实相远超越它试图探索的物理宇宙。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The Nature of the Psyche. Seth reveals a startling new concept of self, answering questions about the inner reality that exists apart from time, the origins and powers of dreams, human sexuality, and how we choose our physical death.
quotes.translation: 《心灵的本质》。赛斯揭示了一个惊人的自我新概念，回答了关于独立于时间而存在的内在实相、梦的起源与力量、人类性欲，以及我们如何选择物理死亡的问题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now: Myths are natural phenomena, rising from the psyche of man as surely as giant mountain ranges emerge from the physical planet. Their deeper reality exists, however, in Framework 2 as source material for the world that you know.
quotes.translation: 现在：神话是自然现象，从人类的心灵中升起，正如巨大的山脉从物理星球上隆起一样。然而，它们更深层的实相存在于框架二中，作为你所知世界的源材料。

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The mind constructs into matter its own idea of reality, and this is where personal expectation comes into play. You do not only create your own environment, generally speaking, you create it concretely, in forms of mass and matter.
quotes.translation: 心灵将自身对实相的观念构建成物质，而这就是个人期望发挥作用之处。一般来说，你不仅创造自己的环境，而且具体地以质量和物质的形式创造它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

source_raw.title: （Jane's Jan. 10/64 trance is described in Session 14, Vol. 1.）

quotes.text: This portion is conscious, aware, alert. It is you, so focused in physical reality, who do not listen to its voice, who do not understand that it is the great psychological strength from which your physically oriented self springs.
quotes.translation: 这个部分是清醒、警觉、有意识的。它就是那个你——那个如此专注于物质实相、却听不见它声音、不明白它是你物质导向自我所源出的伟大心理力量的你。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Such a remark may appear so simple that it is not worth saying, but it is extremely important that it be understood. In like manner, there is indeed no particular boundary or line of demarcation between the dream universe and the physical universe. Any seeming barrier is artificial, for all these realities merge one into the other, and an action in one affects the other.
quotes.translation: 这样的说法可能看似简单到不值一提，但理解它却极为重要。同样地，梦境宇宙与物质宇宙之间确实没有特定的界限或分界线。任何看似存在的屏障都是人为的，因为所有这些实相都彼此交融，一个实相中的行动会影响另一个实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (Pause.) Such a change in your waking and sleeping patterns very nicely helps cut through your habitual ways of looking at the nature of your own personal world, and so alters your conception of reality in general.
quotes.translation: 现在：口授。（停顿。）你清醒与睡眠模式的这种改变，能很好地帮助你打破审视个人世界本质的惯性方式，从而整体上改变你对实相的概念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dictation: There are vast distances of a psychological and psychic nature separating my reality from your own. To some degree Ruburt's mind is the connective between us. As I speak in sessions, therefore, I am not entirely myself.
quotes.translation: 口授：我的实相与你们的实相之间，存在着心理与心灵层面的广阔距离。在某种程度上，鲁柏的心智是我们之间的连接桥梁。因此，当我在课中发言时，我并非完全是我自己。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This does not mean that either of you need travel about in a constant flurry of lectures. It does mean that the psychic activity within the sessions carries its own psychic reality. It reaches out and draws others to you. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 这并不意味着你们两人需要四处奔波、不断举办讲座。这确实意味着课内的心灵活动携带着它自身的心灵实相。它会向外延伸，将其他人吸引到你们身边。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: "2. Each reality is surrounded by its probabilities, but this is obviously relative ...

quotes.text: In certain terms it is the connection, the symbol, between the two probability systems, for Mr. Markle's house also has a shared drive. Ruburt and Joseph live in double apartments, in a large old mansion redone into such quarters. The driveway is shared with a very wealthy family next door, in which the same size house is a home to one family. Joseph's mother wanted Joseph to be very wealthy. The drive symbolically connects the two realities, and is a point where the two merge.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来说，这是两个概率系统之间的连接点与象征——因为马克尔先生的房子也共享车道。鲁柏和约瑟住在双层公寓里，那是一座改建为这种格局的大型古老宅邸。车道与隔壁极为富裕的家庭共享，而同样大小的房子在那户人家只住着一家人。约瑟夫的母亲希望约瑟夫非常富有。这条车道象征性地连接着两个实相，也是两者交汇的节点。

quotes.text: The sculptor's creation is pragmatically realistic, in that it exists as an object, and can be quite legitimately perceived, as can your world. quotes.translation: 对立的效果因此源于感知的缺失。既然你必须在所感知的世界中运作，那么对立面就会表现为存在的条件。然而，这些元素被分离出来是有特定原因的。你正在被教导，并且也在教导自己处理能量，成为与一切万有共同创造的有意识合作者，而“发展阶段”或学习过程之一包括将对立面视为现实。

In dreams the self looks elsewhere, and the "I" is a conscious "I", and the working ability is tremendous. The inner self perceives realities that it observes in many directions, being free from the intense focus within limited directions of camouflage existence.
quotes.translation: 自我以这种方式环顾四周。自我所看的方向并非自我本身。在梦中，自我看向别处，而“我”是一个有意识的“我”，运作能力极为强大。内在自我感知到它在许多方向观察到的实相，摆脱了对伪装存在有限方向的强烈聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This is not, incidentally, necessarily any kind of somber endeavor, nor are the after-death environments somber at all. To the contrary, they are generally far more intense and joyful than the reality you now know.
quotes.translation: 顺便一提，这未必是任何阴郁的努力，死后环境也绝非阴郁。恰恰相反，它们通常比你们现在所知的实相更加热烈与喜悦。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are many ways in which my reality is made known here. There are--
quotes.translation: 我的实相在此以许多方式被知晓。存在——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Your physical senses, again, act almost like a biological alphabet, allowing you to organize and perceive certain kinds of information from which you form the events of your world and the contours of your reality.
quotes.translation: 你的肉体感官再次像一套生物字母表，让你能组织并感知特定种类的信息，由此构建出你世界的事件和你现实的面貌。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The whole personality has for a long time been waiting in another system of reality. There is no law that says that a personality must fully materialize within a given system, though it is usually wiser to do so.
quotes.translation: 整个人格早已在另一个现实系统中等待。没有法则规定人格必须在某个特定系统中完全物质化，尽管这样做通常更为明智。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: It is electrical energy. Quasars are distributed, so to speak, throughout all realities--throughout all universes, in other words. They do not conform to the camouflage patterns within any system outside of their own. They are not suns, planets, galaxies or universes in those terms.
quotes.translation: 它是电能。可以说，类星体分布于所有现实——换言之，遍布所有宇宙。它们不遵循自身系统之外的任何伪装模式。就那些术语而言，它们不是恒星、行星、星系或宇宙。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It would be most difficult to operate within your sphere of reality without the pretension of concrete, finished events. You form your past lives now in this life as surely as you form your future ones now also.
quotes.translation: 若没有具体、完成的事件的伪装，在你的现实领域内运作将极为困难。你在此生中塑造你的过去世，正如你在此生中也塑造你的未来世一样确定。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (First, after holding session 805 we took a six-week break from sessions of any kind. We didn't plan to do this; it just developed, and we eventually realized that it did so through Jane's simple need for a change in routine. We had plenty of other things to do: I was still occupied daily with writing notes and appendixes for Volume 2 of "Unknown" Reality; on June 4 Jane received the page proofs for Cézanne, and began correcting them for the printer; on the 14th of the month "our" contractor began converting half of our garage into a writing room for Jane, and adding a large back porch [see the end of Note 2 for Session 801]. All of that building activity was much noisier and more disruptive than the work had been for the front porch, and forced some changes in our schedules, including more night work, as we manipulated around those distractions.
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: The inner senses try desperately to make their knowledge plain to the individual. It is communicated through what you call hunch or intuition. It represents actual knowledge of a definite and inerasable reality.
quotes.translation: 内在感官拼命试图让个体明白它们的知识。这通过你所谓的预感或直觉来传达。它代表了对一种明确且不可抹灭的现实的真实认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Our material will flow clearly now along those lines that are most important. To me this means that I am able to deliver to you information concerning the nature of reality which you can then pass on, and apply.
quotes.translation: 我们的资料现在将沿着最重要的脉络清晰流动。对我而言，这意味着我能够向你传递关于现实本质的信息，而你可以将其传递并应用。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The idea has an energy potential based upon the innate energy potential of its creator. You are dealing now with what may be thought of as energy envelopes, and this is a most valid description of all realities. Continued experience in conceiving ideas and manipulating them and transforming them actually adds to the available energy of the individual.
quotes.translation: 这个观念具有基于其创造者内在能量潜能的能量势能。你现在处理的是可被视为能量包膜的东西，这是对所有实相最有效的描述。持续体验构想、操控并转化观念，实际上会增加个体可用的能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: In greater terms you are a part of the same "set," and at another level someone sees you as a character in a living room turning on a television set. Intrinsically the psyche, the private psyche, contains all such programs and realities. Certain portions of it, however, choose to take different focuses in order to bring those aspects in more clearly.
quotes.translation: 从更宏观的角度来看，你是同一"集合"的一部分，而在另一个层面，有人将你视为客厅里打开电视机的角色。内在而言，心灵——私密的心灵——包含了所有这类节目和实相。然而，它的某些部分选择采取不同的焦点，以便更清晰地凸显那些面向。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 711
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: A clear, uncluttered, bright, and powerful consciousness needs frequent rest periods if its efficiency is to be maintained, and if it is to correctly interpret reality. Otherwise it distorts what is perceived.
quotes.translation: 一个清晰、无杂念、明亮而强大的意识需要频繁的休息期，以维持其效率并正确诠释实相。否则它会扭曲所感知到的事物。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. I will continue. Man will not learn the basic nature of reality by studying the physical universe alone, nor will he learn it by studying the personality as it operates within the physical universe alone.
quotes.translation: 现在。我将继续。人类无法仅通过研究物质宇宙来了解实相的基本本质，也无法仅通过研究在物质宇宙中运作的人格来了解它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Such experience then convinces you more thoroughly of the reality you perceive until a vicious circle is formed, in which all events mirror beliefs so perfectly that no leeway seems to appear between the two.
quotes.translation: 这类经验随后会更彻底地让你相信你所感知的实相，直到形成一个恶性循环，其中所有事件都如此完美地反映信念，以至于两者之间似乎毫无余地。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: I am not telling you to inhibit thoughts or feelings. I am asking that you become aware of those you have. Realize that they form your reality. Concentrate upon those that give you the results that you want.
quotes.translation: 我不是要你抑制思想或感受。我是要你觉察你所拥有的那些。认识到它们形成了你的实相。专注于那些能带给你想要结果的思想和感受。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Christ meant, "You form your own reality. Those who think thoughts of peace will find themselves safe from war and dissension. They will be untouched by it. They will escape, and indeed inherit the earth."
quotes.translation: 基督的意思是："你创造自己的实相。那些心怀和平之念的人，将发现自己免于战争与纷争。他们不会受其影响，反而能避开它，并确实继承大地。"
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is natural of course that you interpret projections from other realities into your own, according to the laws and limitations that seem to apply to your own system. You cannot however understand much concerning even the basic structure of your own universe unless you make some attempt, at least in imagination, to project yourselves beyond it.
quotes.translation: 当然，你自然会根据似乎适用于你自己系统的法则和限制，来解释来自其他实相投射到你系统中的信息。然而，除非你至少尝试在想象中将自己投射到自身系统之外，否则你甚至无法理解自己宇宙的基本结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In your terms, if you believe that you chose illness to compensate for a past-life deficiency, then it will help you to realize that you form your reality now in your present, and can therefore change it.
quotes.translation: 用你们的话来说，如果你相信你选择疾病是为了补偿前世的缺失，那么这将帮助你认识到：你在当下此刻创造自己的实相，因此能够改变它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your dreaming experience, however, gives you a guideline that will help you understand the nature of your own psyche, and the deeper reality in which it has its being. Again: The dreaming psyche is awake.
quotes.translation: 然而，你的梦境体验会给你一个指引，帮助你理解自己心灵的本质，以及它赖以存在的更深层实相。再次强调：做梦的心灵是清醒的。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (Session 757 was devoted to other matters that Jane and I were interested in.)

quotes.text: It is well known that emotions have a chemical reality, but it is not generally realized that dreams also have the same sort of property. Telepathy is indeed affected by chemical reactions, as dreams are.
quotes.translation: 众所周知，情绪具有化学实相，但人们通常没有认识到，梦境也具有同样的属性。正如梦境一样，心电感应确实受到化学反应的影响。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There are systems of probability not connected with your own system at all, much more advanced than any you presently imagine, and in these, the truths of which I have been speaking are well known. In them individuals creatively and purposely create realities, knowing how to do so and giving full rein to the creative abilities of consciousness.
quotes.translation: 存在着与你们系统完全无关的概率系统，它们远比你们目前想象的任何系统都要先进，在这些系统中，我一直在谈论的真理是众所周知的。在这些系统中，个体创造性地、有目的地创造实相，知道如何做到这一点，并充分释放意识的创造能力。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: If it were scientifically inclined, the body would know that such spontaneous performance was impossible, for science cannot explain the reality of life itself in its present form, much less its origins.
quotes.translation: 若身体具有科学倾向，它便会明白这种自发性表现是不可能的，因为科学无法解释生命本身在现有形态下的实相，更遑论其起源。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The desire for discovery, and the ability to create are strong in all of you, and also in others who will come here. In various ways you have struggled with psychic realities; and Mark and Roarck are also involved with practical considerations involving women, as earlier Ruburt was involved with her Walter, and you, Joseph, were also involved.
quotes.translation: 你们所有人心中都涌动着强烈的探索欲望与创造能力，那些即将到来的人们亦然。你们以各种方式与心灵实相搏斗；而马克与罗阿克也正涉足涉及女性的现实考量，正如早前鲁柏与她的华特，以及你约瑟夫也曾深陷其中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Your seasons, and the physical nature of your universe, is that part of action which is instantly renewing, and which automatically lets even ego feel its relation to that reality of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 你们的季节，以及宇宙的物质本质，是行动中不断自我更新的部分，它自动让自我也能感知自身与那实相——它本是其中一部分——的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is only because you believe that physical existence is the only valid one, that it does not occur to you to look for other realities. Such things as telepathy and clairvoyance can give you hints of other kinds of perception, but you are also involved in quite definite experiences both while you are normally waking and while you are asleep.
quotes.translation: 只因你们相信物质存在是唯一有效的实相，才未曾想到去探寻其他实相。诸如心电感应与千里眼这类现象，能给予你们其他感知方式的暗示，但你们在正常清醒时与睡眠中，也都经历着相当明确的体验。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: All portions of All That Is do not recognize themselves consciously as All That Is. But know themselves mainly as individuals, not as the prime gestalt individual. When realization is reached at the highest level, then All That Is instantly creates new realities, and to some extent, you see, loses the conscious knowledge of its own identity.
quotes.translation: 一切万有的所有部分，并非都自觉认知自身为一切万有。它们主要认知自身为个体，而非原初完形个体。当在最高层次达到觉悟时，一切万有便会立即创造新的实相，并在某种程度上，如你所见，失去对自身身份的自觉认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: All of this is fine theory, esoteric but hardly practical -- unless you begin to question the nature of your own thoughts, and begin to explore the reality of those events that you seem to encounter.5
quotes.translation: 这一切都是精妙的理论，深奥却难以实用——除非你开始质疑自身思想的本质，并开始探索那些看似遭遇的事件之实相。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 729
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You can often get carried away by a television drama, so that for a moment you forget that it is "not real," and in your concentration upon it you can momentarily ignore the greater reality about you.
quotes.translation: 你常会被电视剧情节深深吸引，以至于暂时忘记它"并非真实"，在专注观看时，你可能会短暂忽略周遭更宏大的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Your new friend can be called Mareth, Ma-re-th, which is the name most suitable for his entity. You realize that such names are translations, as indeed all of this material is a translation of realities into conceptual patterns, and from conceptual patterns into words. It is with the words, of course, that necessary distortions must occur.
quotes.translation: 你的新朋友可以称为马雷斯（Ma-re-th），这是最符合其存有的名字。你应当明白，这类名称本身就是翻译——正如所有这类资料，都是将实相转化为概念模式，再从概念模式转化为文字。当然，在文字转化过程中必然会产生必要的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The solutions lie in the conscious mind -- I cannot emphasize this too strongly -- and in those beliefs that you accept about the nature of reality and, specifically, about the nature of your being.
quotes.translation: 解决方案在于意识心——这点我再三强调——以及你接受的关于实相本质的信念，特别是关于你自身存在的本质。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, before we plunge into the nature and characteristics of dream reality, let us briefly consider the relationship between emotions, space, and distance as they occur within the waking conditions.
quotes.translation: 现在，在我们深入探讨梦实相的本质与特性之前，先简要审视清醒状态下情绪、空间与距离之间的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: As the present life of any individual rises from hidden dimensions beyond those easily accessible in physical terms, and as it draws its energy and power to act from unconscious sources, so does the present physical universe as you know it rise from other dimensions. So does it have its source, and derive its energy from deeper realities.
quotes.translation: 正如任何个体的今生都源自物质层面难以触及的隐藏维度，并从无意识源头汲取行动的能量与力量；同样，你所知的当前物质宇宙也源自其他维度，它从更深层的实相中获得源头与能量。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The idea, then, is not to annihilate normal consciousness, but quite literally to expand it by bringing into its focus other levels of reality that it can indeed intrinsically perceive and utilize.
quotes.translation: 因此，目标并非消灭正常意识，而是通过将其他层次的实相纳入其焦点——这些实相本就是意识心内在能够感知并运用的——来真正扩展意识。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: There are perspectives of reality which you yet do not understand. You should understand clearly the ways in which you create these physical images, for they need not imprison you as they often do.
quotes.translation: 你们尚未理解的实相视角确实存在。你们应当清楚了解自己创造这些物质影像的方式，因为它们本不必像常发生的那样囚禁你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Though they probe their own universe, they will not wander into your reality. They will only perceive the shape and form that your own mental acts, thoughts and dreams take within their own system.
quotes.translation: 尽管他们探索自己的宇宙，却不会闯入你们的实相。他们只会感知到你们的心智行为、思想和梦境在自身系统内所呈现的形态与样式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The self that you know is but one fragment of your entire identity. These fragment selves are not strung together, however, like beads of a string. They are more like the various skins of an onion, or segments of an orange, all connected through the one vitality and growing out into various realities while springing from the same source.
quotes.translation: 你所认知的自我，不过是你完整身份的一个片段。然而这些片段自我并非像珠子般串在线上。它们更像洋葱的层层外皮，或橙子的瓣瓣果肉，皆由同一生命力相连，从同一源头萌发，延伸至不同的实相领域。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Fanaticism abounds, of course, because the human tendencies and experiences that have been denied by the mainline society erupt with explosive force, where the tendencies themselves must be accepted as characteristics of human experience. Iran is an example for the world, in explosive capsule form, complete with historical background and a modern political one. Modern psychology does not have a concept of the self to begin to explain such realities.
quotes.translation: 狂热主义自然盛行，因为被主流社会否认的人类倾向与经验会以爆炸性力量迸发，这些倾向本身必须被接纳为人类经验的特性。伊朗正是以浓缩胶囊形式呈现给世界的例证，兼具历史背景与现代政治脉络。现代心理学尚未拥有足以解释这类实相的自我概念。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: For much more Seth material on the counterpart concept, see Session 732 and Appendix 25 in Volume II of The "Unknown" Reality (Published by Amber-Allen Publishing, Inc., San Rafael, CA).

quotes.text: To do this, I hope to explore a more meaningful concept of evolution1--and that concept must involve a discussion of subjective reality and its effect upon the "evolution" of man's consciousness.
quotes.translation: 为此，我希望探索一个更具意义的进化概念——这个概念必须涉及对主观实相的讨论，以及它对人类意识"进化"的影响。

quotes.text: You do retain coded memory of these. The thoughts themselves, also psychic realities, were projected outward, changing and affecting the physical environment in direct and objective terms. They acted independently of you after their projection. Nevertheless they changed your (underlined) environment. Indeed, they form the environment.
quotes.translation: 你确实保留着对这些事物的编码记忆。这些思想本身，作为心灵实相，被投射向外，以直接而客观的方式改变并影响物质环境。它们在投射后独立于你而运作。然而，它们改变了你的（下划线强调）环境。事实上，它们构成了环境。

quotes.text: The realities, of course, exist whether or not you perceive them. Actually "time," in quotes, exists as the pulses leap the nerve ends. It is not a simultaneous procedure. You must then experience lapses. Past, present and future appear highly convincing and logical when there must be a lapse of time between each perceived experience.
quotes.translation: 当然，无论你是否感知到它们，这些实相都存在。实际上，带引号的“时间”存在于脉冲跃过神经末梢之时。它并非一个同步的过程。因此你必须经历时间间隔。当每个被感知的经验之间必须存在时间间隔时，过去、现在和未来显得极具说服力且合乎逻辑。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Action can never be considered apart from that which is seemingly acted upon, for action becomes a part of structure. Action begins from within, and is a result of inner vitality inherent within all realities. Some action is always present. Action itself is not a thing alone. It is not an identity. Action is a dimension of existence.
quotes.translation: 行动绝不能与被作用的对象分开考量，因为行动会变成结构的一部分。行动始于内在，是所有实相内在生命力的结果。行动始终存在。行动本身并非孤立之物，亦非某种身份认同。行动是存在的一个维度。

quotes.text: We are speaking of course here of the ordinary physical environment. The chemical, biological, electrical and psychic functions of the self are directly connected to the physical universe as a whole. Theoretically the influence of a particular given self is endless, and not only in so far as your own physical camouflage time universe is concerned. The influence of any given self reaches also into realities that are not bounded by space and time.
quotes.translation: 我们在此当然指的是普通物质环境。自我的化学、生物、电性与灵性功能直接与整个物质宇宙相连。理论上，特定自我的影响是无穷尽的，且不仅限于你们自身的物质伪装时间宇宙。任何特定自我的影响也延伸至不受时空限制的实相。

quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The inner senses will allow you to perceive the reality that is independent of physical form. I will ask you all to momentarily forsake your roles therefore, and to try this simple exercise.
quotes.translation: 内在感官将让你感知独立于物质形态的实相。因此，我请你们所有人暂时放下你们的角色，尝试这个简单的练习。

quotes.text: The patterns I have suggested, therefore, will bring you far closer to an understanding of the reality of your being, and help you break down beliefs that cause personal and social division.
quotes.translation: 因此，我所建议的模式将使你们更接近对自身存在实相的理解，并帮助你们打破导致个人与社会分裂的信念。

quotes.text: As you dig deeper into yourself you will find hints of other realities. Yours is not the only system that exists within what you would call the same space as the physical universe. You simply do not perceive these other systems. It is not space or time that divides one system from another. Habits of perception divide them however.
quotes.translation: 当你深入探索自我时，会发现其他实相存在的线索。你所处的系统并非唯一存在于你们所谓物理宇宙同一空间内的系统。你只是没有感知到这些其他系统。分隔不同系统的并非空间或时间，而是感知习惯。

quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Each person chooses for himself the individual patterns within which he will create this personal reality. But inside these bounds are infinite varieties of actions and unlimited resources.
quotes.translation: 每个人为自己选择创造个人实相所依据的特定模式。但在这些界限之内，存在着无限多样的行动与无穷的资源。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The truth as far as it can be stated is this: YOU FORM YOUR REALITY NOW, in capital letters, through the intersection of soul in flesh, and in your terms the present is your point of power.
quotes.translation: 真理若能用语言表述，便是：你正在当下创造你的实相——请用大写字母铭记——通过灵魂与肉身的交会，而用你们的话说，当下就是你的力量焦点。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This, temporarily, is something like what happened to you, Joseph. The inner self is aware of other realities. It is aware of the ego. Remember here the difference between consciousness of self and the ego, for the difference is important. The ego is but part of the self, part of the conscious self, but focused in one direction.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，这暂时与你曾经历的情况类似。内在自我知晓其他现实，也知晓自我。请记住自我意识与自我之间的区别，因为这种区别至关重要。自我只是自我的一部分，是意识自我的一部分，但只聚焦于一个方向。

quotes.text: "There is much material here that I will give you, because it is important that you understand the different ways of relating to reality, and how those ways create the experienced events.

quotes.text: (With emphasis:) Reincarnation simply represents probabilities in a time context (underlined) -- portions of the self that are materialized in historical contexts. Period. All kinds of time -- backward and forward -- emerge from the basic unpredictable nature of consciousness, and are due to "series" of significances. Each self born in time will then pursue its own probable realities from that standpoint. Again, each such self is immediate.

quotes.text: In dreams this relationship often is revealed. The truth behind such relationships is inherent in all God-Man, God-Woman, Animal-Man, or Animal-Woman legends and mythology. There are connections, then, between man and the animals and the so-called gods (in small letters), that hint at psychological and natural realities.
quotes.translation: 在梦境中，这种关系常被揭示。此类关系背后的真相，内在于所有神-人、神-女人、动物-人或动物-女人的传说与神话中。因此，人类与动物及所谓"神祇"（小写）之间存在关联，暗示着心理与自然的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: God himself did not create reality easily. We will get into that matter at another time (humorously emphatic), though in the past we have given you considerable information on it.
quotes.translation: 上帝本身创造实相也并非易事。我们将在另一时间深入探讨此事（幽默而强调地），尽管过去我们已就此提供过相当多的信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is necessary. I have no qualms with this, but it is possible, and in this stage of your evolution it is necessary, that the human personality learn to become flexible, to change the focus of awareness so that other realities can be perceived. There are indeed as I have said, effects that I can show you, and I will.
quotes.translation: 这是必要的。我对此并无异议，但在你们进化的现阶段，人类人格必须学会变得灵活，改变意识的焦点，以便感知其他实相。正如我所说，确实存在一些我可以向你们展示的效果，我会的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your idea of one soul, one self, forms a significance and a selectivity that blinds you to these other realities that are as much "here and now" as your present self. The units of consciousness that compose your physical being alone are aware of those greater significances, to which your limited ideas make you opaque.
quotes.translation: 你们对"一个灵魂、一个自我"的观念形成了一种意义和选择性，使你们对这些其他实相视而不见——这些实相与你们当下的自我一样"此时此地"。构成你们物质存在的意识单位本身就知晓那些更宏大的意义，而你们局限的观念使你们对其麻木不察。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 683
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: You are one conscious version of yourself, creating along with all of your contemporaries the realities of the times. When I use the term "contemporaries," I refer to all of the species. You read your consciousness in certain fashions, but it is quite possible to read the consciousness of the world in other ways also.
quotes.translation: 你是自身的一个有意识版本，与所有同时代者共同创造着时代的实相。当我使用"同时代者"一词时，我指的是所有物种。你们以特定方式解读自己的意识，但完全有可能以其他方式解读世界的意识。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-08-10-08Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_Tow - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: 4. In the Preface for Volume 1 of Dreams, see Session 881, with its Note 1. Then I suggest a review in chapters 1 and 2 of all of the material pertinent to evolution and creationism.

quotes.text: They may use other terms than Fate, of course, but the vital, personal, direct, affirmative intent to live is not there. They are headed for another reality, and ready for it.
quotes.translation: 当然，他们可能使用"命运"以外的术语，但那种充满活力、个人化、直接而肯定的生存意图并不存在。他们正朝向另一种实相，并已为此做好准备。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: In larger terms, in the predream states you are aware of all of the activities of your own greater psyche as it participates in -- and contributes to -- the infinite existence of psychic consciousness as you understand it, and becomes aware of the psychological realities that form the framework of its own stability.
quotes.translation: 从更宏大的角度来看，在梦前状态中，你们能意识到自身更大心灵的所有活动——它参与并贡献于你们所理解的心灵意识的无限存在，并觉察到构成其自身稳定框架的心理实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now. Once your consciousness is outside of the physical body, then you are dealing with a different kind of reality indeed. This is experience every bit as real as any other.
quotes.translation: 现在。一旦你们的意识脱离物质身体，你们便确实在处理一种不同的实相。这种体验与其他任何体验一样真实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: He is only recognized and his wants satisfied when he focuses in one particular reality. He learns quickly then to discard the others, for they do not meet his physical ends.
quotes.translation: 只有当他在某一特定实相中聚焦时，他才会被认出，他的需求才会被满足。于是他很快学会摒弃其他实相，因为它们无法满足他的物质目的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, if you had all been really paying attention to what I have been saying for some time about the simultaneous nature of time and existence, then you would have known that the theory of evolution is as beautiful a tale as the theory of Biblical creation. Both are quite handy, and both are methods of telling stories, and both might seem to agree within their own systems, and yet, in larger respects they cannot be realities....
quotes.translation: 现在，如果你们一直真正留意我关于时间与存在同时性本质的论述，那么你们就会明白进化论与圣经创世论同样美妙。两者都很实用，都是讲故事的方式，在各自体系内似乎自洽，但从更宏大的视角来看，它们都无法成为实相……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 705)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: As you know, camouflage elements are formed from the vital energy, which itself forms of itself all dimensions and all realities. It exists within all camouflage, since the camouflage itself is merely the form that is adopted. The inhabitants of any dimension, or whatever makeup, are still whole-self constructions.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，伪装元素由生命力构成，这生命力本身自创了所有维度与所有实相。它存在于所有伪装之中，因为伪装本身只是被采用的形式。任何维度或任何构成的居民，仍然是全我结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You will accept a suggestion given by another only if it fits in with your own ideas about the nature of reality in general, and your concepts about yourself in particular.
quotes.translation: 只有当他人给予的暗示符合你关于实相本质的一般观念，以及你关于自身的特定概念时，你才会接受它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You may finally come to a half-understanding of the nature of reality and wail, "I believe that I have caused these ill effects, but I find myself unable to reverse them."
quotes.translation: 你最终可能对实相本质获得一知半解，哀叹道："我相信这些不良后果是我造成的，但我发现自己无力扭转。"
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is indeed an example of an endeavor of the sort that is too often carried on, with energy expended in a search for a reality that is known by any nincompoop to exist.
quotes.translation: 这确实是一种常被进行的徒劳尝试——耗费能量去追寻连傻瓜都知道存在的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: We have spoken of expectations. These, you see, are electrical realities, which may explain their importance; for you not only sometimes predict so- called future events, but you create their actuality within the electrical field, and therefore insure their existence one way or another within the physical field.
quotes.translation: 我们曾谈到期待。这些期待是电性实相，这或许能解释其重要性；因为你不仅有时预测所谓的未来事件，更在电性场域中创造其真实性，从而确保它们在物质场域中以某种方式存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The source and the power of your present consciousness is not and has never been physical, and where I am many are not even aware that such a physical system exists. You have chosen your own illusion, and so you must accept it, and from its viewpoint must you try to understand the realities that exist beyond it.
quotes.translation: 你当前意识的源头与力量并非物质性，也从未是物质性的。在我所在之处，许多人甚至不知道存在这样一个物质系统。你选择了自己的幻相，因此必须接受它，并从这个视角去理解超越其外的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: There are all kinds of events traveling along the same pathways, equally used, that do not appear physically. Physically then you do not perceive them. They may be transformed and emerge as realities or events within entirely different systems, in which they are then accepted by the inhabitants as vivid events.
quotes.translation: 有各种事件沿着相同的路径行进，同样被使用，却未在物质层面显现。因此你无法在物质层面感知它们。它们可能被转化，在完全不同的系统中作为实相或事件出现，并被该系统的居民视为鲜活的事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: In The Nature of Personal Reality, Seth deals extensively with the point of power, its exercises and meanings and benefits. See especially sessions 656-57 in Chapter 15.
quotes.translation: 在《个人实相的本质》中，赛斯详细论述了力量点及其练习方法、意义与益处。特别参见第十五章第656-57节。
quotes.book: The Magical Approach
quotes.source_file: 10-09-10-09The Magical Approach_ Seth Spea - Jane Roberts.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: You may think of your soul or entity -- though only briefly and for the sake of this analogy -- as some conscious and living, divinely inspired computer who programs its own existences and lifetimes. But this computer is so highly endowed with creativity that each of the various personalities it programs spring into consciousness and song, and in turn create realities that may have been undreamed of by the computer itself.
quotes.translation: 你可以将你的灵魂或存有——仅为此比喻而短暂地——视为一个有意识、鲜活且受神启发的计算机，它编程自己的存在与生命历程。但这台计算机被赋予了如此高度的创造力，以至于它所编程的每个不同人格都迸发出意识与歌声，进而创造出连计算机本身都未曾梦想过的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt's perception is highly altered this evening, and this is an example of certain kinds of both affirmation and denial. He has always emphasized his own unique creative and intuitive processes. In so doing, he denied many of the concepts believed in by others. He accepted the belief that any consciousness could be in some kind of direct intimate contact with experiences and realities usually not perceived, but ignored.
quotes.translation: 今晚鲁柏的感知高度改变，这是某种肯定与否定并存的例子。他始终强调自己独特的创造性与直觉过程。这样做时，他否定了许多他人所相信的概念。他接受了这样的信念：任何意识都能与通常不被感知、却被忽视的经验与实相建立某种直接亲密的接触。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are no presents or pasts to these minds, only simultaneous experience, and a creativity that constantly of itself and its existence creates more. Consciousness of itself forms all of these realities and systems. It does not forget as you forget, that you form all the dimensions within your own system.
quotes.translation: 对这些心智而言，既无当下也无过去，只有同时性的体验，以及一种不断从自身及其存在中创造更多存在的创造力。意识本身构成了所有这些实相与系统。它不会像你们遗忘那样遗忘——你们自身系统内的所有维度皆由你们所造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Your astronomers may receive a ghost image/ of it at the edges of your universe, but only a reflection from a reality that you cannot perceive. Now take your break.
quotes.translation: 你们的天文学家或许会在宇宙边缘接收到它的幻影影像，但那只是你们无法感知的实相所投射的倒影。现在请休息片刻。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: We form the reality that you know. We have spoken to you since the beginning of your time. We have inspired and helped those of your prophets who have looked to us.
quotes.translation: 我们构成了你们所知的实相。自你们的时间伊始，我们便与你们对话。那些仰望我们的先知，皆曾受我们启发与协助。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The unknown reality. You have inner affiliations. What are they? I will outline the inner psychic species, and it is up to you to discover to which one you belong.
quotes.translation: 未知的实相。你们拥有内在的关联。那是什么？我将勾勒内在心灵物种的轮廓，而发现自身归属，则取决于你们。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 732
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: There are here in what you call the subconscious, abilities and realities of which you know little, and as you see how the subconscious projects itself into other dimensions, so will you see more clearly how energy is projected outward to form your own world of matter. There is much here to be explained.
quotes.translation: 在你们所谓的潜意识中，存在着你们知之甚少的能力与实相。当你们看清潜意识如何投射自身进入其他维度时，也将更清晰地看见能量如何向外投射，形成你们自身的物质世界。此处尚有许多待阐明之处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In our dream experiments therefore, this is one of the purposes that we hope to achieve. The ego is not equipped of itself to delve directly into nonphysical realities. If the ego is trained to be flexible however, it will accept such knowledge from the subconscious, and other wider horizons of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，在我们的梦境实验中，这正是我们希望达成的目标之一。自我本身并不具备直接深入非物质实相的能力。然而，若自我被训练得富有弹性，它便能从潜意识及自我更广阔的视野中接纳此类知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of this is intimately connected with your biological structure, which is meant to follow the conscious mind's interpretation of reality. Give us a moment ...
quotes.translation: 这一切都与你们的生物结构密切相关，而生物结构本应追随意识心对实相的解释。请稍等片刻……
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You would then encounter the heart of the camouflage area. The completely uncamouflaged areas at the outer edges of the various systems should remind you of the undifferentiated areas between various life cycles in the subconscious. This is no coincidence, as this general setup occurs in all realities.
quotes.translation: 接着你会触及伪装区的核心。各系统外缘那些完全未经伪装的区域，应当让你联想到潜意识中不同生命周期之间的未分化地带。这绝非巧合，因为这种基本架构存在于所有实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I told you, Joseph, that I would discuss the magnetic alterations that caused me to call a quick ending to our last session. Now as a rule these conditions occur only during this particular season. All living things exist, as you know, in other than material form. Every living thing has what you would term an astral form or vehicle. This consists of electromagnetic realities operating within specific frequencies.
quotes.translation: 约瑟，我曾说过要讨论导致我提前结束上次课的那些磁性变化。通常这类状况只出现在特定季节。如你所知，所有生命体除了物质形态外还以其他形式存在。每个生命体都有你们所谓的星光体或载具，由特定频率范围内运作的电磁实相构成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The ego can exist only within the context of these root assumptions. The primary dream experience is finally woven into a structure composed of these root assumptions, and it is these that you remember. These serve you as basic information, but the information is then put into symbolic form. Objects, you see, are symbols. These objects in dreams are symbols of realities that the ego could not otherwise perceive.
quotes.translation: 自我只能存在于这些基本假设的脉络中。主要的梦境体验最终被编织成由这些基本假设构成的结构，而你们记住的正是这些结构。它们作为基础信息为你所用，但信息随后会被转化为象征形式。要知道，物体本身就是象征。梦境中的物体是自我无法直接感知的实相之象征。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The Jonestown and Harrisburg incidents are indeed classic examples of the meeting places between private and public realities. I intend to deal with them in depth in The Individual and the Nature of Mass Events, where the background, particularly for Frameworks 1 and 2, has already been established.
quotes.translation: 琼斯镇与哈里斯堡事件确实是私人实相与公众实相交汇点的经典案例。我打算在《个人与群体事件的本质》中深入探讨它们，该书已为（尤其是）架构一与架构二建立了背景基础。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 846, APRIL 4, 1979
9:30 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Such individuals are usually beyond reach from anyone within your system. They are not beginning new reincarnations, nor resting, nor going on to new realities. They will eventually awaken to the nature of their activities, for there will be no counteraction of personalities, you see, and no growth.
quotes.translation: 这类个体通常超出你们系统内任何人的接触范围。他们既未开始新的转世，也未处于安息状态，更未前往新的实相。他们终将觉醒于自身活动的本质——因为你看，那里既无人格的反作用力，也不存在成长。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You must understand, again, that your ideas and thoughts do not exist as phantoms or shadow images without substance. They are electromagnetic realities. They affect your physical being and they are automatically translated by your nervous system into the stuff of your flesh and of your experience.
quotes.translation: 你必须再次明白，你的思想和念头并非虚无缥缈的幻影或阴影，它们具有电磁实相。它们影响你的物质存在，并由你的神经系统自动转化为你血肉之躯与经验的素材。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: But the legs do walk, and the dream universe does exist. As the entity expands and originates new personalities, and these personalities then become independent individuals, so do the individuals create dream or so-called dream realities and individuals of the dream universe, which are independent.
quotes.translation: 但双腿确实行走，梦境宇宙也确实存在。正如存有扩展并衍生出新的人格，而这些人格随后成为独立的个体，个体也创造出梦境或所谓的梦境实相，以及梦境宇宙中独立的个体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such encounters also occur during waking hours, but the ego is not aware of them. I will have some comments later in the session that may enable you to become more aware of other realities beside your own, and also some advice that will enable you to operate within your own system more effectively.
quotes.translation: 这类相遇在清醒时也会发生，但自我并未察觉。稍后在本节课中，我将提出一些评论，或许能让你更意识到自身实相之外的其他实相，同时提供一些建议，使你更有效地在自己的系统内运作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: These help form the reality of human conditions upon your planet at any given time. Those conditions are at least partially the result of such mass dreams.
quotes.translation: 这些因素在任一特定时刻共同塑造了你们星球上人类境况的实相。那些境况至少部分源于此类集体梦境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Good evening to our friend. Now, to our fine young lady: you must watch the pictures that you paint with your imagination, for you allow your imagination too full a reign. If you read our early material, you will see that your environment and the conditions of your life at any given time are the direct result of your own expectations. You form physical materiaizationls of these realities within your own mind.
quotes.translation: 晚安，我们的朋友。现在，对这位优秀的年轻女士说：你必须留意你用想象力描绘的画面，因为你让想象力过于放纵。若你阅读我们早期的资料，便会发现你的环境与任一时刻的生活境况，皆是你自身期望的直接结果。你在自己心智中形成了这些实相的物质化显现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: "Ruburt's creative nature early began to perceive at least that man's existence contained other realities that were deeper. Some of this is difficult to separate. To leave the church, say, meant to carry still some of the old beliefs, but without the bandaids that earlier offered some protection.
quotes.translation: “鲁柏的创作天性很早就开始察觉到，至少人类的存在中包含了更深层的其他实相。其中有些部分难以厘清。例如，离开教会意味着仍带着某些旧信念，却失去了早先提供些许保护的‘创可贴’。”
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: As you are not aware of many so-called realities with which your own cat is familiar, so you are completely unaware of other universes that coexist with your own. Your outer senses are equipped to perceive your own camouflage patterns. They are not equipped to deal with other camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 由于你并未意识到你的猫所熟悉的许多所谓实相，因此你完全不知道与你自己的宇宙并存的其他宇宙。你的外在感官被设计用来感知你自己的伪装模式，它们并不具备处理其他伪装模式的能力。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Now in other ways it was also utilized by your old masters. The expansiveness then was also of a spiritual nature. Whatever objects were shown in the painting automatically presupposed the existence of spiritual realities, and other universes, though these presuppositions were highly ritualistic.
quotes.translation: 现在，在另一方面，它也被你们古代的大师们所利用。那种广阔性当时也具有灵性的本质。画作中展示的任何物体都自动预设了灵性实相和其他宇宙的存在，尽管这些预设高度仪式化。

quotes.text: The sight of our imaginary automobile, therefore, is perceived by you as a visual stimulus, because you are conditioned to perceiving it in such a fashion. But it is also possible to perceive our automobile in entirely different fashions within different realities, and from various perspectives.
quotes.translation: 因此，我们想象中的汽车景象被你视为视觉刺激，因为你已被制约以这种方式感知它。但在不同实相中，从各种视角，也有可能以完全不同的方式感知我们的汽车。

quotes.text: As your ordinary waking state perceives an entire universe of physical data, so each of these other states of consciousness perceive realities as complicated, varied, and vivid. It is for this reason that it is so difficult to explain the experiences possible within any given one. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 正如你平常的清醒状态感知到一个完整的物质宇宙，其他每种意识状态也感知到同样复杂、多样且生动的实相。正因如此，要解释任何特定状态中可能获得的体验才如此困难。（长停顿。）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul

quotes.text: Your own thoughts have a reality that you do not understand, and their own kind of form, or psychic content, and this content exists not as pure energy,
quotes.translation: 你自己的思想具有一种你不理解的实相，以及它们自己的形式或心灵内涵，而这种内涵并非以纯粹能量的形式存在。

quotes.text: The inner possibilities are far more important however, and your inner development more important than any decisions having to do with your occupation. For your inner thoughts are the only realities, and from these you form your physical circumstances, including those in the occupational area.
quotes.translation: 然而，内在的可能性远比任何与职业相关的决定更为重要，你的内在发展也更为重要。因为你的内在思想才是唯一的实相，你由此形成你的物质环境，包括职业领域中的那些环境。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: You create appearances. You create outer senses to perceive the appearances, and so what you perceive through the outer senses seems logical indeed. But again, there are infinite realities, as vivid, and some indescribably more vivid than your own, but presently you are not focused upon them.
quotes.translation: 你创造表象。你创造外在感官来感知这些表象，因此你通过外在感官所感知到的确实看似合乎逻辑。但再次强调，存在着无限多的实相，它们同样生动，有些甚至比你自己的实相难以形容地更为生动，只是目前你并未聚焦于它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You are taught not to trust your subjective experience, which means that you are told not to trust your initial and primary connection with reality.
quotes.translation: 你被教导不要信任自己的主观经验，这意味着你被告知不要信任你与实相最初且主要的连接。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: Many of these planes of actuality can never be explored by any physical vehicle. They would appear as incomprehensibly vast as your single planet would appear to a single fly, who set out to examine it. Perception of its characteristics would be impossible. To you physical objects would seem so far separated in space that you would lose your way, and not perceive realities as they there existed at all.
quotes.translation: 这些实相层面中的许多永远无法通过任何物质载具来探索。它们会显得难以理解地浩瀚，就像你唯一的星球对一只试图考察它的苍蝇所显现的那样。感知其特性是不可能的。对你而言，物质物体在空间中会显得如此遥远分隔，以至于你会迷失方向，根本无法感知到存在于那里的实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Such inner therapeutics also occur however at various levels of consciousness where they may be sparked by exterior stimuli of an esthetic or pleasing nature. Other exterior conditions have also their effect. To involve oneself in large groups, for example, is beneficial often, not simply to take attention away from the self, but because a larger range of electromagnetic realities are easily available.
quotes.translation: 然而，这种内在疗愈也发生在不同层次的意识中，在那里它们可能被具有美学或愉悦性质的外在刺激所激发。其他外在条件也有其影响。例如，让自己置身于大型群体中往往是有益的，这不仅是为了将注意力从自我上移开，还因为更大范围的电磁实相更容易被获取。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Certainly for more than the hundredth time I say: "Your beliefs form your reality," and this means that your beliefs structure the events you know.
quotes.translation: 当然，我不止第一百次说：“你的信念形成你的实相，”这意味着你的信念构建了你所知道的事件。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: These psychological forms or structures have a reality and validity, composed of gestalts that exist in perspectives that you do not recognize.
quotes.translation: 这些心理形式或结构具有真实性与有效性，由存在于你尚未认知的视角中的完形所构成。

quotes.text: Instead events are built up, so to speak, from significances. But let us forget that term for a moment and consider association, with which you are already familiar, since your stream of consciousness operates in that fashion. By its very nature each consciousness is a particular, peculiar, and unique focus of awareness which will experience any possible realities through its own characteristics.
quotes.translation: 事件实则是从意义中构建而成。但暂且搁置这个术语，让我们考虑你已熟悉的联想机制——你的意识流正是以这种方式运作。每个意识本质上都是特定、独特且唯一的觉知焦点，它将通过自身特性体验所有可能的实相。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Projection can occur then in those terms or directions also. This is however much more difficult, and of a different nature entirely. The consciousness that ordinarily projects in an out-of-body experience could not practically project into one atom. The realities are too different.
quotes.translation: 投射也可以在这些层面或方向上进行。但这要困难得多，且性质完全不同。通常进行出体投射的意识，实际上无法投射进一个原子。这些实相的差异过于巨大。

quotes.text: We will go into these laws, and outline others in future sessions. You will see also how the inner senses are equipped to perceive basic inner realities of the inner universe, in much the same manner that your outer senses are equipped to manipulate within your camouflage universe.
quotes.translation: 我们将在未来课程中深入探讨这些法则，并概述其他规律。你们也将看到内在感官如何被设计来感知内在宇宙的基本实相，正如外在感官被设计来操控你们的伪装宇宙一般。

quotes.text: Now. Each thought forms its own electromagnetic reality, and is composed of energy which can never be dissipated, but only transformed.
quotes.translation: 现在：每个思想都形成其自身的电磁实相，由永不消散、只能转化的能量构成。

quotes.text: Also, your actions now can affect the future personality as well as the past one. You must try to stretch your imagination and feel these realities, because the intellect alone cannot comprehend them. Psychological time is your best method for perceiving these actualities.
quotes.translation: 此外，你们当下的行为既能影响未来人格，也能影响过去人格。你们必须尝试拓展想象力去感受这些实相，因为仅凭理智无法理解它们。心理时间是感知这些实相的最佳方法。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The realities are formed by psychic intent, and the true cohesiveness is intuitive. The deep connections that occur, for example in various reincarnations, are not apparent to the ego. The connections between us, now, are far more logical than any simple cause and effect.
quotes.translation: 实相由心灵意图所形成，真正的凝聚力是直觉性的。例如，在不同转世中发生的深层联系，对自我而言并不明显。我们之间此刻的关联，远比任何简单的因果关系更具逻辑性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: --because you will understand that fearful expectations greatly color your perception of reality, and your construction of it.
quotes.translation: ——因为你会明白，恐惧的期待会极大地扭曲你对实相的感知，以及你对它的构建。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text: I have mentioned that any action has an electromagnetic reality, and so thoughts and dreams as well form this identity system.
quotes.translation: 我曾提到，任何行动都具有电磁实相，因此思想和梦境也同样构成了这个身份系统。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The next brief chapter will be devoted to methods that will allow you to take advantage of greater options, to bring into your daily experience events and experiences that have so far remained "latent." In each individual case the options will be different, of course, yet you can draw into your present life some knowledge and intimate connection with your own probable realities.
quotes.translation: 下一章将专门探讨一些方法，让你能善用更多可能性，将至今仍"潜伏"的事件与体验带入日常经验。当然，每个人的可能性各不相同，但你仍能将关于自身可能实相的知识与亲密联系，引入当下的生活。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: One small note: In some respects these pulsations represent what happens in some of your flying saucer incidents, for you do not have a vehicle such as the one you think you perceive. I am speaking of only certain cases, where you have visitors from other realities.
quotes.translation: 一个小提示：在某些方面，这些脉动代表了你们某些飞碟事件中的情形——因为你们并没有像自己以为所感知到的那种飞行器。我仅指某些特定案例，即你们有来自其他实相的访客时。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It is both the creative and aggressive aspects of consciousness that allow it to use symbols, to move through various levels of experience, and the aggressive nature of thought that so propels it, despite your knowledge, into realities that you do not understand.
quotes.translation: 正是意识中创造性与攻击性的双重面向，使其能运用符号、穿越不同经验层次；而思想的攻击性本质，即便在你有所认知的情况下，仍会将其推向你尚未理解的实相。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Now anything that appears in physical terms also exists in other terms that you do not perceive. You only perceive realities when they achieve a certain "pitch," when they seem to coalesce into matter. But they actually exist, and quite validly at other levels.
quotes.translation: 任何以物质形式显现的事物，也以其他你无法感知的形式存在。你只有在这些现实达到某种"强度"、似乎凝聚成物质时才能感知到它们。但它们确实存在，并且在其他层面同样真实有效。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Men are not islands, even unto themselves. They merely perceive islands, or they perceive bits of realities. The dream correlates the various manifestations of the self with the whole portion. Dreams bring intuitive knowledge of the whole self to its own parts.
quotes.translation: 人并非孤岛，即使对他们自身而言也是如此。他们只是感知到岛屿，或者说感知到现实的片段。梦境将自我的各种显现与整体部分相关联。梦境将整体自我的直觉知识传递给其各个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: To a large extent you create what you see or perceive. This does not mean you are the creator in that respect. There are many realities of whose existence you are ignorant, but they nevertheless exist. Now you may end the session or take a break as you prefer.
quotes.translation: 在很大程度上，你创造你所看见或感知到的事物。但这并不意味着你在那个方面是造物主。有许多现实的存在你一无所知，但它们确实存在。现在你可以选择结束课程或休息一下。

quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: More generally however, and quite simply, such projections allow you to practice in dealing with realities that you will meet when you no longer operate within the physical system. The conditions then will not frighten you, for you will be familiar with them.
quotes.translation: 但更普遍且简单地说，这样的投射让你得以练习处理那些当你不再运作于物质系统时将会遇到的现实。届时这些状况不会令你恐惧，因为你已对它们熟悉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Again, there are many others like us. We attempt to translate realities into terms that you can comprehend. We change our face and form but we are always the one. We are therefore always a part of the one entity which is the Seth entity. (Long pause at 9:30.)
quotes.translation: 再说一次，有许多像我们这样的存在。我们试图将现实转化为你能理解的术语。我们改变面貌与形态，但我们始终是同一个。因此我们始终是赛斯本体这个单一实体的一部分。（9:30处长时间停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: Identity could be called a strong organizing characteristic that perceives impressions in definite ordered form. As identity is strengthened through experience then it automatically expands itself to add further realities which it is now able to manipulate.
quotes.translation: 身份可被称为一种强大的组织特性，它以明确的秩序形式感知印象。当身份通过经验得到强化时，它便会自动扩展自身，以接纳它现在能够操控的更多现实。
